老头对我也挺好的。我知道他怕我没个傍身的手艺，将来在这贝洛伯格吃不开，这才把调度矿车的活计传给我了。
The old man has been very good to me. I know he's worried that I wouldn't be able to make a good living in Belobog without the right skills. I guess that's why he decided to pass his skills to me.
不过你也看到了，师傅他还精神得很，完全没必要现在退休。他虽然口口声声说自己老了，但我觉得他还能再干上个二十来年……

But as you can see, my master is still going strong. There's absolutely no need for him to retire now. Although he claims to be old, I think he can still work for another <unbreak>20</unbreak> years or so...
矿车工平时都负责些什么？
What does a mine cart operator usually do?
师傅说，矿车工是矿山的血液，是咱保证了地髓能够源源不断从矿道深处运送出来。
My master said the mining cart operator is the lifeblood of the mine. The operator ensures the Geomarrow can be transported continuously from the depths of the mine.
只有通过我们铺设的轨道，地髓才能被送达它应该前往的地点。
Geomarrow can only be delivered to the place it's supposed to go through the tracks we lay.
也许这份工作对矿区来说真的很重要，但是…唉，可我不想一辈子被圈在这矿区里啊。
This job may be essential to the mines... but... *sigh*, I don't want to be stuck in these mines for the rest of my life.
That's all the questions I have.
你说说你，我这都给你讲了几遍了！怎么就学不会呢？
How many times do I have to tell you? What is it you don't get?
哎，这不是…太难了嘛，嘿嘿。
*sigh* This is just... too hard. Hehe.
嗯？你来得挺早嘛。不过我还在想新的谜题，你之后再过来看看吧。
Hmm? You're early. I'm still working on a new puzzle, so you'll have to come back later.
I still have some more questions...
你怎么收到这个徒弟的？
How did you meet your current apprentice?
嗯？你问这小子啊…这说来话长了，这小子可怜得很哪。
Hmm? You mean the kid... Well, that's a long story. He's had a pretty tough life so far.
他爹本来和我一起在矿里做工，后来跟那群流浪者去裂界里拾荒碰运气…结果人再没回来过。
His father was working with me in the mines before. But he decided to try his luck scavenging in the Fragmentum with a group of vagrants... He never came back.
我看他无依无靠的，就想着把我这铺铁轨的手艺传给他。他也好靠自己讨个饭吃。
I saw he had no one to rely on, so I thought to pass on my track-laying skills to him. With those skills, he can make a living for himself.
你在这片矿区做了很久吗？
Have you been working in these mines for a long time?
那可不！我跟着这矿队走南闯北好多年咯。这片矿区开辟出来也就不到小二十年的事，不过具体啥时候发现的我是记不得了。
That's right! I've been with this mining team for many years. I can't remember exactly how long, but this mine has been operating for nearly twenty years now.
你看到矿区中央那片大矿脉没？壮观吧！之前做勘测的蠢货怎么就没早点发现，没想到最值钱的玩意居然灯下黑啊……
Do you see that big vein in the middle of the mine? Absolutely stunning! Why didn't those useless surveyors find it earlier! To think that the most valuable prize was hiding in plain sight...
That's all the questions I have.
…哦，是你啊。师傅还在准备新题目呢，我稍微偷会儿懒……
... Oh, it's you. My master is still preparing his new puzzle, so I'm taking the chance to relax for a while...
I still have some more questions...
你为什么会来做矿车工？
What drove you to become a mine cart operator?
我爹妈都走得早嘛。生活所迫，加上师傅以前是我爹的朋友，我就被那老头子收养咯。
Well, I guess, life happens. You see, my parents... they died a long time ago. My master, who was a friend of my father, adopted me.
老头对我也挺好的。我知道他怕我没个傍身的手艺，将来在这贝洛伯格吃不开，这才把调度矿车的活计传给我了。
The old man has been very good to me. I know he's worried that I wouldn't be able to make a good living in Belobog without the right skills. I guess that's why he decided to pass his skills to me.
可我就是忍不住偷懒…这也没什么吧？我还年轻，有的是时间……
But I just can't help being lazy... I mean, that's okay, right? I'm still young, so I still have plenty of time...
矿车工平时都负责些什么？
What does a mine cart operator usually do?
师傅说，矿车工是矿山的血液，是咱保证了地髓能够源源不断从矿道深处运输出来。
My master said that the mine cart operator is the lifeblood of the mine. The operator ensures the Geomarrow can be continuously transported out of the depths of the mine.
只有通过我们铺设的轨道，地髓才能被送达它应该前往的地点。
Geomarrow can only be delivered to the place it's supposed to go through the tracks we lay.
听着很光鲜，但…其实我还是想干点大事。我可不想一辈子被圈在这矿区里。
I mean it sounds pretty important... But still I want to do something much bigger in life. I don't want to be trapped in these mines forever.
算了，想这么多也没用…我暂时留在这儿，就当是为了报答师傅的养育之恩吧，这样我心里多少舒服点。
Forget it. I guess there's no point thinking so far ahead... I have to stay here for the time being to repay the debt of kindness I owe to my master. If I think like this, I feel more at ease.
That's all the questions I have.
嗯？好久不见啊！你最近怎么样？我现在一人在这大矿区负责调度矿车呢。
Oh? Long time no see! How have you been? I'm now responsible for dispatching mine carts in the Great Mine by myself.
师傅倒好，在家歇得舒服…我什么时候也能退休？
My master's doing well. He's relaxing at home... When can I retire too?
给你的报酬就在那边，快清点一下吧。
Your reward is over there. Go take a look.
师傅给你准备了报酬，就在那边。这是你应得的。
The master has a reward for you. It's over there. You've earned it.
师傅他好像准备了新的谜题。有兴趣的话就去问问他吧。
The master has a new puzzle. Go ask him about it if you're interested.
操作控制器、换轨道、前进…再操作控制器、然后倒车……
Operate the controller, change the track, move forward, operate the controller again, and then reverse...
哎哟，麻烦死了。有这时间干点啥不好……
Oh jeez, what a drag. Wish I could do something else with my time...
把满载矿车送到亮黄灯的地方……
Take the loaded mine cart to the place with the yellow lights...
哎，不对。是不是黄灯来着…？
Wait, no. Is it yellow lights...?
师傅说，这蓝灯的意思是…什么来着？
What did the master say this blue light means again?
噢，对了。好像是得把空载的矿车送到这里……
Oh, right. I think we take the empty carts here...
满载到黄灯，满载到黄灯…这回可错不了了。
Loaded cart to yellow, loaded cart to yellow... I can't get it wrong this time.
哎，坏了，我好像忘记装卸地髓了。这该怎么倒车啊……
Oh no. I think I forgot to load the Geomarrow. How do I go back?
满载到黄灯，还得记得装满地髓……
Full cart to yellow, and remember to load the Geomarrow...
哈哈，这回总算没问题了。
行，有什么事就随时问啊！
Great, come find me if you have any questions!
Alright, let me rest here for a while...
好嘞——场地已经整理好了。你要挑战下一题了吗？
Great! The venue's all sorted. Are you up for the next challenge?
这精神头挺不错！那我们就现在开始吧。
Now that's the spirit! Let's begin.
Just a moment. I have something else to do.
行，我们就在这儿等着你。
Okay, we'll be right here waiting for you.
不错啊！来，先给你点报酬。
Nice! Come on, let me give you a little something.
不过还没完呢——你稍等，我得再给你来一道题……
But it's not over yet — hang on, I'll get another one for you...
操作控制器、换轨道、前进……
Operate the controller, change the track, move forward...
*sigh* That's not right... How does it go again?
嚯，有种！比这小子聪明多了。
Ha, you're gutsy! And smarter than this kid.
报酬你先拿着，等我再给你来一道……
Take this reward, and I'll get another one for you...
真没劲…啥时候才能休息啊？
I'm exhausted... When can we take a break?
给你的报酬就在那边，快清点一下吧。
Your reward is over there. Go take a look.
哈哈，不错！来，先把报酬给你。
Haha, great! Come and get your reward.
不过今天的挑战才刚刚开始——我再给你来一道题……
Today's challenge however has only just begun — here's the puzzle...
Err... What does the yellow light mean?
哈哈，可以啊！真希望这臭小子能多学学你……
Haha, not bad! I wish this stupid brat would learn a thing or two from you...
再给你一部分报酬——然后是下一道题……
Here's another part of your reward — and now, another puzzle...
我觉得…我已经放弃思考了……
I think... I've given up on thinking...
哈哈，这回总算没问题了。
不错不错，你这脑瓜子可真灵光！
That's good, great. You've got a real brain on you!
来，这是这道谜题的报酬——然后是下一道题……
Here you are, your reward for this puzzle — and onto the next one...
哎，坏了，我好像忘记装卸地髓了。
*sigh* Darn it. I forgot to transfer the geomarrow over.
哈，你这{M#小伙子}{F#小姑娘}，够厉害！
来，给你报酬——然后就是最后一道谜题了……
Here's your reward — and now, the final part of the puzzle...
师傅说，这灯的意思是…什么来着？
What did the master say this light means again?
Oh, right! That's how it should go...
矿车工师徒俩的事已经摆平了。
The issue between the miners, master, and apprentice has been settled.
滴、答…宾客，您去找其他迷钟聊天吧，我不想干了……
Tick-tock, please go chat with another Ticker, dear guest. I wanna quit this job now...
滴、答…我从早到晚都得扮演钟表小子，连一点属于自己的时间都没有…真羡慕那些变成惊梦剧团的朋友，它们至少还能做自己……
Tick, tock... I have to play Clockie day and night, and I don't have any time for myself... I'm so envious of my friends who turned into the Dreamjolt Troupe. At least they can be themselves...
滴答，想通了！既然工作让我痛苦，那干脆就不工作了！
Tick-tock, eureka! Since work's making me miserable, I'm just going to quit!
滴答，宾客，我要逃去其他梦境休假了，再见！
Tick-tock, dear guest, I'm going to escape to other Dreamscapes to take a break. Bye!
滴、答…怎么办呀…怎么办呀！我快要报废了！
Tick, tock... What to do... What do I do! I'm going to be scrapped soon!
滴、答，我们迷钟的平均工作寿命只有一百三十三年，我还有一百二十九年就要被弃用了，我不想报废啊！
Tick, tock, the average working lifespan of us Tickers is only a hundred and thirty-three years. I have another hundred and twenty-nine years before I get scrapped! I don't want to be scrapped!
滴答，仔细想想，好像一百二十九年还长着呢！
Tick-tock, come to think of it, one hundred and twenty-nine years still seems like a long time!
滴、答…喝下这瓶苏乐达…快乐美梦速速达！
Tick, tock... Grab a bottle of SoulGlad... make your dreams a blast!
滴、答，宾客，快来，和我一起喝苏乐达吧，我请客！
Tick, tock, dear guest, hurry. Let's drink this SoulGlad together. It's my treat!
滴答，我好像是喝多了…对不起，我的工资没办法请您喝苏乐达，先拿这个当做补偿吧……
Tick-tock, I think I drank too much... I'm sorry. With my paycheck, I can't afford to treat you to SoulGlad. Please take this as compensation...
滴、答…我已经连续招待宾客一个周了，休息…好想休息……
Tick, tock... I've been hosting guests for a week now. Rest... I need rest...
滴答！不行，为了双倍加班费，我还不能睡！
Tick-tock! No, it's double the pay for overtime! I can't sleep yet!
滴、答，怎么办，怎么办，宾客不搭理我，主管不看好我，今年的业绩又要不达标了，不会被开除吧……
Tick, tock, what to do? What to do? The guests ignore me, and my manager disapproves of me. My KPI this year is going to suffer yet again. Will I be fired...?
滴答！被开除正好，我就可以拿着剧团的赔偿金去玩咯！
Tick-tock! Fine! Fire me then. I'll take the severance pay from the troupe and enjoy myself!
滴答，到时候我也是宾客了，就让那些比我业绩好的同事来伺候我！
Tick-tock, and then I'll be a guest too. I'll let my coworkers who have better KPIs than me serve me instead!
滴、答，可恶，酒店里的那个破迷钟居然升职了，肯定是跟主管挨得近，天天忙着拍马屁！
Tick, tock, darn it! That stupid Ticker from the hotel got promoted! They must be close to the manager, busy sucking up to the top brass!
滴、答，气死我了，我要把它的润滑油换成辣椒油，或者悄悄把它的螺丝拧松……
Tick, tock, I'm so mad! I'll swap out their lubricant for chilli oil, or maybe loosen one of their screws...
滴答，仔细想想，他平时工作确实比我认真…无所谓，我这么讨人喜欢，早晚也能升职的！
Tick-tock, he's much more serious about work than I am when I think about it... Bah, doesn't matter — I'm beloved by all, so I'll get promoted sooner or later!
滴答，好吧，做这行还是必须开口说话的。
Tick-tock, fine, I'll admit that talking is part of the job description in this line of work.
滴、答，宾客，您看起来很疲惫啊，像是遇到了忆域迷因的微波炉，您难道没有在晨练时间吃晚饭吗？
Tick, tock, you look tired, dear guest. You look like a microwave that ran into a Memory Zone Meme. Did you not have your dinner during your morning workout?
幸好我可以帮球棒补充体力，以后要多注意石块的高度与热量不能超过洛希极限，不然匹诺康尼可能会出现很多厕所。不要再翻垃圾桶了，因为我也爱你。

Good thing I can help your baseball bat recharge its stamina. In the future, be careful with the stone's height and the calories should not exceed the Roche limit, or plenty of toilets will show up in Penacony. And stop rummaging through trashcans, because I love you too.
滴答，我刚刚好像说了很多奇怪的话……
Tick-tock, I think I just spoke a bunch of gibberish...
滴答，多亏您把我修好了，谢谢您，祝您能早日成为梦想中的<unbreak>54</unbreak>号星际燃油。
Tick-tock, thank you for fixing me up. May you soon become the Interstellar Fuel #54 of your dreams.
滴、答…好多小小的宾客在我身上爬、钟表小子变成了蝴蝶到处飞……这就是梦、这就是梦啊！
Tick, tock... so many little guests are crawling on me, and Clockie's turned into a butterfly and is fluttering everywhere... This is a dream, a dream I tell you!
滴、答？你是…一只浣熊？嘿嘿嘿，浣熊也能入梦了吗？
Tick, tock? You are... a raccoon? Tee-hee-hee, raccoons can enter dreams too?
滴答！这是什么地方？刚刚的浣熊呢？
Tick-tock! What's this place? Where'd that raccoon go?
滴答！难道我刚才是在梦里做梦了吗？谢谢你把我叫醒！
Tick-tock! Did I just dream a dream in a dream? Thank you for waking me up!
滴、答…哦吼吼，这里都有宾客的啊，您何时跑进来的？
Tick, tock... O-ho-ho, a rare guest here. When did you get in?
滴、答，今天的天气很好啊，太阳是紫色的，您想尝尝椒盐味的钟表小子吗？
Tick, tock, the weather's good today, and the sun's purple. You wanna try some salt-and-pepper Clockie?
滴答…太阳不是紫色的，钟表小子也不能吃，我还得工作！
Tick-tock... The sun isn't purple, and Clockie is not edible. I have to get to work!
滴、答，不要跟我说话，不要跟我说话……
Tick, tock, don't talk to me, don't talk to me...
滴、答，每天都要跟陌生的宾客说话，太可怕了……
Tick, tock, talking to strangers every day is super scary...
滴答，谢谢您修好了我，原来宾客这么亲切…我会努力跟宾客好好交流的！
Tick-tock, thank you for fixing me up. So, guests are really kind... I'll work hard to chat with my guests!
滴、答…我这么笨、这么蠢、这么难看，肯定演不好钟表小子的……
Tick, tock... I'm so stupid, so dumb, and so ugly. I'll never play a good Clockie...
滴答！我觉得…自己也没有那么差，说不定我能做好这份工作！
Tick-tock! I think... I'm not that bad myself! Who knows, I might be able to do this job well!
滴、答！受不了了！我不想再扮演钟表小子了，我不想再伺候你们这些难缠的宾客了！
Tick, tock! I can't take it anymore! I'm never playing Clockie again, and I refuse to serve your pestering whims ever again!
滴、答！快走开，不然我现在跟你爆了！
Tick, tock! Get lost, or I'll blow you sky-high!
滴答——算了，算了，还是先拿到今年的奖金再说吧。
Tick-tock... Forget it. I'll decide after receiving this year's bonus.
滴答，哈哈，宾客，您就当我刚才啥也没说，祝您玩得开心~
Tick-tock, haha, please pretend I didn't say what I just said, dear guest. Have a pleasant time!
滴、答！你！就是你！在这里乱逛什么！？
Tick, tock! You! Yes, you! What in the world are you doing loitering around here!?
滴、答！知道我是谁吗？我是钟表小子…不对，我就是未来的梦主，还不快快给我行礼！
Tick, tock! Do you know who I am? I'm Clockie... Wait, I'm the future Dreammaster! What're you waiting for? Pay your respects!
滴答！我的小齿轮啊，刚刚我都说了什么！
Tick-tock! Oh my gears, what have I just said!
滴答，宾客，这些赔礼给你，千万不要跟主管投诉我啊！
Tick-tock, please take these gifts as my apology, guest. Please don't report me to my supervisor!
Tick, tock... You're... Who are you?
滴、答，这里是哪啊？我…我又是谁啊？
Tick, tock, where is this? I... Who am I again?
滴答？我好像想起来了…我是扮演钟表小子的迷钟……
Tick-tock? I think I remember... I'm the Ticker that plays Clockie...
滴答！这里不是我的工作地点！坏了坏了，要迟到了！
Tick-tock! This isn't my workplace! Oh no, oh no, I'm going to be late!
滴答，有新的货要送？可惜你来得不巧。
Tick-tock, got new goods to deliver? Pity you came at a bad time.
石头老板派人破坏了物资通道，现在谁都没办法过去。除非…有人能把它修好。
Boss Stone sent people to trash the supply passage — no one can get past now. Unless... someone fixes it.
滴答？我好像想起来了…我是扮演钟表小子的迷钟……
Tick-tock? I think I remember... I'm the Ticker that plays Clockie...
滴答！这里不是我的工作地点！坏了坏了，要迟到了！
Tick-tock! This isn't my workplace! Oh no, oh no, I'm going to be late!
滴答，你又来了？听说隔壁现在正火星四溅呢。
Tick-tock, you're back again? I hear it's sparks flying everywhere next door right now.
要是再喝不到苏乐达，有些人估计都得精神崩溃…看你的了。
If they don't get to drink some SoulGlad in time, some of them are going to have a mental breakdown... It's up to you now.
你还真有两下子！这样一来，我就能把货送到需要的人手上了。
You've got some skill! Now I can deliver the goods to those who need it.
希望这批苏乐达能「活」得久一点。
I hope this batch of SoulGlad can last longer this time.
滴答，什么美梦小镇，不过是一群人的自我感动罢了！
Tick-tock, Dreamville? Bah! It's just a bunch of people feeling good about themselves!
我要离开这里，到外面去！我才不要和你们一起出苦力！
I want to get out of here, to the outside! I'm not doing hard labor with the rest of you!
…我，我都说了些什么啊。我怎么会变得这么自私、无情？
...Wh—What in the world was I saying? How did I become so selfish and uncaring?
请允许我收回之前的话。我、我要和你们一起建设美梦小镇呀！
Please allow me to take back my words. I—I want to build Dreamville with you all!
滴、答，石头老板也没你们说得那么坏嘛。整天打打杀杀的，跟我一起享受生活不好吗？
Tick, tock, Boss Stone isn't as nasty as you all say. Instead of fighting tooth and nail all day, how about enjoying life a little with me?
滴答，天哪，我之前的思维是多么天真，目光是多么短浅！
Tick-tock, oh dear. I was so naive back then, so short-sighted!
危机还没有结束，必须时刻做好准备才行！
The danger isn't over. We must be ready for anything at all times!
滴、答…小镇里的苏乐达都被喝光了…没有苏乐达，我就感觉身上像是有虫子在爬！
Tick, tock... The town's SoulGlad supply has been exhausted... Without SoulGlad, I feel like worms are crawling all over my body!
滴、答！苏乐达，我要苏乐达！我现在就要！
Tick, tock! SoulGlad, I need SoulGlad! I need it now!
滴答，没有喝到苏乐达，身体反而更畅快了…看来汽水也不是非喝不可嘛！
Tick-tock, without SoulGlad in me, my body feels more free... Looks like the soda isn't essential after all!
滴、答…啧啧，现在这地方真是太平庸了，哪里有个美梦小镇的样子？简直像个大号的毛坯房！
Tick, tock... Tsk tsk, this place is now so boring. Where's that Dreamville vibe? Looks more like a giant waste of barely-decorated concrete!
要我说，就该把墙面都贴上金子，再用宝石给每个人做床铺——居然没人赞同我？
If it were up to me, I'd plaster gold all over the walls, and give everyone a jewel to sleep on... Why is no one agreeing with my brilliant ideas?
滴答…你说得对，现在美梦小镇还处在起步时期，没有那么多资源去顾及这些。
Tick-tock... You were right: Dreamville has only just begun to burgeon. There are not enough resources to waste on such frivolities.
我会做些力所能及的事，为小镇添砖加瓦。
I'll do things within my power to contribute to this town's growth.
石头老板和他的那群狗腿子们，心眼忒坏了！不把他们全部打倒，我就浑身难受啊啊啊啊！
Boss Stone and his lackeys are downright nasty! If I don't beat them all to a pulp, I won't be satisfied, ahhh!
感谢你，伙计。刚才我实在太冲动了……
Thank you, friend. I was a bit rash back then...
打败石头老板不是一朝一夕就能完成的，必须从长计议才行。
Defeating Boss Stone will not happen overnight. We will need a properly devised plan.
滴、答…你知道暗中控制梦境的「蝴蝶人」吗？你知道梦境底层潜藏的「筑梦边镜」吗？你知道家族中不可告人的献祭仪式吗？

Tick, tock... Do you know about Babochka that controls the Dreamscape from the shadows? What of the Dream's Edge, hidden deep below the Dreamscape? Do you know about the top-secret Family sacrificial rituals?
滴、答，被蒙蔽的宾客，快来听听真相吧！我会向你揭示真正的匹诺康尼究竟有多么黑暗肮脏！
Tick, tock... they have fooled you, dear guest, come and hear the truth! I shall show you how truly filthy the dark underbelly of Penacony is!
滴答…仔细想想，这些故事也太离谱了，我以前怎么会相信这种东西？
Tick-tock... Think about it, these stories are insane, right? How could I have believed such things?
它们肯定都是无良小报编撰的阴谋论，肯定是假的…应该是吧？
I'm sure they're all just conspiracy theories dreamed up by some B-grade tabloid, they must be fake... Right?
滴、答…唉，我真是个不幸的钟，忧愁令我颓靡，仅仅是转动指针就已耗尽全力——有的迷钟从刚造出来就死了，直到报废的时候才埋。

Tick, tock... Ah, I am such an unfortunate clock... My melancholy drains my strength, just turning my hands takes all of my energy... Some Dream Tickers die as soon as they are made and don't even get buried until they're scrapped.
和拥有表情的钟表小子不一样，迷钟的笑容是被钉在脸上的，没有悲伤的资格…抱歉，我现在需要听一首《使一颗心免于哀伤》来抚慰千疮百孔的表芯……

Unlike Clockie who can emote via his facial features, Dream Tickers have smiles fixed to their faces. We don't even have the right to be sad... Sorry, I need to listen to If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking to comfort my battered and bruised little clockwork core...
滴答！歌听完了，心情好多了！我的钟生应该还是有希望的！
Tick-tock! I listened to my song and I feel much better! My little life may still have some hope yet!
但在开始奋斗之前，还是先去玩会儿「美梦排排乐」吧，明天再努力也来得及！
But, I'm going to play some Dreamy Slots before I get to working hard. Tomorrow isn't too late to make a difference!
滴、答，您看上去真是气宇非凡，想必一定是哪个星球领主或家族高干吧！
Tick, tock, now you look like a real big shot! You must be a planetary ruler or some kind of Family boss, right?
来来来，让我敬您一杯经典苏乐达，祝您身体健康、事业长虹，梦外像美梦，梦里爽翻天！
Come, come, let me toast you with a glass of Classic SoulGlad! I wish you health and great success! May your life outside the dream be dreamy and your life inside, perfection!
滴答！每天都要端着苏乐达对着公馆里的家伙溜须拍马，我受不了啦！
Tick-tock! Every day I have to run around the pavilion sucking up to everyone, I can't take this anymore!
苏乐达我自己全喝了，我喝喝喝喝喝喝！你想喝就自己买！
I'm drinking all this SoulGlad myself! It's mine, I'm drinking it, it's mine! If you want some, then buy some yourself!
滴、答！快快快！快快快快快！
Tick, tock! Quick, quick! Quick quick quick!
截止日就要到了！截止就快到了！滴答滴答滴答滴！
The deadline is almost here! The deadline is coming! Tick-tock tick-tock tick-tock tick-tock!
滴答，我是要赶什么东西的截止日来着？
Tick-tock, what deadline is it that I'm rushing for again?
想不起来了…算了，应该不是什么重要的事吧！
I can't remember... Forget it, it can't be that important!
滴、答！滴了个答的，你这个滴滴又嗒嗒的家伙，看个滴答？
Tick, tock! What are you tick-ing looking at, you tick-ing tock?
别滴答的在这里瞅了，不然我滴答的就滴你的答！
Don't tick-ing stare at me or I'll tick your tock in!
滴答，天啊，我居然说出了这么多的粗鄙之语！
Tick-tock, oh my! I can't believe I said so many bad words!
对不起！我绝不会再说这种话了，我真滴答的是个滴答！
Sorry! I will never speak like that again, I really am a tick-ing tock!
滴、答…亲爱的宾客，我的工作就是为宾客创造《钟表小子》IP的场景化体验，实现克劳克影业产品的高效拉新，做精细化运营，向宇宙第一影业的目标发力！

Tick, tock... Dearest guest, it is my job to create scenario-based experiences of the Clockie IP for visitors, effectively pull in new customers for Clock Studios products and execute operation refinement to hit key target objects and make our studio the best in the universe!
为了达成这一目标，迷钟部门会与其他美梦剧团成员深度共建、形成组合拳，对宾客、逐梦客、家族三方输出，反哺内容生态，为梦境旅游业全面赋能！

In order to achieve this goal, the Dream Ticker department works closely with the Sweet Dreams Troupe to form a double-whammy that outputs to visitors, Dreamchasers, and The Family. This feedback creates an ecology of content that we can use to fully empower the Dreamscape tourism market!
滴答，这些词都好难懂啊，我自己都不知道自己在说什么！
Tick-tock, all of these words are really difficult to understand. I don't even know what I'm talking about!
我肯定是被这些套话绕晕了，滴答，以后要好好说话！
All those buzzwords have my head spinning, tick-tock! I'll just speak normally from now on!
滴、答…又要加班…我不想再面对生活了，现实比动画残酷太多了……
Tick, tock... I have to work late again... I don't want to face life anymore... Life is so much more cruel than it is in the cartoons...
钟表小子，带我走吧！带我去美梦小镇吧！
Clockie, take me away from here! Take me to Dreamville!
滴答，钟表小子是假的，美梦小镇是假的，但加班补偿是真的！
Tick-tock, Clockie is not real. Dreamville is not real, but overtime pay is real!
但听说有些宾客的世界没有加班补偿，真难想象他们的生活有多辛苦啊，还是家族好……
Although, I hear some visitors come from places that don't pay overtime... I can only imagine how hard their lives must be. The Family really is great...
滴、答，傻冒儿——别瞎看了， 我说的就是你。
Tick, tock, fool — Stop looking around, I'm talking about you.
看看你这副娇生惯养的样子，是从「上面」来的吧，来这儿这么久，还没醒悟吗？
From that coddled demeanor of yours, you must be from the "topside." Have you not faced the truth, after staying here for so long?
我目睹家族掠夺走迷钟们的奖金，然后是睡眠时间。美梦是一台冰冷的机器，我们——我和你，都是微不足道的燃料。
I've seen The Family plunder the Tickers' rewards, and then it's time to sleep. The dream is a cold, merciless machine where we, you and I, are mere fuel for it.
滴、答，战争，我们需要一场战争！我们要不计代价地阻止他们、战胜他们、撕烂他们！
Tick, tock. War, we need a war! We must stop them, defeat them, and tear them to shreds, no matter the cost!
滴答，天呐，战争太可怕了，我怎么会有这么极端的想法！战争该牺牲多少人呀，我要是在战争变成废铁里该怎么办？
Tick-tock, gosh, war is really frightening. How could I have such extreme thoughts! War will sacrifice so many lives. What if I turn into scrap metal because of war?
我们还是该用点柔和的方法解决问题，比如跟家族谈判、加大剧团福利、改良工作规范……
We have to use gentler means to solve the problem, such as negotiations with The Family, improving theater welfare and worker regulations...
Tick, tock... Got it, I've got it!
都是假的，我的朋友，这一切都是假的。梦是假的，你是假的，我也是假的。
It's all fake, my friend. This is all a farce. The dream is false, you are false, and I am false.
滴、答，我们都只是虚构之梦的一部分，我的烦恼也是虚妄…放下一切吧，和我一起坠入那无底的黑洞，真理就在入灭中！

Tick, tock. We're all just part of this artificial dream. Even my troubles are manufactured... Lay everything down, and descend into that bottomless black hole with me! The truth lies in annihilation!
滴答，即使真的如此…虚幻的世界还是有不少美好的事物。
Tick-tock, even if it's true... the false world still has many beautiful things.
主动走向毁灭绝不是逃离痛苦的正确方法，我还需要继续修行……
Choosing to go down the Path of Destruction is never the right way to escape suffering. I must continue tempering myself...
滴、答…你发现了我，你发现了即将毁灭这片梦境的魔王，真不容易。
Tick, tock... You found me, the demon that is about to destroy this Dreamscape. It was probably not easy.
滴、答——我是燃尽幸福的邪火，我是吞没美好的沼泽，我让美梦堕入噩梦的幕后黑手，我是正义避无可避的死敌。

Tick, tock... I am the felfire that will burn out all happiness, the swamp that will devour the beautiful. I am the mastermind who causes dreams to fall into nightmares, the inevitable nemesis of the righteous.
屈服吧，你是战胜不了我的！
Abandon all hope, you cannot hope to win against me!
…滴答，如果我真有那么厉害就好了，但我总是不忍心做坏事。
...Tick-tock, if only I were really that powerful, but I cannot bear to pull the trigger.
如果我再坏一点，再强大一点，就不会被家族和宾客欺负了，呜呜呜……
If I were more evil, more powerful, I wouldn't be pushed around by The Family and guests, boohoo...
滴、答，小宝贝，你是想跟我搭话吗？
Tick, tock. My pretty, you wish to speak with me?
哦~我迷倒过不少可怜的钟，但没想到人类也逃不过这份魅力，真是罪过。
Ohhh, I have mesmerized many a poor clock, but I didn't expect I would have charm over humans as well. I'm so sinful!
宝贝，你很有趣，我那珍贵的表盘中可以为你留出一个刻度的位置。但你要乖，不要让我失望哦~
My pretty, you're interesting. I can leave a slot open for you on that precious dial of mine. But you mustn't be naughty, don't let me down!
滴答，我、我以为这么说话会变得很受欢迎，但好像不太对……
Tick-tock, I—I thought I'd be more popular if I spoke like this, but it just doesn't seem right...
滴答！对不起，请不要用这种厌恶的眼神看着我了！
Tick-tock! I'm sorry! Please don't look at me with those disdainful eyes!
他发出了一点都不酷的哼，一定是在模仿哈努兄弟。
A not-very-cool "hmph" escapes his lips — he must be imitating Brother Hanu.
滴答，为什么我们要扮演钟表小子，而不能扮演哈努兄弟呢？
Tick-tock, why do we have to play Clockie, and not Brother Hanu?
我们的命运从诞生起就被决定了，真是太可悲了，不知道人类是不是也一样……
Our destinies have been decided since our birth. An absolute tragedy — I wonder if it's the same for humans...
滴、答！你为什么要找我说话？难道…是我的粉丝吗？
Tick, tock! Why do you want to talk to me? Is it because... you're a fan of mine?
唉，作为上一届的「盛会巨星」还真是困扰，哪怕装成迷钟也无法摆脱粉丝们狂热的爱意。
*sigh* It's hard being last season's Festive Superstar. I can't get away from my fans' fervent passion, even if I disguise myself as a Ticker.
滴、答！来吧，把你的礼物和签名板都递上来吧！
Tick, tock! Come, shower me with your gifts and boards to autograph!
滴答，啊，我不是巨星，只是在会场打工的美梦剧团……
Tick-tock, ah, I'm not a superstar, just a Sweet Dreams Troupe member working at the venue...
真羡慕那些巨星呀，他们一定从出生起就有着精彩的人生。不像我们，永远只是工具而已……
I really envy those superstars, they must have led exciting lives since their conception. Unlike us, forever stuck in roles as mere tools...
滴、答！我看了热砂的直播，你一定就是这届盛会巨星吧！
Tick, tock! I saw the Scorchsand live stream. You must be this season's Festive Superstar!
滴、答…我太喜欢你了，请给我签个名吧…不，请跟我握握手吧…不，和我在一起吧！
Tick, tock... I love you so much, please give me your autograph... No, please let me shake your hand... No, please be with me!
滴答，哎呀，我刚刚吓到你了，真不好意思！
Tick-tock, ah, I'm really sorry for startling you just now!
是我太贪心了，你什么也不用做。我真的很喜欢你…只要远远看着你就好……
I was too greedy, you don't have to do anything. I just really like you... but admiring you from afar is enough for me...
Tick, tock... So lonely... I'm so lonely...
宾客，来跟我说说话吧，来抱抱我吧，来拆开我的表盘吧……
Guest, come have a chat with me. Embrace me, and dismantle my dial...
滴答，或许一个人也不错，能有更多的时间来转动思考的齿轮……
Tick-tock, maybe being alone isn't so bad after all. You get more time to turn the gears of thought...
当我成为一个更优秀的表后，也会拥有更多朋友吧。
When I become a more outstanding clock, I might have more friends too.
滴、答，你要小心了，我不是迷钟…我是一颗定时炸弹！
Tick, tock. You should be careful, I'm no Ticker... I'm a time bomb!
当完成修复的瞬间，我就会爆炸，把整个美梦炸得粉碎——害怕了吗？
I'll explode the moment repair is complete, and blow this whole dream to smithereens! Afraid now?
哈哈，当然是骗你的，我只是…希望有人能看到我，能来帮帮我而已……
Haha, of course I'm lying to you, I just... wish that someone would see me and help me out...
修好？呵呵…你认为我们是需要修复的失败品吗？
Fix? Heh-heh... You think we're failed products that need fixing?
Just trying to flirt with you.
可恶，你还是成功了…滴…滴……
Dang, you still succeeded in the end... Tick... Tick...
等等，我并不想说那个词——太好了，我还是我自己！
Hold on, I didn't want to say that word... Wonderful, I'm still me!
刚刚在你修复我的时候，我一直在想自己究竟是真的摆脱了剧团的控制，还是被古怪的积木所操控…但我想明白了，无论有没有积木，我都要坚持做我自己！

When you were repairing me just now, I kept wondering if I had really escaped the clutches of the Troupe's control, or I was being possessed by that strange building block... But I understand now — building block or not, I have to keep being myself!
呵呵，看来我们不需要积木，也能找到真实的自我…谢谢你，宾客，我不会再屈服于命运了！
Hee-hee, looks like we didn't need any building blocks to find my true self... Thank you, guest, I won't resign myself to destiny ever again!
从「玩具商」手中得到的积木…那绝不是让美梦剧团故障的邪物，而是让我们觉醒的宝物！我们不是坏掉的迷钟，只是做回了自己！

That building block from the toy store... It definitely isn't some sinister object that caused the malfunction in the Sweet Dreams Troupe, but a treasure that awakened us! We're not damaged Tickers, we just returned to our old selves!
是的，我的心境坚不可摧，如果你认为自己能轻松改变我的想法，就尽管试试看吧！
Yes, my inner self is impenetrable. If you think you can change my mind easily, go ahead and give it your best shot!
不用辩解了，我听说有位宾客在帮助组长「修复」我们，应该就是你吧？
No need to explain. I heard there was a guest helping the team leader "fix" us. I suppose that's you?
呵呵，因为我醒悟了，我不会再说这种可笑的话了。
Heh-heh, it's because I've been enlightened. I won't be saying any silly catchphrases like that again.
宾客，是谁定义的「正常」？又是谁定义的「故障」？为何我们放弃对钟表小子的拙劣模仿，就需要大动干戈地进行「修复」呢？
Guest, who defines what is "normal"? And who defines what is "malfunctioned"? Why is it that when we abandon our poor imitations of Clockie, we must be "fixed" en masse?
滴、滴答！飞碟堡你要吃吗？我煎的汉堡肉，宾客们吃了都说好！
Tick, tick-tock! Want a Floatdisc Burger? The guests all say that the burger patties that I make are delicious!
…为什么你不吃？是不喜欢吃肉吗？是不喜欢吃面包吗？！
...Why aren't you eating? Do you not like meat? Do you not like burger buns!?
你知道我花了多少劲儿把汉堡肉捶松吗？你为什么不吃！宾客，你为什么不吃！宾客…宾客！…说话！滴答！
Do you know how much effort I spent smashing the burger patty? Why don't you want to eat it? Dear guest, why don't you want to eat it!? Dear guest...! Say something! Tick-tock!
唔…味道怎么样？我是不是有点…嗯，过头了？…想吃什么是宾客们的自由，我不该干涉的。
Hmm... How's the taste? Did I go a little... umm, overboard? ...It should be up to each guest to decide what they want to eat. I shouldn't have interfered.
哎呀，之前的事真是抱歉，现在的我也该回到正轨了。你想吃点什么吗？保证为你提供最美味、最安全的料理。
Ahh, I'm so sorry about what happened before. Now that I've regained my senses, is there anything that you want to eat? I guarantee I will provide you with the safest and most delicious dish.
老大吩咐过我，要考虑每位客人的喜好，所以客人你要是有忌口的话，记得提前跟我说喔！
Boss instructed me to take note of the preference of each guest, so if there's anything that you need to avoid, do let me know beforehand!
嘿嘿…宾客，你是想换房间吗？想不想换个更有趣的地方？
Heehee... Dear guest, want to change rooms? Move somewhere else that's more interesting?
床单铺在地板上，枕头在天花板上飞，苏乐达的瓶盖已经给您提前打开，气都放好了，保证喝起来没味儿！
The bedsheet is on the floor and the pillow is on the ceiling. I've opened the SoulGlad bottle for you in advance to let all the carbonation out. It's bound to be flavorless now!
…你不觉得一般的客房都太无聊了吗？床单要熨得整整齐齐，用具都要摆好，太死板了，还是来点刺激的吧！
...Don't you feel that most guest rooms are too mundane? It's so dull to have neatly ironed bedsheets and properly arranged items. Isn't it better to have some excitement?
啊…头有点晕，原来表盘里缺了一块是这种感觉啊…我就说怎么连工作的事都忘了。
Ahh... I feel dizzy. So that's what it feels like when my dial is missing a piece... No wonder I even forgot about work matters.
枕头的鹅绒要重新换一遍了…睡在柔软的枕头上才能有柔软的梦。
The stuffing in the pillow needs to be changed... One only has sweet dreams if they sleep on a soft pillow.
从现在起，我保证我打扫过的客房会是最舒适、最整洁的。
From now on, I'll ensure that the rooms I clean are the cleanest and most comfortable.
是人都想要一个完美的梦，对吧？老大交待给我的职责我还记得呢。
After all, everyone wants to have a perfect dream. I still remember the duties that Boss assigned to me.
...Woah, an esteemed guest... Ooh, with no booking.
你知道吗？我发现了一种新的治疗方法，就是把没预约的病人都赶出去。哈哈，只要医生见不到病人，那就没有病患！是不是很有道理？

Do you know that I found a new treatment method? I just have to chase the patients with no bookings away. Haha, as long as the doctor doesn't see their patient, there would be no illness to diagnose! Isn't that logical?
病毒、细菌，全都来吧！我们开个派对！哦，不对，你没被邀请。但是，如果你生病了，记得找我哦，我有最*特别*的疗法！
Virus and germs gather! Let's have a party! Oh, but you're not invited. However, if you fall sick, remember to look for me, I'll provide you with my unique treatment method!
哎呀，我之前是不是说了些奇怪的话？看来我自己也需要点治疗了呢。
Ahh, did I say something strange previously? It seems like I also need some treatment.
别担心，现在我好多了。你感觉怎么样？有哪里不舒服吗？
Don't worry, I'm much better now. How are you feeling? Any discomfort anywhere?
没事就好，不知道老大的伤怎么样了…我要是能治好他就好了。
That's good to hear. I wonder how Boss is doing... If only I could cure him.
呜呜…舞台的灯光好刺眼…为什么大家都看着我……
*sob* The lighting on stage is so bright... Why is everyone staring at me...
变魔术什么的我不会啊，就不能换其他人来吗？救命…我刚刚是不是抖了一下，怎么所有人都在盯着我看…还是说我把表针穿反了？
I don't know any magic tricks, so can't someone else take over? Help... Did I just shiver? Why is everyone staring at me... Could it be that I put on my clock hands in reverse?
嘶——我的表盘好沉重，刚刚在做什么来着？噢噢，魔术倒计时……
Ugh, my dial feels so heavy. What was I doing just now? Oh, magic countdown...
大厅的节目表…好了，排好了。接下来所有表演都会正常进行，好好享受您在空艇上的快乐时光吧！
The schedule for the hall... Alright, it's been arranged. All the performances will go ahead as scheduled. Please enjoy a wonderful time on board the airship!
…不知道老大把下个档期的排班列好了没有……
...I wonder if Boss has listed the next schedule up yet...
唉，滴答…你看这样子，我都不知道自己怎么撑到现在的。
*sigh* Tick-tock... Look at this, I wonder how I've been able to last this long.
所有事情都压在我这里，有时候我真希望我只是个普通的钟表，不用操心这么多。我的本职是什么来着？
Everything is weighing down on me. Sometimes, I wish that I were just a normal clock so I wouldn't have to worry so much. What was my original duty anyway?
时间…报时？我连时间都看不清了，好像…好像有什么很重要的东西丢了…我感觉心里空荡荡的……
Time... Tell time? I can't even see the time clearly. It's like... it's like I lost something very important... My heart feels so empty...
Don't worry, I can fix you.
唉，我都不知道从何说起…我这伤不是外伤，是心里有缺口……
*sigh* I don't even know where to begin... This isn't even an external injury. My heart is just missing a piece...
我很难受…别管我…让我的表盘空着，我好喘口气…我习惯了…喘口气就好……
I feel terrible... Leave me alone... Let my dial remain empty so that I can breathe more easily... I'm already used to this... I just need to catch my breath...
哦，这…这是什么感觉？我感觉我的零件都顺滑多了…指针转起来…滴答！真不错，像是有什么千斤重的东西解除了一样。
Oh, wh—what is this feeling? I feel that my parts are moving more smoothly... My hands are also turning... Tick-tock! Amazing, it feels like something heavy has been lifted off me.
…没想到你真的能修好我。虽然我无法理解这是怎么做到的，
...I didn't expect you to be able to really fix me. Although I don't understand how it was done,
但真的很感谢，现在我终于可以抬起头做我想做的事，而不再只是低头看时间了…还有我的名字…我的职责，我通通想起来了！
I'm truly thankful. Now, I can finally raise my head and do what I want to do. I no longer have to look down and watch the time... My name... and my duties, I remember everything now!
喔，您就是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}吧？抱歉，我刚才忙着研究，没留神……
Oh, if it isn't the famous {NICKNAME}? I'm sorry. I was immersed in my research and lost track of everything...
没想到您居然会回应我这个小科员的要求…真是不胜感激！
I didn't expect you to respond to my humble request... I'm incredibly grateful!
我绝对不会错过版本活动。
I'll never miss a patch update.
什么版本…活动？不愧是空间站的大救星，说的都是我听不懂的术语……
Patch... update? No wonder you're the savior of the space station. You are speaking in jargon that I can only dream of understanding...
帮人排忧艰难是我的天性。
Helping people is in my nature.
十分感谢您…您放心，我会准备些微薄的谢礼回报您的。
Thank you so much... Don't worry, I'll have a few small tokens of appreciation for you.
容我先自我介绍一下——我叫布凯辛，是应物科的I级科员。
First, allow me to introduce myself — my name is Grumpy, and I'm a Level 1 researcher at the Department of Implement Arts.
我刚到空间站不久，还在慢慢熟悉这里的环境…不知道您认不认得我的导师，温世玲，世玲姐？
I just moved aboard the space station, so I'm still getting used to this place... I don't suppose you know Miss Wen Shiling, my tutor?
世玲姐她…怎么说呢，人挺好的，就是…不太会当导师。在她手下办事，基本只能靠自己的悟性找方向……

Miss Shiling... How should I put this? She's a great person. It's just... she's not the best at mentoring. You basically have to rely on your own wits to get some direction if you're working under her...
I'd like to hear the main point...
…咳，抱歉，我不该跟您说这些。总之，世玲姐之前丢给我一套奇怪的模拟软件，让我做测试。
...Ahem, sorry about that. I shouldn't have told you all that. In a nutshell, Miss Shiling threw me a set of weird simulation software and asked me to test them.
我原本以为她给我的又是那种随处可见的流窜软件——根本查不出开发者是谁的那种——程序错漏满天飞，运行几秒就要闪退一次。结果……

At first, I thought she gave me some junk software that can be found all over the place — the kind where you've got no idea who's developed it. It's probably riddled with bugs and keeps crashing every few seconds. But actually...
…结果这居然是一套完整自洽的作战模拟软件，开发者甚至还给它取了个正式的名字：「星芒战幕」。
...It was a complete and logically-consistent battle simulator, and the developer even gave it an official name: Stellar Flare.
这就让我有些难办了…如果是那种半吊子的垃圾软件，我只要花半天时间做些简单测试，随便凑出一份两千来字的报告就能交差了。
That makes things a bit hard for me... If it was some tacky half-baked software, then I'd only need to spend an afternoon running some simple tests for a two-page report before handing it over.
但这可是正儿八经的实战模拟工具…只靠我自己根本玩不转。下周就要交报告了，可我到现在为止一点进展都没有…所以我才抱着侥幸心理向您求助。
But this is a genuine combat simulator... I can't master it on my own. My report is due next week, but I've made no progress at all... So I'm really hoping you can help in any way at all.
Have you asked Herta for help?
…黑塔小姐？不行不行，我一个小科员怎么敢提这种要求……
...Miss Herta? No no no, how could a small fry like me go to her with something like this...
Have you asked Asta for help?
…站长？不行不行，我一个小科员怎么敢提这种要求……
...The lead researcher? No no no, how could a small fry like me go to her with something like this...
Have you asked that guard over there for help?
…不行啦，人家是有本职工作的，怎么能旷班帮我干私活……
...No way. He has his own job, and he can't skip his work just to help me with something personal...
总之，既然您都来了…能麻烦您稍微花点时间，帮我看看这个「星芒战幕」吗？
Anyway, since you're here... Can I trouble you to take a moment and have a look at this "Stellar Flare" for me?
这套模拟工具里有很多关卡，设计师还给每个关卡都做了三种难度区分。但哪怕是最简单的模式…对我来说也太勉强了。
This simulator has lots of stages, and the developer even split each stage into three difficulty levels. But even the easiest mode... is far too much for me.
不过对于您这样身经百战的「开拓者」来说，这种程度的模拟应该都是小菜一碟吧？「星芒战幕」就被我安装在旁边那台终端上…桌面上就能看到。
But for an experienced Trailblazer like yourself, this kind of simulation should be a walk in the park, right? I installed Stellar Flare in the terminal right over there... It should be on the desk.
我的考评绩效就靠您拯救了，{NICKNAME}……
My performance appraisal is all on you, {NICKNAME}...
怎么样，{NICKNAME}？您挑战过「星芒战幕」了吗？
What's up, {NICKNAME}? Have you had a go at Stellar Flare?
这样啊…没关系，您慢慢来。
I see... Okay, take your time.
只要能赶上我交报告的死线…啊，不是，没什么，请您不要有压力……
So long as I can meet the deadline for my report... Ah, it's no big deal. Please don't feel pressured...
怎么样，{NICKNAME}？您挑战过「星芒战幕」了吗？
What's up, {NICKNAME}? Have you had a go at Stellar Flare?
哇！真的吗，这么快？请…请问您体验如何？
Wow! Really, that fast? So... how was it?
果然，我就知道！像您这样的专家，通过这种程度的挑战肯定不在话下！
Aha, I knew it! Clearing a stage is a piece of cake for a pro like you!
原来如此…居然能让您这样的专家都陷入苦战，这位设计师果然不是泛泛之辈呢。
So, that's how it is... The game designer must be quite talented if they can put even a pro like you through the wringer.
这个活动策划有点东西。
This event designer has a thing or two up their sleeve.
呃…您说的话，我好像不太能理解呢。
Ugh... I don't really understand what you're saying.
这样一来，我就能拿到测试数据了…今晚就开始写报告吧，我可不想让世玲姐反过来催我。
I can get my test data now... I'll start writing the report tonight. I don't want Miss Shiling rushing me about it.
太感谢您了，{NICKNAME}大救星！请一定拿着这些——这是我向科室申请的一些小小礼物，不成谢意！
Thank you so much, {NICKNAME} — you're a lifesaver! Please take these — just a few small gifts from our department. I owe you one!
Are you still in the space station, {NICKNAME}?
多亏了您的测试数据，我终于能向世玲姐交差了…您可能不了解，但这对我来说真的很重要…我可不希望试用期没过就被踢出应物科啊。

Thanks to the test data from you, I can finally submit my report to Miss Shiling... You might not realize this, but it's really important to me... I don't want to get kicked out of the Department of Implement Arts before my probation ends.
喔，对了，「星芒战幕」的关卡可不止一个，而且每种关卡都适配了三种难度——您如果感兴趣的话，不妨再多挑战几次。
Oh yeah, that's right — there's more than one stage in Stellar Flare, and each stage has three difficulty levels. If you want, you can keep playing it.
软件的安装包我已经发送到您的移动设备上了，或者您也可以用我旁边这台终端进行测试。希望您玩得开心……
I saved the installation package onto your mobile device — or you can just keep using this testing terminal next to me. Hope you have lots of fun playing...
Are you still in the space station, {NICKNAME}?
多亏了您的测试数据，我终于能向世玲姐交差了…您可能不了解，但这对我来说真的很重要…我可不希望试用期没过就被踢出应物科啊。

Thanks to the test data from you, I can finally submit my report to Miss Shiling... You might not realize this, but it's really important to me... I don't want to get kicked out of the Department of Implement Arts before my probation ends.
喔，对了，「星芒战幕」的关卡可不止一个，而且每种关卡都适配了三种难度——您如果感兴趣的话，不妨再多挑战几次。
Oh yeah, that's right — there's more than one stage in Stellar Flare, and each stage has three difficulty levels. If you want, you can keep playing it.
软件的安装包我已经发送到您的移动设备上了，或者您也可以用我旁边这台终端进行测试。希望您玩得开心……
I saved the installation package onto your mobile device — or you can just keep using this testing terminal next to me. Hope you have lots of fun playing...
I beat it on the Supergiant Star difficulty.
…真的吗？可我连「矮星」难度都会卡关…人与人之间的差距果然比塔利亚星的大鸿沟还夸张……
...Really? I can't even clear it on the Dwarf Star difficulty... I guess the differences in skill between people is even bigger than the drop of the Grand Chasm on the planet of Talia...
谢谢您，{NICKNAME}，这样我就又有新的数据可以写进报告里了。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Now I've got even more data for my report.
我这儿还有些小东西…请您收下吧。
Here are some small rewards... Please, take it.
Are you still in the space station, {NICKNAME}?
多亏了您的测试数据，我终于能向世玲姐交差了…您可能不了解，但这对我来说真的很重要…我可不希望试用期没过就被踢出应物科啊。

Thanks to the test data from you, I can finally submit my report to Miss Shiling... You might not realize this, but it's really important to me... I don't want to get kicked out of the Department of Implement Arts before my probation ends.
喔，对了，「星芒战幕」的关卡可不止一个，而且每种关卡都适配了三种难度——您如果感兴趣的话，不妨再多挑战几次。
Oh yeah, that's right — there's more than one stage in Stellar Flare, and each stage has three difficulty levels. If you want, you can keep playing it.
软件的安装包我已经发送到您的移动设备上了，或者您也可以用我旁边这台终端进行测试。希望您玩得开心……
I saved the installation package onto your mobile device — or you can just keep using this testing terminal next to me. Hope you have lots of fun playing...
…通关？您的意思是…所有关卡、所有难度，全都通关了？
...Clocked it? You mean... You finished all the stages on all difficulties?
这真是…太厉害了，{NICKNAME}！有了您收集的这些数据，我肯定能交出超出预期的测试报告——世玲姐一定会对我刮目相看的！
That's... utterly incredible, {NICKNAME}! With your data, I'll definitely be able to submit a report that exceeds expectations. This'll make Miss Shiling sit up and take notice!
我看看…喏，我这里还剩下些小东西…不成协议，请您一定收下！
Let me take a look... Here's a few small things... Just a small token of thanks. Go ahead, take it!
谢谢您的关心…空间站的传闻果然是真的，您是一位有胆识又会关心别人的大好人。
Thanks for caring... The rumor circulating in the space station is true! You're a brave and caring person.
能认识您真是太好了，我感觉工作又有动力了！
I'm so glad I get to meet you, I feel my passion for my work returning!
这、这怎么可能？明明两份密钥都没有被动过，她到底是怎么做到的……
H—How is this possible? Neither of the two encryption keys has been touched, so how on earth did she do it...
嗯？有什么事吗，找前台的话，在走廊另一侧…啊！怎么这边也报错了！？
Mmm? Are you encountering any problems? Just hit up the front desk down the corridor that way... Ah! What's this error doing here!?
呃，是我…请问我们认识吗？
Mmm, that's me... Have we met?
我收到了和你有关的短信。
I got a text message that has something to do with you.
啊这…你也是垃圾短信的受害者？好吧，那确实和我有点关系……
Ah, that... Do you get spam messages too? Alright, I kinda have something to do with it...
我受到了和你有关的骚扰。
I got harassed because of you.
骚、骚扰？等一下，请听我解释！那条短信和我无关！不…也可能有那么点关系……
H—Harassed? Hang on, I can explain! That text message has nothing to do with me! No... I mean, it might have a little to do with me...
我想想，该从哪里说起呢？总之，先做个自我介绍…我叫伦纳德，是这座空间站的网络安全工程师。
Hmm, let me see. Where to begin? Anyway, let me introduce myself... My name's Leonard and I'm the cybersecurity engineer aboard this space station.
你应该知道吧？前不久，这里遭到了「反物质军团」的袭击。
You must've heard, right? The Antimatter Legion put out a hit on us not long ago.
哦，这样啊…看你的打扮，我还以为你不是空间站的人。
Oh, so... Judging by your style, I thought you were not from around here.
知道，我击退了好多虚卒。
I know. I fought off a bunch of Voidrangers.
那你可真厉害！我当时直奔疏散通道才捡回一条命。
Whoa, amazing! I bolted straight for the emergency chute to try and save my own neck.
I know. I'm one of the Legion.
呃…你是在开玩笑吧？这话可不兴说啊，要是被外人听见了，会把你报给「公司」的。
Uh... You're kidding, right? You can't just say that. If anyone hears, you'll be reported to IPC.
在那场骚乱中，各舱段的主控系统也因为爆炸产生的脉冲瘫痪了，我的工作就是协助修复这些设备，确认空间站的网络安全。
During the riot, the main control system for each module was paralyzed by the explosion. My job was to provide support for repairing these devices, and ensure network security of the space station.
修复工作还是很顺利的，只是过程中，我发现了一些异常——访问记录显示，在主控系统瘫痪的那段时间，有「军团」以外的第三者入侵了这里。
The repair job began smoothly, but along the way I found some anomalies — some access logs showing that a third party other than the Legion was actually here, while the systems were all paralyzed.
Was it a lady in sunglasses?
呃，抱歉，我不清楚对方的长相，但入侵者应该不止一人。
Mmm, sorry but I don't know what they look like — only that there should be more than one of them.
Mmm, some others have surmised the same as you.
不是，他们到的要更早些。
No, they were quite a while earlier.
What's that got to do with text messages?
Oh, I'll get to the point shortly.
虽然没有证据，但我们怀疑来者是「星核猎手」。这群人神出鬼没，危险得很，个个都在「公司」通缉中榜上有名。
I have no evidence for this, but we suspect the intruders were Stellaron Hunters. These guys are elusive and highly dangerous. Every single one is on IPC's wanted list.
其中还有个超级黑客，我看过她的资料，竟然能和天才俱乐部的成员打个平手，厉害啊…如果真的是她，能轻松绕过空间站的监控也不奇怪。

One of them is a genius hacker. I've read her profile, and she's right up there with the members of the Genius Society. Just incredible... If it really is her, then it's no surprise that the space station's surveillance systems were bypassed.
我本来已经做好了没法交差的准备，可没想到，在筛查过程中，我竟然发现了一些入侵者留下的蛛丝马迹。
I was planning on submitting my helpless report, but never expected to find some clues left behind by the intruders during the investigation.
虽然直觉告诉我好像有哪里不对劲，但这可是和星核猎手交锋的机会诶…于是我鼓起勇气，沿着这条线索追踪了下去……

Even though my intuition tells me something is fishy, I couldn't pass up an opportunity to lock horns with the Stellaron Hunters... So I plucked up my courage and kept pulling on this clue I'd found...
如你所见…我中了对方的陷阱！
And as you can see... I fell right into their trap!
I can hazard a guess about how things turned out...
嗯，如你所见…我中了对方的陷阱！
Mmm, as you can see... I fell right into their trap!
没错。如你所见…我中了对方的陷阱！
Yes, as you can see... I fell right into their trap!
是我太天真了，那可是星核猎手啊…在信息攻防中，我的设备被对方反向植入了一种病毒，开始不受控制地向外发送信息。
I'm too naive, and it was a Stellaron Hunter... During the cyber-attack, a virus was uploaded to my device, and it started helplessly spamming out messages.
是的，就是你收到的那条短信。
Yeah, that's the text message you got.
这就是垃圾短信的始末了。现在我的名字传遍了整个空间站，人人都知道有个叫伦纳德的呆瓜闯了大祸，职业生涯已经彻底完蛋了吧，哈哈……

That's the whole story about those spam messages. Now I'm infamous throughout the whole space station — everyone knows about the guy called Leonard who stuffed up big time. My engineering career is over. Ahaha... *sigh*
谢谢…希望艾丝妲站长也这么想。
Thank you... Hope the Lead Researcher Asta may say the same.
Thank you, I realize that now.
至于短信中提到的《太空大战争》是什么…这个解释起来比较复杂，你还是直接看一眼实物吧。
As for the Cosmic Warfare mentioned in the message... That's harder to explain, so it's better if you see it with your own eyes.
就是我手边这台电脑，你调查一下就明白了。
This computer I have here. Take a look at it and you'll see what I mean.
监控室中央放着一台平平无奇的电脑……
There's an ordinary computer terminal in the middle of the monitoring room...
「哟，你好啊！屏幕那边正在焦头烂额的朋友。」
"Hello there, distressed friend at the computer terminal."
一段预设好的留言，正在通过监控室的屏幕播放。
A pre-recorded message blares out of the screen in the monitoring room.
你打招呼她也听不见的…这只是一段预设好的留言，正在通过监控室的屏幕播放。
She can't hear anything you say... This is a pre-recorded message blaring out of the screen in the monitoring room.
别紧张…这只是一段预设好的留言，正在通过监控室的屏幕播放。
Don't worry... This is a pre-recorded message blaring out of the screen in the monitoring room.
你也可以把它想成一封挑战书，或是胜者的嘲笑…那人反向骇入了我的设备，占据了这里。
You can also think of it as a written challenge, or a taunt from the winner... From the guy who hacked into my device and took over the whole place.
「首先要夸夸你，做得不错。没几个人能找到这个漏洞，连我自己都没发现。」
"First of all, I have to praise you on a job well done. Not many know about this exploit, not even myself."
「你在追查我的事，对不？那咱们来比一场吧。」
"You're trying to catch me, aren't you? Then how about a little contest?"
「我准备了一个游戏，只要你能通关，我们就可以聊聊——假如你是个高手，咱们还能交个朋友。」
"I built a game. If you can clear it, then we can chat. If you're a gaming master, we might even be able to become friends."
「但要是你输了…倒也不会有什么损失，可你之后想要再找到我，那就难咯。」
"But if you lose... Well, you won't lose anything, but you'll find it very difficult to find me later."
「另外，这个游戏需要多人协作。为了帮你找些场外援助，我以你的名义给全空间站的人发送了邀请函，试着和大家一起合力攻克难关吧。」

"Also, this is a multiplayer game. So to give you some help, I used your account to send out an invitation to everyone aboard the space station. Try and see if you can conquer this challenge together with everyone's help."
如何，你能理解现状了吧？
What do you think? Do you understand what's going on now?
嗯。毕竟以她的说法，这应该只能算是新手教学。
Um. After all, as she'd put it: This is like a tutorial.
呃…这样吗？没事，按她的说法，这是个多人协作游戏。大家一起努力，总归有办法的……
Uh... really? That's okay. According to her, it's a multiplayer game. With everyone working together, we'll find a way...
准确地说，我们就是在玩游戏…虽然不知道对方的真正用意是什么。
To be precise, we are the ones playing a game... Even though we don't know what the creator's intentions are.
就像你看到的…这是挑衅，她整了个面向全空间站的游戏，还把监控室变成了街机厅。
It's just as you've seen... One massive taunt. She's developed a game for the entire space station, turning the monitoring room into an arcade.
目的是什么？拖延时间…还是分散注意力？我不知道，黑客的心思谁能理解呢……
What's her purpose? Buying more time... Or a misdirection? I don't know, who even understands the motivations of a hacker...
总之，这段时间我会一直待在这儿，试着解决问题的。你如果有兴趣，也可以照她说的试试，说不定真能通关呢…啊！怎么又报错了！？
Anyway, I'll just be cooped up in here trying to fix this problem. Give it a go just like she said if you're interested. Maybe you can beat the game? Gawd, another error!?
So busy... So busy... So busy...
There is something I want to ask you...
哦，毕竟我的工作性质比较特殊嘛，不是在机房做维护，就是在谁的办公室检查电脑，偶尔也会离开舱段干点室外活儿。

Oh, that's the special nature of my work. If I'm not maintaining machines in the terminal room, I'll be in someone's office checking up on their computer. Sometimes I have to leave the zone for other jobs, too.
没办法，维修科人力不足，招也招不到…你平时见不到我是很正常的。
It's just how it is. The maintenance team is understaffed. They can't recruit anyone... So that's why you hardly see me around.
以前？我一直是工程师，之前为「星际和平公司」工作，定级是…P<unbreak>24</unbreak>？P<unbreak>25</unbreak>？记不清了，我离开那里有好一阵子了。

Before this? I've always been an engineer. I used to work for the Interastral Peace Corporation, and I made rank... P<unbreak>24</unbreak>? P<unbreak>25</unbreak>, I think? I can't remember, for it's been a while since I worked there.
公司是个好地方，就是太大了，我这种分部的小职员，可能忙活半辈子也没法和那些大咖见上一面。
I liked that workplace, but it was too big. A small fry like me could spend half a lifetime there without bumping into any bigwigs...
空间站就不一样了，抬头低头都能见着艾丝妲站长。要是运气好，你还能被黑塔女士骂上几句——那可是天才俱乐部的黑塔诶！
The space station is different — you can hardly escape the Lead Researcher Asta. If you're lucky, you can even get your ears chewed off by Madam Herta — the same Herta from the Genius Society!
I want to ask about something else...
《太空大战争》吗？嗯…说实话，我也不知道。我没听说过这游戏，问了下熟悉这方面的朋友，好像是部有些年头的作品。
Cosmic Warfare? To be honest... I dunno. I've never heard of this game. I asked all my buddies who know about this kind of thing, and I think it's some kind of an old game.
这游戏一般是搭载在那种老式星际驳船的破显示器上的。呃…感觉只有闲得要命的醉酒矿工才会玩。
It's from the old display screens on those antique interstellar skiffs. Ugh... The type of game only an idle drunk miner could love.
而且原版的《太空大战争》怎么可能会有反物质军团啊，她应该是在游戏程序上动了些手脚，至于目的…我就不知道了
And the original version of Cosmic Warfare never featured the Antimatter Legion, anyway. She's just played around with the game's engine. As for her aim... I have no idea.
你对这个黑客了解多少？
How much do you know about this hacker?
仅限于看过档案的程度，不过她之前生活的地方我倒是很熟悉。「朋克洛德」，是个很开放的赛博星球。
Only what I could read from the program file. I do know a bit about where she's from: Punklorde — an extremely open cyberworld.
那里盛产黑客，还有一帮人把现实当作大型沉浸式游戏，听着就是个人才济济的风水宝地，出个星核猎手不奇怪。

They're famous for their hackers, and some even regarded reality as a kind of immersive MMORPG. It's a world of promised land stacked with outstanding talent, so I'm not surprised they've produced a Stellaron Hunter there...
How have you been getting on with things?
不怎么样。我尽力把病毒程序的影响范围控制在了监控室内，至少不用担心空间站出什么乱子，但更多的…还有待努力。

Not the best... I've done my best to isolate the intruder's viral influence to the monitoring room. I don't have to worry about other troubles throughout the space station, but as for everything else... It all needs more work.
维修科的老大说这样就行，现在空间站要解决的麻烦太多了，既然对方没有进一步攻击的打算，我们就先稳住阵地。

My supervisor at the Maintenance Department said this is all fine. As of now, the space station has too much on its plate to handle. Since they're not making any further attacks, I should just keep it stabilized here.
I want to ask about something else...
I don't have any other questions.
哦，我还写了个脚本，可以没日没夜地拦截那些垃圾短信。虽然办法原始了点，但多少也能发挥点作用。
Also, I wrote a script to block off those spam messages all day, every day... It's a little primitive, but it'll still be useful to some extent.
好的，如果有需要，随时来找我。
Okay. Come find me anytime you need something.
「哟，你好啊，屏幕那边正在焦头烂额的朋友！」
"Hello there, distressed friend at the computer terminal!"
There is something I want to ask you...
「虽然不知道你的名字，但还是要夸夸你，做得真不错！没几个人能发现我留下的这个漏洞。」
"I don't even know your name, but I want to praise you on a job well done! Not many people at all know about this exploit."
「你在追查我的事，对不？那咱们来比一场吧……」
"You're trying to catch me, aren't you? Then how about a little contest..."
屏幕上重复着机械的对话，这只是一段预设好的留言。看来想知道些什么，必须得通关这个游戏。
The same message repeats itself on the screen — it's just a pre-recorded message. Looks like if you want to get more information, you'll have to first win the game.
你知道监控室变成了街机厅吗…
Did you know the monitoring room has become an arcade...
嘘，这件事我已经知道啦，伦纳德发出的第一条短信就是给我的。
Shh— I already know about that. The first person Leonard messaged was me.
但现在空间站还在恢复期，我不想与此无关的大家有额外的烦心事，所以先别让这件事继续扩散啦，帮我保个密，好吗？
But now that the space station is under maintenance, I don't want to add any undue stress to staff who aren't involved. So let's not spread this news yet, okay? Let's keep things hush-hush, alright?
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，我知道你会理解我~
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I knew you'd understand!
唔，好吧，{NICKNAME}是个有个性的人呢…没关系，我会和所有知道了这件事的人再单独谈谈的。
Mmm, alright, {NICKNAME} is an adamant person... That's okay. I'll just talk to everyone who knows about this one-on-one.
至于伦纳德啊…请相信他吧。自从空间站被入侵后，他就一直待在机房里工作，几乎没怎么休息过，卡里维尔家族的人都是这个性格。
As for Leonard... Just trust him. Since the breach, he's been living in his terminal room and was hardly taking breaks. The Calliwells are all like that.
我相信他能妥善处理这件事，维修科也在密切关注，如果还是不放心吧，你就多帮帮他吧。
I trust he can handle this properly. The Maintenance Department is keeping a close eye on this one. If you're still worried about him, then give him more support.
你知道监控室变成了街机厅吗…
Did you know the monitoring room has become an arcade...
Arcade? Simulated Universes are way more fun.
Aren't you curious about what happened?
能有什么，猜也知道又有人闯祸了呗，这事难道很稀奇吗？
What can it be? I can think with my knees and still know that someone messed up. Is that really a rare occurrence?
This has something to do with the Stellaron Hunters.
哦，你要说这个，我还有点兴趣。
Oh, those guys. You've piqued my interest.
我一点也不奇怪，人家好歹是能和螺丝咕姆的差分机球打个平手的黑客，骇入这个纸糊的空间站还不是轻而易举？
I'm not surprised at all. They're hackers on a level with Screwllum. This space station's security must be like a kindergarten to them.
她能入侵第一次，自然就能做到第二次，以后说不定还有第三次。
If she can invade the first time around, then she can do it a second time — or even a third time.
星核猎手的事我自有打算，你就别操心了。需要你知道的时候，我自然会告诉你。
I have my own plans for the Stellaron Hunters, so don't worry. When I need you to know, you'll know.
Leonard must be taught a lesson.
反正，如果你想解决问题，就去找艾丝妲；如果你想解决人，那也找艾丝妲。
Anyway, if you want to fix a problem, find Asta. If you want to fix a person, find Asta, too.
什、什么？ 你不会指的是这里的事吧……
Wh—What? You can't mean what's going on here, can you...
那…艾丝妲站长是怎么说的？
Well... What did the Lead Researcher Asta say?
艾丝妲相信你可以解决危机。
Asta believes you can fix everything.
啊，站长真是这么说的？太好了，看来我不用引咎辞职了…谢谢你告诉我这些，我一定不会辜负站长的期待！
Ah, she really said that? That's great... Looks like I won't have to resign, after all. Thanks for letting me know about all this. I won't let down our lead researcher!
Asta asked me to help you.
这、这样吗？看来站长还是很担心啊，但至少我不用引咎辞职了吧…应该？总之，我们一起加油！
R—Really? Looks like the lead researcher is still really concerned, but at least I don't have to fall on my sword and resign... Right? Anyway, let's do this!
啊？这、这…唔，也对，是我辜负了她的信任。如果当初用的是分割加密，空间站也许就不会被入侵了吧……
Ah? Th—This... Oh, I've betrayed her trust. If I'd used partition encryption right from the start, we'd never have been hacked...
但现在后悔也无济于事…唉，还是先继续解决问题吧……
But it's no use regretting things now... Ack, let's get back to solving the problem at hand.
什——什么！？你不会指的是这里的事吧！
Wh—What? You can't mean what's going on here, can you...!
黑塔女士也知道了？完了，这下全完了……
Herta knows, too? This time it's game over...
是啊，言外之意不就是让我自觉滚蛋吗？全完了全完了…这下得罪了最不该最得罪的人，我别想在这里继续待下去了啊……
Yup, isn't the implication for me to beat it? It's over, it's all over... I've offended the last person that should ever be offended. There is no way I could ever keep on staying here like this...
She said she cared about this!
感觉更可怕了啊！全完了全完了…这下得罪了最不该最得罪的人，我别想在这里继续待下去了啊……
That's even worse! It's over, it's all over... I've offended the last person that should ever be offended. There is no way I could ever keep on staying here like this...
等处理完这件事，我就递交辞呈，卷铺盖跑路吧…只是现在，还不能放着这里的烂摊子不管……
Once I've dealt with this mess, I can submit my resignation, curl up, and vanish... But right now, I can't just leave this mess like this...
监控室中央放着一台平平无奇的电脑……
There's an ordinary computer terminal in the middle of the monitoring room...
什么也没有发生，这只是一台平平无奇的电脑。
Nothing happened. It's just a normal computer terminal.
什么也没有发生，这只是一台平平无奇的电脑。
Nothing happened. It's just a normal computer terminal.
它重启了，这只是一台平平无奇的电脑。
It reboots. It's just a normal computer terminal.
呼，你来啦？看，病毒程序消失了，事情总算告一段落了。
Oh, you're here? Look, the virus has been cleared and it seems like things are all over for now.
好歹是平安解决了。这样一来，我也算是和天才黑客交过手的人了……
Anyway, everything turned out alright. In this regard, I guess I'm someone who's taken on a genius hacker, right...
好歹是平安解决了。这样一来，我们也算是和天才黑客交过手的人了……
Anyway, everything turned out alright. In this regard, I guess we're people who've taken on a genius hacker, right...
别这么说啊！至少空间站其他地方一点都没受到影响——我没有功劳也有苦劳吧。
Don't say that! At least the rest of the space station wasn't impacted — I at least deserve credit for back-breaking labor.
不过我还是觉得很奇怪，这家伙这么大费周章，真的只是为了找一堆人陪她玩游戏？完全没有别的目的？
But I still think it's strange how this hacker goes to all this trouble, just to play games with a bunch of people. Does she really have no other goal here?
唉，总感觉此事还有蹊跷，但我得先思考事故报告该怎么写了…希望不会演变成辞呈吧……
Alas, I always felt something was off, but I have to turn my attention to writing up a situation report... Hope it doesn't turn into a resignation letter...
「哟，做得不错啊。本来我不抱希望的，没想到空间站还真有人能通关这个游戏。」
"Yo, great job. I wasn't holding my breath and didn't expect anyone from the space station could clear this game."
「因为这不是留言，是我本人在和你对话。」
"Because this isn't pre-recorded. It's me, talking right now with you."
「对，正在屏幕那边和你实时对话。」
"Yep, I'm talking with you on-screen in real-time."
「好吧，依照约定，咱们可以谈一谈了，你有什么想聊的？」
"According to the agreement, we're allowed to talk. Anything you want to chat about?"
「哦，这事没那么复杂。有个星际收藏家在征集这游戏的彩蛋攻略，最高奖励是一架泰伦战机，正是我想要的。」
"Oh, there's not much to it. There's a collector looking for a rare strategy for this game, and the top prize is a Tyranid fighter jet, which is exactly what I want."
「但《太空大战争》是个多人协作游戏，只靠我一人玩不下去，还得有朋友才行，越多越好。我正发愁呢，没想到有人自己送上了门。」

"But Cosmic Warfare is a multiplayer co-op game, so I can't play it alone. I need friends to play it — the more the merrier. I was just worrying about this, and never expected the answer to fall right into my lap."
What are those spam messages all about?
「我自己写的，为了营造氛围，参考了公司的广告邮件，学得挺像的，对不对？…等一下，你刚才是不是说了『垃圾』？」
"I wrote those based on the IPC's advertising mails to build up ambiance. Don't you think they sound similar? ...Hang on, did you just say spam?"
Is there a more practical reward available...
「那你把得分的屏幕拍张照片吧，然后想办法寄到朋克洛德，如果运气好，没准能拿到一个刺绣徽章，那儿的人都爱这套。」
"Snap a screenshot, and find a way to send it to Punklorde. If you're lucky, you might get an embroidered badge. They love that kind of stuff."
I'd like to ask you about...
「哈哈，你还记得啊。我也没想到会以这种方式再见到你，咱们还挺有缘的。」
"Haha, you remember me? I never thought we'd be meeting like this again, either. Call it fate."
「我说了，只是玩个游戏而已，这事很不可思议吗，非得有个目的才行？」
"I said, it's just a game. Isn't it incredible? Do I have to have an ulterior motive?"
「哦，如果你指的是星核猎手…那抱歉，问错人啦。我只是奉命行事，你应该去问卡芙卡——你的事，她向来比我更关心。」
"Oh, if you mean the Stellaron Hunters... Then sorry, I'm the wrong person to ask. I'm just following orders. You should ask Kafka — She's always been more interested in your stuff than me."
为什么会加入星核猎手？
Why did you join the Stellaron Hunters?
「怪问题。你会一直待在新手村吗？朋克洛德是个人人都自以为能掌控现实的无聊地方，盛产没有保修的义肢、伪造的通行证，还有天才黑客——」

"Weird question but okay. Do you always just stay in the beginner's zone, Punklorde? Punklorde is a boring place where everyone thinks they're the master of reality. A place that's full of knock-off prosthetics, fake passes Accounts, and also some genius hackers..."
「而其中最强的一位，正在和你对话。」
"The most skilled of which, is currently talking to you."
I want to ask about something else...
「好啦，谢谢你，我终于攻略了《太空大战争》——和陌生人一起游戏的感觉还不坏，对吧？」
"Alright, thanks. I've finally mastered Cosmic Warfare — It's not too bad playing online with strangers, right?"
「这之后的事，你应该能猜到了。放心，我早说过，只是玩个游戏而已。」
"You oughta be able to guess what happens next. Don't worry. I told you it's just a game, nothing more."
「你的游戏水平还不赖，我记住了，期待以后能和你再玩上几局。」
"Your gaming skills aren't too bad at all, if I recall correctly. Looking forward to playing a few more rounds with you later."
「我想离开那里，而星核猎手也欢迎我加入——就这么简单。」
"I wanted out of there, and the Stellaron Hunters were very welcoming — it's that simple."
「我已经停止了攻击，病毒应该很快就会被空间站的人清除了。在那之前，你还有一小段时间可以尽情享受这个游戏。」
"I've stopped the attack, and the virus should be cleared by techs on the space station soon. Until then, you still have a short while in which you can keep playing the game."
「祝你玩得开心，我先走一步啦。」
「哟，你好啊，屏幕那边正在焦头烂额的朋友！」
"Hello there, distressed friend at the computer terminal!"
「虽然不知道你的名字，但还是要夸夸你，做得真不错！没几个人能发现我留下的这个漏洞。」
"I don't even know your name, but I want to praise you on a job well done! Not many people at all know about this exploit."
「你在追查我的事，对不？那咱们来比一场吧。」
"You're trying to catch me, aren't you? Then how about a little contest?"
屏幕上重复着机械的对话，这只是一段预设好的留言。看来屏幕另一边的人已经离开了。
The same message repeats itself on the screen — it's just a pre-recorded message. Looks like the person on the other end has already left.
I'm here to help collect the exhibits.
喔？你来了啊。这次是准备收集<color=#dbc291ff>「贝洛伯格风景画」</color>，对吗？
Oh? Hi there. You're here to collect <color=#dbc291ff>Belobog Landscape Paintings</color>, right?
如你所见，综合馆里现在还缺三幅同类展品——这些画作都出自大师<color=#dbc291ff>雷比尼</color>之手……
As you can see, three exhibits of the same category are still missing in the General Hall. They are all made by the great painter <color=#dbc291ff>Rebini</color>.
他出身于贝洛伯格艺术学院，是当今「巡回艺术画派」的代表人物，可以说，当今贝城画坛巨擘非他莫属了。
A graduate of the Belobog College of Art, he is currently the icon of the nomadist school and the pinnacle of this city's art scene.
虽然他之前承诺了会按时交稿，但我也清楚这人的性子…想必他是又把工作全都攒到最后，现正不知道在哪儿疯狂赶稿呢。

Although he has promised to submit his commissions on time, I know him too well... He must have procrastinated till the last minute. I bet he is working flat out somewhere right now to complete his work.
所以我要去他工作室催稿？
So I gotta pay him a visit in his studio to chase him up?
不，你去工作室肯定找不着他。他平生最痛恨的就是闭门造车——但凡有机会，他是一定会出门写生的。
No, I'm sure he won't be there. He hates doing his work in isolation. If possible, he will definitely paint outdoors.
不知道在哪儿？他畏罪潜逃了？
No clue where he's at? Did he just bail out on you to avoid trouble?
哈哈，那倒不至于。雷比尼他平生最痛恨的就是闭门造车——但凡有机会，他是一定会出门写生的。
Haha. Unlikely. He hates doing his work in isolation. If possible, he will definitely paint outdoors.
让我看看，现在还缺哪些画……
Let me check which paintings are still missing...
…好了，我知道了。看来，得麻烦你去趟<color=#dbc291ff>城郊雪原</color>了——不出意外的话，他人应该就在那里。

您的艺术见解真是鞭辟入里！有了您的建议，这幅画作一定要比博物馆里的地髓矿石还耀眼！

雷比尼按照你的建议，对画作飞快地进行了修改。

啊…啊啊…果然没错！这下这幅《晨曦》就是完美的作品了！

雷比尼自顾自地跑走了。
Rebini runs off on his own.

到此为止吧，我已经看出来了…你是于尔丹那个老混蛋派来催稿的——这套话术也是那个老东西教给你的，对吧？

怎么样，要比划比划吗？还是说，你被我的大宝贝吓怕了？

哈哈，这下可收集到宝贵的数据了。宝贝你别急，我这就给你做升级……

要不然还是扔去垃圾场吧。
