一幅摄影作品，记录了沦为裂界的边堡城塞。
A work of photography that captures the fallen citadel that has become part of the Fragmentum.
这幅作品的气质很是清冷——和那片死寂的怪异空间如出一辙。
This piece of work is chilling — exactly what the dreary, strange space evokes.
一幅摄影作品，记录了筑城者建立的古老遗迹一角。
A work of photography that captures a corner of the ancient ruins built by the Architects.
「造物引擎」与虚卒的冰雕。作为影像中唯二的入镜者，永冻的它们或许能得到些慰藉。
The Engine of Creation and an ice sculpture of a Voidranger. Eternally frozen, they may have been consoled by the fact that they were the only two entities photographed.
一幅摄影作品，记录了上城区的花店「长夏」的店面。
A work of photography that captures the shop front of Eversummer Florist on the Overworld.
这张照片给了你一种错觉：这个房间中仿佛真的藏着永冬之城的夏天。
This picture gives you an illusion that this room really did house a summertime in the Everwinter City.
一幅摄影作品，记录了歌德宾馆金碧辉煌的大堂。
A work of photography that captures the grandiose hall of Goethe Hotel.
华丽、温馨、舒适，这是很多人对这幅作品的第一印象——他们肯定没有入住次日就被全城通缉的经历。
"Opulent, warm, and cozy" is the first impression people have of this piece. They must not have experienced being wanted all over the city the second day of staying there.
一幅摄影作品，记录了磐岩镇搏击俱乐部门口的景象。
A work of photography that captures the entrance view of Boulder Town's Fight Club.
不知道要付给那个铁公鸡多少冬城盾，才能疏散观众拍出门可罗雀的搏击俱乐部。
You wonder how many shield one has to pay to the bouncer to evacuate the audience and photograph the empty Fight Club.
一幅摄影作品，记录了克里珀堡中大守护者的办公室。
A work of photography that captures the Supreme Guardian's office in Qlipoth Fort.
照片中不见那位少女匆忙的身影。她现在或许正在此处，努力将这座城市带往更美好的未来。
You don't see the busy figure of the lady in the picture. She must be toiling herself in this place right now to lead the city into a better future.
{TEXTJOIN#40}，出自巡回艺术画派巨擘雷比尼之手，描绘了黄金歌剧院在蓝天下熠熠生辉的模样。
{TEXTJOIN#40} by Rebini, a paragon of the nomadism movement, enlivened the shimmering Golden Theater with the blue sky as the background.
你印象中的歌剧院穹顶似乎并不像画中一样饱满。这大概就是所谓的「艺术加工」吧。
You don't recall the Golden Theater's dome being as full as it was portrayed in the picture. Perhaps this is what they call "artistic license."
一幅油画作品，描绘了宏阔的行政区全景。
An oil painting depicting the Administrative District in its full majesty.
画中的行政区比你印象里的要大很多，或许是因为这里的很多地方你都去不了。
The Administrative District depicted in the painting is much larger than you remember. Maybe it's because there are many places off-limits to you.
一幅油画作品，描绘了磐岩镇的街头景色。
An oil painting depicting the streets of Boulder Town.
昏暗的街道上空无一人，令这幅作品缺少了下层区聚落特有的亲切感。
The dim, empty street on the piece lacks the unique hospitality of the Underworld settlements.
《劳动者》，出自巡回艺术画派巨擘雷比尼之手，描绘了大矿区的景象。
The Laborers by Rebini, a paragon of the nomadism movement, depicts the scenery of the Great Mine.
看了这幅画，上层区的人们可能会对尘土飞扬的矿坑产生不切实际的美好幻想。
Seeing this picture might cause the Overworlders to harbor an impractical, romanticized notion of the dusty mines.
一幅油画作品，描绘了查拉图斯特拉萨帕……
An oil painting depicting Mt. Zarathustrazapa...
…查拉图斯特拉萨帕拉伊斯坎德拉山的远景。据说是雅利洛-Ⅵ表面最高的山峰，但这名字到底是谁起的？
...Mt. Zarathustrazapala Iskandra from afar. It was said to be the tallest mountain on the surface of Jarilo-VI, but who gave it such a ridiculous name?
《晨曦》，出自巡回艺术画派巨擘雷比尼之手，描绘了沐浴在晨曦中的贝洛伯格。
Ray of Dawn by Rebini, a paragon of the nomadism movement, depicts the Belobog basking in the morning sun.
你只能从雪幕中看到雪，而那位画家却看到了希望的曙光——这大概就是后者能够成为艺术家的原因了。
You can only see snow from the snow curtain, but the artist saw a ray of hope beyond it — this must be why they managed to become an artist.
一块地髓结晶原石，品相很是高级。
A piece of geomarrow ore, looks to be very high in quality.
这种矿物是驱动整个贝洛伯格不断运转的燃料，更是万千劳动者汗水的结晶——其中当然也包括你。
This mineral is the source that fuels the entire Belobog's operation, as well as the crystallization of blood, sweat, and tears of thousands of workers — including you.
一辆贝洛伯格最常见的公共交通工具（的比例模型），经常能见到它带着「叮叮当当」的声音驶过街头。
A scale model of the most common form of public transport in Belobog. They can be seen all over the streets making ding-dong sounds as they pass by.
如今的冬城人依旧钟情这种传统且可靠的交通方式——尽管在通勤高峰时，它的可靠性会有所动摇。
Belobogians still love this traditional and trustworthy form of transportation, even though its trustworthiness can waver during rush hours.
一尊黄铜制的天球仪，造型典雅。
An armillary sphere made with brass. Classy and elegant.
你似乎在大守护者的办公室里见过同样的摆件。可到底哪个才是复制品？
You seem to recall seeing an identical ornament in the Supreme Guardian's office, but which one is the replica?
一尊黄铜制的天球仪，造型典雅。
An armillary sphere made with brass. Classy and elegant.
你已经在大守护者的办公室里仔细端详过这件展品了，很清楚星球表面那可爱的图案到底意味着什么。
You've already inspected this display in detail in the Supreme Guardian's office. You know exactly what the lovely diagram on the surface of the planet really means.
结构复杂的机械构件。互相啮合的齿轮传递着力量，维系着这座城市的运作。
A complicated machinery component. The intermeshing system of gears transmits power to sustain the city's functions.
再庞大的机器也是由微小的部件驱动的，就像贝洛伯格与她的人民。
Even a huge machine is driven by the tiny components with which it is made, just like Belobog and her citizens.
笨重粗犷的操作杆台座。它能用来驱动许多机械结构，而你也确实如是做了——主要是那些升降台和矿车轨道。
A bulky and rugged operating lever base. It can be used to drive many mechanical constructs, and many of which you used — mainly of elevators and mine cart tracks.
你怀疑贝洛伯格的工程师们是不是已经彻底放弃思考了。
You wonder if the Belobogian engineers have given up on thinking.
安装着许多接口的机械铁球，学名是「机关能源中枢」，能够将地髓矿脉转化为各种设备所需的能源。
A mechanical iron ball with many connective ports, formally called a mechanism energy hub. It can convert geomarrow veins into energy required for all kinds of devices.
你有时会感到好奇——为什么如此重要的机器内部竟然充满了连你这种门外汉都能修好的电路？
Your curiosity is piqued — Why is the inside of such an important machine filled with circuits that even a layperson like you can fix?
银鬃铁卫的加农火炮。这种武器或许有些落后，但其威力足以捍卫贝洛伯格的安宁。
Silvermane Guards' cannon. This weapon might be a little outdated, but its firepower is enough to defend the peace in Belobog.
你或许并未意识到，在不算漫长的逃亡之旅中，它的炮口常常对着你。
You may not have realized it, but in your short journey as a wanted person, its muzzle is frequently pointed at you.
一台自动机兵的操作终端机柜，与机兵们复杂的系统直接相连。
An operational terminal cabinet of an automaton, it is directly connected to the complex systems of the automated soldiers.
自动机兵真的很自动，所以没有多少人会专门操作和维护这个东西。
Automatons are all automated, so not many people know how to operate and maintain this thing.
一台古董收音机，七百年前对抗反物质军团时幸存的遗物之一。
An antique radio, one of the relics that survived the Antimatter Legion's invasion <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago.
在那段难见天日的黑暗岁月里，正是这台小小的机器将整个城市的每一颗心维系在了一起。
In those dark times, it was this tiny machine that tied each and every heart of the city together.
一个破旧的皮箱，是来自四百年前的文物，出土时还装着其他的文物。
A worn leather case from four hundred years ago. It contained other artifacts when it was unearthed.
你在这里没有看到皮箱里的东西。大概是策展人为了显得展品够多，把它们放在了其他展柜里了。
You don't see anything inside the leather case. The curator probably placed it in other display cases to bolster their number of collections.
七百年前对抗反物质军团时使用的行军毯，是过去铁卫们最可靠的床榻。
The military bedroll used <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago against the Antimatter Legion. It was the most reliable bed for the Silvermane Guards in the past.
典型的前寒潮时期产物，毕竟现在的天气下已经不存在如此单薄的床榻了。
A typical pre-Eternal Freeze production. After all, with the current weather, such thin bedrolls no longer serve a purpose.
旧世界的古董油灯。在银河中的知识降临雅利洛-Ⅵ之前，它是最寻常的照明工具。
An antique oil lamp from the Old World. Before interplanetary knowledge descended onto Jarilo-VI, it was the most common tool for lighting.
过去的人们曾借它在黑夜中寻求光明。而后，天外之物驱逐了这里的长夜，却也使他们失去了许多。
In the past, people depended on them to shed light in the darkness. Later on, technology of an extraterrestrial nature helped to chase away the long nights, but it also cost them a lot.
曾经是平平无奇的工艺品，如今是博物馆的重要馆藏。
It used to be a mundane handicraft project, but is now one of the more important pieces in the museum.
或许它在那个年代只是一件垃圾。但只要存在得够久，垃圾也能成为宝物。
Maybe in those years, it was only a piece of junk. But with time, even junk can become treasure.
一款老式台灯，地髓能源应用于日常生活的重要标志。
A primitive table lamp. It is an important symbol of application of geomarrow energy to everyday life.
想必你已经发现了：在贝洛伯格，从能源中枢到家用电器，它们用的电路系统都是一样的。
You must have noticed: In Belobog, everything from energy hubs to household electrical appliances uses the same circuit system.
诞生自筑城纪元<unbreak>280</unbreak>年间的首饰盒，岁月无法掩盖它的精致。
A jewelry box made in <unbreak>280</unbreak> AF. Its delicate nature cannot be concealed by its age.
它曾被用来承载美丽的饰物，如今则被用来承载逝去的时间。
It used to be a receptacle of beautiful accessories, but is now only a receptacle of lost time.
来自天外的陨石碎片，七百年前随反物质军团一同降临在这片大地上。
Meteor shards from outer space. It landed on this land alongside the Antimatter Legion <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago.
寒潮驱逐了入侵者，但泯灭不了它们留下的痕迹，这颗星星的碎片便是其中之一。
The Eternal Freeze chased the intruders away, but could not wipe away the traces they left behind. This piece of star shard is one of many left behind.
一枚古董标本瓶，瓶中花束意外地生机盎然。
An antique herbarium bottle with an unexpectedly vibrant bouquet.
你猜花束标本是新放进去的，真正的古董只有这个瓶子。
You surmise the bouquet was newly placed inside. The only antique is the bottle.
一幅摄影作品，记录了科考基地「炉心」的景色。
A work of photography that captures the scenery of the Furnace Core research station.
当年的科考基地已成为史瓦罗与女孩的家——但他们为什么总站在门口不进去呢？
The research station of yesteryear has become Svarog and the girl's home, but why are they always outside and never go inside?
一幅摄影作品，记录了贝洛伯格广场上的纪念碑「永冬铭碑」。
A work of photography that captures the Everwinter Monument erected on the Belobog Plaza.
某位情报官曾介绍过纪念碑的设计理念。忘记了也没关系，就算没人介绍，优秀的艺术品也能自行传递其蕴含的价值。

A certain intelligence officer has introduced the monument's design concept. It doesn't matter if you forget, because even if no one introduces it, a good piece of art can convey the value it contains by its own virtue.
一幅摄影作品，记录了永冬岭上的星核拘束装置。
A work of photography that captures the Stellaron Imprisonment Device atop Everwinter Hill.
它拘束了从天而降的灾祸、贝洛伯格的未来，以及一位大守护者的漫长的噩梦。
Imprisoned inside it is a calamity descended from the sky, the future of Belobog, and the enduring nightmare of a Supreme Guardian.
一幅摄影作品，记录了贝洛伯格的客运缆车。
A work of photography that captures a Belobogian cable car.
尘封十余年的缆车在你们的努力下重新启动。它于上下层区间不倦地摆渡，老旧的缆绳重新联结起长别的人们。

With your effort, the cable car restarted its service after a decade of collecting dust. It travels between the Overworld and Underworld ceaselessly, and its rundown cable reconnecting the long-segregated people of Belobog.
一幅摄影作品，记录了贝洛伯格边境的铁卫禁区。
A work of photography that captures the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone on the edge of Belobog.
市民们或许不知道，在这里遍布错综复杂的道路与机关障碍：难道银鬃铁卫们都不会迷路吗？
The citizenry may not have known, but intricate road networks and mechanical obstacles are placed all over the premises: Do Silvermane Guards not get lost?
一幅摄影作品，记录了大矿区的大桥。
A work of photography that captures the bridge at the Great Mine.
冰冷的钢铁桥梁与山崖显得有些凄清，但在矿工眼中十分亲切——它是工人们回家的必经之路。
The cold, hard steel bridge and the cliff look a little bleak, but the miners hold them in great affection — it is the path leading home to the miners.
一幅摄影作品，记录了大矿区的地髓矿脉。
A work of photography that captures the geomarrow veins in the Great Mine.
巨大的矿脉俨然岩层下的另一轮太阳——它照亮了地下矿区、上下层的街道，以及整座贝洛伯格。
The massive mineral vein is like an underground sun buried in stone — it illuminated the mines, the streets in both the Overworld and the Underworld, and the entirety of Belobog.
一幅摄影作品，记录了铁卫禁区的能源中枢。
A work of photography that captures the energy hub of the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.
你还记得自己为了靠近这个大铁球费了不少力气，好在那位倒霉蛋总是随身携带着那枚重要的钥匙。
You remember using much effort to get close to the giant steel ball. Fortunately, that poor fool always carries the all-important key.
一张概念图稿，记录了艺术雕塑「齿轮与智慧」的迭代历程。
A piece of concept art. It records the iterative process of the sculpture, Gears and Wisdom.
这幅设计稿能教给你的生活小窍门：通常情况下，你只能像这组齿轮一样拼命消磨自己的智慧，直到确认需求方的真实意图。
Here's a life protip this concept art can teach you: Often, you'll just have to scramble and grind your wits like this set of gears until you manage to ascertain the true intent of the requester.
「约翰•匹克之选」牌缝纫机的广告画，但是复制品。
An advertisement illustration of a John Peak's Choice brand sewing machine, but this is a replica.
「约翰•匹克之选」牌缝纫机是贝洛伯格工业转向轻型化的重要标志，这也是它为何会被张贴在这里的原因。
John Peak's Choice brand sewing machines are an important symbol of the shift toward a light industry in Belobog, which is why this is posted here.
一幅贝洛伯格机械制造业的宣传画，但是复制品。
A poster for Belobog's machinery manufacturing industry, but this is a replica.
望着铅一般的色调与画幅中的重型器械，你仿佛回到了那个由钢铁铸成的时代。
Looking at the leaden tones and the heavy machinery depicted on the canvas, you feel like you were transported back to that era when almost everything was made of steel.
一座以齿轮为主题的艺术雕塑，名叫「齿轮与智慧」。
A gear-themed sculpture named Gears and Wisdom.
可它为什么叫「齿轮与智慧」，而不是齿轮与其他的什么东西？不过，能让人产生思考，也算是与智慧有关。
But why Gears and Wisdom and not Gears and Some Other Things? Then again, being that it elicits reflection and thoughts, calling it Wisdom doesn't seem to be too far-fetched.
巨大的地髓供暖器，贝洛伯格街头随处可见的加热装置。
A huge geomarrow radiator. It is a heating device that can be seen everywhere on the streets of Belobog.
你感到暖意流经全身。要是在星球表面铺满这样的供暖器，或许真的可以驱散寒潮。
You feel warmth swirling around your torso. If the surface of the planet can be covered with heating devices like this, the Eternal Freeze might really be dispelled.
路边随处可见的「铜墙」型汽车，由「拉塔」汽车公司生产。
A Bronze Wall model automobile that can be seen all over the city. It is manufactured by Ratta Motors.
这款汽车自诞生起就以品质过硬、价格低廉著称，长年冠绝「拉塔」汽车销量榜冠军，以至于它们到现在为止只发售了这一款民用型号。
This model has been famous for its high build quality and affordable price. Ratta Motors's sales always tops the chart, so much so that they have only released this one civilian model so far.
一辆「灯塔」型汽车，是「拉塔」汽车公司生产的限量款。
A Beacon model automobile. It is a limited edition automobile manufactured by Ratta Motors.
据传，这辆车原是大守护者阿丽娜的专属藏品，但那位贵公子却弃之如敝履——看来，贝洛伯格的经济水平在七百年间有了质的飞跃。

Rumor has it that this car is part of Supreme Guardian Alina's personal collection, but a certain rich person treats it like it is worthless. Hopefully, that means Belobog's economic growth has been booming for the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years.
一辆「提灯」型汽车，如今主要用于出租车业务。
A Lantern model automobile. It is mostly used as a rented ride vehicle.
然而，贝洛伯格的绝大多数居民都选择乘坐有轨电车通勤。出租车高昂的价格令许多人望而却步。
However, a vast majority of Belobog citizens choose to commute by tram. Taxicabs' high price would stop most people in their tracks.
一台自动机兵，型号名为「蜘蛛」。
An automaton of the model Spider.
就你的经验，这个型号的机兵似乎并不安全。希望它不会在这里爆炸。
In your experience, this automaton model is not safe. Hopefully, it doesn't explode in the establishment.
一台自动机兵，型号名为「甲虫」。
An automaton of the model Beetle.
据说「甲虫」的信号灯曾被用于协助调度采集建造作业——但如今的它们似乎总是同时亮着两盏灯。
It is said that Beetles' signal lights were once used to assist in scheduling collection and construction operations — Nowadays, both the lights seem to be on constantly.
一台自动机兵，型号名为「战犬」。
An automaton of the model Hound.
机械宠物的圈子里最受欢迎的型号——可能只是因为名字里有个「犬」。看来，名字对一个产品来说真的很重要。
In the mech-pet circle, this is the most popular model, just because it's modeled after a puppy. Looks like appearance is really important to merchandise.
一组老式金属机柜，是矿用机械的终端设备。
A set of old metal cabinets. These are terminal equipment for mining machinery.
在贝洛伯格，简单的矿用机械通常都配有复杂的终端设备。但它们的存在并不能简化作业流程，只是为机械师们提供了炫技的空间。

In Belobog, simple mining machinery usually comes with complicated terminal equipment. However, their existence is not there to simplify operations, but to provide a space for mechanics to show off their skills.
一台下层区生产的古典座钟，人们利用它在昏暗的地下数算时间。
A classic desk clock made in the Underworld. People use it to calculate time in the lightless underground.
这座钟对于矿工而言意义非凡——毕竟地髓什么时候都可以挖，错过的休息时间可找不回来。
This clock is especially meaningful to miners. After all, geomarrow will not be running out anytime soon, but precious rest time can never be replaced.
一面显示屏，装在笨重的机柜上。
A display screen mounted on a bulky cabinet.
在你的梦里，曾有一位深蓝头发的男人对着这屏幕喃喃自语——可它甚至都不会发光，天啊。
In your dreams, a man with deep-blue hair was murmuring at the screen. It couldn't even light up, dear gods.
一台精致的放映机，出自黄金歌剧院的慷慨借用。
An exquisite projector, on generous loan from the Golden Theater.
七百年来，这部放映机从未放映过任何电影——因为缺乏拷贝和拍摄电影的基础，电影本身已名存实亡。
In the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, this projector had never shown any films. Due to the lack of copying and filming basics, the film industry only exists in name.
现已停产的某型号显示屏，陈年古董。
A display screen of a certain model that has been discontinued. An antique.
虽说是古董，但它相较于如今的产品在技术上并不落后——冬城的消费者对于不思进取的产商们似乎非常宽容。
Although it is an antique, it is not technologically backward compared to today's products — the Everwinter City consumers seem to be very tolerant of unoriginal manufacturers.
对于这个寒冷的世界而言，能够带来温暖的纺织品本身就有种「存护」的意味。
For a freezing world, textiles that bring warmth have an inherent meaning of "Preservation."
在贝洛伯格，你随处都能买到贴身的衣物。但再奢侈的衣物，都不如一件别人用它专门为你编织的心意昂贵。
In Belobog, you can always buy clothing that fits you anywhere, but not even the most extravagant clothing is comparable to a piece woven with the sewing machine specifically for you.
一台民用放映机，比黄金歌剧院出借的款式要简陋。
A civilian projector, cruder than the one on loan from the Golden Theater.
长得很像电影里的道具，但它确实是用来放电影的。
Looks like a prop in a film, but it really is to show movies.
一系列来自下层区的招贴画，看起来已十分陈旧。
A series of posters from the Underworld. They look old.
它们为什么会出现在这里？你不好说。
Why would they appear here? You can't say for sure.
一系列来自下层区的招贴画，看起来已十分陈旧。
A series of posters from the Underworld. They look old.
难道这座博物馆真没有其他更合适的展品了吗？
Does this museum not have any other more suitable exhibits?
第一任大守护者阿丽萨•兰德的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
A portrait of Alisa Rand, the first Supreme Guardian. The exhibition label reads:
「在末日谣言四起之时，大守护者阿丽萨•兰德与她忠诚的筑城者们一道号召众人高筑城墙，成就了如今对抗风雪的最后堡垒——贝洛伯格；」

"When the rumors of the doomsday spread, the Supreme Guardian Alisa Rand and her loyal Architects called upon everyone to build a great wall, which has since become the last bastion against the wind and snow — Belobog."
「面对天外之敌的进犯，阿丽萨高执炎枪，率领贝洛伯格众人凭城据守，直到春神与战争之神雅利洛降临至我们的行列中；」

"In the face of the invasion of the enemy from beyond the sky, Alisa held her flaming spear and led the people of Belobog to defend the city until the god of spring and war, Jarilo, descended upon our ranks."
「她的坚韧与英勇唤来了驱散敌寇的汹涌寒潮，彻底终结了长达三十余年的惨烈战争，和平奇迹般地自战火肆虐的大地再度滋长；」

"Her tenacity and valor summoned the turbulent Eternal Freeze to disperse the enemy invaders and completely ended the tragic war that lasted more than thirty years. Miraculously, peace sprouted once again from the land ravaged by war."
「在生命的最后，大守护者决意前往裂界自行了断，以向众人宣告贝洛伯格绝不会被个人意志扼住咽喉；」

"At the end of her life, the Supreme Guardian decided to go to the Fragmentum and meet her own end, in order to announce to the people that Belobog would never be choked by the throat by personal will."
「 第一位大守护者自此陨落。同时，贝洛伯格正式迈进风与雪与火种的时代。」
"Our first Supreme Guardian has since fallen. At the same time, Belobog officially took its first step into the age of wind, snow, and kindling."
"— She Who Evokes Miracles, Alisa Rand."
第五任大守护者阿丽娜•兰德的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
A portrait of Alina Rand, the fifth Supreme Guardian. The exhibition label reads:
「赞美仁慈的阿丽娜•兰德！她的仁慈使骁勇的银鬃铁卫举起长戟，拱卫宏伟的克里珀堡与那隔绝风雪的高墙；」
"Praise the kind Alina Rand! Her benevolence has caused the valiant Silvermane Guards to raise their halberds to defend the magnificent Qlipoth Fort and the high wall keeping storm and blizzard out."
「她的仁慈使贝洛伯格纷乱的法理重新归于明晰，将那作威作福的显贵者裁撤，更责令其将权柄归还给其原本的所有者；」

"Her mercy brought clarity back to the troubled jurisprudence of Belobog, abolished the dignitaries who had been abusing their powers, and enjoined them to return their authority to their rightful owners."
「她的仁慈使贝洛伯格停转的齿轮机构再度发出轰鸣，象征着进步的烟焰自高耸的炉身贯入雪幕；」
"Her compassion made Belobog's stalled gears roar once more, and the smoke of progress flowed from the towering furnace into the snow curtain."
「她的慈爱广博如深空，她的仁善闪耀如黄金——赞美仁慈的阿丽娜•兰德！」
"Her love is as broad as the sky is deep, and her kindness shines like gold — praise be to the benevolent Alina Rand!"
第二任大守护者斯维特兰娜•兰德的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
A portrait of Svetlana Rand, the second Supreme Guardian. The exhibition label reads:
「阿丽萨•兰德的养女，后进者的领袖，银鬃铁卫的统领者与贝洛伯格的戍卫者与重振者；」
"Alisa Rand's adopted daughter, the leader of the greener Architects, the commander of the Silvermane Guards, and Belobog's protector and rebuilder."
「彼时，人们只记得她与阿丽萨的联结，将其与前任大守护者多作比较，但她最终以非凡的手腕使众人折服，将离散的人心重新聚于一处；」

"During that time, people only recognized her by her connection with Alisa. They compared her to the previous Supreme Guardian, but eventually, she won over the people's hearts in her own unique way, reuniting the hearts of those that have drifted apart."
「她将混乱的火种亲手碾作枯焦的薪柴——她为饱受战火蹂躏的城市建立起无数遮风避日的屋宇，又将食粮与温热的地髓带给一切蒙受苦难的人；」
"With her own hands, she crushed the kindlings of chaos into charred wood — she built countless shelters for the war-torn city, and brought food and warm geomarrow to all who suffered."
「直到大守护者踏上母亲走过的路，再度踏入裂界时，人们终于放下成见，一致高唱她那高贵的姓名为其送行——」
"It was only after the Supreme Guardian walked in her mother's footsteps and entered the Fragmentum once more that the people finally let go of their preconceived thinking and sang her noble name."
第三任大守护者亚历珊德拉•兰德的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
A portrait of Alexandra Rand, the third Supreme Guardian. The exhibition label reads:
「她是贝洛伯格大学的创建者与永久名誉校长，全贝洛伯格最慷慨的学术赞助人：她置纷乱的语言与度量衡于同一准绳之下，打破了隔绝众人心智的藩篱；」

"The founder of the University of Belobog and its permanent honorary dean, the most generous academic sponsor in all of Belobog: She compiled confusing languages and metrics, measured them against the same standards, and broke the barriers that separate people's minds."
「她是贝洛伯格地下世界的执炬人，当之无愧的开拓者：她令贝洛伯格每一颗勇敢的心都投身于地髓开拓团的伟大事业，并在那岩层之下为坚韧的冬城人赢得了广阔的天地；」

"She is the torchbearer of the Belobog Underworld, a peerless pioneer. She was the reason every valorous soul in Belobog devote themselves to the great cause of the Geomarrow Development Group, and the reason our Everwinter City found expansion on the rocky underground."
「她是贝洛伯格历史的记录者，贝洛伯格大事年表的修订者：她为贝洛伯格在时间的洪流中寻得自己的立足之处，从此勾勒出冬城的未来所在；」

"She is the record keeper of Belobog's history, the compiler of Belobog Chronicles. She has found her footing in Belobog among the tsunami of time and sketched the direction in which the Everwinter City was headed."
「她是觉悟者，求真者，真正的尊贵之人，更是唯二将自己的名号刻在冬城城墙上的守护者：行政区的心脏——亚历珊德拉广场——便以她的名字命名。」

"She is an enlightened, a truthseeker, a true exalted, and one of the only two Supreme Guardians to have her name carved onto the ever-standing walls of the Everwinter City. The heart of the Administrative District — the Alexandra Plaza — was named after her."
第八任大守护者希莉儿•兰德的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
A portrait of Cyrille Rand, the eighth Supreme Guardian. The exhibition label reads:
「她的人生是一场庸碌浮沉的悲剧；她的统治让贝洛伯格的人民尝尽疾苦；」
"Her life was a tragedy full of mediocrity, arduity, ups, and downs. Her administration caused every anguish known to humanity to the Belobogian citizenry."
「幼年时的希莉儿资质平平，却因一连串阴差阳错的巧合被选中，成为了大守护者的候选人；」
"In her youth, Cyrille was unexceptional. However, due to a series of opportune events, she became a candidate to become the Supreme Guardian."
「她的单纯和善良被彼时身居高位的奸谄之辈利用，后者将所有权力揽于一身，不断推出压榨平民的苛政，只为满足自身的贪欲；」

"Her naivete and kindness was abused by those in power with malevolent intent, who took all the authority as their own, and who continuously carry out an oppressive rule against the citizens, just to assuage their own greed."
「终于，积蓄的阴火于某个静谧的雪夜炸响，在一场精心设计的骗局中，希莉儿被自己的子民夺去了生命；」
"Finally, a hidden deposition ignited and exploded one snowy night. In an elaborate, premeditated trickery, Cyrille lost her life to her own subjects."
「彼时的人们为『暴君』的消逝欢呼雀跃，百年后，则有更多人将她的故事写作时代的挽歌。」
"Then, the people cheered for the fall of the tyrant. A century later, many more wrote her story as an elegy of the ages."
「后来，来自星空的旅行者找到了线索——原来希莉儿的回响始终游荡在支离破碎的裂界空间中，从未消散。」
"Later, travelers from space found the clue. It turned out that the echo of Cyrille's voice had always been resounding in the broken Fragmentum space. It never dissipated."
「{F#她}{M#他}帮助一个迷茫且无助的灵魂找到了安息之所，给她枯寂的来生也画上了句号。」
"{F#She}{M#He} helped the lost and helpless soul to find a resting place and put an end to her lonely afterlife."
「倘若世上确有能供灵魂安眠的温床，愿她这次合上双眼时能与凄凉的命运彻底诀别；愿她能微笑着进入梦乡。」
"If there exists a place in the world where souls can rest peacefully, I hope she will bid farewell to her miserable destiny when she closes her eyes. May she go to sleep with a smile on her face."
第十八任大守护者可可利亚与其女布洛妮娅的肖像画。其展签上如是写着——
A portrait of Cocolia, the eighteenth Supreme Guardian, and her daughter Bronya. The exhibition label reads:
「在她生命的最后一刻里，这位大守护者毅然选择以其单薄的身躯对抗来自天外的、不可名状的力量。她为冬城捐躯，也终于驱散了呼啸七百年不绝的风雪。」

"In the final moments of her life, the Supreme Guardian chose to resist the undefinable power from beyond the clouds with her singular form. She sacrificed herself for the Everwinter City, and finally ended the snowstorm that howled for seven centuries."
「星核拘束装置」的比例微缩模型，是这颗星球一切灾难的肇因。
A scale miniature of the Stellaron Imprisonment Device. It housed the reason the planet was plunged into calamity.
放心——它只是一尊模型，应该不会引发你幻听的症状。
Don't worry, it's just a model. It shouldn't cause you to have any auditory hallucinations... probably.
这件武器被命名为「阿丽萨•兰德的骑枪」，与你手中的那柄别无二致。
This weapon was named Alisa Rand's Lance, the very same one you hold in your hands.
难道…在那片迷幻空间中与你交流的小女孩就是初代大守护者本人吗？
Does this mean... that the little girl talking to you in that strange space was the first Supreme Guardian herself?
这件武器被命名为「开拓者的棒球棍」，与你手中的那柄别无二致。
This weapon was named Trailblazer's Ball Bat, the very same one you hold in your hands.
没想到，你的武器也有被送进博物馆的一天——虽然不是真品，但这也足够震住在它身旁的几位虚卒朋友了。
You didn't think your weapon would have a place in a museum. This was not the actual weapon, but it was enough to stagger the Voidrangers beside it.
反物质兵团的虚卒冰雕，被八百年前的寒潮冻结至今。
An ice sculpture of a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion. It was frozen some eight hundred years ago when the Eternal Freeze arrived.
虚卒的命运通常是在自我毁灭中彻底遭人遗忘。但现它作为展品享受着众人惊奇的目光，或许也算是一种幸运。

The fate of a Voidranger is to be forgotten during their destruction. This particular one was immortalized as an exhibit, taking in surprised looks of the public, and that might be a form of fortune for its meager existence.
反物质兵团的虚卒冰雕，被八百年前的寒潮冻结至今。
An ice sculpture of a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion. It was frozen some eight hundred years ago when the Eternal Freeze arrived.
它很聪明，在被冻住之前摆出了一个帅气的姿势。虽然保不住性命，但保住了面子。
This is a clever one, as it struck a cool pose before it was frozen solid. It didn't preserve its life, but it did preserve its honor.
反物质兵团的虚卒冰雕，被八百年前的寒潮冻结至今。
An ice sculpture of a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion. It was frozen some eight hundred years ago when the Eternal Freeze arrived.
博物馆内如此温暖，你有些担心它们身上的冰是不是已经开始融化了…你说这只是个模型？好吧，那没事了。
The museum interior is warm, so you were a little worried whether the Voidrangers have started to melt... This is only a model? Oh well, it's nothing.
反物质兵团的虚卒冰雕，被八百年前的寒潮冻结至今。
An ice sculpture of a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion. It was frozen some eight hundred years ago when the Eternal Freeze arrived.
虽然你不了解这些虚卒的身体构造，但也许这些怪物现在依然活着，在坚冰下思考脱身的方法……
You don't understand the physical structure of these Voidrangers, but maybe these monsters are still alive, brainstorming a way to escape inside the solid ice...
一组过去的剪报及其附录。
A set of newspaper clippings and their appendices.
这篇剪报的标题是「兄弟对簿公堂，歌德家宅暂封」。
This clipping is titled "Brothers in Court, Goethe Mansion Sealed Temporarily."
一组过去的剪报及其附录。
A set of newspaper clippings and their appendices.
这篇剪报的标题是「捷音自煦日节晨曦传来，雪原前线我军酣畅大胜」。
This clipping is titled "Good News at Sunrise for the Solwarm Festival: A Decisive Victory at the Snow Plains War Front."
一组过去的剪报及其附录。
A set of newspaper clippings and their appendices.
这篇剪报的标题是「大守护者塔提维娜发表重要讲话」。
This clipping is titled "Supreme Guardian Tatiana Delivers an Important Speech."
一组与大守护者「愚者」希莉儿有关的原始史料。
A set of historical data about the Supreme Guardian Cyrille the Fool.
有人说，阿基维利的「开拓」之旅是将过去、现在与未来联结的旅途——作为一名星穹列车的开拓客，你出色地完成了这项使命。
Some say that Akivili's Trailblaze journey is a journey to link the past, the present, and the future. As a Trailblazer aboard the Astral Express, you accomplished this mission with distinction.
长戟与火枪，银鬃铁卫的制式武器。
Halberds and firearms, the standard Silvermane Guard weapons.
大部分参观者并不知道这些武器的威力——毕竟很少有人能像你一样能有机会实际体验一下。
Most museumgoers don't know the power of these weapons. After all, few — if any — have had the chance to witness and experience them.
这是一台投影仪。它可以展示博物馆预置的宣讲内容，以便观众更好地了解贝洛伯格的历史文化。
This is a projector. With it, the museum can project and display preset presentation content to help audience understand the history and culture of Belobog better.
你可以点映自己想看的内容。要看哪个主题好呢？
You can select and play the content you are interested in. Which topic would you like to select?
随着一声脆响，有关「灾难与星核」的内容登时出现在博物馆的墙面上，随后是一道沉稳的女声辅以解说。
With a crisp click, the content regarding "Calamity and Stellaron" appears on the wall of the museum. A velvety female narration accompanies the presentation.
…七百年前，来自天外的怪物点燃了星球。生死存亡之际，自天外降临的「星核」响应了阿丽萨•兰德的祈愿，唤来了足以退敌的寒潮。

...Seven hundred years ago, monsters from beyond the sky ignited our beautiful planet. In a time of life and death, a Stellaron that descended from outer space heeded Alisa Rand's prayers and summoned the Eternal Freeze to repel our invaders.
然而，「星核」的伟力是恩赐，更是灾难。为了令寒潮退却，无数位大守护者与科研人员前赴后继，矢志究明天外来物的作用原理。

However, the power of the Stellaron was a blessing but also a curse. In trying to quell the Eternal Freeze, countless Supreme Guardians and researchers devoted their lives to understand how the extraterrestrial object works.
他们不懈为之努力，直到星核终于被彻底抑制——执着的求索者们终于实现了他们的夙愿，进而得以拥抱不见风雪的光明未来。
They worked ceaselessly until the Stellaron was finally confined — the seekers' persistence finally paid off as we embrace the bright future of a blizzardless world.
随着一声脆响，有关「守护众人之人」的内容登时出现在博物馆的墙面上，随后是一道沉稳的女声辅以解说。
With a crisp click, the content regarding "The Protector of All" appears on the wall of the museum. A velvety female narration accompanies the presentation.
…自贝洛伯格建城至今，一任又一任的大守护者承「琥珀王」克里珀恩赐，为众人带去祂的庇护，引领众人向前。
...Since Belobog's foundation, each Supreme Guardian received the blessing of the Amber Lord, leading the citizens to move ahead under THEIR protection.
第十八任大守护者可可利亚与天外来客并肩作战，最终以她自己的生命为代价，彻底终结了肆虐近千年的风雪——他们无愧为贝洛伯格的铁壁。

The eighteenth Supreme Guardian, Madam Cocolia did battle alongside allies from beyond the sky, and ended up sacrificing herself to eradicate this blizzard that ravaged our planet for nearly a thousand years. They are, undeniably, the iron walls of Belobog.
然而，在银鬃铁卫奋勇作战的同时，人们也始终未曾放弃挣扎——在高墙之底、岩盘之下，贝洛伯格的子民们于黑暗中紧握希望，终于迎来自由的天地。

However, whilst the Silvermane Guards battled for our safety, the citizens of Belobog never gave up on their own struggles — under the tall wall, beneath the stone disk, Belobogians held on tightly to hope in the darkness, and finally welcomed a future of freedom.
随着一声脆响，有关「仰望星辰」的内容登时出现在博物馆的墙面上，随后是一道沉稳的女声辅以解说。
With a crisp click, the content regarding "Gaze Upon the Stars" appears on the wall of the museum. A velvety female narration accompanies the presentation.
…可以说，若没有「开拓者三人组」的协助，星核便不可能得到抑制。他们乘坐神秘的列车自星穹降临贝洛伯格——这一次，天外来客没有带来战火，而是未来。

...It can be said that, without the help of the Trailblaze Trio, the Stellaron wouldn't be contained so successfully. They arrived at Belobog on a mysterious train from the stars. This time, visitors from outer space didn't bring forth the smog of war, but the light of hope.
他们凭借自身的本领，为这座城市重拾了希望——在他们的帮助下，贝洛伯格的居民这才重新得见晴朗的天空，这才得以重新走进无际雪原，探索全新的天地。

With their own abilities, they brought solace and aspiration back to the city. With their help, Belobogians were finally able to see the clear skies once again, and were inspired to revisit the boundless snow plains to explore a whole new world.
他们无私奉献，不求回报。在解决了星核危机后，他们便又重新踏上旅途，随星穹列车一道化作象征祈愿与希冀的流星。

They gave selflessly, not asking for anything in return. After resolving the Stellaron Crisis, they returned to their journey, becoming shooting stars symbolizing blessings and hope aboard the cavalcade from outer space.
{NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒，这就是他们的名字。若你时常想念为众人带来拯救的开拓者们，不妨抬头仰望——他们或许正在星海间畅游，而冬城的希望也在彼处。

Their names were {NICKNAME}, March 7th, and Dan Heng. If you often find yourself missing the Trailblazers who brought salvation, look up and gaze. They might be traveling among the stars, with wishes of the Everwinter City by their side.
你可以随时回到这里，点映想看的内容。
You can always come back and review the content you would like to see.
（这应该就是照片上的物件了…把它带回去吧。）
(This should be the item in the photo... I'll bring it back.)
你将展品带回了贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆……
You've brought the exhibit back to the Belobog History and Culture Museum...
博物馆的员工将展品放在了正确的位置……
The museum staff have placed the exhibit in the correct position...
（看来这件展品也可以顺利展出了……）
(Looks like this piece can now be put on display...)
幽灵星槎？我很久之前就听人说过类似的「都市传说」……
A phantom starskiff? I heard of a similar "urban legend" long ago...
传说在迴星港中，有两位监船工人在巡逻检视培养舱，一艘幽灵星槎缓缓驶向他们，无声无息，就像是从虚空来访的使者。

Legend says that at the Stargazer Navalia, a phantom starskiff had gradually and silently approached two workers when they were patrolling among the incubators. The skiff was as quiet as a messenger visiting from the void beyond.
胆子大的监船工人登上星槎查看，发现船上空无一人，只有呜呜哀嚎的学舌妖，走向深处后，他发现船上货物满载，甚至还有散发着热气的食物。

The more courageous worker boarded the starskiff to take a look, only to discover that there was no one on the skiff. There was only a wailing Parrot Goblin. As he walked deeper, he found the skiff full of cargo, and even contained food that was still warm.
素裳小姐才是，你好像在发抖……
But Miss Sushang, you seem to be the one trembling...
唯一的诡秘之处在于甲板上满是血污，像是发生过什么争斗…他进一步检视了航线图，发现这艘星槎来自岱舆仙舟，去往苍城仙舟。

The only mystery was that the deck was covered in blood, as if there was a rough battle before... The worker examined the route map and found out that this starskiff originated from the Xianzhou Daiyu and was heading toward the Xianzhou Cangcheng.
失去方向的星槎，迷航了……
Looks like the starskiff had lost her direction and gone off course...
胆小的监船工人像是听到了同伴呼唤，亦步亦趋地登上了幽灵星槎…随后星槎像雾气般缓缓消散在迴星港里。从此再没人见过这两位工人了。

The timid worker thought he heard his partner calling and boarded the phantom starskiff... Soon after, the starskiff slowly faded from Stargazer Navalia. From then on, no one had ever seen the two workers again.
你要是喜欢，还可以有后续。
If you like it, there's a follow-up story.
没有人逃出来，前面都是你编的？
Since no one manages to escape, did you make up the story?
C'mon fam, don't point it out like this.
既然有人目击到了幽灵船，这很有可能是岁阳作祟，我们肯定要去调查的，不是吗？
Since someone has witnessed the ghost ship, it may be a heliobus' doing. We are going to investigate it, no?
幽灵星槎也是岁阳造成的吗？
Can a heliobus create a phantom starskiff too?
...I'm not sure, but it's highly possible!
仙舟上许多年前失踪过船只吗？
Was a missing ship reported from Xianzhou many years ago?
From what I know, there were many!
…只、只要我们不登上星槎肯定没事的，素裳小姐。
...A—As long as we don't board the starskiff, we should be fine, Miss Sushang.
L—Let's go. Ghost-hunting squad, move out!
发帖人说是在这附近见到了幽灵星槎。不过嘛，既然是幽灵船，肯定不会被轻易找到。要不，我们就在这里分头行动，找到线索后再集合？
The post said they saw the phantom starskiff around here. But since it's a phantom starskiff, I doubt we can spot it easily. How about we split our ways here and regroup once we find clues?
恐怖片里最忌讳分头行动了。
Splitting up is taboo in horror movies.
It's better for us to go together!
…你们也太谨慎了吧，那好吧，我们一起去找找吧。
...You all are overcautious. Fine, let's search together.
（就在这附近找找幽灵星槎的线索吧……）
(Search the clues of the phantom starskiff nearby...)
（难道说，那就是传闻中的幽灵星槎？）
(Could that be the legendary phantom starskiff?)
(Let's get closer and take a look.)
这么没头脑地找也缺乏效率，不如我们找个高点儿的地方？
We're not gonna be efficient running around like headless chickens. Why don't we get to the high ground?
（那里好像有个人，去问问看吧……）
(It seems like there's someone there. I'll try asking them...)
…消失了！你们看到了吗？幽灵星槎消失了！
...It disappeared! Did you see it? The phantom starskiff disappeared!
我叫作晴霓，之前和{NICKNAME}打过照面。
我叫作晴霓，是天舶司的职员。
I'm Qingni, a staff member from the Sky-Faring Commission.
…天舶司也在寻找幽灵星槎吗？
...Is the Sky-Faring Commission looking for the phantom starskiff too?
嘘——这是我擅自行动的，我家那位司舵大人可不允许我追查什么幽灵星槎。
Shh — I acted on my own. Madam Helm Master won't allow me to track down anything like a phantom starskiff.
她也不允许其他人去找幽灵星槎——说什么「不过是些怪力乱神，讨论它们只是在浪费时间」。
She doesn't allow the others to investigate it either... To her, it's "just some supernatural stuff, and it's a waste of time to discuss it."
但是，你看到了网上的帖子。
But you saw the post online.
没错，我就想来这里找找看。
That's right, and I thought of coming here to try to find it.
结果就是，你看到了，我也看到了。但它又消失了。
In the end, you saw it, and I saw it too. But it disappeared.
多好的机会呀！我还以为我能登上去拍个视频呢…这下可好，白白错失了一个爆火新闻的机会。
What a pity! I thought I could board it and film a video... And now I've missed the opportunity to make a hit post.
登上去？你怎么会这么想，万一遇到什么怪事可怎么办？
Board it? Why would you do that? What if something strange happened to you?
晴霓小姐就是为了打探这个才来的吗？
Miss Qingni, are you here to find out more about the skiff?
…是的。我听人说起，我妈…呃，也就是驭空大人在几日前登上过这艘星槎。
...Yes. I heard someone said my mother... Uhm, Madam Yukong had boarded the starskiff a few days ago.
也许是我疑神疑鬼了。这几天她变得和平时有些不一样，总是长吁短叹、多愁善感…就像是变了个人。
Perhaps I'm being paranoid, but I do find my mother different from her usual self. She often moans and sighs, seemingly moody all day... It's as if she's become another person.
那个从来都很果决硬气的妈妈，怎么会变成这样呢？所以我搜集了几条关于这艘星槎的传言，来到这儿，想探个究竟。
Why would someone as unwavering and firm like my Mom turn out like this? So, I've researched several rumors about this starskiff, and here I am to investigate it further.
她竟然登上过幽灵星槎？
She actually boarded the phantom starskiff?
这也是别人告诉我的，我问过她，她不承认。
I heard that from others. I asked her, but she denied it.
…这就像是被岁阳附身了一样。
...Sounds like she is being possessed by a heliobus.
你们将岁阳及捉鬼小队的事告诉了晴霓。
You and the others tell Qingni about the heliobi and the ghost-hunting squad.
妈妈被岁阳附身了？我、我该怎么办？
Mom is being possessed by a heliobus? Th—Then what should I do?
…晴霓小姐别紧张，我、我是十王司的判官，我会帮忙处理的。不过在此之前，你还听说了怎样的传言？
...Stay calm, Miss Qingni. I—I am a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. I will handle this for you. But before that, what other rumors have you heard?
我听说妈妈从星槎上离开时，幽灵星槎上还有一位狐人飞行士，穿着天舶司的衣服。
I heard people saying that when Mom left the starskiff, there was a foxian pilot on the skiff as well. They were wearing the Sky-Faring Commission uniform.
岁阳不止附身在驭空大人身上。
Madam Yukong isn't the only one who is possessed.
到底是谁啊，看得这么清楚？
Who is that rumormonger? They have pretty good eyesight.
是岩明大叔，他说自己那天在港口接待事务时偶然看到这事。
It's Uncle Yanming. He said he was receiving some guests at the port that day and incidentally saw it.
驭空大人平时都在司辰宫里处理公务，摇动同心火铃的话…那地方不妥吧？
Madam Yukong is often handling official business at the Palace of Astrum. If we ring the Harmonic Chime... that place might be a bit inconvenient, no?
当然啦，司辰宫是接待仙舟宾客的门面，几位就算除魔，也请不要在那儿闹出太大动静啊。
Most certainly. The Palace of Astrum is the official location where we receive guests from other Xianzhou ships. I understand you need to exorcise the demons, but please do not make a ruckus there.
也许我们可以把驭空大人单独约出来？
How about we ask Madam Yukong to come out alone?
好主意，走，现在就去司辰宫。
That's a good idea. Come on. Let's go to the Palace of Astrum now.
对了，一会你们去找妈妈的时候，我不能在场，不然她就知道我去找过幽灵星槎了。
Right, I cannot follow you to meet my mother. Otherwise, she will know that I went to investigate the phantom starskiff.
别怕，现在是她比较理亏…
Don't be scared. She's the one who broke her own rules...
这不是理亏不理亏的问题，你们千万别提我啊！
It doesn't matter what she did. Please don't mention me to her!
放心，我们是不会出卖你的…
Don't worry. We will not betray you...
我相信你们，这件事就拜托啦。
I trust you. I'm counting on you.
晴霓小姐放心，我身为十王司的判官，会妥善处理相关一切的。
Miss Qingni, don't worry. As a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, I promise to handle this case properly.
I'll be waiting here for your good news.
我就在这里等着各位的消息。
Then I'll be waiting here for your good news.
我看你们出现在司辰宫，应该是来找我的。
Seeing you at the Palace of Astrum, I suppose you are here for me.
驭空大人，有件事想和你聊聊…
Madam Yukong, there's something we wish to speak with you...
是什么大事，竟然这么多人来找我？
What's the matter? You've brought quite a big group here.
同心火铃响动起来，驭空转头看向了你，眼中闪过一丝疑惑。
The Harmonic Chime rings, and Yukong turns her head to you, a hint of doubt flashing across her eyes.
打招呼的方式挺新颖啊。
That's an innovative way of saying hi.
驭空大人，我们在迴星港看到了幽灵星槎，您…您有什么头绪吗？
Madam Yukong, we saw a phantom starskiff at Stargazer Navalia. Do... Do you have any idea about it?
（你这家伙问得也太直接了吧！）
抱歉，我对此并无头绪，想来这不过是荒诞的传说罢了。
I'm sorry. I have no idea about it. I believe it's just an absurd legend.
这事真真的！不过等我们走近瞧的时候，星槎消失了。
The skiff is r—r—real! But it disappeared the moment we got close to it.
也许只是光的幻觉，也许是一艘超速的星槎…诸位不如坦诚一点吧，为什么来找我？天舶司不登记人们虚构出来的星槎。

Perhaps it was just an illusion of light or a speedy starskiff... Please, why don't you be honest with me? What's the intention behind your visit? The Sky-Faring Commission does not register any imaginary starskiff.
有人曾目击你登上幽灵星槎。
Someone saw you board the phantom starskiff.
与我身形肖似的狐人不少，想来是看错了。
There are many foxians who have a similar figure as mine. I suppose that person is mistaken.
你还和船上的人有过交谈。
You had even talked to the people on the starskiff.
Mistaken Madam Yukong for someone else? Are you serious?
街谈巷议就是这样，明明没有的事情，却说的十分确凿。
That's how rumors and street talks come about. Some things didn't happen, yet they can make it sound conclusive.
听说你不许职员谈论它…
I heard that you don't allow your staff to discuss the skiff...
迴星港里出没幽灵星槎，这样的怪谈毫不新鲜。打从我进天舶司，每十来年就会听说类似的传闻，花样各不相同，却都细节充分有鼻子有眼的。

A phantom starskiff appearing in Stargazer Navalia? It is not my first time hearing such a ghost story. Ever since I entered the Sky-Faring Commission, I've heard such legends every few decades. There're all different stories, yet every single one is detailed and convincing.
闲暇之余说些八卦闲谈无伤大雅，但这里是工作场合，应当谈论的当然是工作中的正事。
It's fine to talk about these rumors during leisure time, but this is a workplace. All discussions should only be related to work.
天舶司成员镇日里聊些荒诞不经的星槎流言，对工作有任何帮助吗？
Do you think it's useful for the Sky-Faring Commission members to discuss these nonsensical rumors about a starskiff all day long?
（怎么办？驭空大人的回答真是无懈可击……）
(What should we do? Madam Yukong's answers are impeccable...)
(Why don't we get honest with her?)
驭、驭空大人，我是十王司的判官…那个，我担心您已受到岁阳侵扰……
Ma-Madam Yukong, I'm a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission... Well, I'm afraid that you have been affected by a heliobus...
司辰宫里行事多有不便，但我们想邀请您到绥园，好好做个检查。
As it's inconvenient for us to handle this matter in the Palace of Astrum, we would like to invite you to Fyxestroll Garden for a thorough check.
你们怀疑我被岁阳寄体了？
You suspect that I'm being possessed by a heliobus?
Well, I'm not so sure myself...
岁、岁阳会被人强烈的情感所吸引，会根据你的经验和记忆产生幻觉……
A h—heliobus will be attracted by one's strong emotions and produce hallucinations based on your experiences and memories...
小妹妹，身为司舵，我早已被知会了这次岁阳灾异的来龙去脉，我知道它的特性。岁阳所生成的幻觉，我绝不会相信的……

Young lady, as the Helm Master, I've already been well-informed of the circumstances of the current heliobus disaster. I know its characteristics, and I will never trust the hallucinations the heliobi produce...
算了，开诚布公，才能尽解疑惑。身为司舵，我自当遵守十王判官的要求。
Never mind. Only when we are open and honest can we resolve all our doubts. As the Helm Master, I should comply with the requirements of a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission.
不过，得等我忙完公务。入夜我会去绥园见你们，这样可以吗？
However, you'll have to wait until I'm done with work. I will meet you at Fyxestroll Garden tonight. Is that okay with you?
唉，我也有很长的时间没去过狐眠冢了，咱们就在那儿见面吧。届时，各位所有的疑惑都将会得到解答。
Well, it's been a long time since I visited Foxsomn Tomb. Let's meet there. By then, all your doubts will be answered.
判官小姐，去做你们该做的事吧，我在这里待段时间就离开。
Miss judge, go to what you need to do. I will stay here for a while, then take my leave.
唉，我也有很长的时间没去过狐眠冢了，咱们就在那儿见面吧。
Well, it's been a long time since I visited Foxsomn Tomb. Let's meet there.
How was it? Did she agree?
答应了。你妈妈，好威严，和…和我妈一样…一样的让人说不出话来。
Yes. Your Mom is very stern. J—Just like my Mom... Her presence makes it difficult to speak up.
没想到，你也有这样的妈妈。
I didn't expect you to have a Mom like this.
几位，我有种直觉，驭空大人没有被附身。
Everyone, my intuition is telling me that Madam Yukong isn't being possessed.
There isn't any reaction from the Harmonic Chime.
暂时不能排除这个可能…
We shouldn't leave out any possibilities...
真的吗？可她以前从不会流露出悲伤的表情，有时很恍惚，她会看着我，想说什么却没有说……
Are you serious? But in the past, she would never reveal such a melancholic expression. Sometimes, she becomes so distracted that she stares blankly at me without uttering a word...
忽然之间，她就像是需要我来哄睡的孩子，我也不知道怎么办，只能静静地搂着她。
It's like she suddenly turned into a child who needs me to put her to sleep. I don't know what to do either, so I can only embrace her silently in my arms.
连前阵子仙舟上出那么大的事儿她都没表现出一点脆弱的样子。但突然有一天，她回来时就变成了那样…我、我也想不出别的可能了。

We had such a huge crisis on the Xianzhou a short while ago, but she didn't show a single sign of weakness back then. Yet she came home one day and started to act in this way... I—I can't think of other possibilities.
可每个人都有柔弱的一面。
But everyone has a soft side.
是呀，越是强势的人，这一面藏得就越好，我娘就是这样的。
Exactly. The stronger the person appears to be, the better they are in concealing their soft side. That's how my Ma is.
A phantom starskiff that puts a spell on people's hearts...
嗯，连晴霓小姐这样亲近的人都能察觉到她性情大变，多半是因为这古怪的事情吧。
Yeah, for someone as approachable as Miss Qingni to detect a change in her personality, it's likely due to an unnatural phenomenon.
不管怎样，驭空大人答应了今晚会在绥园与我们见面，到时候应该能问个清楚。
Regardless, Madam Yukong agreed to meet us at Fyxestroll Garden tonight. We should clear our doubts with her.
交给我们吧…不过，要是能近距离拍拍幽灵星槎就好了，那样——
Leave it to us... But it will be good if I can take a close-up picture of the phantom starskiff. That way —
我就知道你在想什么。走，我们回绥园去吧。
I knew what you are up to. Come on. Let's go to Fyxestroll Garden.
驭空大人约定和我们在狐眠冢见面，时候差不多了吧？
Madam Yukong said to meet us at Foxsomn Tomb. Is it about time?
你们看！那是…晴霓小姐…的影子——？！
Look! Is that... Miss Qingni's... shadow!?
有没有可能，是晴霓小姐被附身了？
Is it possible that Miss Qingni is the one actually being possessed?
Does possession produce that kind of visual special effects?
这时候就别插科打诨啦！追上去瞧瞧。
Now's not the time for jokes! Let's follow her.
Come on. Let's catch up to her!
但…驭空还没来，你们又是谁？
But... Yukong isn't here yet. Who are you?
这艘幽灵星槎的航行之旅，应该就到此结束了。
The voyage of the phantom starskiff should now come to an end.
嗯，我邀请你们来到狐眠冢，就是为了解除各位对幽灵星槎的疑惑。
Yes, I invited all of you to the Foxsomn Tomb so as to clear up any doubts you have about the phantom starskiff.
这个幻影，和晴霓小姐长得好像…她为什么一直在呼唤你的名字？
This illusion looks so much like Miss Qingni... Why is she constantly calling your name?
因为在它看来，它认得我，它…很想念我。
Because, as far as it is concerned, it recognizes me. It... misses me.
幽灵星槎…是岁阳因人们的思念而有灵具现。它循着那些哀悼人们的思绪，在仙舟上无定来去。
The phantom starskiff... is a manifestation of people's thoughts by the heliobus. It travels unpredictably on the Xianzhou, following the sorrowful thoughts of those who mourn.
当心怀悲伤的人来到狐眠冢，它就像听到了老朋友内心的哭泣声变化成了故人的样子来相见…来响应那些没能履行的重逢约定。

When someone with a broken heart comes to Foxsomn Tomb, it would come and meet them in the guise of the ones who had passed away, as if hearkening to the inner cries of their friend... It will respond to those unfulfilled promises of reunion.
狐眠冢有什么特别之处？
罗浮仙舟上少有祭奠的场所，但狐眠冢不同。它是狐人追思故人的地方。
There are few places on Xianzhou Luofu where one can honor the dead, but the Foxsomn Tomb is different. It's a place for foxians to commemorate the deceased.
三十年前与丰饶民的大战结束后，许多人都曾来到这儿纪念阵亡的飞行士。
After the great war with the Denizens of Abundance thirty years ago, many people had come here to commemorate the fallen pilots.
它变化成了我阵亡的战友，采翼的模样。
It has taken form of my fallen comrade-in-arms, Caiyi.
这些年里，我无数次来到狐眠冢，怀念和采翼无话不说的日子，怀念与她心有灵犀的飞行，怀念和她并肩战斗的热血…我甚至将那场大战的飞舰残片收殓在这儿。

I have come to Foxsomn Tomb countless times over the years to reminisce my days with Caiyi. Back then, we told each other everything, we understood each other without needing words as we flew, and we fought passionately side by side... I even entombed the airship fragments from that great war here.
没想到时光流转，思念变成了星槎，它真的飞回来了。
I didn't expect that, as time went on, my thoughts for her would take the form of a starskiff and actually fly back to me.
你许久没有回到狐眠冢了，但你的悲伤却如此强烈。我…只好来找你。
You haven't been to Foxsomn Tomb for a long time, but your sadness only grows ever greater. I... had to come and find you.
我以为自己已经习惯不再怀念了，直到我走进船舱，再次见到你，我又想起了逝去的那些日子，我又变回了软弱的狐人姑娘，只会哭泣。

I thought I'd gotten used to not thinking of you. But when I boarded the starskiff and saw you again, I remembered those bygone days and was reduced to a weak foxian girl once more, a little kit who could do nothing but cry.
我品尝得到…你咸涩的眼泪，在心里流…一直在流。
I can taste your salty tears... you have never stopped crying in your heart...
你需要人聊聊，我会听你一直聊下去……
If you need to talk, I will always be here to talk with you...
也许我们应该给你俩留出空间…
Perhaps we should give you two some personal space...
驭空大人，你知道那只是幻象…
Madam Yukong, you should know that it's only an illusion...
很抱歉。采翼，我叫十王司判官来这里…是为了和你告别。
I'm sorry, Caiyi. I've asked a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission to come here... so I came to bid goodbye to you.
帝弓垂怜，能再次见到记忆中的你，真好。但是，我不能驻足在这一刻，我仍要带着对你的记忆往前进。

The Reignbow took pity on me, allowing me to once again meet the person you are in my memories. For that, I'm grateful. But I must not stay stagnant in this moment. I want to move on with my life while holding on to my memories of you.
你的女儿，不…是我们的女儿，晴霓，她很好。
Your daughter, no... Our daughter, Qingni, is doing very well now.
真抱歉啊，我不能完成对你的承诺了…晴霓会如她自己所选，成为一名飞行士。和你一样了不起的飞行士！
I'm sorry that I couldn't fulfill my promise to you... Qingni will become a pilot, as she chose for herself. She will become a pilot as marvelous as you were!
我明白，谢谢你。在飞去下一处前，我想问你……
I understand. Thank you. Before going to my next destination, I wish to ask you...
Will you... ever touch the sky again?
驭空没有回话，她深深看向自己故友的幻影，把答案留在了心里。
Yukong doesn't reply. She gazes soulfully at the illusion of her deceased friend and keeps the answer to herself.
幽灵与星槎突然散作飞舞的流萤星火，不再成形。你们将这些无主的岁阳收进了藏月瓠中。
The phantom and the starskiff suddenly disperse into fluttering glitters like fireflies, no longer taking shape. Your group captures these masterless heliobi into the Lunaumbra Gourd.
各位，我会向晴霓讲讲这几天发生的一切，她应该知道的。

等等，咱们没提过晴霓吧？

当女儿的有什么事能瞒得住妈妈呢。

请容我一个人在这儿静静待一会儿。

思念变成一艘星槎飞回来了，原来岁阳也会做这样的事……

…在这种时候，我才会回想起寒鸦大人说，岁阳只是被情绪吸引的星火之精。
...Times like this make me recall how Madam Hanya said heliobi are simply starfire essence attracted by emotions.
也许，岁阳从来没有基于善恶而决定行动。

那个，虽然有些破坏气氛……
Well, I know this spoils the mood...
我拍到了幽灵星槎，咱们现在发个帖子吧？

确实破坏气氛，我来发吧。

…我猜，驭空大人之后还会回来的吧。

那今天就这样解散吧，回见！

请看，这是真正的幽灵星槎…投影。
Look, this is the real phantom starskiff's... projection.
狐人的奠仪会将逝者们的遗物放上星槎，送出仙舟，航入恒星，与之同辉。

…其实是希望故人乘船归来吧？

我和天舶司的同僚商量了一番，我们在狐眠冢放置星槎投影，让每一个前来悼念的人心中有所寄托。妈妈，你看看，这怎么样？

I had a discussion with our colleagues in the Sky-Faring Commission, and we decided to place a projection of the starskiff at Foxsomn Tomb, so everyone who comes to mourn will have something to pin their hopes on. Mother, take a look at this. What do you think?
做得好，就让它停靠在这里吧。
Well done. We'll keep it docked at Foxsomn Tomb.
是你啊，{NICKNAME}。这次幽灵星槎的事麻烦你了，替我向捉鬼小队表示感谢。

…真好看，本姑娘果然是天生丽质！
...That looks great! I truly am a natural beauty!
So it's not because of my photography skills?
好好好~看在你帮我这么多忙的份上，我就承认这点吧。
Alright, alright~ As you've helped me so much, I'll give you that.
It really is a great photo.
对吧！你的审美也算是过关啦！
Right? Looks like your taste is passable, too!
最上等的食材往往不需要复杂的烹饪工序…就算你的拍照技术还差点火候，凭咱这张脸也足以拯救这张照片啦！
The finest ingredients don't require complex recipes... Even if your photography skills leave a lot to be desired, at least my beautiful face was enough to save this photo!
之前真是吓死我了，还以为这些照片再也找不回来了呢。
I was so scared that I was never going to be able to get these photos back.
总感觉如果失去了这些记录，这些回忆也会被淡忘…但肯定都是错觉！本姑娘可不会忘记我们一起经历的旅程！
I felt like if I lost these records, these memories would just fade away... But, that's not true! There is no way I would forget our journeys together!
不管怎么说，总算是把咱的照片全都救回来了，这次的事情也可以算是旅途中的珍贵回忆之一了！
Either way, we finally managed to get all of our photos back. Now, this whole ordeal will become another precious memory along our journey!
所以说…{NICKNAME}，我们拍张合照留念吧！
So... Let's take a photo together to commemorate this moment, {NICKNAME}!
I truly am a natural beauty!
唉，练习了这么多天，你的艺术素养居然还没有提升……
Ah, after all these days of practice, your artistic skills still haven't improved...
好了，那这张照片就送给你吧！
Alright, I'll give you this one!
喏，好好保管，不要弄丢或者弄坏了……
Take care of it, okay? Don't lose it or damage it...
最重要的是——不要忘了这是我给你拍的照片！
Most importantly... Don't forget that I gave you this picture!
拍摄的目标应该不是桑博，再拍一张吧……
Sampo probably isn't the target for this picture, let's take another one...
（拍摄的角度不太好，还是再拍一张吧……）
(The angle isn't great on this one, I should take another one...)
喂喂，大名鼎鼎的开拓者不会想耍赖吧？
Hey, hey! The great Trailblazer wouldn't be up to anything shameless now, right?
怎么了？忘了使用相机的方法了吗？
What's wrong? Have you forgotten how to use a camera?
How's it going? Have you finished taking pictures?
演出结束，周围的人群散去了…
The performance finishes and the surrounding crowd disperses...
(The person in the photo must be nearby...)
（照片里的东西应该要等等才能出现……）
(I need to wait for the object in the picture to appear...)

(The shadow in the photo should be something commonly seen on the Express...)
三月七把你们的合照放到了照片墙
March 7th put your photo on the photo wall.
You moved Hook into the picture...
{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我隔着老远就看到你啦，你要去金人巷吗？
You're easy to spot, haha! Are you going to Aurum Alley?
那像你这样刚刚抵达仙舟的旅客一定很需要一个导游吧！
A new arrival like you should get a tour guide!
嗯嗯，作为到处吃喝…咳，外出看诊的名医，我对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方真是了如指掌，雇了我可绝不会让你吃亏的！

Mm-hm, as a renowned doctor, I regularly go out for street food. A—After I'm done treating my patients, that is! Anyway, basically I'm an expert on all the culinary delights the Xianzhou has to offer, so... Ugh, hire me as your tour guide already!
有什么关系嘛！外出看诊的名医，也会对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方了如指掌啊。雇了我可绝不会让你吃亏的！
Yeah, so what? I go out all the time to see patients, so I know the food establishments around here like the back of my hand. I'm the best tour guide around!
写作导游，读作吃白食的。
"Tour guide"? Sounds like a fancy way of getting free food.
竟、竟然一眼看穿了我的想法……
但多一个人又有什么关系嘛，作为到处吃喝…咳，外出看诊的名医，我对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方了如指掌，雇了我可绝不会让你吃亏的！
But the more the merrier, right? I go out all the time to see patients, so I know the food establishments around here like the back of my hand. I'm the best tour guide you could hope for!
一路上我分文不取，当然当然，如果你要吃点什么记得带上我就好~
I won't charge anything for my services... except for food, of course!
如果在游玩途中遇到些肠胃不适、跌打损伤的小问题，也有我这样超专业的医士为您立刻诊治，这样的好事哪里能找到喔！

什么嘛，你到了长乐天都还没有去过金人巷吗？
Wait, you've been to Exalting Sanctum before but you never visited Aurum Alley?
我忙得很，没有闲逛的功夫。
I'm too busy to wander around random places.
咦，真的吗？你都来到了长乐天，却没空闲逛，真是可怜……
Really? You didn't have time to look around? What a pity...
我以为长乐天就这么点儿地方。
I didn't know there was anything else to see in Exalting Sanctum.
Didn't know? There's lots to see around here!
看来像你这样刚刚抵达仙舟的旅客一定需要一个导游！
Looks like you're in need of a professional tour guide!

看来不带上你是不行了…

快点快点，要是去晚了小吃都卖完了怎么办？
Hurry up! Do you want the snacks to sell out!?
{NICKNAME}游客，咱们到啦，这儿就是金人巷了！要论旅游项目的特色，当然就是「好吃的特别多」。
{NICKNAME}, we've reached our destination — Aurum Alley! Of course, the main feature of this tour is the endless selection of tasty delicacies.
尤其是「尚滋味」的江湖菜，这样的味道整个罗浮仙舟也只有金人巷这里才能吃得到。
The folk dishes at Spices Supreme are a must-try. This is the only place on the Luofu you can find them.
所以，话既然说到了这里……
You're the tour guide. What do you recommend?
…推荐推荐？你应该说「我请你吃点好吃的」。
...Recommend? I think you mean: "I'd like to treat you to some Xianzhou delicacies."
*sigh* Which Xianzhou delicacies would you like?
蒜苗五花肉脆瓜胡辣鸡丁星芋扣肉红油乱斩牛杂陈婆豆腐…哎，我舌头都要打结了！背药名都没这么利索的……

Ooh! Garlic-infused Pork, Crisped Melon and Diced Chicken, Star Taro Braised Pork, Chili Oil Beef Offal Stew, Granny Chen's Tofu... Ugh, I'm getting tired saying them all! Reciting medicine ingredients is easier than this!
当然了，我们可以先去小吃摊上垫个底，你可以先想想自个有什么想吃的，我找个空位子等你。
Let's start with the snack stands. You can browse around for bit — I'll go find us a seat while you make up your mind.
（总之，先向食客们打听打听吧……）
(I should see what the other customers have to say about the food here...)
这旅游攻略好像还没有更新啊。
This travel guide needs an update.
…你问我小吃摊上有什么东西好吃吗？
...Oh, you wanna know which snack stalls I recommend around here?
这你可问对人了，虽然我跟你一样都是初来乍到，但是这里的美食我都尝了一遍。
Well, you've come to the right person. It's my first time here too, but I've tried everything.
金人巷有很多食物我从来都没有听过，第一次吃的时候，其实还有些害怕。
There's a lot of things here that I've never even heard of — I was kinda scared to try them.
你可以试试「貘馍卷」，看上去就像是蛋糕卷一样。小吃摊老板说这是用「梦貘」做的，那到底是什么生物呀？
I recommend the tuskpir wraps — they're very similar to cake rolls, but the hawker said they're made from something called... well, "tuskpir..." What do you suppose that is?
当时我整个人都懵了。我犹豫再三，一咬牙、一跺脚、狠狠心吃下去之后，发现这「貘馍卷」就是谷物小点心，什么嘛，差点被老板骗了。
I'll admit, I was hesitant to try it at first. But once I worked up the courage and took a bite, it turned out to be just another delicious snack.
不过味道倒是意外独特，咬口酥脆，入口即化。吃下肚片刻还会对过去品尝美食的回忆产生一些联想。所以说，这真的是「梦貘」做的吗……

Very unique taste — crispy melt-in-the-mouth type texture too... Y'know, the flavor kinda reminded me of a lot of stuff I'd eaten before, but I couldn't put my finger on anything. That's the magic of "tuskpir," I guess...
Is there anything I should avoid?
你听说过「苏打豆汁儿」吗？仙舟本地人总说这玩意儿可好喝了。我买来喝了一口，喷了邻桌食客一身。
Have you heard of mung bean soda? The Xianzhou locals say it's delicious. So I bought one, took a sip, and then sprayed it all over the diners at the next table.
「苏打豆汁儿」颜色灰绿，味道酸腐，我看这东西只有一些本地老饕能受得了，您呀，也别抱着兴趣随便尝试了。
It has a grayish green color and a sour, rotten flavor... I reckon there's a handful of food connoisseurs that actually like it. Try some if you dare, but don't get your hopes up.
…你问有什么好吃的吗？金人巷这地方，你闭着眼睛随便走，哪一家都好吃。
...Oh, interested in the food? In Aurum Alley, there's no such thing as a bad food stall. Just close your eyes and pick one at random.
我叫霄翰，虽说是金人巷本地人，但也好久没有回来了。离家在外的时候，光是想着这里的味道，乡愁便让我彻夜难眠。
My name's Xiaohan. I'm originally from Aurum Alley, but this is my first visit in a long time. When I was away, I'd stay up at night reminiscing about the flavors and aromas of this place.
你是温和派、还是激进派？
Are you feeling adventurous or cautious?
那我推荐你去点一碗「热浮羊奶」，甜甜的，不腻口。喝下肚去还会觉得自己体重变轻了——当然，不能替代减肥餐。

Then I recommend trying a bowl of steamed puffergoat milk. It has a mild, sweet flavor and a smooth texture. People say they feel lighter after drinking it! Of course, it's no substitute for a balanced diet.
Depends on what you mean by "adventurous."
你要是想要激进的，就得尝尝「苏打豆汁儿」了。
If you're really feeling adventurous, you could try some mung bean soda.
这豆汁儿啊，要尝它的「酸」，酸中带…怪的味道。
I'd describe the taste as... unique. And a little sour.
你还可以试着大口猛灌…任由这饮料在肚子里翻江倒海。那滋味，妙极了。
It's best to drink it in big gulps, and let it fizzle in your stomach. That's a great feeling.
没想到，您这是游子归乡。
So you're a wanderer returning home.
仙舟上有化外民来观光，我们也得去其他世界看看，多听多看多交流嘛。
The Xianzhou gets plenty of visitors, so it's only natural that we should venture out and see what other worlds are like.
可惜离家百年归来，只觉得这金人巷越发萧瑟陌生。只有「苏打豆汁儿」还算是一如既往。
I spent <unbreak>100</unbreak> years away from home, and I have to say... Aurum Alley has seen better days. It's looking kind of run-down. The only thing that hasn't changed is the mung bean soda.
我才第一次来，不觉得它冷清。
I don't think it's that bad.
哈哈哈哈，这不过是我的归乡感受罢了。
Was this place more prosperous back then?
没错，许久以前，这金人巷曾是罗浮第一夜市。
That it was. Many years ago, Aurum Alley was the most popular night market on the Luofu.
虽说我在外面事业小成，但我始终爱着这金人巷，终究还是回来了。
I had a good career going out on the other worlds, but I always missed the Alley. In the end, I decided to come back.
…我想着能不能出一份力，让这里变得更美好一些。
...Now I'm keen to do my part and make this place a little better.
这店家到底懂不懂什么是流量，懂不懂什么是经济啊！
Do these people know nothing about the value of brand exposure? That's marketing <unbreak>101</unbreak>!
I'm wondering what's good to eat around here...
我是不是在哪里见过你啊？
Have I seen you somewhere before?
见过我？不不不，你没见过我…哎呀，你在这杵着就是为了想打听我的建议，对吧？
Me? No, no, no, no, no, we've never met... Oh, are you wondering what's good to eat around here?
你问我小吃，算是问对人了，我是大名鼎鼎的「食探」，最擅长去大小饭馆里探店。
Well, I can help you with that — I'm known around here as the "forager" — I venture into all manner of culinary establishments to taste test their food.
可惜这家老板非要说我吃白食，不让我探店，活该后悔去吧。
The seller at this food stall won't let me do any taste testing because I'm not a "paying customer." Well, if they don't want free publicity, that's their loss.
那你就信我的，就点「琼实鸟串」或者「鸣藕糕」，绝对不会出错。
Ah, with my discriminating taste as your guide, you'll never go wrong. Give the berrypheasant skewers or songlotus cake a try.
Don't taste testers pay for their own food?
跟你话说不到一块去。我探店，其实是在帮店家做宣传，这本来是要收钱的。
You're clearly not familiar with this line of work. Taste testing gives the restaurant publicity — that means a higher sales conversion!
…算了算了，我也不计较了，我到别处探店去。
...Ah, forget it. There are other food vendors here waiting for me to appraise them...
{NICKNAME}，买小吃的事就拜托你了，别让我等太久啦。
{NICKNAME}, I'm counting on you to go buy all the snacks — don't keep me waiting too long!
哎哟，这位客官是化外民游客吧。我想问您一句，喜欢金人巷这地方吗？
Oh, a visitor from afar? May I ask you a question — do you like Aurum Alley?
It's my first visit here, I can't say yet.
Then I'll have to make sure your first visit here is a good one.
喜欢，这里的人都很友好。
Yes, the people here are very friendly.
那就好，那就好。我们对远道而来的客人都是很热情的。
Glad to hear. We always try to treat visitors from outside well.
…客人别嫌我唠叨，你从外面的世界来的，了解星际和平公司吗，风评好吗？
...I hope you don't mind me prattling on, but since you're an Outworlder, are you familiar with the IPC? Do you know if it has a good reputation?
公司对银河贸易帮助巨大。
It's been a great help to pan-cosmic business.
确实，巡镝和信用点之间兑换也很方便。
That's true, and they made it much more convenient to exchange strale and credits.
资本巨鳄，感觉不是好东西。
They're a cabal of predatory sharks.
我听会长说「公司会毁掉金人巷」，我有些担心。
I was a little worried when I heard the president say that the IPC is going to destroy Aurum Alley.
…只记得查宝的广告非常烦人。
...All I know is its Findie ads are really annoying.
查宝？我不知道那是什么。
Findie? I've never heard of that before.
换句话说，你其实也不太了解星际和平公司……
Anyway, sounds like you know as much about them as I do...
哎呀，我也不能把你晾在这里…你看看菜单，选选想吃什么吧，算是阿姨送你的。
Well, I can't just leave you here empty handed — take a look at the menu. Order whatever you want — it's on the house.
I'll have some steamed puffergoat milk.
I'll have some mung bean soda.
啊，太好了，你怎么知道我想吃什么？
Fantastic! Hey, how did you know my favorite food?
I just know you that well.
我觉得你是什么都想吃。
I'm pretty sure you'll eat anything.
太好了…但你好像只买了一份，怎么办？
Great... but it looks like you only brought enough for one person... what am I supposed to do?
You can have it — I'm not really hungry.
老板送我的，我面子薄没多要。
The stallholder gave me this for free, and I'd feel embarrassed asking for more.
Yeah, I would feel bad asking for more, too.
这份是我的，你的要自己去买。
This one's mine. Now you can go buy your own.
哎哟，这不是龙女大人嘛…来来来，我再给你们拿一些，千万不要客气。
Ah! It's the Dragon Lady... Here, I'll get you another serving — no need to be shy.
在食客们喧闹的交谈声中，时间就在不经意间匆匆逝去。
Amidst the bustling of the diners, time flies by before you even notice.
回过神来，你已经沉浸在金人巷的夜市气氛之中了。
When you return to your senses again, you find yourself immersed in the atmosphere of Aurum Alley's bustling night market.
苏打豆汁儿…你、你不会是故意的吧？
Mung bean soda... Is this some sort of prank?
苏打豆汁儿，仙舟老饕都说妙！
The foodies here all say it's a must-try!
Tee-hee, I chose it on purpose~ *giggles proudly*
…这一碗苏打豆汁儿还是你喝了吧。
No, thanks, I'm not really thirsty.
不不不，你是外来的客人，你应该试试。
No, no, no, you're our honored guest — you can drink it.
我喝就我喝，这能有多可怕？
Fine. How bad can it be, anyway?
就像喝药一样，眼睛一闭心一横就喝完啦。
It's just like drinking medicine — close your eyes and cross your heart.
哎哟，这不是龙女大人嘛…来来来，我再给你们拿一些，千万不要客气。
Ah! It's the Dragon Lady... Here, I'll get you another serving — no need to be shy.
哎！豆汁？呃，不、不用了！唉，好吧。谢谢高阿姨。
Huh!? W—Wait, Auntie, I—I'm not thirsty, please... *sigh* Thank you, Auntie...
在食客们喧闹的交谈声中，你们随意地谈起有趣的话题。时间就在不经意间匆匆逝去，回过神来，你已经沉浸在金人巷的夜市气氛之中了。
Amidst the bustling of the night market, you and Bailu share news and fun stories. Time flies by before you even notice.
我差点就在小吃摊上吃饱了，正事还没有做呢。
*sigh* I'm so full of snacks I can hardly move. I haven't even gotten around to business yet.
这次出门想去买些药罐子，就在前面的「清玩斋」，走吧走吧。
I wanted to stop by Elegance Pagoda to buy some medicine jars while I'm out. Come on, let's go.
你们好好说话，可别欺负人——
Watch your words, no need to be aggressive here...
Hey, what's going on at the dock?
公司的人和码头工人们吵起来了。
Some of the dock workers got into an argument with the IPC folks.
…要不？我们先到码头上去看看吧。
...How about we go see what's happening at the dock?
万一有人受伤了怎么办，快走。
What if someone gets hurt and needs medical attention? Come on.
喂，这又是从哪里蹿出来的野丫头，这关你什么事？
When did you decide to show up, little miss feisty? How is this any of your business?
身为云骑，码头上发生冲突，我岂有坐视不管的道理？还有，我不叫喂，也不叫野丫头，我叫素裳！
As a Cloud Knight, I can't just sit back and do nothing when I see civil unrest. And for your information, my name isn't "little miss feisty" — it's Sushang!
Person Appearing as Merchant Guild Secretary
姑娘，这件事就交给我们金人巷商会来处理吧。

——这都要怪你们金人巷商会呀。
Person Appearing as Merchant Guild Secretary

Then say it out loud so everyone can hear: Aurum Alley Merchant Guild apologizes to every vendor here for defaulting on the lease and leaving us to pick up the mess!

等等，我俩不是围观群众吗？

Person Appearing as Merchant Guild Secretary

谁说商会就一定还不上，这要…要是能还上呢？

这样吧，咱俩打一个赌，要是商会能还上公司的租金，我就当着金人巷父老乡亲的面低头道歉……

我还要大声地说「我是个有眼无珠的蠢货！不知天高地厚，只会狺狺狂吠！」然后我在你面前只能学狗叫，如何？
I'll shout it loud and clear — "I'm a raving idiot howling into the wind!" And then I'll bark like a dog. How does that sound?
好啊，要是我打赌输了怎么办？
简单呀，你也当着父老乡亲的面如此向我赔礼道歉，在我的面前学狗叫。
Oh, that's simple. You apologize to me in front of all the people of Aurum Alley, and you bark like a dog.
This is so childish. Don't accept.
...You're not being very helpful, are you?
大家都听到了，我就等着了，哈哈哈哈，我们走！
You all heard that, right? I'll be waiting for you, hahaha. Come on, let's get out of here!

…冷、冷静下来，才发现要是输了会给云骑军丢脸。但是你瞧那家伙气焰嚣张的样子，他要是败了学狗叫，那狼狈样子一定很有趣。
...Now that I think about it, if I lose the bet, it'll reflect badly on the Cloud Knights... but you can't give in to bullies! He's the one who'll be barking like a dog.
商业问题还得让商会解决吧…
Merchant matters should be left to the Merchant Guild to handle...
这倒是没错，但是我也实在瞧不过那家伙的气焰嘛！
Maybe... but you can't give in to bullies!
我叫明曦，是金人巷商会的秘书，大家平时叫我「小秘书」。这金人巷码头的事，原本是商会与公司之间的纠纷，不该牵连各位的。

My name is Mingxi. I'm the secretary of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild — most people just call me Miss Secretary. This leasing dispute is between the IPC and the Merchant Guild — you shouldn't have been dragged into it.
再说这样的话可就疏远了。

所以，码头真的还不上租金了吗？
So, is it true that the Merchant Guild can't pay back the lease?
...Miss Secretary, just tell it like it is.
按照现在的情况来看，金人巷码头经营不善，暂时还不上租金。
As things stand now, the Merchant Guild is in no position to pay back the lease.
这码头是商会租用的吗？
This dock was leased out to the Merchant Guild?
对，光是租用港口，商会就已经欠公司一屁股债了。
Yes, the entire port... Now we owe the IPC an arm and a leg.
我感觉金人巷也蛮繁华的？
Aurum Alley looks like it's flourishing though?
小吃的生意倒还算热闹，但其他生意，还有码头的运营却到了捉襟见肘的地步。
The food hawkers are thriving, but dock operations and other businesses are stretched to the breaking point.
金人巷码头营收要如何改善？
What can we do to fix Aurum Alley's balance sheet?
要是能改善就能赚钱，然后就能还上欠款了吧？
If we can make the businesses more profitable, then maybe we have a chance of paying back the IPC?
「开源节流」就能增加码头的营收。如今「开源」困难重重，很多金人巷商铺拒绝与货运码头合作……

If we cut costs and tap into new revenue streams, we can turn things around. A lot of vendors in Aurum Alley don't want anything to do with the dock though, so it may be hard to find new sources of revenue...
「节流」就是降低成本，如各位所见，码头也没有全部开放，而工人嘛……
Cutting costs means reducing expenses. As you can see, the dock isn't even fully utilized, and the workers, well...
喂喂喂，你们商会可别想着要裁人啊！
Hey, hey, hey, don't get any funny ideas about laying people off!
小秘书也在想办法嘛。要我说，现在发送订单的效率有些低，要是能在这花些心思，肯定能节约成本。
Miss Secretary is just helping us think of ideas. If you ask me, I think our ordering system is rather inefficient. I'm sure we could reduce our costs if we found a way to improve it.
Can I give it a try?
没想到您还有这样的本事，请您一定得试试。
I didn't realize you were such an entrepreneur.
I don't think that would save much...
总比什么都不做要好，{NICKNAME}，我看你很擅长动脑子，你试试嘛。
It's better than doing nothing. {NICKNAME}, you're smart — why don't you give it a try?
你从哪儿诊断出我有脑子的？

没关系的，您可以作为商会的顾问来参与此事。就算搞砸了也没关系…毕竟现在的状况已经很糟了呀，坏又能坏到哪儿去呢。

往好处想，万一成了呢？咱们以后在金人巷的消费说不定就被他们全包了！

没关系的，您可以作为商会的顾问来参与此事。就算搞砸了也没关系…毕竟现在的状况已经很糟了呀，坏又能坏到哪儿去呢。
Don't worry, the situation is already bad as it is, so it's no big deal if things don't pan out. You can be on this project as our consultant.
商会会长都没得法子，这位短生种小朋友真能做到吗？唉，死马当作活马医好了！

嘘！这可不能大声说出来啊。

Impressive... but if you ask me, inventory efficiency isn't enough to save us. If Heron Express doesn't deliver the goods, then they're just gonna sit around collecting dust.
明白了，你们要是方便的话，能跟我去一趟「鹤运物流」的金人巷分部吗？
I see your point. If you have the time, could you accompany me to Heron Express' Aurum Alley branch office?

Of course! It's just... I'm better with brawn than brains...
我看这金人巷，还得靠我啊。

不小心又给自己揽了一身事。
Seems like I could make a career out of this.
这不是小秘书吗，你身边这几位是？

我是云骑素裳，这位头上长角的小姑娘我想就不用介绍了吧！而这位是……
I'm Sushang of the Cloud Knights. I think you already know the little girl with horns on her head. And this is...
I'm the savior of Aurum Alley.
It doesn't matter who I am.
这时候还要保持神秘吗？

It'll be easier to escape if nobody knows my name.
你们好…小秘书，听说你们在码头和公司的人打赌了，没还上欠款就要当面学狗叫？
Good to meet you all... Miss Secretary, I heard you made a bet with the IPC... and if you lose you have to bark like a dog?

跟公司打赌的，是这位女侠。

没错，金人巷的各位不必担心，是我去打赌的。

Right — if the Merchant Guild pay back what they owe, the only one barking will be that IPC stooge.

We made our inventory more efficient, but the dock workers said we still need a way to distribute the goods. I was wondering if Heron Express would be interested...
你听码头工人说，他们肯定说责任不在他们。要我说，这责任也不在我们。
Those dock workers don't want to take responsibility, and I'm afraid it's not our responsibility, either.
那…我们应该怪谁，又怪公司吗？
Then who should we blame? The IPC?
公司高调宣传自己将接管金人巷，并承诺会有「商铺补助」…我怀疑他们悄悄打过招呼，让商铺们别用码头物流。
The IPC said that they would handle operations at Aurum Alley and promised to give subsidies to the vendors... I suspect they secretly told all the vendors not to use the dock for logistics.
码头订单少，不能怪物流。
