...Sounds like the IPC set a trap for the merchant guild.
这都怪我们之前没有察觉他们的计谋。
*sigh* We can only blame ourselves for letting them get away with it for so long.
头好痒，好像要长出脑子了。
I think my brain is about to explode from all this.
没事，有机会我再告诉您详细情况吧。
Don't worry, I'll explain all the details to you later.
要是还不上租金，亏损事小，失信事大。商会如果失去了商铺的信任，终究是名存实亡…如果没有了商会，公司在金人巷这片商区也就没有竞争对手了。

If we can't pay back the rent, the financial damages will be manageable, but the reputational damage will be irreparable. If the Merchant Guild loses everyone's trust, it'll become an empty shell of its former self... and without the Merchant Guild, the IPC will have no competitors in Aurum Alley's business district.
公司想把这里建设成大型物流中转仓，到时小吃铺、旧货商铺都得搬离这里……
The IPC wants to turn this place into a big logistics warehouse. By then, the food hawkers and used goods stores will have to move away...
啊…也就是说，「金人巷」要没了吗？
Ah... So no more Aurum Alley?
是啊，虽然金人巷的每一寸土地都在，但属于它的味道、它的游客，还有大家对它繁荣景象的记忆都将不复存在了。
Correct. The physical space will still exist, but the Aurum Alley we all know — its fragrances, its bustling tourists — will be nothing more than a memory.
说说眼前的事吧——我们要怎么做？
Let's not get ahead of ourselves — what are we gonna do about the matter at hand?
对于物流来说，只要合理规划物流路线，就能有效降低成本。
On the logistics side, we can reduce costs by making sure the delivery routes are planned efficiently.
垣风老哥，你让这位{NICKNAME}试试，{F#她}{M#他}有些本事，也许能作为参考。
Mr. Yuanfeng, please allow {NICKNAME} to try {F#her}{M#his} hand at it. {F#She}{M#He} has some skills that could prove useful in this area.
交给我试试吧，我不敢保证。
I can't make any promises, but I'll try my best.
不止有些本事，而是本事大了。
没错没错，{F#她}{M#他}可比我头脑灵活多了。
为什么不用玉兆来计算？
Why not use a jade abacus to calculate the routes?
建木灾变后，玉兆的运筹功能都被限定在特殊部门的工作上。区区小巷子里的商业规划，只能靠咱们的脑瓜了。

After the Ambrosial Arbor disaster, the use of jade abaci for any kind of strategic planning was restricted to certain departments. For business planning in Aurum Alley, we can only rely on our brains.
而且，商会顾问的职责不仅仅是规划，还有说服和博弈…我们想要仰仗您的可不止这份规划的才能哦。
Also, the duties of a Merchant Guild consultant include planning, negotiation and strategy... We're going to be relying on you for more than just delivery routes.
按照你的思路来，物流应该能减少不少成本。
With these routes in place, logistics costs will be reduced significantly.
我果然没有看错！你们就是能帮助金人巷复兴的救星。
I knew it! You're the heroes who can help us revitalize Aurum Alley.
现在能告诉我们金人巷到底发生了什么吗？
Now can you tell us what really happened to Aurum Alley?
金人巷原本是长乐天洞天最繁华的夜市，在过去，这条以美食和商业著称的巷子里挤满了为主人领取货物的金人…不过繁华早已过去了。

...Well, Aurum Alley was originally the busiest night market in Exalting Sanctum. In days past, this alley, famed for its food and commerce, was brimming with aurumatons collecting goods for their masters... but that prosperity has long since passed.
民用金人被限制，新兴的商业中心也开始冒头。金人巷就像是走在一段平缓的下坡路上——所有人都知道它江河日下，却不以为这是严重之事。

Restrictions were placed on civilian aurumatons, and new commercial centers began to spring up. It was like being on a gentle downhill slope — everyone knew things were changing, but no one thought it was serious.
随着罗浮仙舟暂时停泊休养，和公司的贸易往来越发频繁，商会遭遇到真正的威胁——公司高调宣布竞标金人巷的开发。他们的承诺看得见、摸得着，并且极富侵略性。

When the Luofu was moored for maintenance and trade with the IPC increased, a new threat emerged for the Merchant Guild — the IPC's announcement of a bid for the development of Aurum Alley. Their promises were visible, tangible, and extremely aggressive.
「平缓的下坡路」突然断裂坍塌，没有人能够再装作视而不见。商会与金人巷本身都已经岌岌可危。
When the "gentle downhill slope" suddenly became the edge of a cliff, no one could pretend to ignore it anymore. Both the Merchant Guild and Aurum Alley itself were in jeopardy.
Can you fill us in on the details?
金人巷商区的经营合同即将到期，公司地区主管将此视为目标，并开始布局，码头债务危机也只是布局的一部分。

The contract for operating Aurum Alley's business district is about to expire, and the IPC's regional director has seen an opportunity. They orchestrated the dock debt crisis, and that's just the beginning.
与此同时，这个地区不同的商铺也犹豫不决——有些人将公司视为卧榻之侧的虎豹，心怀不轨；也有人将公司承诺的高额利润看作转机……

Meanwhile, vendors in Aurum Alley have expressed mixed feelings about the IPC — some see it as a crouching tiger with malicious intentions, while others see the IPC's promise of high profits as a chance to turn things around...
不安的情绪已经愈演愈烈——现如今人人都担心「金人巷就要没了」。商会必须做出点什么，至少要为本地商户再争取到一些利益。
But now the chill is setting in — everyone is worried that Aurum Alley is going to disappear. The Merchant Guild has to do something to help the merchants here.
I get the gist of it.
所以，我谨代表商会正式向你们发出邀请，希望你们能作为<color=#dbc291ff>「商业顾问」</color>参与到拯救金人巷的计划中。
Therefore, on behalf of the Merchant Guild, I would like to formally extend an invitation to you all to serve as <color=#dbc291ff>"business advisors"</color> in the plan to save Aurum Alley.
交给我吧，我能帮得上忙的。
Leave it to me. I'm sure I can be of some use.
请问「商务顾问」薪资丰厚吗？
How favorable is the compensation for this position?
虽然商会手头并不宽裕，但绝不会亏待你的。
The Merchant Guild is tight on funds, but we'll be sure to make it worth your time.
不好意思，我不做亏本生意。
Sorry, but I'm not a business strategist.
…是这样的吗？请你不要马上拒绝我。
...Is that how you feel? Well, don't turn down the offer just yet.
这样吧，先和身边的朋友们商量下如何？
Why don't you talk it over with everyone first?
我肯定是希望你能来帮忙的。
I really hope you can help out.
毕竟我不帮忙，你就要道歉了。
Of course. You'd be in big trouble if I don't.
道歉的事倒是不打紧。但我真心想帮助金人巷。
I'm not worried about that, I just want to help save Aurum Alley.
…你也不想我在那么多人面前学小狗叫吧？而且，我真的很想帮金人巷一把。
...You don't want me to have to bark like a dog in front of all those people, do you? Besides, I'd really like to help the people in Aurum Alley.
我的老家曜青仙舟，和公司有着更密切的往来。据说最初也只是公司在此投资互市。不过时间久了，事情就有了变化……
My home, the Xianzhou Yaoqing, had much closer ties with the IPC. Initially, people thought they were just engaging in a little interstellar investment... but over time, things changed.
渐渐地，曜青的年轻一辈开始喜欢起公司娱乐部门生产的幻戏和玩具；穿上了剪裁贴身、设计时髦的公司服饰，都快分不清他们是仙舟人还是公司职员了。

Gradually, the Yaoqing's younger generations began to enjoy the immersia produced by the IPC's Entertainment Division. Once they started wearing IPC clothing lines, you could hardly tell if they were Xianzhou locals or IPC employees.
还有不少人渴望在成人礼之后去往公司的世界赚钱。
After their Coming of Age Ceremonies, a lot of them aspired to join the IPC to make it big.
洞天里的建筑也变得面目全非了。我小时候看见的优美飞檐变得越来越少，琉璃瓦和息壤砖也消失了。一座座表面平滑，像纪念碑一样的公司大楼开始拔地而起。

The architecture across the whole delve began to change. The graceful flying eaves I saw as a child became fewer and fewer, and the glazed tiles and Fallow Earth bricks gradually disappeared. Sleek, monolithic IPC buildings started sprouting up everywhere.
但凡活过五百岁朝上的曜青人，比如我娘，他们都说曜青变了。可他们也说不上这一切变化究竟是奔向一个美好的未来，还是滑向被短生种左右的滑坡…他们只是惶恐不安。

Any of the Yaoqing locals older than <unbreak>500</unbreak> — like my mother — will say the Yaoqing has changed. But they're not sure whether this change is leading to a better future, or if it's allowing short-life species to dictate their way of life... It's making everyone anxious.
看到明曦面对公司那家伙时，我感到了同样的不安。明明活过了数倍于对方的生命，却在面对他们时茫然不知所措。
When I saw Mingxi being confronted by the IPC, I felt the same uneasiness. She's been around several life-spans longer than that stooge, but somehow she was still at a loss for how to deal with him.
如果对手是功夫了得的恶人，我倒是能挺身而出过上几招。但是金人巷这事仅靠拳脚功夫也没法解决，我有劲却无处使。
If our opponents were martial arts types, I could hold my own against them... but Aurum Alley's problems aren't something we can fight off with a sword.
我想帮助金人巷商会，想帮他们守住金人巷，拜托你了！
I want to help the Merchant Guild, I want to help everyone at Aurum Alley... please help me help them!
我明明只是来金人巷吃小吃的…没想到会撞上这么多事。
*sigh* I only came here for the food... I didn't expect to get tangled up in all this dock leasing stuff.
不过，你要是愿意出手相助的话，金人巷也许就不用消失了。
Still, if you're willing to give it a shot, maybe Aurum Alley doesn't have to disappear.
仔细想想，你好像什么都没做？
Wait a sec... You haven't contributed anything so far.
怎么会，我劝劝你，不就算我为金人巷做出了贡献吗？
That's not true, I'm doing something right now — persuading you to help us! An admirable contribution.
你只是担心小吃铺都要没了？
You're just worried all your favorite food stands are gonna disappear.
这难道还不重要吗？这就很重要…没有美食的金人巷就像…就像不装药丸的葫芦，毫无意义。
So what!? Hmph, the food's the best bit... Aurum Alley without food would be like a pill without medicine... meaningless!
我就知道你肯定会答应。你真是本小姐最值得信赖的好朋友！
I knew you'd help us! A truly reliable friend!
By "friend" you mean "free meal ticket," right?
怎么样，您能成为金人巷的「商业顾问」吗？
What do you think? Will you become a business advisor for Aurum Alley?
思考了再三，我还是想拒绝。
After much consideration, I'm still not up to it.
I don't know the first thing about business or consultancy...
A willingness to help is all we need.
这件事我还没跟会长说过，这样吧，我们现在就去会长那边。
I still haven't discussed any of this with the president — let's go pay them a visit.
垣风大哥担忧地注视着金人巷，他比看上去更加心思细腻。
Yuanfeng gazes at Aurum Alley anxiously. Seems like he's actually more meticulous than he appears.
连烟姐姐，请你转告会长，我找到了帮手能够拯救金人巷码头…不止如此，我认为{F#她}{M#他}能帮助金人巷再次复兴。
Miss Lianyan, please tell the president that I have someone who can help us with the leasing situation at the dock... and also bring Aurum Alley back to its former glory.
Hi, I'm that "someone" who can save y'all.
看来你这人信心满满呢。
Well, seems like you have plenty of confidence.
我这个人最讨厌面试了。
我亲眼见过您的能力，您绝对不用担心。
I've already seen your abilities — there's nothing to be nervous about.
稍等一下，我问问会长的看法。
I'll go ask the president's opinion on the matter. Please wait a moment.
会长相信小秘书的判断，不过还是准备了考验——请将「陈机铺」纳入到物流规划之中。
Okay, the president trusts Miss Secretary's judgment, but the applicant still needs to pass a test... You must integrate Oldies Depot into the logistics plan.
I'mma flex my skills for you real quick.
Don't get your hopes up too high...
连烟靠近店门，朝着店内小声地沟通了什么，没人听清她与会长的交谈。
Lianyan approaches the store's doorway and quietly conveys something to the one within. No one hears what she said to the president.
会长承认了{NICKNAME}的能力，同意将金人巷商会的部分管理权限开放。
The president acknowledges your expertise and agrees to confer management responsibilities accordingly.
至此，金人巷商会发出正式请求——请帮助商会摆脱危机，复兴金人巷的繁荣！
Aurum Alley Merchant Guild would like to issue a formal request... Please help us emerge from this crisis and revitalize Aurum Alley!
I will rise to the occasion.
You make it sound so formal.
现在就退出还来得及吗？
Is it too late to back out?
你们别在意，{F#她}{M#他}只是嘴上说说而已。
太好了，你平时有空的话，请到码头上来找我。
Now that that's settled, please come see me at the dock when you have time.
在我这里可以协助码头工人<color=#dbc291ff>「码放货物」</color>，以及协助鹤运物流完成<color=#dbc291ff>「物流规划」</color>。
You'll be able to help the dock workers <color=#dbc291ff>do the inventory</color> and help Heron Express with <color=#dbc291ff>logistics planning</color>.
我平时也会收集有关金人巷的各类情报，<color=#dbc291ff>其中包括商铺的情报，以及各种传闻。</color>解决各类事件，也能对复兴有所帮助。

I keep tabs on all the goings-on in Aurum Alley, <color=#dbc291ff>including rumors and the latest gossip.</color> If we can solve some of the problems in the community, it could help in rejuvenating Aurum Alley.
如果是「急人所急」之事，我也能帮忙。
If it involves helping people in need, count me in too.
如果你平时有空的话，请到码头上来找我。
Just come see me at the dock when you have time.
在我这里可以<color=#dbc291ff>协助码头工人「码放货物」，以及协助鹤运物流完成「物流规划」。</color>
You'll be able to help the dock workers <color=#dbc291ff>do the inventory and help Heron Express with logistics planning</color>.
我也会收集有关金人巷的各类情报，<color=#dbc291ff>其中包括商铺的情报，以及各种传闻。</color>解决各类事件，也能对复兴有所帮助。

I keep tabs on all the goings-on in Aurum Alley, <color=#dbc291ff>including rumors and the latest gossip</color>. If we can solve some of the problems in the community, it could help in rejuvenating Aurum Alley.
总之，就是去找你就对了呗？
So basically I just need to go talk to you at the dock?
有困难尽管来找我就对了。
Anytime you need anything, come find me.
眼下最要紧的就是争取在还款日到来之前完成债务目标。
The important thing right now is to generate enough revenue before the payment due date.
那么我先离开了，你随时可以在码头上找到我。
I'll be off to the dock then. Stop by anytime.
总之，金人巷的事就是我的事，要是遇到什么其他困难，你记得随时叫上我。
Any problem facing Aurum Alley is also my problem. If you encounter any difficulties, don't hesitate to come find me.
另外…我还是问一下吧，码头应该是能还上欠款的吧？
Also... I should probably ask... Do you really think we'll be able to pay back everything owed on the dock?
{NICKNAME}真厉害！你让我想起刚到罗浮时认识的一个好姐妹，她也和你一样既有救人所急的热心肠，一样的心灵手巧，本事不小。
{NICKNAME}, you're the best! You remind me of the friend I made when I first arrived on the Luofu — she had the same eagerness for saving people, and the same tenacity for solving problems.
…我了解。{NICKNAME}肯出手帮助这儿，已经让我很感动了！
...I understand, {NICKNAME}. But even then, it's impressive that you are willing to step up and help!
我还有云骑的任务在身，得先走一步了。得空的话，我会来金人巷帮忙的。
I have a mission from the Cloud Knights, so I have to leave for now. If I have time, I'll definitely come back to Aurum Alley to help out.
明明是拯救金人巷这么要紧的事，会长却根本没有露面，也不知道是怎么想的。
So strange — saving Aurum Alley is a critical issue, but the president didn't even make an appearance...
我们还没取得会长的信任吧。
Perhaps we haven't won their trust yet.
你可不能做经营码头的工具人呀。
Then why would they put you in charge of things at the dock...?
会长可能有什么难言之隐？
Perhaps they weren't feeling too well.
要是身有贵恙，我可以给帮忙看看，再开点儿药嘛。
If that's the case, I can give them a check-up and prescribe some medicine.
一不小心在这儿逗留了太久了，{NICKNAME}，我要先回丹鼎司瞧瞧，免得他们担心。你就好好加油吧！
Wow, time sure does fly when you're trying to save the world. {NICKNAME}, I need to get back to the Alchemy Commission. Keep up the good work around here!
我知道你想问问有关会长的消息，不过，我建议你眼下专注于码头的事务。
I know you want to ask about the president, but I suggest you focus your energy on managing the dock for now.
会长一直在关心各位的进展，不必担心。
Don't worry, the president is paying very close attention to our progress in Aurum Alley.
既然你来了，我们就开始处理码头相关的工作吧。
Now that you're here, let's get started on the dock-related work.
来得正好，大家正在向公司这家伙讨说法呢！
You're just in time — everyone is asking this IPC goon for an explanation!
你张嘴就是「公司这家伙」，也太不懂礼貌了吧。
Calling someone an "IPC goon" isn't very becoming of a Cloud Knight now, is it?
今天我不代表公司，我只是个金人巷的游客，你可以叫我斯科特。
I'm not here today as a representative of the IPC, I'm just a tourist. You can just call me Skott.
你看，这位{F#女士}{M#先生}就比你通情达理多了。
You see, this {F#young lady}{M#gentleman} understands etiquette.
我说，我只是寄个快递，怎么被你们围起来了？
Hmph, can't a man come here to deliver a package without being surrounded?
这家伙的货物有问题，会损坏其他客人的商品，害得码头一直在赔偿……
There's something wrong with the stuff this guy is shipping — it's causing damage to other people's goods, and our dock here is liable for the compensation...
我们要检查你的快递包裹。
We want to check your courier package.
你要不要自己解释一下原因？
Would you like to explain yourself?
哈——？说大声点，我听不太清。你们金人巷就是这么对待游客的？
Ha...? Speak louder, I can't quite hear you. Is this how you treat guests in Aurum Alley?
我们现在就去打开他的快递，肯定有鬼。
Let's open that package right here, right now — then we'll see what he's hiding!
你可得想清楚了，要是我的东西坏掉了，你赔得起吗？
I'd be careful if I were you — if you damage my goods, you'll have to pay for them.
如果是你的快递有问题呢？
What if we discover a serious issue with your package?
哈——？你说我的快递有问题，我还说你们有问题呢。
Ha...? A serious issue? I think you'll be the ones with the serious issue!
We can compensate you for any damages. Open it.
哈——？我没听错吧，{F#她}{M#他}说{F#她}{M#他}赔得起，真是让人意外。
Ha...? Did I hear that right? {F#She}{M#He} said {F#She}{M#he} can afford to pay for it. What a surprise.
少在那里阴阳怪气，我们现在就拆。
No need to make this difficult. Let's open it.
素裳和工人将斯科特的快递摆在码头的空地上。
Sushang and workers place Skott's package on the floor.
小秘书有些紧张，她也不知道如何是好。
Mingxi is a bit nervous. She's not sure how to proceed.
去检查检查货物里有什么蹊跷吧。
Let's check and see if there's anything suspicious.
精致的陶瓷花瓶。年代久远，体态均匀，瓶身上自然形成的纹理独一无二。这些瓷器大多昂贵并且容易碎裂，它不应该出现在这样的小小货运港里。

Intricate porcelain vase that can be dated to the distant past. Its well-balanced proportion and the naturally-formed patterns on its body make it stand out from the rest of its kind. Such an expensive and brittle vase shouldn't have been sent here.
漂亮的博古架。色泽沉穆，线条素雅，造型古朴，整体虚实相宜，空灵有致。文化人喜欢将笔墨纸砚、瓶瓶罐罐放在架子上，获得一番仙逸的快乐。

A beautiful antiques display shelf with sober color and an elegant contour. Its classic style lends itself an air of serenity. The shelf provides a suitable home for brushes and inkstones and pulls you away from the mundane hustle.
被叫作「浓云金蟾」的香炉。虽然迄今为止，你已经与太多的入魔机巧战斗过，你很难得见到如此安静的家伙。
A crucible named "Golden Cloud Toad." Considering how many hostile ingenia you've encountered, this one is suspiciously quiet.
等等，你的经验告诉你，它既然出现在这里，少不了会引来一场恶斗。不出意外，眼前这只「浓云金蟾」适时醒了过来。
Wait, you sense a malicious intent brewing in the air. A fight is imminent. As expected, the toad springs to life.
它算不上是你的威胁，但是旁边的易碎品可就不这么想了……
It's not that much of a threat for you, but the silent screaming of the fragile goods nearby is too loud to be ignored.
你对这台机巧做了手脚，货船上的其他货物就是被它损坏的。
You tampered with this ingenium so that it caused damage to other goods on the freight skiff.
哈——？说大声点，我听不太清。
Ha...? Speak louder, I can't quite hear you.
现在证据确凿，你还要抵赖？
You still deny it when faced with conclusive evidence?
你们看仔细了，这个什么古董怪物根本就不是我的。
Here, look carefully — this old piece of junk doesn't even belong to me.
不信，你们可以问码头工人。
If you don't believe me, just ask the dock workers.
是、是这样的，这台「浓云金蟾」不是斯科特先生的。
I—If I may, h—he's telling the truth. This Golden Cloud Toad does not belong to Mr. Skott.
那为什么这个什么蛤蟆会摆在这里？
Then why was the toad here in the first place?
那是你们自己的问题，不关我的事，对吧？
我反倒要问问，我的花瓶本来包装得好好的，差点就要被砸碎了，这算怎么回事？
Now let me ask you a question — my vase was almost smashed to pieces — what do you say about that?
Oh? You wanted it to be broken?
The inspection is over. We'll send the goods on their way.
Ha...? Did I hear that right?
你们闹了这一出，不给我道个歉，可就说不过去了。
After making a big scene like that, don't you owe me an apology?
哈——？这要是不道歉，传出去可不太好听呀。
Well...? Are you going to apologize or not?
无所谓，你就当是提前练习吧。道歉这种事，一次可不够呀，哈哈哈哈。
For this kind of barbarity, a single apology won't ever be enough. Just think of this as a practice round for later, hahahaha.
这要是我，我就不会道歉。
If it were me, I wouldn't be apologizing for anything.
这要是你，应该就不会被算计了。
If it were you, you wouldn't have fallen for his trap.
我们被算计了，没有办法。
He fooled us. That's all there is to it.
就让他得逞吧，下次就不会了。
He fooled us this once, but he won't fool us next time.
抱歉，我根本就没有搭上话。
我娘告诉我，只要我练就了一身本事，别人就能与我讲道理了…看来我这本事还不够。
My mother always told me that as long as I honed my skills, I'd be able to deal with any situation... Seems I've still got honing to do.
在还款日到来之前，我得让二位学会吵架、不对…学会辩论才行！走吧，我们去找会长。
Before the payment due date arrives, I'm going to teach you two how to fight — with words! Follow me — we're going to see the president.
小秘书已经解释过来意，你们是想要学会在与人争论时占据上风，对吗？
Miss Secretary said that you want to learn how to get the upper hand in an argument. Is that right?
连烟比小秘书更像是小秘书。
Lianyan, you seem more like a secretary than Miss Secretary.
我只是个传声筒，可不是什么秘书。
I'm no secretary — more of a messenger.
怎么还见不到会长啊？急死了。
When are we gonna get to see the president?
会长说过以后会和各位见面的，现在还不是时候。
The president agreed to meet with you all later, but now is not the time.
会长知道码头上最近发生的事，愿意将简单的谈判技巧传授给各位。
The president is aware of recent events and is willing to pass on some simple negotiation skills to you.
第一条，<color=#dbc291ff>「提前准备好底牌」</color>。就像云骑军上战场之前要备好武器，走上谈判桌之前，你也得确认好自己的底牌。

Rule one: <color=#dbc291ff>Prepare your ace card in advance</color>. Just as Cloud Knights ready their weapons before entering battle, you should have your ace card ready before you walk up to the negotiating table.
我现在就给你们几个「材料」，你们一定要仔细确认。
I will present you with a few items, and you need to examine them carefully.
这是码头闹剧中装着「浓云金蟾」的快递箱。发件人处被刻意划掉了姓名、联系方式，鹤运物流记录中显示寄件人是阿丰。

This is the box that was opened earlier at the dock — the one containing the Golden Cloud Toad. The name and contact information of the sender were deliberately crossed out, but records from the Heron Express show that the sender is A-Feng.
这是码头工人阿丰的收支记录，近日收到了公司分多次汇入的信用点。
The records show that a dock worker named A-Feng recently received credit remitted by the IPC, spaced out over several installments.
这种记录是怎么搞到的？
How did you obtain all these?
材料我都确认过一遍了。
第二条，<color=#dbc291ff>「在合适的时机出牌」</color>。只有当对方话语中露出破绽时，这些「材料」才能发挥真正的作用。
Rule Two: <color=#dbc291ff>Play your ace card at the right time</color>. These documents can only be truly effective when your opponent reveals a weak spot.
这样吧，我为你们准备了一次练习，作为指导的结束。过来吧，阿丰师傅。
How about this — I've prepared a little practice exercise for you. Mr. A-Feng, over here please.
这会长到底有些什么本事啊……
What exactly does the president have up their sleeve...
我没有什么可说的，我什么都不知道。
I don't know anything. I don't have anything to say.
我叫阿丰，是我将那个带有「浓云金蟾」的箱子带出来的。
My name's A-Feng — I was the one who brought out the box containing the Golden Cloud Toad.
我没有看到什么箱子，只看到了「浓云金蟾」。
I didn't see any boxes, only the Golden Cloud Toad.
你们要检查货物，我们当然就把货箱拆了，不然，你要自己拆吗？
If goods need to be inspected, we remove the packaging ahead of time — you wouldn't want to do all that work yourself, would you?
别人叫我搬，我就搬了，我也没想到里面装着故障机巧，这件事和我没有关系。
I was told to move something, and I did. I had no knowledge of the presence of an ingenium. This matter has nothing to do with me.
你为什么强调这事和自己没有关系？
Why do you emphasize that this matter has nothing to do with you?
我不是怕你误会嘛，就好像是我故意放进去的一样。
I just want to avoid any misunderstanding, in case someone has it in their head that I intentionally misplaced an item...
(I sense a hole in his logic...)
你不可能和这件事没关系。
I think this has a lot to do with you...
鹤运物流上有记录显示，这箱快递就是「阿丰」寄出去的，你怎么说？
Records from Heron Express show that this container was sent by a person named "A-Feng." What do you have to say about that?
啊，这个，会不会是哪里搞错了呢？
Ah! Th—That... must be some kind of mistake.
我也是码头工人，我怎么可能向着星际和平公司呢……
I'm a dock worker, after all. How could I conspire with the IPC?
码头工人就必须和星际和平公司对立吗？
Does being a dock worker mean that person can't conspire with the IPC?
谁不知道他们想要利用码头债务，让商会彻底失去信誉嘛。商会雇佣了我，又不是公司雇佣了我，我不可能支持公司的。
Everyone knows the IPC wants to use the dock debt to discredit the Merchant Guild. The Merchant Guild are the ones who gave me a job, not the IPC — why would I side with them?
(I sense a hole in his logic...)
你收到了公司的信用点，为了这点好处，你帮助公司破坏码头的运输活动。
You received payments from the IPC, and in exchange you sabotaged the shipping operations at the dock.
这和现在的话题无关吧。
This has nothing to do with the topic at hand.
我叫阿丰，是我将那个带有「浓云金蟾」的箱子带出来的。
My name's A-Feng — I was the one who brought out the box containing the Golden Cloud Toad.
别人叫我搬，我就搬了，我也没想到里面装着故障机巧，这件事和我没有关系。
I was told to move something, and I did. I had no knowledge of the presence of an ingenium. This matter has nothing to do with me.
我也是码头工人，我怎么可能向着星际和平公司呢……
I'm a dock worker, after all. How could I conspire with the IPC?
公司担心码头会还清债务，就想让我做些小动作…可那又咋样？
The IPC was worried that the lease for the dock would be paid off, so they had me move some things around... is that so terrible?
这金人巷交给公司管理有什么不好的。你们这些迂腐的家伙别耽误大家挣钱啊！
Is letting the IPC take over management of Aurum Alley such a bad thing? Besides, what's it to you if I make some extra money?
阿丰先生…商会的目标是促进金人巷复兴，怎么会是耽误大家呢？
Mr. A-Feng... Our goal at the Merchant Guild is to help make Aurum Alley a better place for everyone. Why would you work against that?
你就继续自欺欺人吧，这金人巷早晚得变成公司的大仓库！
Keep your heads in the sand if you like, but it's only a matter of time before Aurum Alley becomes another warehouse for the IPC!
你应该堂堂正正地反对。
Be a man! Do the right thing!
没错，背地里做小动作可不行。
That's right! You shouldn't be betraying your fellow workers for a quick profit.
码头现在可是蒸蒸日上。
But the business on the dock is flourishing.
就算能还上码头的租金，那用来竞标金人巷的资金呢，你们有吗？
Hmph, even if you pay back the debt, where are you gonna get enough money to win the bid for Aurum Alley?
其实我也支持公司的做法。
Well, actually, I side with the IPC as well.
Hmph, what do you take me for? I'm not falling for that.
看来真相已经水落石出了。请收下阿丰师傅的证词，你们也许能用得上。
It seems that the truth has come out. Here is Mr. A-Feng's testimony — it may come in useful later.
码头的租金也已经备妥了，你要是准备好接下来的谈判，就来码头上找我吧。
The payment for the dock is ready now. If you're ready for the next round of negotiations, come and see me at the dock.
嗯嗯，新账旧账一起算，我得让那家伙当众道歉！
Right, that guy's gonna be sorry for everything he's done. Time we got a public apology!
公司的业务员代表已经到了，我也叫上了天舶司的夕葵小姐公证。
The IPC representative has arrived, and I've called for Miss Xikui from the Sky-Faring Commission to act as a notary.
嗯嗯，我只有拳头能说过他，嘴上的事情就靠你了。
Remember, this is a war of words... over to you.
在正式交涉前，我们要确认一下手头的「材料」。
Before we start, let's review the documents we have.
我们在规定的还款日内完成了目标金额。这是我们能够继续谈判的基础，也是金人巷商业活力的证明。
We reached the required amount by the repayment date. This is the basis for our right to continue negotiations and is a testament to the business viability of Aurum Alley.
The leasing contract for the dock?
金人巷码头公开招标后，公司凭借「外贸资源」和「雄厚资本」成功中标。随后，公司将码头租赁给金人巷商会实际运营。

When the Aurum Alley dock went up for public bid, the IPC won the bid using its interstellar trade resources and extensive capital. Then the IPC leased the dock out to the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild for management and operations.
这份合同能够证明金人巷商会经营码头的正当权利。
This contract can prove that the Merchant Guild has legitimate rights to operate the dock.
码头工人阿丰的证言，他承认自己接受公司的好处，并破坏了码头物流的正常运作。
The testimony of dock worker A-Feng, who has admitted to disrupting the normal operations of the dock in exchange for payment from the IPC.
材料我都确认过一遍了。
走吧，天舶司的公证人已经在那边等我们了。
Let's go. The notary from the Sky-Faring Commission is already waiting for us.
我谨代表天舶司，协调星际和平公司与金人巷商会之间的租金纠纷。
On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I am here to preside over the leasing dispute between the IPC and Aurum Alley Merchant Guild.
这还需要什么协调吗？我就直说吧——商会早就该滚出金人巷了。
Is there anything left to dispute? I'll cut to the chase — the Merchant Guild should have removed itself from Aurum Alley a long time ago.
公司就不能派个正常人过来谈判吗？
Couldn't the IPC choose a sane person to represent them?
哈——？你说大声点，我听不太清。
Ha...? Say that a little louder, I can't quite hear you.
<size=28>I said: The — IPC — should — send — someone — else!</size>
呜…这小妞的嗓门好惊人，我耳膜都要穿孔了……
Goodness! There's no need to shout, little miss feisty — my ears are ringing!
呼，希望待会儿你当众向我道歉的时候，也要像刚才那样大声！
Hmph, you should be saving your voice for your public apology...
我作为公司的商业代表，出席这场谈判合法、合情、合理！你们金人巷商会打算派谁上阵呀？路过的云骑军？躲的不见踪影的懦夫会长？……

As the representative of the IPC, my presence in this negotiation is legal, reasonable and sensible! Who do you plan on sending to the battlefield? A random Cloud Knight? That cowardly president who's afraid to even show their face?
还是这个临时被你们拉来，一脸别人欠了{F#她}{M#他}五十信用点的{F#小妞}{M#小子}？
Or how about that kid who got dragged into this fiasco at the last minute, walking around like {F#she}{M#he} owes someone <unbreak>50</unbreak> credits?
…够了，斯科特代表，请阐述公司方面的诉求。
...That's enough, Representative Skott. Please state the IPC's side of the case.
金人巷商会，请准备好发言。
Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, please prepare to make your opening statements.
公司特地将经营权租让给金人巷商会，就是为了谋求共同发展。
The IPC specially leased operations of the dock to Aurum Alley Merchant Guild in the hopes of seeking common interest and development.
公司为什么不能自己运营码头？
Why couldn't the IPC operate the dock from the beginning?
哦，你是想说公司是在给金人巷商会下套吗？
Oh, are you implying that the IPC was setting a trap for the Merchant Guild?
公司将码头租给商会，然后商会经营不善，以便彻底破坏商会积累的信誉？
You're saying the IPC leased the dock to the Merchant Guild — who mismanaged it — in order to destroy the Merchant Guild's credibility?
你们肯定就是这样想的。
That was definitely your plan all along.
你这就是在承认商会肯定经营不好码头。
So you admit that the Merchant Guild mismanaged the dock.
但是商会拒绝与金人巷的各大商铺进行合作，曾经繁华一时的码头如今门可罗雀。
But the Merchant Guild refused to cooperate with the major shops in Aurum Alley, and the once prosperous dock is now desolate.
商会从来没有拒绝和金人巷商铺合作。
The Merchant Guild has never refused to work with any shops in Aurum Alley.
没有拒绝？那我问问你们，现在有几家商铺加入到你们的物流网络里了？
Never refused? Then let me ask you — how many shops are currently in your logistics network?
There will be a lot more later.
以后？多久以后？按你们仙舟人的时间观念，五百年以后？哈哈，这里的商铺们等得起吗？
Later? How much later? For the Xianzhou, does "later" mean <unbreak>500</unbreak> years? Haha, can the shop owners here wait that long?
呃…这…十年？二十年？{NICKNAME}，怎么办，我、我也说不上来。
Uh... ten years? Twenty years? Psst, {NICKNAME}, what should I say? Is twenty about right?
金人巷码头运输效率低下、成交量低，根本没有创造价值，这就是经营不善的证据。
The inefficient shipping and low volume of transactions at the Aurum Alley dock — which does not create any value at all — are clear evidence of poor management.
码头已经改善了运输效率，发货量也在不断增加。
The dock has improved shipping efficiency and transaction volume is increasing.
哈——？你们不会以为这点交易量就能满足了吧？
Ha...? You guys didn't think that this transaction volume would be enough, did you?
金人巷的商铺们可不是来陪你们过家家的，大家都是要挣钱的。
The shopkeepers in Aurum Alley aren't here to play house with you — we're all trying to turn a profit.
再加上商会无力支付租金，我方认为商会应该主动放弃码头经营权，并支付额外赔偿。
Coupled with the Merchant Guild's inability to pay the rent, we believe the Guild should voluntarily relinquish operating rights to the dock and pay additional compensation.
你凭什么认为我们无力支付租金？
What makes you think we can't afford to pay the lease?
你们要能还上，<color=#dbc291ff>就拿出证据来呀</color>。
If you have the necessary funds, <color=#dbc291ff>prove it</color>.
We've already paid back the lease.
这是金人巷商会的租金。商会已经扭亏为盈，能够赔付欠款了。
These are the funds from Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. The Guild has turned a profit and is able to pay back what it owes.
什、什么？！你们居然还上了？凭什么！
Wh—What? You already paid back the lease? How!?
金人巷商会提供的材料真实可信，根据双方的租赁合同来看，商会依然持有码头经营权。

The documentation provided by Aurum Alley Merchant Guild is true and credible, and according to the lease contract between the two parties, the Merchant Guild still holds the rights to operate the dock.
接下来，商会一方提出，斯科特代表一直在暗中破坏码头经营活动，对此你有什么要解释的吗？
Next order of business — the Merchant Guild has accused Representative Skott of secretly sabotaging dock operations. Do you have anything to say about that?
你们少血口喷人了，我为什么要搞小动作？你们这破码头，既没有商铺合作，又频繁出现事故，这跟我有什么关系？
Don't be so slanderous! Why would I stoop so low? What do the frequent accidents at this dock have to do with me?
码头上出运输事故，你怎么会知道呢？
How did you know about the frequent accidents at the dock?
我也用码头物流的嘛，我寄出去的快递总是在路上被损坏，你们有什么头绪吗？
I use the shipping services too, you know — do you have any idea how often my packages are damaged in transit?
你少在那里装糊涂了，这不是都怪你吗？
Don't feign ignorance — isn't that all by your own design?
再说了，我又不参与码头发货，难不成还能是我买通了码头工人吗？真是好笑。
Besides, I'm not even involved in shipping operations — how could I possibly buy off a dock worker? The absurdity!
有没有一种可能，你真的买通了码头工人呢？
Is it possible that you paid off a dock worker to do your bidding?
空口无凭，<color=#dbc291ff>拿出证据来呀</color>。
We have the testimony of A-Feng.
这份证言铁证如山，就是你指使他破坏客人商品的。
This testimony is concrete proof that you instructed him to sabotage shipments.
什、什么？！那个老古董…仙舟人不是一直宣扬什么讲义气吗？我给他那么多钱，他转眼就把我卖了！可恶啊——
Wh—What? That little... Aren't the Xianzhou people always preaching about righteousness? I gave him all that money, and he sold me out in a heartbeat! Darn it...
哈——？你说这个谁懂啊，快拿回去吧。
Ha...? What's this about? Get that out of here.
公司特地将经营权租让给金人巷商会，就是为了谋求共同发展。
The IPC specially leased operations of the dock to Aurum Alley Merchant Guild in the hopes of seeking common interest and development.
但是商会拒绝与金人巷的各大商铺进行合作，曾经繁华一时的码头如今门可罗雀。
The Merchant Guild refused to cooperate with the major shops in Aurum Alley, and the once prosperous dock is now desolate.
金人巷码头运输效率低下、成交量低，根本没有创造价值，这就是经营不善的证据。
The inefficient shipping and low volume of transactions at the Aurum Alley dock — which does not create any value at all — are clear evidence of poor management.
再加上商会无力支付租金，我方认为商会应该主动放弃码头经营权，并支付额外赔偿。
Coupled with the Merchant Guild's inability to pay the rent, we believe the Guild should voluntarily relinquish operating rights to the dock and pay additional compensation.
你们少血口喷人了，我为什么要搞小动作？你们这破码头，既没有商铺合作，又频繁出现事故，这跟我有什么关系？
Don't be so slanderous! Why would I stoop so low? What do the frequent accidents at this dock have to do with me?
再说了，我又不参与码头发货，难不成还能是我买通了码头工人吗？真是好笑。
Bah! I'm not even involved in shipping operations — how could I possibly buy off a dock worker? The absurdity!
如果你们提供的证据属实，斯科特先生，这是不正当的商业行为，天舶司会继续调查。
If the evidence presented is true, Mr. Skott, then this constitutes improper business practices and the Sky-Faring Commission will conduct a follow-up investigation.
怎么会这样，到底是哪一步出了岔子……
How did this happen? How did the plan go awry...?
别忘了，我们之前的赌约，你要当着大家的面向我道歉！
Don't forget about our bet! You have to apologize in front of everyone!
我不！凭什么要我向你道歉！
就凭你践踏了他人的努力，就凭你使用了肮脏的手段！
Because you used dirty tricks to trample all over the honest work of others!
如果我道歉，就能让热爱金人巷的人们不必心寒意冷的话，我会道歉一百次一千次！
An apology alone won't be enough to fix the damage. If it were — I'd make you do it a thousand times over!
但现在该道歉的人是你！
Consider yourself lucky it's just the once!
I... hereby apologize to Aurum Alley...
Ha...? Speak louder, I can't quite hear you.
还有呢，你当时说的那句话呢？
Don't forget the other part of the bet.
Sushang is kicking your butt, dude.
真的吗？我只是有感而发而已。
Really? I was just speaking from the heart.
我、我要向金人巷的父老乡亲们道歉——
I—I apologize to all the people of Aurum Alley...
「我是个有眼无珠的蠢货！不知天高地厚，只会狺狺狂吠！」
I'm a raving idiot howling into the wind!
你当时怎么说的，学狗叫呢？
Wasn't there something about barking like a dog?
Make him bark, make him bark!
Woof, woof! Woof, woof, woof, woof, woof! Woof!
啧，真是丑态百出，今天就到此为止吧。
Tsk, what a clownshow. This arbitration is hereby resolved.
斯科特代表垂头丧气地离开码头。
Skott leaves the dock with his head hanging low.
码头的债务危机暂告一段落，金人巷的复兴才刚刚开始。
The dock's crisis is over for now. The revival of Aurum Alley is just beginning.
多亏了各位，我们成功在码头的债务危机中顺利通过。
Thanks to all of you, we managed to pull through the dock's debt crisis.
这毫无疑问是你们的功劳。
这个过程，实在是有些艰辛。
但是这一切都是值得的。
现在应该趁着好势头，将金人巷码头全面升级，进一步提升码头的交易量。
We should take advantage of the momentum to upgrade the Aurum Alley dock and increase its transaction volume.
我筹备着将<color=#dbc291ff>「码放货物」和「物流规划」进行升级</color>，之前闲置的码头，现在也准备开放使用了，你要是有空就来找我确认吧。
I'm preparing to <color=#dbc291ff>upgrade inventory and logistics planning</color>. The previously-idle dock is now ready for use, so come see me when you have time.
码头危机暂时结束，但是「金人巷复兴」才刚刚开始呢！
The dock crisis is over for now, but the rejuvenation of Aurum Alley has just begun!
多亏了各位的努力，金人巷不仅还上了码头的租金债务，还提升了码头的吞吐量，我安排码头工人将原本闲置的码头清理了出来，升级了「码放货物」的规模。
Thanks to your help, the lease was paid off and the dock capacity is increasing. I told the workers to clear out areas that weren't utilized and use them to store extra cargo.
这下码头能够支持跟更多的商家合作了，让我们一起为金人巷复兴努力吧！
Now the dock can support collaboration with more businesses. Let's keep working together for the revival of Aurum Alley!
正好有一件事要通知你——我们顺利地完成了这一阶段的营收目标！这都是多亏了你、素裳、还有金人巷各位商户们的帮助。
I have something to tell you — we achieved our revenue goal for this quarter! This is all thanks to you two, not to mention the merchants of Aurum Alley.
商会承诺，我们不会辜负大家的期待，会将这笔钱用在该用的地方。
The Merchant Guild promises that we will use the money where it is meant to be spent — no disappointments!
另外，这笔钱还会用于码头整体的修缮升级…也就是说，我们暂时无法使用码头物流。
The funds will be used for the overall repair and upgrade of the dock... which means we won't be able to use the dock's shipping logistics for a while.
为了犒劳你和素裳姑娘长时间以来的操劳，商会在高阿姨那里订了些小吃，你们也正能休息休息，为之后的复兴计划继续做准备。

In order to reward you and Sushang for your long hours of work, the Merchant Guild has ordered some gourmet snacks from Tall Auntie, so you can rest for a bit and prepare for the revival of Aurum Alley.
小秘书之前跟我打过招呼啦，让我为你们准备些点心，你先去坐下，我一会就端上来。
Miss Secretary asked me to prepare some refreshments for you earlier. Make yourselves comfortable — I'll bring them out shortly.
我听说了你们为金人巷做了不少好事，慢慢吃，我这边还准备了一些打包带走的。
I've heard about all the great things you've done for Aurum Alley. Please, take your time! I've packed some for you to take home, too.
抱歉，现在暂时无法使用「码放货物」和「物流规划」。
I apologize, inventory arrangement and logistics planning are currently unavailable.
商会正在为码头的后续开发计划做准备，等到安全检修结束之后你再来找我吧。
The Merchant Guild is making preparations for new developments at the dock, so you can come back once the safety check is all said and done.
高阿姨热情地打包了满满一袋外卖给你。
Tall Auntie enthusiastically packs a full bag of takeout for you.
大事不好了，我刚才收到信息，会长让我立刻停止码头升级。
There's been an unexpected change in plans — I've received word that the president has ordered me to stop all upgrades to the dock immediately.
会长知道码头升级有多重要吧？
Does he know how important it is to upgrade the dock?
There's no way he couldn't know.
会长是公司派来的奸细吧？
现在可不是开玩笑的时候呀。
Now's not the time for jokes.
太好了，我现在就想摆烂了。
Maybe he knows when it's time to give up hope.
现在可不是开玩笑的时候呀。
Now's not the time for jokes.
我也不太理解，走吧，我们去找会长讨个说法。
I'm also confused. Let's go have a word with him.
我也给素裳姑娘发个信息，到陈机铺去汇合。
I sent a message to Sushang telling her to meet up at Oldies Depot.
我有事要找金人巷商会商议，不过，你们先说吧。
I also have something I wish to discuss with the Merchant Guild, but I'll wait for you to finish.
We're going to pay a visit to the president!
Will we actually get to see him this time?
我懂了，会长一开始就不存在！
Wait, I get it... the president doesn't even exist!
什么，这倒是我没有想到。
What? I hadn't even considered something like that.
会长，你别躲在里面不出声。
President, get your butt out here!
我知道你在店里，你开门啊。
Yeah, we know you're in there. Open the door!
会长充分感谢各位付出的努力，也知道各位想问什么。
The president fully appreciates your efforts and knows what you want to ask.
他认为继续升级码头，这做法与公司没有本质差异，只会破坏金人巷的特色。
He believes that continuing to upgrade the dock, a strategy that is not fundamentally different from that of the IPC, will only destroy the unique character of Aurum Alley.
金人巷是充满人情味的街道，无论是小吃街还是文玩旧货都是围绕当地居民与游客建设，这是金人巷的独特性与吸引力。

Aurum Alley is a place brimming with personality — from the delicious food to the cultural antiques. Everything is built around visiting tourists and local residents, and that's what makes it such a special place.
根据历史数据来看，继续物流开发会将这里变成「大型仓库」。物流越是提升，游客越是减少，这对金人巷的商铺和社区来说是不可接受的。

Based on historical data, continued development of the shipping operations will turn the area into a giant warehouse. The more the shipping capacity is increased, the less attractions there will be for visitors. Such an outcome is unacceptable for the shopkeepers and community of Aurum Alley.
…我读书少，你可别骗我！真的是这样的吗？
...Ugh, historical data isn't my forte. You better be telling the truth!
还是应该继续升级码头。
We have to keep upgrading the dock.
这件事应该问问商户们。
We should ask the merchants about this.
I agree with the president in upholding tradition.
Very well, I believe it's my turn to speak.
天舶司收到了许多商铺的联名请求：「重组商会」。换句话说，商户们希望你能辞任商会会长一职。

The Sky-Faring Commission has received a joint request from several merchants concerning the reorganization of the Merchant Guild. Mr. President, the merchants would like you to resign as the president of the Guild.
金人巷的商户们…有一天也会背叛我吗？
There has come a day... that the merchants of Aurum Alley have betrayed me?
我不会放弃我为金人巷打造的图景，更别说卸下职责了。
I won't give up the vision I've built for Aurum Alley, let alone step down from my duties.
我无意干预商会决策，但作为老友我要提醒你，金人巷永远是当下的，它不在过去。
It is not my intention to interfere with the Merchant Guild's affairs, but as an old friend I would like to remind you that Aurum Alley only exists in the present, not in the past.
…驭空大人，现在总是由过去造就，不是吗？
...Madam Yukong, the present is always made from the past, is it not?
我建议你做出一些让步，以缓和商铺的态度，比如采用明曦他们的做法，或是由明曦暂代你的职务。
I suggest that you make some concessions to appease the merchants. If you don't follow Mingxi's plans for the dock, she will temporarily take over your position.
明曦，我想听听你的想法。
Mingxi, I would like to hear your thoughts.
…会长，我希望您理解，我绝不是为了掌控金人巷事务的权力而来。我自小听着会长描绘这儿的繁荣，也想为实现这幅图景努力。只是，现在您的想法和我们有了冲突。

...President, I hope you understand that I am in no way vying for power over Aurum Alley. I have listened to the president's vision of prosperity since I was a child, and I want to work to achieve that vision. But currently, your ideas conflict with ours.
建议你听听驭空大人的建议。
I suggest you heed the advice of Madam Yukong.
给我一个机会，证明你是错的。
Give me a chance to prove you wrong.
我明白了。我可以接受明曦暂代我的职责。
I understand. I can accept Mingxi temporarily taking over my duties.
不过，明曦要将自己的决策在所有商铺面前公之于众，说服我，也赢得商铺的认可。你既然有信心，那这点应该能做到吧？
However, Mingxi must make her decision public, and win the approval of both myself and all the merchants. Since you have shown confidence, those terms should be acceptable to you?
嗯，我会全力以赴的，会长。
Yes, I'll do my best, President.
你们要记住，就算你们取代了我，危机还是迫在眉睫——你们至少得挣到「投标保证金」的数额，才有机会挫败公司。
You have to remember that even when you're acting in my place, a crisis is still imminent — you must earn at least the amount of the bidding deposit to even have a chance of thwarting off the IPC.
很好，既然会长已做出决定，便由我来负责召集公开会议。
Very well, since the president has come to a decision, I will be in charge of calling a public meeting.
{NICKNAME}，明曦，我有事找你们，等此间事毕，记得来找我一下。
{NICKNAME}, Mingxi, I have something for you. When you are all finished here, remember to come and see me.
…会长就在这里。明明自己也能说话，却要我帮他当传声筒，哎。
*sigh* ...I wish the president did more of the talking. I'm getting tired of being a mouthpiece.
不过话又说回来，继续开发码头和公司真的没有区别吗？
Is there really no difference between our strategy and the IPC's?
公司的做法也不一定就是错的。
Just because the IPC does something doesn't mean it's wrong.
我听说银河中不少地区接受了公司的商业合作，并一举成为了星际贸易热门地区。
I've heard that many places in the galaxy that partnered with the IPC have become popular areas for interstellar trade.
有很多商铺反对本地商会、支持公司，也是合情合理的。
It makes sense that there are many merchants who oppose the Merchant Guild and support the IPC.
我们和他们，还是有些区别的。
我们是为了金人巷而奔走？
Everything we do is for Aurum Alley?
你想说公司是为了公司做出的决策，我们是为金人巷做出的决策。
You're saying that the IPC is in it for the IPC, but we just want what's best for Aurum Alley...
但同样是为了金人巷，我们和会长也会产生分歧。
...but the president wants what's best for Aurum Alley too, and yet we still disagree with him.
We don't earn nearly as much money as the IPC?
难道就不应该选择能挣钱的那一方吗？
Shouldn't people choose the side that can earn them money?
街道的主人既不是商会，也不是公司…是生活在这里的人。
The streets aren't owned by the Merchant Guild or the IPC... but by those who live here.
我讲不出什么大道理，只是觉得，我们应该多问问商铺的意见……
*sigh* I guess I don't have any special insights. I think... I think we should ask the merchants what they think.
驭空大人有事找我们，走吧。
Madam Yukong is looking for us. Let's be on our way.
我听夕葵说，是你作为商业顾问协助金人巷商会重整旗鼓…真是多才多艺，还有什么事是你不会做的？
I heard from Xikui that it was you who became a business advisor and assisted Aurum Alley Merchant Guild in their dispute with the IPC... How versatile. Is there anything you can't do?
Well, for starters, I can't jump...
...I'm not very good at that either.
不要再夸我了，我会不好意思。
Omg, stop it~ You're making me blushhh~
接下来，我将担任天舶司司舵。
Nope. 'Tis why I'll totally take over the Sky-Faring Commission next.
…会长曾帮助金人巷实现繁荣，是「金人巷的英雄」。不过即便是英雄，也不会永远被人拥戴。
The president is still a hero to Aurum Alley — he helped it achieve prosperity... but a hero will not be embraced forever.
而公司的做法我见过，他们讲究效率，在全银河中推行标准统一的商业模式。
I've seen the IPC's approach — they prioritize efficiency and a standard uniform business model across the galaxy.
我劝告过他们，生搬硬套未免有些太小看仙舟，但无奈本地商会又太过保守。
I warned them that their business model wouldn't work on the Xianzhou without adjustments... but the Merchant Guild's overly traditional mindset is a different obstacle.
我直说吧，如今的金人巷商会毫无胜算。
Let me put it bluntly — Aurum Alley Merchant Guild has no chance of succeeding today.
商会缺乏上谈判桌的资本。
The Guild lacks the necessary capital to get to the negotiating table.
公司能给的肯定比你们多，但是评审的标准并非只看财力。
The IPC does have more capital on hand, but the review criteria are not solely focused on financial resources.
两者都不怎么样，非得选一个。
Neither party is ideal, but one has to be chosen.
但是你们可以成为不同于商会，也不同于公司的第三种可能。
...And yet all of you now represent a third choice — different from both the Merchant Guild and the IPC.
我给你们的建议是，去同功坊看看，店老板霄老大是「提出重组商会」的人。要是能够得到他的认可，你们肯定会受到更多商铺的支持。

My advice to you is to visit the shopkeeper Mr. Xiao. He is the one who proposed the reorganization of the Merchant Guild. If you can get his support, you will definitely receive support from the other merchants.
司辰宫中还有事务要忙，接下来就看你们的了。让老家伙看清楚，你们才是新的英雄。
I have business to attend to in the Palace of Astrum — the rest is up to you. Convince the old shopkeeper, and you may just become the new heroes of Aurum Alley.
客人是来修什么东西的？敝店能打包票，将您的机巧修复如初。
Need something fixed? We guarantee that your ingenium will be good as new.
不过要是化外民的科技，我得看看是哪个世界的。
Of course, if it's outworlder technology, it'll depend on the world...
I didn't come to fix anything.
How's the revival of Aurum Alley coming along?
...I'd appreciate if you could state the reason for your visit today.
霄老大，我是商会的小秘书明曦，我们来是想谈……
Mr. Xiao, I'm Mingxi, the secretary of the Merchant Guild. We're here to talk about—
Forget it. I support the IPC.
你们商会做了什么过分的事吗？
Did the Merchant Guild do anything out of line?
看来家父让各位为难了呀。我叫霄翰，这附近的人叫我小少爷。
It sounded like my father was being a little difficult... I'm Xiaohan — people around here call me Little Master.
看来你们几位就是让斯科特代表当众道歉的人吧。
If I'm not mistaken, you're the ones who made Representative Skott apologize in public?
看来我们已经出名了呀。
为金人巷挺身而出，有理有节，真是了不起。
You stood up for Aurum Alley with reason and integrity — I'm thankful to you.
怎么有人自称小少爷的？
Why would someone call themselves Little Master?
我可不是自称啊，离开仙舟有好些年了，回到这里后儿时伙伴还叫我「小少爷」。
Oh, hehe, I didn't give myself that name — it's what my friends have always called me. I only recently returned to the Xianzhou after many years away, but it seems like the name stuck!
请问为什么会突然找上家父呢？
May I ask why you wanted to speak with my father?
码头需要与不同商铺合作，我们想邀请令尊与码头达成合作……
We need the support of the merchants for the dock, and we wanted to see if your father could join us...
家父不是已经拒绝了吗？
…我们听说霄老大要求「重组商会」，是来了解原因的。
We heard that Mr. Xiao proposed to "reorganize" the Merchant Guild, and we wanted to ask why.
这样吧，我帮你们想个办法。
I see... I'll help you figure something out.
太好了，令令令郎，不是，令堂？…哎！您父亲真的很固执。
Great! Uh... your father is a very tough nut to crack.
他们老一辈匠人都是这样油盐不进…对了，这样吧，你们可以来家父的店铺做学徒。
The older generation of craftsmen can be rather set in their ways... Here, how about this — why not join my father's shop as apprentices?
家父面子薄，要是有水平的学徒相求，他看到你们的诚意，会改变态度的。
My father is stern on the surface, but if he sees a capable apprentice and a sincere heart, he'll change his attitude.
我们要是擅自帮忙，他脸上更挂不住。
Well, it's better to beg forgiveness than ask permission. Let's just start you out and see what he says.
Things might just fall into place if we try hard enough.
诚心诚意总是有打动人的力量。
A sincere heart always has the power to impress people.
你真不是骗咱们去打白工吗？
You aren't tricking us into doing free work, are you?
我是真心诚意想要帮各位解决问题的。各位的实习工资，会由我来支付的。
I truly want to help you — and you'll receive compensation for your work.
So it's decided? Let's get moving then. Time to make you apprentices.
老爸，这位商会的朋友想来您这边做学徒，我带他们上手了啊。
Father, my friends from the Merchant Guild want to be your apprentices. I'll go ahead and show them the ropes.
Nonsense! I never said I needed more hands!
况且这同功坊的情况你又不是不知道，我们哪儿有钱雇新学徒？
Even if I did want to hire more people, I couldn't afford them. You know that better than I do.
所以我这不是替你找来了吗？
I can cover their salaries! Come on, it'd be rude to turn them away.
胡闹，修不好事小，{F#她}{M#他}这样的新手万一砸了客人东西，我还得照赔，岂不是砸了同功坊的招牌？
Don't be ridiculous — a green hand like {F#her}{M#him} won't be able to fix a thing... Plus, if {F#she}{M#he} breaks our customer items in the process, it'll be us taking the blame.
那你就别逃避，和人家好好聊聊。
If that's what you're worried about, just give 'em a little training.
So I'm an apprentice now, right?
我们是真的想和您聊聊。
看来我老爸点头了，咱们开始吧？{NICKNAME}，恰巧有熟客送来个坏掉的机巧，要不咱们就露一手，修好这个。
That sounds like a "yes" to me. Let's get on with the job, shall we? {NICKNAME}, here's something from one of our regulars. Show him what you can do.
Anything else I can help you with?
Are we friends now? Wanna have a chat?
心里有数，眼里有活，我再帮你们找个活。
*sigh* He's hard to impress. I'll find you some more work.
Ugh... what did I do to deserve this?
老爸，人家替咱们把活儿干了，咱们工钱可不能吝啬啊。
Just a reminder, Father — fair work for fair pay.
来来，{NICKNAME}，这边！这儿还有个玉兆你可以试试。
Over here, {NICKNAME}! See what you can do with this jade abacus.
老爸，你也别光在那里看着，过来指导指导学徒呀。
Don't just stand there, Father! Go teach your apprentice a thing or two.
好了好了！我已经清楚各位的来意了…求你们不要再碰客人送来维修的东西了！
Fine, I give in! I know why you're here. Just... please stop tinkering with my customers' items.
I think we just made him surrender...
不好意思，把工作台搞乱了。
Sorry if I made a mess of your workbench.
It's fine, just leave it as it is.
*sigh* Ask what you wanted to ask.
You and the president — you know each other well?
我也做了很久生意，会长算是老友。
你好像更加支持公司的做法？
You seem to be on the side of the IPC?
公司提出的方案存在很多可能性，但那个老东西只是过去留下的一潭死水。他想要的，不会实现。
I see a lot of potential in the Corporation's plan... but a certain old friend of mine lives in the past. Whatever vision he has — it won't come true.
你对商会有什么不满吗？
What's your issue with the Merchant Guild?
不满？不，没有的事。我只是固执而已。
Issue? It's less about issues, and more about stubbornness.
固执…对于仙舟人来说算是一种常态了。活过了几百年光阴，习惯了每天走在同一条道路上，干同样的活，与同样的人交谈…大部分人早已安于这样的生活方式。
We walk a single path, do the same things, and talk to the same people for centuries... A mind can become insensitive to change.
但论固执，会长那个老东西比我有过之无不及。他比我活得更久，曾经见过金人巷的盛况，那时这里星槎往来穿行，金人摩肩接踵。
However, compared to the president, my stubbornness is nothing. Back in his day, Aurum Alley was teeming with shuttling starskiffs and commercial aurumatons.
但罗浮仙舟一旦展开巡猎，就会远航其他星域，原本往来的商旅也就不再往来了。
But then the Luofu departed again on the Path of The Hunt. Our business partners couldn't follow, so they stopped trading with us.
You want to restore the Alley to its former glory?
是会长。会长想要重现金人巷繁荣的旧时光。只是我们商铺都知道，是时代变了，没有任何人的努力可以扭转时代的变迁。
The president does — he wants to bring the old times back. Shop owners like me know that's impossible.
所以我接受公司的方案，金人巷可以消失，在罗浮之上还会有其他集市取代它的。
Therefore, I stand behind the IPC's plan. Aurum Alley will inevitably be replaced.
会长反对公司就是为了这个？
Is that why the president is against the IPC?
会长常常讲起，他想要重现那段繁荣的旧时光。
He always says the Alley deserves another chance.
是啊，这也是他顽固不肯放手的理由。他不想让金人巷变作公司的物流码头，他还盼着旅客们人来人往的景象再一次出现呢。
Indeed, which is why he won't let it go. He wants to see the streets teeming with tourists, not IPC cargo.
但时代变了，没有任何人的努力可以扭转时代的变迁。我接受公司的方案，金人巷可以消失，在罗浮之上还会有其他集市取代它的。
But times have changed — we can't sail against the current. That's why I stand behind the IPC's plan — Aurum Alley will inevitably be replaced.
可是在公司承诺的未来里，同功坊还会存在吗？
But is your shop part of the future that the IPC promised?
…谁知道呢。同功坊多半是不会留下来的吧。
...Hard to say. Chances are I'll have to sell it.
不过呢，我不会后悔的。好日子过去了。长生种得学会接受事实，接受短生种们改造自己的土地，把夜市变成货运码头……

Not the easiest decision to make, but I won't regret it. The good days are behind us — we must accept that short-life species will repurpose our lands, and that night markets are destined to become shipping docks...
…接受那些只有短短几十年的野心家，确实胜过了我们这些活久了的老东西。
...We must come to terms with the fact that short-life ambitions will reshape a world where things were thought to last forever...
霄老大，要不要试试与我们合作呢，小秘书正试着改变商会，我们和会长可不一样。
Mr. Xiao, why not try working with us? Mingxi is pushing for reforms within the guild. We're nothing like the president.
他们曾在码头上与公司代表据理力争，我看到了商会变化的可能。
They made a lot of good points when arguing with the IPC at the dock. I do see possibilities for the guild to change.
金人巷的未来可不是二选一。
You don't have to choose between the president and the IPC.
加入我们，我们让你包赚不赔！
以商会现在的实力，还是公司赢面较大。
Given the state of the guild, my money is on the IPC winning...
不过，我都抛下了「金人巷必须存在」的执念，就绝不会否定你们胜利的可能性。在那之前，你们就放手试试吧！
...but since I've accepted the worst-case scenario — Aurum Alley ceasing to exist — I can't see why it hurts to endorse your idea... and see how far it takes us.
同功坊愿意参加金人巷复兴计划，这肯定会影响很多人的。
Thank you! Now that you have joined our revival project, I'm sure many others will follow suit.
好啊，让我瞧瞧，你们能做到什么地步。
Mm... That's settled then. I'm curious to see what comes of your plan.
既然霄老大愿意参加金人巷复兴计划，事不宜迟，咱们现在就开始物流规划吧。
Now that Mr. Xiao is on board, his shop can be part of the logistics network we've been working on.
希望我们接下来也能合作愉快，各位辛苦了，我还有事就先回码头了。
I'll head back to the dock for now. Thanks for all the hard work by the way — hope things work out just as smoothly down the line.
商会为同功坊定制了推广方案，同功坊因而声名鹊起。
The merchant guild has established a promotional plan for Artistry Hardware, and hence did its fame begin to grow.
你们来得正是时候，小少爷正打算讲讲会议策略。
Right on time! Xiaohan is about to share his strategy for the upcoming hearing.
会长喜欢用他过去的经验和数据来说事，当然，我们也可以。
The president likes to quote past experiences and data. We can do that, too.
会长和驭空大人也到了，你准备好了吗？
The president and Madam Yukong are here. Ready?
在正式交涉前，我们要确认一下手头的「材料」。
Before we start, let's review the documents we have.
Turnover of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild?
这是金人巷复兴计划最直接的成果，更重要的是，它是金人巷恢复商业活力的证明。这部分金额将用作「金人巷商区招标」的保证金。
This is the most direct achievement of our revival project. More importantly, it's evidence that the Alley has regained its footing. The money will serve as the bidding deposit for Aurum Alley.
同功坊与码头合作以来，业务范围扩展，收入提升的同时，还获取了好的口碑。
Since Artistry Hardware partnered with the dock, its scope of operations has expanded, and its revenue and customer satisfaction have both increased.
许多顾客慕名而来，实际到店人数不降反升，这与会长的设想相悖。
As a result, we're seeing an uptick in customers visiting the shop — contrary to the president's assumptions.
The historical trading volume of the Alley?
资料上不难看出，金人巷的辉煌是时代造就的。
The data suggests that the success of the old Aurum Alley was largely due to the economic circumstances of the past.
即便是最辉煌的时期，金人巷的交易量也几乎是与现在持平。
At its peak, the old Aurum Alley had a trading volume similar to what the Alley has today.
材料我都确认过一遍了。
The hearing is about to begin.
驭空用眼神锐利，似乎是在提醒你会议就要开始了，她不会偏袒你们其中任何一方。
Yukong's gaze is penetrating, as if she is reminding you that the meeting is about to begin. She will not be biased toward either side.
连烟笑而不语，等待着会议开始。
Lianyan smirks but says nothing, simply waiting for the meeting to start.
我谨代表天舶司，受邀主持金人巷商会的公开会议。小秘书，你们人到齐了吗？
I will be hosting this hearing on behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission. Mingxi, are your people all present?
我们到齐了。可是，会长人呢？
We're all here... but where's the president?
老朽我也不想公开示人的，但今日事关金人巷未来，我不得不出席。
I know my appearance is a little unsettling... If the hearing weren't of vital importance to the future of Aurum Alley, I wouldn't attend in person.
怎么，对面是一块铁疙瘩，你就害怕了？
Still, I didn't expect a reaction like this... Are you so afraid to converse with a piece of metal?
比起害怕，我更感觉到奇怪。
金人巷里有金人，很奇怪吗？
Surprised that there's an aurumaton in Aurum Alley?
小孩子看了都会做噩梦。
I hope there aren't any children here.
请你告诉小孩我是发声玩具。
*sigh* If there are any children here, just tell them I'm one of those talking toys...
作为玩具有些太惊悚了。
...that's missing the rest of its body.
A talking aurumaton head? So cool!
会议将大家召集起来，不是听你们闲聊的。会长，请阐述你对金人巷的规划与考虑。
Let me remind everyone that we are at a hearing. Mr. President, please share with us your vision for Aurum Alley.
我能理解孩子们对金人巷的热情，这一点我也一样，我们都想让这里更加繁荣。
I can tell that the opposing side is eager to see Aurum Alley thrive. Your passion resonates with me.
但是你想要的繁荣，与我们想要的不同？
Since we share the same passion, where is it that we disagree?
你们想要的繁荣会消灭金人巷的传统与个性，那是我们承受不起的繁荣。
The prosperity under your proposal means diminishing the Alley's tradition and personality — we can afford neither.
公司计划将金人巷改造为物流中转仓，你们所作所为的本质也是如此。
The IPC plans to turn the Alley into a logistics hub. You are practically thinking the same.
我们的做法和公司是有区别的！
Our proposal is different from the IPC's!
没错，公司接手金人巷之后，他们可能关闭「同功坊」，而我们就不会。
That's right. The IPC will close down Artistry Hardware if they take over. We would never do that.
我们用决策保护商铺，而公司只会为了决策牺牲商铺。
We protect businesses, the IPC sacrifices them for their own gain.
保护？牺牲？这不过是你们人类的漂亮语言，我只会看结果。
Protect? Sacrifice? I find that humans rarely understand these concepts correctly. The outcome is what truly matters.
一旦物流主导金人巷，同功坊这样的商铺很快会消亡，甚至不需要公司出手。
Once the Alley is turned into a logistics hub, shops like Artistry Hardware won't be able to sustain themselves, regardless of what the IPC does.
（他完全将我们和公司划上等号了……）
(He is convinced that the IPC and us are the same...)
过度开发只会影响游客体验，导致实际来到街道的游客减少，这就是现实。
The reality is — overdevelopment can only adversely impact customer experience, making the Alley less appealing.
这是你用数据得出的结论？
Do you have data to support your statements?
历史数据远比你们的说辞更有说服力，<color=#dbc291ff>你们最好也学会使用数据</color>。
Historical data has proved my point. <color=#dbc291ff>It is the reality, not rhetoric that matters</color>.
(I sense a hole in his logic...)
There are actually more customers coming to the Alley!
这份数据记录了同功坊与码头合作以来的营收变化，以及到店游客数量的变化。
This record reflects the change in Artistry Hardware's turnover and the increase in customers since it partnered with the dock.
不降反升，这不可能…难道你们在虚张声势？
The shop does better than it used to? Impossible... you must be bluffing.
你比我更熟悉小秘书，她会用假数据来说服你吗？

Don't go getting mushy on us.
One last word from this old piece of metal:
去吧，我就在这金人巷里，等着你们从司辰宫捎回好消息。
Go, and may good tidings come with you when you return.
小少爷为人谦恭有礼，平易近人，实在是让人很难想象他和斯科特代表一起共事。
It never struck me that someone as humble and kind as Xiaohan would work together with the likes of Skott.
在这之前，我总是用斯科特的形象去想象公司的一切，总以为他们盛气凌人、手段肮脏。
Before I met Xiaohan, I always imagined everyone at the IPC would be like Skott — overbearing and dodgy.
但现在至少我明白了一件事，公司并不只有一张面孔。
Now I understand, the IPC has many faces.
前面就是司辰宫，你准备好了吗？
Palace of Astrum is up ahead. Ready?
在正式竞标前，我们要确认一下手头的「材料」。
Before we place our bid, let's go over our key points again.
这是金人巷复兴计划中最直接的成果，更重要的是，它是金人巷商业活力的证明。
This is the most tangible achievement of our Alley revival project. It demonstrates that the Alley still has plenty of life in it.
我们取得足够的资金，才有底气和公司共同竞标。
Having enough funding to back up our bid is key to competing with the IPC.
尚滋味推出「特色联动套餐」后，来到金人巷的游客数量增加了不少。
Because of the crossover meal deals, the Alley has seen an uptick in customers.
更重要的是，它证明了作为「美食街」的金人巷，在如今依然有十足的竞争力。
It goes to show that the Alley still lives up to its name as one of the best food destinations.
金人巷商铺的意向调查？
The Aurum Alley business opinion poll?
会长收集的商铺意向调查，它整理了商铺们对不同经营理念的倾向。
The president conducted a poll to gather the shops' opinions on the future of the Alley.
如今有更多的商铺们支持金人巷商会，并且看好金人巷复兴计划。
More and more shops have voiced their support for the guild and expressed their confidence in our revival project.
材料我都确认过一遍了。
走吧，公开会议就要开始了。
Let's go. The bidding is about to begin.
驭空目光坚定，此时不与你对话是为了避嫌，聪明的你肯定能够领会。
Yukong's gaze remains steadfast. She's not talking with you right now to avoid arousing suspicion, but if you're smart enough, you should pick up on what the situation entails.
霄翰看上去信心满满，还是把交锋留在谈判桌上吧。
Xiaohan seems pretty confident. You should save the confrontation for when the debate begins.
我谨代表天舶司，受邀主持金人巷商区竞标会议。各方代表均已到齐，现在开标评审。
On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I am invited to host the public bidding of the Aurum Alley commercial district. With members of all parties present, the proceedings may begin.
请各方代表提交投标文件，天舶司将审核经营范围、出资比例、注册资金等相关材料。
I hereby ask all parties to submit your support documents for evaluation. The documents should include scope of business, ratio of contributions, and registered capital.
天舶司确认完各方的投标文件之后，按照招标文件的评标办法开始审核工作。
The Sky-Faring Commission confirms all parties' bidding documents and bidding evaluations commence.
不出意料，公司与金人巷商会成为了留下的中标候选人。
To no one's surprise, the IPC and the Merchant Guild are the only two contenders left standing.
接下来，请中标候选人，向天舶司评标审查会解释金人巷之后的经营理念。
Representatives of all parties, please be ready to brief the review committee on your business plans.
算是我安排的特别要求吧，我会给你们自由讨论的时间，希望你们能充分碰撞观点。
By personal request of the committee, a discussion session will be added to allow all participants to raise and answer questions.
原本竞标是没有吵架的环节吗？
So, debates are not usually required in public bidding?
原本应该是没有的，投标完就可以等定标结果了。
No. Usually you just submit your bid and wait for the result.
但驭空大人希望我们能够好好辩论一番，这样才有机会从对方观点中补足自己。
But Madam Yukong wants us to have a proper debate to better understand each other's points.
接下来应该会有一场恶战。
She's not making it easy for us.
小少爷脑子灵活、目标明确、再加上资金充沛，我们确实不占优势。
Indeed. Xiaohan is eloquent and knows exactly what he wants, not to mention the funding he gets from the IPC. It will be an uphill battle.
但是我们要借这个机会把我们的态度展现出来。
That said, this is also our chance to make a strong case for ourselves.
小少爷，就从你开始吧，让我们听听你对金人巷的规划与考虑。
Xiaohan, whenever you are ready. Tell us about your plan for Aurum Alley.
小秘书，你们有什么要问的吗？
金人巷商会的各位好啊。
Members of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I hope you're all keeping well.
你确定你要从一句话就开始反驳我吗？
No need to be quite so aggressive...
商会利用码头物流，不仅还上了租金，还筹集到了竞标资金，这足以看出码头的重要性。
By utilizing the dock, the guild managed to repay outstanding rents and also raised sufficient funding to stand at the bidding. That just goes to show how vital the dock is.
我们付出了很多其他的努力！
We did much more than simply utilize the dock!
但是你没有否定码头的重要性，无论是合作，还是物流规划，最终都服务于码头。

But you don't deny that the dock was vital to your operations, correct? Your partnership with the shop owners and the increase in cargo handling capacity — none of it would have been possible without the dock.
你错了，我们最终服务的是金人巷商铺。
Wrong. None of it would have been possible without winning the hearts of local businesses.
哈哈，在谈判桌上就别玩文字游戏了吧。
Haha, I think you understand my point.
公司愿意更进一步，充分开发码头的物流效应。将金人巷打造成银河闻名的商业港口。

The IPC seeks to unleash the full potential of the dock, taking full advantage of its role as a logistics center — thus transforming Aurum Alley into one of the most advanced commercial ports in the galaxy.
金人巷真的能够停下星际货船？
How are interastral cargo ships supposed to dock? There isn't enough room.
为了建设商船港，这里大部分商店需要搬出金人巷。
To address this, most of the shops will need to be relocated.
我们也会重新规划整个商区的布局，保证港口足够开阔，吞吐量绝不输给流云渡。
The IPC will redesign the layout of the whole area to make sure ships can move in and out smoothly. We expect at least the same trading volume as Cloudford.
请放心，搬迁的商铺都会拿到合适的赔偿，数字之大，足以让所有人脸上挂着笑容。
Rest assured, all the shops that need relocating will receive generous compensation from the IPC. The package we've prepared will make everyone happy.
公司又开始施展钞能力了……
这难道不是大家所期望的、终极的「金人巷复兴」吗？
And that, honorable ladies and gentlemen, is the rejuvenation that everyone has been hoping for.
你怎么知道这就是大家期望的？
How can you be sure that everyone's vision aligns with yours?
难道各位高呼「金人巷复兴」只是自我满足吗？我不相信。
...I was using a figure of speech — but our vision of "rejuvenation" will benefit the majority.
不对，<color=#dbc291ff>难道不应该问问金人巷商铺们的意见吗？</color>
金人巷的商铺们可不这么想！
这是从金人巷各商户处收集来的意向调查，其中大部分人与商会建立了合作，并且希望能够保留现在的经营模式——其中包括同功坊。

According to the poll we conducted earlier with business owners, most of them have already partnered with the Merchant Guild and wish to preserve their current business model. Artistry Hardware is among the shops that registered this answer.
家父只是个固执迂腐的匠人，不必以他的意见为参考。
...Father has never been the shrewdest when it comes to business matters. I'm afraid his opinions don't constitute the most valuable insights.
就算有很多金人巷商户们期望如此，但这并不代表他们有远见卓识。
In agreeing with your approach, those shops may risk missing the bigger picture... and opportunities for future growth.
那不是远见，那是目中无人。
So you think they don't know what's best for themselves.
小少爷，你把自己看得太高了。
You think too highly of yourself.
明曦，接下来请讲讲商会对金人巷的规划与考虑。
Mingxi, please share with us what the guild has in mind.
小少爷将码头看作的优势，但是对商会来说，商铺才是最大的卖点。
As Xiaohan mentioned, the IPC sees the dock as the most valuable asset the Alley has to offer, but for us, the local shops are what makes the Alley special.
商会不能脱离商铺存在，商会会把金人巷打造成「新•罗浮第一夜市」。
The guild serves the sole purpose of helping local businesses. We will help the Alley reclaim the title of "the best night market on the Luofu".
「罗浮第一夜市」？在公司注资后，仙舟罗浮上处处都会建起新的商业中心，人们为什么会专程来到你的金人巷呢？他们早就不在意谁才是「第一夜市」了。

"Best night market on the Luofu"? With the IPC's funding pouring in, hundreds of commercial centers will sprout. Why would people come to Aurum Alley when they have so many other options? Nobody cares about that title anymore.
不是没有人会在意，我们就很在意。
Say what you want, but we care.
你们为什么会认为只有继续做「美食街」才算是金人巷复兴？
What makes you so determined to hold onto this idea of a "food street"? Why can't the revival of the Alley take on other forms?
因为人们需要金人巷的美食街，<color=#dbc291ff>这一点，我们可以证明</color>。
Because people want it to retain its food street. <color=#dbc291ff>We have proof of that</color>.
人们会始终需要金人巷美食街。
When people think of Aurum Alley, they think about its food. The two notions can't be separated.
这是金人巷商会和尚滋味一起做的联动活动。
We organized a crossover between the Merchant Guild and Spices Supreme.
借助宣传礼品、虚拟购物券等等手段，前往金人巷消费的游客比以往增加了一倍还多。你看，美食街在大家的心中仍然有重要的地位。
By sending out coupons and gifts, we attracted twice as many customers as we normally would. This shows that food is still a big reason why people visit the Alley.
这比重新打造优势更简单直接。
Building on an existing strength is much easier than starting out from scratch.
The Alley's identity as a "food street" is what makes it so competitive.
小少爷，你会投入天价的资金去建设港口，你会赶走大部分的本地商铺，去换来你承诺的「复兴」，但那时金人巷还是金人巷吗？
The revival you envision involves throwing pots of money into building a port while forcing away most local businesses. Wouldn't that erase the very identity of the Alley?
我们想要选择「最金人巷」的未来。
Our approach protects the people who made the Alley what it is today.
金人巷需要在历史的演进中抓住机遇，转变自己的职责。「金人巷」在公司选择的未来里，会成为最有分量的名字。
Aurum Alley needs to adapt and reimagine itself. The future that the IPC offers will ensure its name is known in the most remote corners of the galaxy.
You are sacrificing its identity in exchange for a fancy brand.
我的理想是将金人巷打造成「金字招牌」，一个所有人都叫得出来的名称。
A brand so fancy that everyone will remember it.
「金人巷」刻在了每个人的心中，这不比默默无闻在两三百年之后消失更好？
Wouldn't it be better for the Alley to take on a new life and stay known forever? If it remains a market, I can assure you it will die quietly over the course of the next two centuries.
我只想为当下的金人巷考虑。
I'm only concerned with what's best for the Alley here and now.
自由讨论的时间结束。请双方回去之后静候评审团消息，辛苦了。
That concludes our discussion. We will inform all participants of the result when a decision has been made. Thank you all for coming.
商业区开发竞标并不会当场宣布中标结果，但是离场的双方似乎已经心里有数。
The result of the Commercial District bid is not announced, but both parties leave with a good idea of the outcome.
你是想随便丢出一件材料，然后等待我的反应吗？
You can't just present something irrelevant and expect me to respond.
这与我们的讨论无关，请收回吧。
I can't say what this has to do with our discussions. Please remove it.
我承认商会在经营码头时赚到了不少，但是跟公司比起来还是杯水车薪。
I admit that the guild has made a fortune from the dock, but the IPC can offer much more.
为了金人巷商会的颜面，请收回吧。
You should retract this — I wouldn't want to embarrass the guild.
金人巷商会的各位好啊。
Members of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I hope you're all keeping well.
商会利用码头物流，不仅还上了租金，还筹集到了竞标资金，这足以看出码头的重要性。
By utilizing the dock, the guild managed to repay outstanding rents and also raised sufficient funding to stand at the bidding. That just goes to show how vital the dock is.
公司愿意更进一步，充分开发码头的物流效应。将金人巷打造成银河闻名的商业港口。

The IPC seeks to unleash the full potential of the dock, taking full advantage of its role as a logistics center — thus transforming Aurum Alley into one of the most advanced commercial ports in the galaxy.
这难道不是大家所期望的、终极的「金人巷复兴」吗？
And that, honorable ladies and gentlemen, is the rejuvenation that everyone has been hoping for.
「罗浮第一夜市」？在公司注资后，仙舟罗浮上处处都会建起新的商业中心，人们为什么会专程来到你的金人巷呢？他们早就不在意谁才是「第一夜市」了。

"Best night market on the Luofu"? With the IPC's funding pouring in, hundreds of commercial centers will sprout. Why would people come to Aurum Alley when they have so many other options? Nobody cares about that title anymore.
金人巷需要在历史的演进中抓住机遇，转变自己的职责。「金人巷」在公司选择的未来里，会成为最有分量的名字。
Aurum Alley needs to adapt and reimagine itself. The future that the IPC offers will ensure its name is known in the most remote corners of the galaxy.
我听说，小少爷游学归来之后，比过去沉稳了不少。想必是那段在外的经历，让他得出了现在的思考。
I'd heard that Xiaohan had matured a lot since returning from his study abroad. It would appear the time he spent outside the Xianzhou really did make him a better person.
我正在想，尽管现在我们对商会的决策无比确信，但事实上，我们还是囿于经历与眼界。
It really got me thinking... Even though it seems like we're doing the right thing, will we still think so ten years from now?
…不好意思，耽误您太久，我先回码头了。
...Sorry, you don't have to listen to me daydreaming. I'll head back to the dock for now.
你不会觉得商会肯定中标了吧？
Do you think the guild won the bid?
那当然啊，我们可是主人公。
It sure feels like it sometimes...
怎么想都是公司赢定了吧？
现在去爆破公司还来得及吗？
Is it too late to blow up the IPC?
晚了晚了，已经来不及了。
我才不要什么都不做干等着，我先回金人巷了，再会！
Anyway, no point in standing around here worrying. I'm heading back to the Alley. Talk to you soon!
你们来了，你们二位是被我生拉硬拽带来的帮手，我应该专程向你们道谢。
Ah, you're here. I'm the one who dragged you into all this — I must thank you again.
感谢你们为金人巷和金人巷商会所做的一切。
Thank you for everything you've done for the guild and the Alley.
Yeah, all in a day's work.
两位对金人巷的帮助居功至伟，这是应当的。
You two have done a lot to help us. You deserve every bit of praise.
我已经拿到不少奖励了。
Fancy giving us some more rewards?
{F#She}{M#He} meant to say "thank you very much."
两位对金人巷的帮助居功至伟，这是应当的。
You two have done a lot to help us. You deserve every bit of praise.
最近闲了下来，有很多事情才来得及思考。
Now that I've finally got some free time, I'm starting to reflect on the choices I made and the reasons behind them.
会长的经历塑造了会长的判断，小少爷的经历塑造了小少爷的判断，我们又何尝不是？
The president and Xiaohan had different perspectives because they came from different backgrounds... and I can't help but feel the decisions I made were somewhat restricted by my own background.
The same can be said for all of us.
我想既然经历如此重要，我应该多去经历。金人巷复兴的方法既在金人巷里，也在金人巷之外，我不能一直停留在这里。
If that's true, the only way to get a wider perspective is to leave my comfort zone and look outward. The answer to reviving Aurum Alley isn't necessarily within the Alley itself...
于是我拜托了小少爷，他帮我安排了去往庇尔波因特的实习机会，不久就准备出发了。
...and that's why I secured an internship opportunity at Pier Point with the help of Xiaohan. Once I wrap up here, I'll be on my way.
It's always good to broaden one's mind.
你走了，金人巷怎么办呢？
Who'll look after the Alley while you're gone?
我想拜托两位，在我离开期间帮忙照顾打理金人巷。会长会代替我协助你们的。
I plan to entrust the Alley to you two. If you ever need any help, just ask the president.
没错，你们要是想继续「码放货物」和完成「物流规划」，就来码头找我吧。
That's right. If you wish to continue with the inventory or logistics planning, come and find me.
我将暂时告别这里，希望我能学成归来，各位再见。
I hope I can come back with new insights. Bye for now, I'll see you when I get back.
突然有一种「事情告一段落」的感觉了。
Guess we can say "that's it for today's episode."
想起来，最开始我只是想「日行一善、急人所急」而已，没想到，我们竟然做了这么多……
"Be eager to help those in need and do one good deed a day..." I like to practice what I preach, but I never thought we'd accomplish so much.
要不是你和斯科特打赌…
All thanks to your bet with Skott...
我总不能在那个时候退缩呀，再说了，我们不是赢了嘛。
I couldn't have backed down, could I? Besides, we got him good.
要不是你的嗓门比较大…
All thanks to your shouting match with Skott...
我听白露说你们老远就听到我的声音了，真的吗？
Bailu told me you two heard me yelling before you showed up. Is that true?
要不是白露喜欢凑热闹…
All thanks to Bailu looking for trouble...
我其实也是发现码头闹事才去凑热闹的。
I don't blame her. I got excited when I heard people arguing at the dock... and the rest is history.
现在回过神来，我总感觉金人巷太幸运了，不知道是不是我的错觉？
It feels surreal that everything worked out for the Alley.
你是觉得这一切都不真实？
确实，金人巷也太幸运了。
难道不是我们太厉害了吗？
Things worked out because of our hard work.
我当然知道我们很厉害…我还是觉得金人巷很幸运。
Yeah... Everything could have easily gone wrong.
虽然有过磕磕碰碰，有过互不信任，但争吵和矛盾竟然都是为了金人巷能变好…这个过程中只要有人成心使坏，我们都不会像现在这样顺利。
Sure, there were clashes and distrust, but virtually everyone was acting in the best interest of the Alley. If that hadn't been the case, the whole thing would have fallen apart.
啊…斯科特不算，那个坏家伙费尽心思搞破坏，反倒显得像一个缺心眼。
I say "virtually" because of Skott, of course... Lucky for us, he wasn't as smart as he thought he was.
小手段无法获得真正的认可。
是呀，驭空大人不会对破坏商业秩序的行为坐视不理的。不等我们出手，天舶司也会派人来处理，斯科特这样的人肯定得意不了。
Exactly. Madam Yukong would never allow malicious competition. If we hadn't taught Skott a lesson, the Sky-Faring Commission would have done so anyway.
如果斯科特是小少爷的上司…
If Skott has turned out to be Xiaohan's superior...
那么公司可能就会更加肆无忌惮，更加难对付…幸好小少爷是一个讲道理的人。
Then the IPC would've been more brutal, and the situation would've been much harder for us... Thankfully, Xiaohan turned out to be upright and reasonable.
所以我在想，这样的幸运是理所应当的吗，金人巷走到现在这一步是巧合吗？
Taking all that into account, did we get lucky, or was Aurum Alley always destined to pull through?
有幸运，有巧合，但无关紧要。
Not sure... but I don't think it matters.
没想到素裳居然考虑了这么多？
It was all thanks to my literary mind.
什么嘛，我书读得少，但是我娘给我讲过的道理可不少！
Hmph, I may not be as well-read as you, but my mom taught me a thing or two!
我想肯定是因为「热爱金人巷的情感」，所以不同的人才会因「热爱」汇聚于此，才会出现不合理的「幸运与巧合」，对吧？
I guess the love and care for the Alley brought everyone together, and that's why despite all the difficulties, things turned out for the best.
很不习惯你讲大道理的样子。
Never heard so many wise words from you before.
Ha, better start getting used to it.
虽然感慨也感慨得足够了，但金人巷还没有完成复兴呢…码头的事情还得麻烦你。
Monologues aside, there's still plenty of work to do to get the Alley back on track. The dock still needs your help.
要是遇到什么其他困难，记得随时叫上我，我就先忙去啦～
Let me know if you run into trouble again, I'll be there. Talk to you later!
斯科特对你的出现视而不见，当然，你也可以对他不屑。
Skott chooses to ignore your presence, and in return, you can choose to disdain him.
你曾经在天舶司见过夕葵小姐，出于公正的原则，她不会在这个时候与你私聊。
You may have met Miss Xikui at the Sky-Faring Commission, but due to her commitment to impartiality, she refrains from engaging in private conversations with you at the moment.
Enough of that. Let me do it.
Let me try. If that doesn't work, put someone else in.
让我连线，我现在就要连线。
I love planning stuff. I wanna do it now!
我叫阿丰，是我将那个带有「浓云金蟾」的箱子带出来的。
My name's A-Feng — I was the one who brought out the box containing the Golden Cloud Toad.
别人叫我搬，我就搬了，我也没想到里面装着故障机巧，这件事和我没有关系。
I was told to move something, and I did. I had no knowledge of the presence of an ingenium. This matter has nothing to do with me.
我也是码头工人，我怎么可能向着星际和平公司呢……
I'm a dock worker, after all. How could I conspire with the IPC?
我叫阿丰，是我将那个带有「浓云金蟾」的箱子带出来的。
My name's A-Feng — I was the one who brought out the box containing the Golden Cloud Toad.
别人叫我搬，我就搬了，我也没想到里面装着故障机巧，这件事和我没有关系。
I was told to move something, and I did. I had no knowledge of the presence of an ingenium. This matter has nothing to do with me.
我也是码头工人，我怎么可能向着星际和平公司呢……

你察觉到阿丰紧张地避开视线，他的话里好像有什么问题……

我没有看到什么箱子，只看到了「浓云金蟾」。

你们要检查货物，我们当然就把货箱拆了，不然，你要自己拆吗？

你为什么强调这事和自己没有关系？
Why do you emphasize that this matter has nothing to do with you?

<color=#dbc291ff>(I sense a hole in his logic...)</color>
你不可能和这件事没关系。

鹤运物流上有记录显示，这箱快递就是「阿丰」寄出去的，你怎么说？

啊，这个，会不会是哪里搞错了呢？

谁不知道他们想要利用码头债务，让商会彻底失去信誉嘛。商会雇佣了我，又不是公司雇佣了我，我不可能支持公司的。
Everyone knows the IPC wants to use the dock debt to discredit the Merchant Guild. The Merchant Guild are the ones who gave me a job, not the IPC — why would I side with them?
<color=#dbc291ff>(I sense a hole in his logic...)</color>
你收到了公司的信用点，为了这点好处，你帮助公司破坏码头的运输活动。
You received payments from the IPC, and in exchange you sabotaged the shipping operations at the dock.
这和现在的话题无关吧。
This has nothing to do with the topic at hand.
The Aurum Alley is getting more and more flourishing...
朋友，我在码头上见过你。你代表商会和不少商户建立了合作，其实我也是做小本生意的，金人巷码头的福利能不能也让我沾沾光？

Friend, I saw you at the docks before. You rep a guild and have connections throughout the business world. Y'know, I'm something of a businessman myself. Can I get in on some of this Aurum Alley dock's hustle?
当然可以，我帮你联系小秘书。
Of course. I'll put you in touch with the secretary.
诶，不急不急，我们先谈，我们聊完了再找小秘书也不迟……
Hey, no rush. Let's just chat for now, and if we want to link up with the secretary after that, then it'll be fine...
哈哈哈，朋友，思维要打开，我走到哪，我的店就开在哪。
Haha, my friend, have an open mind. Wheresoever I go, there you shall find my store.
不过嘛…我这个店卖的东西，多少都有点见不得光…朋友，你懂吧？我特地来找你先商量商量，看看这个事能不能成。
But, ah... The things I sell in this store of mine, they're kinda shady... My friend, know what I'm saying? I came here just to talk with you first about whether this could happen.
I know what you mean. You're a black market dealer.
诶，怎么说话的！我喜欢称自己为「特殊物品经销商」。
Hey, what are you saying? I prefer to think of myself as a "Special Arms Wholesaler."
You're done for. I'm reporting you to the authorities.
Tryna bust out a freestyle rap, are we?
Did I step on your foot?
你看，误会了不是？朋友，我这也是正经生意，有照经营……
Look, this must be a misunderstanding, right? My friend, I'm just an honorable businessman, with a business license and everything...
现在罗浮处处都查得严，我这不是不方便嘛…但是呢，我有个客人急需一批药材，朋友，咱这码头物流是不是能帮个忙？

The authorities are cracking down everywhere on the Luofu. It's a real pain... But you know, I have a customer who urgently needs some of my medicine. My friend, can you help me out with the dockside logistics here?
什么药材，符合仙舟法律吗？
What medicine? Is it legal per Xianzhou law?
朋友放心吧，「法无禁止即可为」…咱们这儿卖的东西，就刚刚好卡在那个「法无禁止」的范围内。
My friend, don't worry. "Anything not explicitly prohibited is technically legal"... All this good stuff lies right in that "not explicitly prohibited" area.
可以，跟我去找小秘书吧。
Fine. Follow me. We're off to see the secretary.
别别别，你要给那个小姑娘说了，咱这批货是要留下痕迹的…这不太好。
No no no, you have to tell that little girl that this batch of ours is going to leave behind traces... That's no good.
码头只要长期合作，不接私活。
We're not taking on shady gigs. Legit business only.
朋友，你这样说就有些不信任我了。
My friend, you don't sound like you trust me when you say that.
我是支持你们金人巷商会的，你看我没有店面，走走停停，公司是不会来找我谈合作的，更别说什么赔偿了。
I support your Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. You see, I don't have a storefront of my own. I mosey about on my way, but the IPC won't come and negotiate any deals with me — let alone mention any money.
再说了，要是以后这里彻底被公司接管了，肯定也没有我的一席之地了。我可以与商会建立正式的合作，不过嘛，需要一个建立信任的过程。
Besides, there's no place for someone like me once the IPC swallows up this place. I can draw up a formal treaty with a guild, but you see, it requires a process of building trust.
这样吧，你帮我送一件货物，要是送到了，你回来找我，我们谈合作如何？
What about this? You help me deliver a package and if it gets through, you come back to me. And then we can talk about working together. How's that?
别啊！我霍三哥虽然不算什么好东西，但绝对算是个说话算话的生意人！
No! They may not call me "Good Guy Mr. Huo," but I'm absolutely a trader who keeps his word!
嘿！就喜欢你这样的敞亮人！放心好了，等你回来，我一定不会亏待你的！
Hey! I like open-minded people like you! Don't worry. You'll be handsomely rewarded when you get back.
你拿着我改造好的机巧鸟过去，将快递放到一个高处——我给你在导航里标记好了，客人会自己来取的。
Take the modded cycrane with you and send it to a very high location. I'll put a marker on your navigator so the client can collect.
不过朋友，我信任你，你可千万别打开「货物」，也别问客人是谁，千万记住。
But friend, I trust you. You must never, ever open the "goods." And never ask about the client, either. Don't forget that.

喂，你手上的是「霍三哥的货」吧？

辛苦你这么远送过来了，就把「货物」放在这里吧。

看什么看，没见过云骑军吗？

仔细一看，你不是云骑士兵。

(Mr. Huo has forbidden me from opening up the "goods," and from asking who the client is?)
（换句话来说，我很难验证那位「云骑」到底是真是假…）
(So in other words, it's difficult for me to verify whether or not that "Cloud Knight" is the real deal...)

(All Mr. Huo said was for me to use this cycrane to send the "goods" to a very high location... This guy seems suspicious, though. What to do?)
(No, I have to ask him again)

(I'm overthinking this. Just get out of here, right now)

仔细一看，你不是云骑士兵。

我讨厌你这种直觉敏锐的快递员。

是你让我走的，现在又反悔了？

我让你放下，你就放下，甚至就这样离开，难道你没有丝毫怀疑吗？

好感动，原来你是这么好的人？

是你自己没有警惕意识，你应该多听听地衡司的反诈骗讲座。

来吧，拿回你的「货物」，做完你该做的事。

哈哈哈哈，{NICKNAME}你回来了，我收到客人的信息，你已经准确将货物送到了。这一路上没出问题吧？

我明白了，你擅长举重若轻。我知道你帮我送货的时候，遇到了小小麻烦。
I get it. You're a very capable one. I know I put you through the ringer with delivering the goods.
但是你为了帮助我偷运货物，击退了云骑军，真是太靠谱啦。

有云骑军想要带走货物。
