朋友你为了帮助我偷运货物，击退了云骑军，真是太靠谱啦。
My friend, you even fought off the Cloud Knights just to help me smuggle some goods. You really are reliable!
你尽管放心，那位不是真的云骑，神策府不会找你的麻烦，而是我雇来的「演员」。
Don't worry. That person wasn't a real Cloud Knight, so the Seat of Divine Foresight won't be looking for you. They were just an actor I hired.
I didn't expect you to test me.
说到底你还是不信任我。
So, basically you don't trust me, huh.
做我们这行的，最重要的就是谨慎。你放心朋友，你通过了我的考验，取得了我的信任，我说到做到。
In this line of business, the most important thing is being cautious. Relax, my friend. You've passed my test and won my trust. I will do as I say.
我会以「个体经销商」的身份与你合作，我向你承诺，码头会有源源不断的运单需求，不过它们都会有「正当的名义」，都来自金人巷的商铺。

I'll cooperate with you as a "sole distributor." I promise you that the docks will be drowning in an unending stream of orders, with each of these orders being "legal" and coming from the shops of Aurum Alley.
放心老爷，都是正规正经的货物。
Relax, these are perfectly authentic goods.
这个嘛，我建议您不要问，我只能说都是合规合法的，我向您保证。
Well, you know... I recommend that you don't ask that. All I can assure you is that they're all legal. You have my word on that.
当然，这么多订单也不是凭空变出来的，老爷您可以在我这里买一些「昂贵的配方」，我们有来有往，实现双赢，这样如何？
Of course, all these orders don't come out of nowhere. You can buy some "costly remedies" from me. A little business between us will be to our mutual profit. How about it?
Please obey the law as much as possible.
一定一定，我做了这么久生意，最懂遵守法律了。
Of course, of course. I'm a business veteran, you know. Following the law is my forte.
咱俩都是响当当的生意人，早晚都能发大财！
You and me, we're both established business people. Sooner or later we'll strike it big!
您慢走，以后要是有什么事，还要仰赖朋友你帮忙呀。
Farewell then. If anything comes up later, I'll be relying on your support, my friend.
阿姨听金人巷商会的小秘书提起过你，你们商会要用金人巷码头把货发到其他洞天里去。
I heard about you from Miss Secretary of the Merchant Guild. The Guild plans to use the Aurum Alley dock to ship goods to other delves.
小秘书给我说，希望美馔阁也能做一些外卖生意——商务活动餐盒、旅行餐盒、又或是那些不方便出门的客人想吃咱家的饭了，也能出外卖。

Miss Secretary told me that she was hoping Delicacy Pavilion could start making takeouts — things like business meals and travel lunch boxes. Customers who don't have time to eat out would have the option to have the food delivered to them.
这多好，我也想吃您家的外卖。
Sounds perfect to me. I'd love a good takeout meal from Delicacy Pavilion.
谢谢你这么捧场，阿姨是打算做外卖的，只是我有些其他的请求……
Thank you! Starting the takeout business is indeed on my priority list. It's just...
难道说，阿姨还有什么疑虑吗？
谈不上是疑虑吧，阿姨就是有一些小小的请求……
I wouldn't call them concerns, more like a small request.
我们美馔阁也算是金人巷美食街的老字号了，但是游客们提起金人巷美食却总是提起「尚滋味」，你想想阿姨这要是做了外卖，可不就……
You see, Delicacy Pavilion has been around for a while, but when people talk about food in Aurum Alley, they think of Spices Supreme. If I were to start this whole takeout business...
没错，我想要是做外卖还没有口碑，我多亏呀。
Exactly. I can't simply jump in only to find people are not even interested.
Ever thought about using bots to get good reviews?
不玩虚的。东西好不好吃，看月销量就能看出来了……

而且这招阿姨以前用过呀…水军只给你刷些什么「敏感肌也能用」，搞笑吧？
Besides, I did try the method you mentioned... But the bots wrote comments like "Specially made for sensitive skin!" They didn't even bother to customize a bit!
唉，我就是担心我们要是做了外卖，还不能做出名声，就浪费了这好机会。

我认为孽物不太能做成食物。
I don't think abominations should be used as food ingredients.
总得试试嘛，可惜阿姨是朵娇花，没可能打赢孽物。要不您受累帮我带几只回来？
Gotta think outside the box! Shame that I'm not much of a fighter myself. Would you do me a favor and bring me a few abominations?
矮阿姨，您真是好身手啊！
阿姨是朵娇花，没可能打赢孽物。所以，这不是在拜托{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}你嘛。
I'm not much of a fighter myself, so I stand no chance against the abominations. Would you mind defeating them in my stead, {F#young lady}{M#young man}?
我听说云骑军截获了一批放生帮偷偷装箱的豺狼，反正都会被处理的，要是能猎回一些，我试试做成菜品…它们应该就在迴星港里，拜托你了。

I heard the Cloud Knights intercepted a bunch of wolves that the Unshackled was smuggling around. Would be a pity if they just got disposed of. If you can get me some, I'll try coming up with some new menu items. You should be able to find the wolves at Stargazer Navalia. I'm counting on you!
我听说迴星港集装箱里有些豺狼，要是能做道菜，肯定是不错的，你能帮我猎些回来吗？
I heard rumors that some wolves were found in the containers at Stargazer Navalia. I bet I can come up with some new menu items with them. Can you bring back a few for me?
阿姨打算效仿燕翠师傅研究新菜的做法，去打几只孽物，看看能不能下菜。
Seeing how Yancui expands her menu, I plan to hunt a few abominations and see what I can do with them.
（留在这里也是隐患，尽早处理了吧。）
(I should take care of them before people get hurt.)
好怪！好怪的味道！——呜呃，我还是找个地方把它扔掉吧……
Ugh... Oh dear, it smells so funky... Better throw it away in a trashcan.
难道说我的辛苦都白费了？
Are you telling me I did all that for nothing?
不好意思呀，我实在很难把这东西当作是食物…食物，到底是什么来着？

这种话不要当着我的面说呀…

不好意思呀，街坊们都说我说话直，你也别往心里去。

燕翠师傅都能处理，你也能！

你不要高看阿姨嘞，燕翠师傅是有点功夫在身上的，我就算了吧。

看到这孽物腐肉的瞬间，我脑子里闪过了一些灵感，也不能算是一无所获。可是与此同时，我也受到了精神创伤，可能需要休息一下。
The moment I saw this abomination, a flash of inspiration struck me and that's not nothing. But then again, I was also traumatized and might just need a rest.
虽然是不情之请…{NICKNAME}你能再帮我一个忙吗？麻烦你在店里跑跑堂，问问客人的点餐需求，告诉后厨就成。
If I may be so bold as to ask... {NICKNAME}, can you please do me one more favor? Please run around the store and take all the customers' orders, then pass those on to the kitchen.
矮阿姨尽管说，我会帮忙的。
Whatever you want, Short Auntie. I'm here to help.
太好了，那我就能稍微缓缓了。
That's great. Then I can take it a little easy.
你们这里都没有扫码点餐的吗？

美馔阁现在还没有…我答应你，小店以后会支持的。现在还得麻烦你。

刚才，矮阿姨已经同意与码头建立合作了。那就麻烦{NICKNAME}将「美馔阁」纳入到物流规划之中吧，这样码头就会有新的运单了。

辛苦你了{F#小囡}{M#小伙子}。今天的客人很多，一个人在外流浪谋生，肯定很不容易。这点辛苦费你一定要收下。

…其实之前公司也来找过我，希望能把我这店盘下来，我问他们之后作何打算，他们只说不会用来开餐厅，我就告诉他们让我再考虑一下。

The general idea is for me to transfer ownership rights of the store on to someone, and claim a nice fat transfer fee... But the IPC doesn't understand that having nothing to do is far worse than being poor for a long-life species, so the merchants haven't immediately flipped sides.

我见过您在码头与人激辩的本事，这次情况虽然不如码头那般针锋相对，但也并不容易。你放心，这是我自己的事，我也积极配合你的。

I've seen your debating skills at the dock. The situation this time may not be as confrontational as back then, but it's no walk in the park either. Don't worry, this is my own issue, and I'll cooperate with you the best I can.
哎，我知道你是来劝我放弃幻想、认真上班的。但今时不同往日，我有必须翘班的理由。

因为负责管理排期的卜官失算，原本应按时完成的占卜事项全都延误了。而那位卜者自知太卜大人生气后果很严重，大笔一挥，就把这些工作量试图转嫁到我们头上……

The diviner in charge of scheduling made a mistake, and all the divinations ended up getting delayed. And knowing how angry the master diviner would be, with a swipe of the pen, that diviner tried to frame us with that workload...
原本一个月的工作，按照现在的规划，必须在半个月内完成。每一位太卜司卜者都成了这次「延误事件」的受害者……

我认为这不是你的问题。

But, that diviner put it nicely — "We are a collective! Knuckle down, work hard, and there's nothing we can't get done!"

You should go on strike! Stand up for yourselves!

我明白你什么意思，你认为我是在做无用功。

这样吧，我拿着「病假证明」，你扮演「审核病假的卜者」，现在就来对质一番。
How about this: I'll take a medical certificate, and you play the role of "sick leave auditor-diviner." C'mon, let's play it out.
如果我的理由完美无缺，你就不要继续拦着我了；如果我的理由站不住脚……
If my excuse is watertight, then you've no right to stop me. But if my reason is deemed groundless...
那你就打消请假的念头吧。
Then you can give up on the thought of taking leave.
Come up with a better excuse!
您好，我是太卜司的司库青雀，我很抱歉地通知您，由于前些天我感染了「不治之症」，身体状况不佳，需要请一段时间病假进行修养和康复。

Hello there, I'm the custodian, Qingque, from the Divination Commission. I sincerely regret to inform you that I am feeling unwell due to contracting an "incurable disease," and must request a period of sick leave in which to rest and recuperate.
我出现了大量脱发、浑身头疼、肝部肿胀等症状，严重影响了我的日常工作。为了避免病情恶化，传染其他卜者，我应该积极采取治疗措施。

My symptoms include hair loss, headache in my arm, and a swelling liver, all of which severely impact my daily work duties. To avoid my condition worsening or infecting any other diviners, I should take active treatment measures.
我请求在接下来<unbreak>10</unbreak>天内请假，以便我能够全面恢复并回到工作中。我保证尽快恢复健康，并在回到工作时，尽力补偿请假期间的工作进度。

I am requesting a leave of absence for the next ten days so that I may fully recuperate and return to work duties. I pledge to recover as soon as possible and will do my best to make up for lost progress once I return to work.
感谢您的理解和支持，期待您的批准！
Thank you for your support and looking forward to your approval!
这说法实在是太标准了。
This really is quite the bureaucratese.
熟练运用请假语是打工人的基础技能哦。
Proficiency surrounding the language used when requesting leave is a basic skill for salary workers.
这是你平时说话的语气吗？
Is that how you normally talk?
...What, no! This is how I talk when I want to request sick leave.
等等，我记得你在码头上怼过公司代表，你不会也想对我也来上这么一套吧？
Wait, I remember you turning that IPC representative inside out on the docks with your words. You're not going to do that to me, are you?
等等！等等！我只是想请个假而已，用不着这么复杂。
Wait! Hold on! I just want to take some time off! There's no need to make this so complicated.
I'll try to tone down my aggression.
那我们就放轻松，把这个请假流程简化一下。
We should relax and just keep this whole leave application process straight and simple.
好好好，不要那么严肃，我的理由要真是站不住脚，你就让着我点嘛……
Fine, fine, fine. No need to be so serious. If my excuses are really that shaky, just go easy on me a bit...
我们先从你第一句开始吧。
I'll let you start it off, then.
您好，我是太卜司的司库青雀，我很抱歉地通知您，由于前些天我感染了「不治之症」，身体状况不佳，需要请一段时间病假进行修养和康复。

Hello there, I'm the custodian, Qingque, from the Divination Commission. I sincerely regret to inform you that I am feeling unwell due to contracting an "incurable disease," and must request a period of sick leave in which to rest and recuperate.
没错，你这都是「不治之症」了，我怎么治得好？
Right, you said this disease is "incurable." How am I supposed to treat that?
我这不是还在等小天老板的病假证明吗？那我现在随便取个名字好了——就叫它「不打牌我就要死了综合症」吧。
Aren't I still waiting to get a medical certificate from Little Tian? Let me come up with a random name for my illness — what about "No-Game-No-Life Syndrome"?
您好，我是太卜司的司库青雀，我很抱歉地通知您，由于前些天我感染了「不打牌我就要死了综合症」，身体状况不佳，需要请一段时间病假进行修养和康复。

Hello there, I'm the custodian, Qingque, from the Divination Commission. I sincerely regret to inform you that I am feeling unwell due to contracting the No-Game-No-Life Syndrome, and must request a period of sick leave during which to rest and recuperate.
{NICKNAME}，怎么办，我需要反驳青雀小姐的证据……
{NICKNAME}, what do I do? I need to refute Miss Qingque's evidence...
这是我为了自己方便而整理的笔记，上面记录着大量闻所未闻的奇难怪病。
These are the notes I listed for my own convenience. I recorded a lot of strange and unheard-of ailments within them.
可是这本《速查》上并没有你的这个「不打牌我就要死了综合症」！
But this quick diagnosis booklet doesn't have your "No-Game-No-Life Syndrome" listed!
你都说了这是你自己整理的笔记嘛，你把我这个「不打牌我就要死了综合症」加上去不就解决了吗？
Didn't you say these are your personal notes? Won't the problem be solved if you just add in my "No-Game-No-Life Syndrome"?
我竟然哑口无言…{NICKNAME}，我们还有其他的证据吗？
I'm actually speechless... {NICKNAME}, do we have any other evidence or anything?
…这是青雀小姐送给我的《琼玉牌秘技丛集》，这是青雀贿赂我的证据。
...This is the Celestial Jade Techniques 101 that Miss Qingque gave me! It's evidence of her bribery.
我是你的牌友，又收了你的好处，我才不得不给你开出病假证明的！
It's because I'm your game mate and have also "benefited" from our friendship that I had to give you this sick leave note!
你说的没错，但是我请假的时候，绝不会告诉别人的！这样是不会暴露什么的。
Exactly! But when I take my absence, I won't tell anyone! That way, no one will notice a thing.
…{NICKNAME}，青雀说的有道理，这本《琼玉牌秘技丛集》好像用处不大。
...{NICKNAME}, Qingque has a point. The Celestial Jade Techniques 101 isn't actually that useful.
上一次的病假证明备份？
A copy of medical certificate from last time?
这是上一次用过的病假证明……
This is the medical certificate that was used last time...
对对对，就是这个，你直接把病名改成「不打牌我就要死了综合症」不就成了吗？毕竟银河里有着各式各样的病症……
Yeah, yeah! This one! Just change my ailment to "No-Game-No-Life Syndrome" and everything will be fine? I mean, there are all sorts of weird conditions across the cosmos...
小天老板<color=#dbc291ff>随便编一个病症</color>，只要看上去合情合理就没人会查的，上次就是这样。
Little Tian, you just need to <color=#dbc291ff>randomly make a disease up</color>. Nobody's going to check up on that — provided it looks reasonable. That's how it went down last time.
临时编个病症是行不通的，丹鼎司专门派人找过我，确认病因病状是否有医典记录。
Making up an illness on the spot won't get you anywhere. The Alchemy Commission has sent someone after me before to check if the symptoms I listed are recorded in their medical texts.
什么？！丹鼎司竟然还有这么敬业的人！
What!? Don't tell me the Alchemy Commission turned out to be this thorough with all their work?
如果是这样的话，我倒是不想连累小天老板…我再想想别的法子吧。
If that's so, then I don't want to get Little Tian in trouble... I'll have to come up with something else.
星际和平公司合作邀请函？
公司几乎向金人巷所有的商户都发送了邀请函，希望商户们能与公司建立合作，我还有些犹豫……
The IPC had sent invites to almost all the stores in Aurum Alley, wishing to strike deals with us all. I'm still a bit hesitant...
要是公司标下了金人巷，也许以后就没有寿考堂给你开病假了。
If the IPC manages to secure Aurum Alley, there may not be a Longevity Hall here anymore to give you sick leave notes.
看来这个证据也不合适，我们换个别的证据吧。
Looks like this piece of evidence doesn't work either. Let's try something else.
没想到在这里也能听到你的「激辩」…就结果而言，您应该是成功了吧？
I didn't expect to hear you "debating" here... As far as the verdict was concerned, you won, right?
符玄大人会来感谢我的。
Fu Xuan the diviner will thank me.
我不会再为难小天了，不过请假还是得请假，我回去之后再想想怎么办好了。
I won't put Little Tian out anymore then, but I'll keep asking for leave. I'll go back and have another think about it.
对了，刚才小天已经同意与码头建立合作了。事不宜迟，{NICKNAME}，咱们现在就把「寿考堂」纳入到物流规划里吧，这样码头上就会有新的运单了。
Little Tian just agreed to collaborate with the docks. {NICKNAME}, please add Longevity Hall into the logistics plan. This way, the docks can get some new orders soon.
其实{NICKNAME}你来之前，我就联系好了小秘书，没有告诉你，实在是抱歉。
Actually before you came, {NICKNAME}, I contacted Miss Secretary. Really sorry for not mentioning that to you.
这小小寿考堂其实也用不了什么码头物流，我只是想表明立场而已。希望你们金人巷商会能赶走公司那些自大的家伙，让他们看看，谁才是这里的主人。

Our humble Longevity Hall really doesn't need any logistics. I just want to express my allegiance, that's all. I hope you and the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild can kick out those arrogant brutes from the IPC. Really show them who's the boss around here.
金人巷的商户们都好有干劲，我还以为大家都像若月老板那样悠闲呢。
The merchants in Aurum Alley are enthusiastic. I thought everyone would be as laid back as Ruoyue about it.
那我先回去了，小天老板，你要加油啊，加油之后，我们去打牌吧。
I'll get going then, Little Tian. You keep working at it. You can do it. And afterward, let's play a few hands of celestial jade.
Cool cool, I'll see you at the games table.
在你的帮助下，寿考堂逐渐打开了知名度。
Thanks to your aid, the Longevity Hall gradually increased its renown.
公司特地将经营权租让给金人巷商会，就是为了谋求共同发展。
The IPC specially leased operations of the dock to Aurum Alley Merchant Guild in the hopes of seeking common interest and development.
但是商会拒绝与金人巷的各大商铺进行合作，曾经繁华一时的码头如今门可罗雀。
But the Merchant Guild refused to cooperate with the major shops in Aurum Alley, and the once prosperous dock is now desolate.
金人巷码头运输效率低下 、成交量低，根本没有创造价值，这就是经营不善的证据。
The inefficient shipping and low volume of transactions at the Aurum Alley dock — which does not create any value at all — are clear evidence of poor management.
再加上商会无力支付租金，我方认为商会应该主动放弃码头经营权，并支付额外赔偿。
Coupled with the Merchant Guild's inability to pay the rent, we believe the Guild should voluntarily relinquish operating rights to the dock and pay additional compensation.
虽然斯科特咄咄逼人，但是他的话里肯定是存在漏洞的。
Despite Skott's confident demeanor, there are undoubtedly flaws in his arguments.
公司为什么不能自己运营码头？
Why couldn't the IPC operate the dock from the beginning?
哦，你是想说公司是在给金人巷商会下套吗？
Oh, are you implying that the IPC was setting a trap for the Merchant Guild?
公司将码头租给商会，然后商会经营不善，以便彻底破坏商会积累的信誉？

你们肯定就是这样想的。
That was definitely your plan all along.
你这就是在承认商会肯定经营不好码头。
So you admit that the Merchant Guild mismanaged the dock.
商会从来没有拒绝和金人巷商铺合作。

没有拒绝？那我问问你们，现在有几家商铺加入到你们的物流网络里了？
Never refused? Then let me ask you — how many shops are currently in your logistics network?
There will be a lot more later.
以后？多久以后？按你们仙舟人的时间观念，五百年以后？哈哈，这里的商铺们等得起吗？
Later? How much later? For the Xianzhou, does "later" mean <unbreak>500</unbreak> years? Haha, can the shop owners here wait that long?
呃…这…十年？二十年？{NICKNAME}，怎么办，我、我也说不上来。
Uh... ten years? Twenty years? Psst, {NICKNAME}, what should I say? Is twenty about right?
码头已经改善了运输效率，发货量也在不断增加。
The dock has improved shipping efficiency and transaction volume is increasing.
哈——？你们不会以为这点交易量就能满足了吧？
Ha...? You guys didn't think that this transaction volume would be enough, did you?
金人巷的商铺们可不是来陪你们过家家的，大家都是要挣钱的。

What makes you think we can't afford to pay the lease?
你们要能还上，<color=#dbc291ff>就拿出证据来呀</color>。
If you have the necessary funds, <color=#dbc291ff>prove it</color>.
We've already paid back the lease.
这是金人巷商会的租金。商会已经扭亏为盈，能够赔付欠款了。

什、什么？！你们居然还上了？凭什么！

金人巷商会提供的材料真实可信，根据双方的租赁合同来看，商会依然持有码头经营权。

The documentation provided by Aurum Alley Merchant Guild is true and credible, and according to the lease contract between the two parties, the Merchant Guild still holds the rights to operate the dock.
接下来，商会一方提出，斯科特代表一直在暗中破坏码头经营活动，对此你有什么要解释的吗？
Next order of business — the Merchant Guild has accused Representative Skott of secretly sabotaging dock operations. Do you have anything to say about that?
你们少血口喷人了，我为什么要搞小动作？你们这破码头，既没有商铺合作，又频繁出现事故，这跟我有什么关系？
Don't be so slanderous! Why would I stoop so low? What do the frequent accidents at this dock have to do with me?
再说了，我又不参与码头发货，难不成还能是我买通了码头工人吗？真是好笑。
Besides, I'm not even involved in shipping operations — how could I possibly buy off a dock worker? The absurdity!
你注意到斯科特虽然戴着墨镜，却掩盖不住慌乱，言语里破绽百出，肯定有什么问题。
You noticed that despite wearing sunglasses, Skott couldn't conceal his agitation, and his speech was riddled with inconsistencies, indicating that something was definitely amiss.
码头上出运输事故，你怎么会知道呢？
How did you know about the frequent accidents at the dock?
我也用码头物流的嘛，我寄出去的快递总是在路上被损坏，你们有什么头绪吗？
I use the shipping services too, you know — do you have any idea how often my packages are damaged in transit?
你少在那里装糊涂了，这不是都怪你吗？
Don't feign ignorance — isn't that all by your own design?
有没有一种可能，你真的买通了码头工人呢？
Is it possible that you paid off a dock worker to do your bidding?
空口无凭，<color=#dbc291ff>拿出证据来呀</color>。
We have the testimony of A-Feng.
这份证言铁证如山，就是你指使他破坏客人商品的。
This testimony is concrete proof that you instructed him to sabotage shipments.
什、什么？！那个老古董…仙舟人不是一直宣扬什么讲义气吗？我给他那么多钱，他转眼就把我卖了！可恶啊——
Wh—What? That little... Aren't the Xianzhou people always preaching about righteousness? I gave him all that money, and he sold me out in a heartbeat! Darn it...
哈——？你说这个谁懂啊，快拿回去吧。
Ha...? What's this about? Get that out of here.
我能理解孩子们对金人巷的热情，这一点我也一样，我们都想让这里更加繁荣。
I can tell that the opposing side is eager to see Aurum Alley thrive. Your passion resonates with me.
公司计划将金人巷改造为物流中转仓，你们的所作所为的本质也是如此。
The IPC plans to turn the Alley into a logistics hub. You are practically thinking the same.
过度开发只会影响游客体验，导致实际来到街道的游客减少，这就是现实。
The reality is — overdevelopment can only adversely impact customer experience, making the Alley less appealing.
你注意到金人头言之凿凿，甚至没有表情变化，但是这并不代表他就是对的。

你们想要的繁荣会消灭金人巷的传统与个性，那是我们承受不起的繁荣。

我们的做法和公司是有区别的！

没错，公司接手金人巷之后，他们可能关闭「同功坊」，而我们就不会。
That's right. The IPC will close down Artistry Hardware if they take over. We would never do that.
我们用决策保护商铺，而公司只会为了决策牺牲商铺。
We protect businesses, the IPC sacrifices them for their own gain.
保护？牺牲？这不过是人类语言中模糊的概念罢了，我只会看结果。
Protect? Sacrifice? I find that humans rarely understand these concepts correctly. The outcome is what truly matters.
一旦物流主导金人巷，同功坊这样的商铺很快会消亡，甚至不需要公司出手。
Once the Alley is turned into a logistics hub, shops like Artistry Hardware won't be able to sustain themselves, regardless of what the IPC does.
（他完全将我们和公司划上等号了……）
(He is convinced that the IPC and us are the same...)
这是你用数据得出的结论？
Do you have data to support your statements?
历史数据远比你们的说辞更有说服力，<color=#dbc291ff>你们最好也学会使用数据</color>。
Historical data has proved my point. <color=#dbc291ff>It is the reality, not rhetoric that matters</color>.
<color=#dbc291ff>(I sense a hole in his logic...)</color>
There are actually more customers coming to the Alley!
这份数据记录了同功坊与码头合作以来的营收变化，以及到店游客数量的变化。
This record reflects the change in Artistry Hardware's turnover and the increase in customers since it partnered with the dock.
不降反升，这不可能…难道你们在虚张声势？
The shop does better than it used to? Impossible... you must be bluffing.
你比我更熟悉小秘书，她会用假数据来说服你吗？
You know Mingxi better than I do. Would she deceive you with fake data?
这只是个例，这还不足以说服我。
The sample size is too small. I'm not convinced.
会长，我要是你，我会将个例变成普遍案例。
If I were you, Mr. President, I would think of ways to translate the success of that one sample into something that can benefit everyone.
不能够为商铺们着想的商会，是没有意义的。
A guild that doesn't proactively help businesses has no reason to exist.
你们没有经历过我所经历的时代，所以你们才不理解「我的坚持」。
You have not witnessed what I have seen, and so you fail to understand my insistence.
曾经的金人巷选择了「我的坚持」，它才会创造如今无法企及的商业奇迹。
The old Aurum Alley achieved a commercial miracle that has not yet been replicated. It did so by following my way of doing things.
如果人类无法从历史里学会经验，那金人会教给你们。
If humans are unable to draw wisdom from history, aurumatons can teach them.
金人头不再从容淡定，这是会长露出破绽的证明。他的话里肯定有什么问题……
The aurumaton head's composure faded, revealing a flaw in the president's facade. There must be something amiss with his words.
你的说法不就是在倚老卖老吗？
You can't just rely on your age and experience...
时间能说明很多事情，年轻人。
There are many things that only time can tell, young one.
你的意思是说现在的金人巷无法超越当时的金人巷？
Are you suggesting that the Alley is a shadow of its former self?
没错，如今金人巷游人数量没有达到巅峰时期的十分之一，那时金人巷车水马龙、摩肩接踵，是真正的「罗浮第一夜市」。
That is correct. The number of customers visiting the shops was ten times what it is today. The Alley was alive, and was credited as the best night market on the Luofu.
Things were better in the old days — <color=#dbc291ff>of that I am certain</color>.
<color=#dbc291ff>(I sense a hole in his logic...)</color>
你所描述的过去并不客观。
You've been looking at the past through rose-tinted glasses.
它充分证明了即便是最辉煌的时期，金人巷的交易量也几乎是与现在持平的。
In the golden era you described, the old Aurum Alley had a trading volume similar to today.
你们把飞来飞去的机巧鸟也算进去了。
You included the delivery cycranes in your math.
过去不能和现在直接对比。那时的环境和现在完全不……
You can't draw simple parallels between then and now using absolute numbers. The trading volume you mentioned may not look impressive today, but it was huge relative to...
…你想说「过去的做法不能直接适用于现在」，因为「那时的环境和现在完全不一样」——我终究还是得出了你们的论点。
...I see what you are saying. While criticizing you for making flawed comparisons, I myself also made the mistake of believing that what worked in the past could be copied to serve the present.
会长，在我看来，金人巷不是用来缅怀过去的幻影。
Mr. President, the way I see it, you shouldn't regard the Alley as a souvenir from the past.
金人巷是人的金人巷，只要人还在变化，金人巷就应该变化。
Aurum Alley should embrace change, as its residents do.
看来会议至此已经得出了结论，散会吧。
It seems we have reached an agreement. The hearing concludes here.
你怎么可以断定我们没有从历史中学会经验呢？
What makes you think we didn't draw any wisdom from history?
你们从历史中学到了不少，学会了嘴硬与诡辩，却对真正的教训视而不见。
You have indeed learned — about wordplay and logic traps — while ignoring the true lessons.
这能说明什么？请不要浪费时间。
What am I looking at? Please don't waste our time.
金人巷商会的各位好啊。
Members of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I hope you're all keeping well.
商会利用码头物流，不仅还上了租金，还筹集到了竞标资金，这足以看出码头的重要性。
By utilizing the dock, the guild managed to repay outstanding rents and also raised sufficient funding to stand at the bidding. That just goes to show how vital the dock is.
公司愿意更进一步，充分开发码头的物流效应。将金人巷打造成银河闻名的商业港口。

The IPC seeks to unleash the full potential of the dock, taking full advantage of its role as a logistics center — thus transforming Aurum Alley into one of the most advanced commercial ports in the galaxy.
这难道不是大家所期望的、终极的「金人巷复兴」吗？
And that, honorable ladies and gentlemen, is the rejuvenation that everyone has been hoping for.
尽管霄翰的考虑有些道理，不过，你见证过金人巷商户们的态度，你知道他的话有问题。
Although Xiaohan's considerations may have some validity, based on what you have witnessed with the merchants in Aurum Alley, you know that his words are problematic.
你确定你要从第一句话就开始反驳我吗？
No need to be quite so aggressive...
我们付出了很多其他的努力！
We did much more than simply utilize the dock!
但是你没有否定码头的重要性，无论是合作，还是物流规划，最终都服务于码头。

But you don't deny that the dock was vital to your operations, correct? Your partnership with the shop owners and the increase in cargo handling capacity — none of it would have been possible without the dock.
你错了，我们最终服务的是金人巷商铺。
Wrong. None of it would have been possible without winning the hearts of local businesses.
哈哈，在谈判桌上就别玩文字游戏了吧。
Haha, I think you understand my point.
金人巷真的能够停下星际货船？
How are interastral cargo ships supposed to dock? There isn't enough room.
为了建设商船港，这里大部分商店需要搬出金人巷。
To address this, most of the shops will need to be relocated.
我们也会重新规划整个商区的布局，保证港口足够开阔，吞吐量绝不输给流云渡。
The IPC will redesign the layout of the whole area to make sure ships can move in and out smoothly. We expect at least the same trading volume as Cloudford.
请放心，搬迁的商铺都会拿到合适的赔偿，数字之大，足以让所有人脸上挂着笑容。
Rest assured, all the shops that need relocating will receive generous compensation from the IPC. The package we've prepared will make everyone happy.
公司又开始施展钞能力了……
你怎么知道这就是大家期望的？
How can you be sure that everyone's vision aligns with yours?
难道各位高呼「金人巷复兴」只是自我满足吗？我不相信。
...I was using a figure of speech — but our vision of "rejuvenation" will benefit the majority.
不对，<color=#dbc291ff>难道不应该问问金人巷商铺们的意见吗？</color>
金人巷的商铺们可不这么想！
这是从金人巷各商户处收集来的意向调查，其中大部分人与商会建立了合作，并且希望能够保留现在的经营模式——其中包括同功坊。

According to the poll we conducted earlier with business owners, most of them have already partnered with the Merchant Guild and wish to preserve their current business model. Artistry Hardware is among the shops that registered this answer.
家父只是个固执迂腐的匠人，不必以他的意见为参考。
...Father has never been the shrewdest when it comes to business matters. I'm afraid his opinions don't constitute the most valuable insights.
就算有很多金人巷商户们期望如此，但这并不代表他们有远见卓识。
In agreeing with your approach, those shops may risk missing the bigger picture... and opportunities for future growth.
那不是远见，那是目中无人。
So you think they don't know what's best for themselves.
小少爷，你把自己看得太高了。
You think too highly of yourself.
明曦，接下来请讲讲商会对金人巷的规划与考虑。
Mingxi, please share with us what the guild has in mind.
小少爷将码头看作优势，但是对商会来说，商铺才是最大的卖点。
As Xiaohan mentioned, the IPC sees the dock as the most valuable asset the Alley has to offer, but for us, the local shops are what makes the Alley special.
商会不能脱离商铺存在，商会会把金人巷打造成「新•罗浮第一夜市」。
The guild serves the sole purpose of helping local businesses. We will help the Alley reclaim the title of "the best night market on the Luofu".
「罗浮第一夜市」？在公司注资后，仙舟罗浮上处处都会建起新的商业中心，人们为什么会专程来到你的金人巷呢？他们早就不在意谁才是「第一夜市」了。

"Best night market on the Luofu"? With the IPC's funding pouring in, hundreds of commercial centers will sprout. Why would people come to Aurum Alley when they have so many other options? Nobody cares about that title anymore.
金人巷需要在历史的演进中抓住机遇，转变自己的职责。「金人巷」在公司选择的未来里，会成为最有分量的名字。
Aurum Alley needs to adapt and reimagine itself. The future that the IPC offers will ensure its name is known in the most remote corners of the galaxy.
你注意到霄翰神情中有一丝动摇，这些话里肯定有些混淆视听的部分。
You noticed a hint of wavering in Xiaohan's demeanor, indicating that there were likely some intentionally misleading elements within the words spoken.
不是没有人会在意，我们就很在意。
Say what you want, but we care.
你们为什么会认为只有继续做「美食街」才算是金人巷复兴？
What makes you so determined to hold onto this idea of a "food street"? Why can't the revival of the Alley take on other forms?
因为人们需要金人巷的美食街，<color=#dbc291ff>这一点，我们可以证明</color>。
Because people want it to retain its food street. <color=#dbc291ff>We have proof of that</color>.
人们会始终需要金人巷美食街。
When people think of Aurum Alley, they think about its food. The two notions can't be separated.
这是金人巷商会和尚滋味一起做的联动活动。
We organized a crossover between the Merchant Guild and Spices Supreme.
借助宣传礼品、虚拟购物券等等手段，前往金人巷消费的游客比以往增加了一倍还多。你看，美食街在大家的心中仍然有重要的地位。
By sending out coupons and gifts, we attracted twice as many customers as we normally would. This shows that food is still a big reason why people visit the Alley.
这比重新打造优势更简单直接。
Building on an existing strength is much easier than starting out from scratch.
The Alley's identity as a "food street" is what makes it so competitive.
小少爷，你会投入天价的资金去建设港口，你会赶走大部分的本地商铺，去换来你承诺的「复兴」，但那时金人巷还是金人巷吗？
The revival you envision involves throwing pots of money into building a port while forcing away most local businesses. Wouldn't that erase the very identity of the Alley?
我们想要选择「最金人巷」的未来。
Our approach protects the people who made the Alley what it is today.
自由讨论的时间结束。请双方回去之后静候评审团消息，辛苦了。
That concludes our discussion. We will inform all participants of the result when a decision has been made. Thank you all for coming.
商业区开发竞标并不会当场宣布中标结果，但是离场的双方似乎已经心里有数。
The result of the Commercial District bid is not announced, but both parties leave with a good idea of the outcome.
有分量的名字有什么用？
You are sacrificing its identity in exchange for a fancy brand.
我的理想是将金人巷打造成「金字招牌」，一个所有人都叫得出来的名称。
A brand so fancy that everyone will remember it.
「金人巷」刻在了每个人的心中，这不比默默无闻在两三百年之后消失更好？
Wouldn't it be better for the Alley to take on a new life and stay known forever? If it remains a market, I can assure you it will die quietly over the course of the next two centuries.
我只想为当下的金人巷作考虑。
I'm only concerned with what's best for the Alley here and now.
你是想随便丢出一件材料，然后等待我的反应吗？
You can't just present something irrelevant and expect me to respond.
这与我们的讨论无关，请收回吧。
I can't say what this has to do with our discussions. Please remove it.
我承认商会在经营码头时赚到了不少，但是跟公司比起来还是杯水车薪。
I admit that the guild has made a fortune from the dock, but the IPC can offer much more.
为了金人巷商会的颜面，请收回吧。
You should retract this — I wouldn't want to embarrass the guild.
Ask again and see what happens...
门口这几位云骑是怎么回事？
What's up with these Cloud Knights at the door?
我也不知道啊，可是他们这样一声不吭地站在这儿，没人敢来买药，这生意也没法做了。
I have no idea, but they're just standing there without saying anything. Everyone's too afraid to come in for medicine and business has fallen through the floor.
…我小心翼翼地问这几位云骑来小店是做什么的，他们就说「别问，公务」。
...I ever-so-carefully asked these Cloud Knights what they were doing at the store, and they said "No questions. Official business."
你要说可疑是挺可疑的，麻烦你了。
They seem more than just a little suspicious, mind you.
I see. I'll help boot them out.
感谢感谢，不过…要是出了事的话，别怪我不认识你哦。
Thank you very kindly but... If anything happens, don't blame me if I pretend not to know you.
…看什么看，没见过处理公务吗？
...What are you looking at? Never seen anyone handling official business before?
你们是来这里假扮云骑军的？
Are you guys impersonating Cloud Knight Officers?
你怎么上来就说我是假扮的。
How can you just come up and say that to me?
你站门口，别人没法做生意了。
People can't do their business with you standing right at their door.
May I please see your credentials?
...Can't you tell just from this set of armor?
报上神策府策士的名字。
Tell me the name of the Seat of Divine Foresight counselor.
可恶，我为什么要回答你，我现在就要让你伏法！
Listen, I don't owe you any answers, because I'm gonna execute you — right here, right now!
…别打了，我们也是被雇来站在店门口的，以后不敢了，我们这就离开。
...Okay no fighting. We're just actors hired to stand here at the storefront. We won't do it again. Please let us go.
{NICKNAME}，真是多亏了你，寿考堂立刻给金人巷港口补货，你也辛苦了。
{NICKNAME}, thanks to you, Longevity Hall can now send supplies over to the Aurum Alley port. Thank you once again!
云骑军出来执行公务，却没有任何正式文件和通知，我为什么要配合你。
Cloud Knights out on official business? Then where's the official permit and documentation — why should I listen to you?
杜老板发生什么事情了？
这些云骑军一声不吭地站在店门口，吓得茶友们无人敢来，以为我这里出什么事了。
These Cloud Knights have been hanging around the front of my store, spooking all my customers who think something's happened in here.
…我问这几位云骑站在这里干什么，他们便说「别问，公务」，我问「公务是什么」，他们无人回应，就只是站在这里。
...I asked these Cloud Knights what they were doing, and they just said, "No questions, Official business." I asked, "What's that?" but they didn't respond. They just stood there in silence.
我怀疑他们是公司雇人假扮的云骑，故意来这里捣乱的。
I think, they're actually heavies hired by the IPC to pretend to be Cloud Knights, and they're just here to make trouble.
Nobody questions an officer of the Cloud Knights.
你们是来这里假扮云骑军的？
Are you guys impersonating Cloud Knight Officers?
无关人等，不要影响公务。
Nothing to do with you. Don't interfere in official business.
你站门口，别人没法做生意了。
People can't do their business with you standing right at their door.
公务要紧，还是生意要紧？
Is official business more important? Or business?
May I please see your credentials?
是哪位长官派你们来的？
So which captain was it who sent you?
说了你也不认识，真志摩听说过吗？
You wouldn't know. Majima, ever heard of him?
你问的太多了，这是妨碍公务！
You kid around too much. This is obstruction of official business!
…我们也只是挣份打工人的钱而已，现在就走，现在就走，哎哟，真是的……
...We're just workers trying to hustle a little money. We'll be off now, off we go... *sigh* Can't believe that...
你们最好走得远远的，金人巷不欢迎你。
Clear out, far away — and don't come back. We don't talk kindly to you folk in Aurum Alley.
哎，公司的小动作可真是让人不快。{NICKNAME}，真是太感谢你了，这下茶友们有着落了。
*sigh* IPC gamesmanship. It really wears me out. {NICKNAME}, thank you so much. My tea lovers are all settled now.
Is there any kind soul out there who can help me?
你是能帮我的好心人吗？请你帮我装上这个玉兆。
Are you kind enough to help me out? Please help me install this jade abacus.
你肯定见过会说话的机巧鸟，负责任的机巧鸟都说话。
Surely you've seen a talking cycrane before. Responsible cycranes can all talk.
不会是在做什么违法的事吧？
Are you sure you're not doing something illegal?
提升工作效率是违法的事情吗？
我的传感机杼太落后啦，我自费购买了新的玉兆，给自己更新换代。可惜我没有手，仅凭自己是装不上去的…所以，拜托你了。
My sensors are too outdated, so I've bought a new jade abacus at personal expense to upgrade myself. Unfortunately, I don't have any hands, so I can't install it... Please could you?
一旦装完，我就能更好地完成递送工作，让我为鹤运物流的工作效率提升百分之二十二之多。
Now that I'm updated, I can complete deliveries better bringing Heron Express over <unbreak>22%</unbreak> higher productivity.
Is there any point in working so hard?
当然有必要！一想到鹤运物流还有数不清的货物没有运送完，我就心急如焚。我不会下班的，我永不下班！
Of course there is! I feel anxious every time I think about all the work left waiting to be done at Heron Express. I'll never clock off — never stop working!
一台机器，责任心这么重吗？
A machine with a sense of responsibility this strong?
我的芯里写满了责任！应该是某人干的……
Responsibility is written into my code! I guess my coder did it...
但这不重要！如果每一台机巧鸟都能像我一样自觉、奋发！那么鹤运物流将能造福更多的仙舟居民！我不会下班的，我永不下班！
But that's not important! If every cycrane could be as self-aware and hardworking as I am, then Heron Express could benefit even more Xianzhou residents! I'll never clock off — never stop working!
帮帮我吧，我还急着去送货呢。
Help me out. I'm in a rush to deliver something.
我能清晰感觉到气流拂过翅膀轻微的震颤…起风了，我要出发了。
I can feel ever so clearly the slightest hint of a slipstream... Time to fly. I'm off.
谢谢你，刚才我遭遇了一场独属于机巧鸟的交通事故。
Thank you. I encountered a cycrane-on-cycrane traffic accident earlier.
Wanna tell me more about the accident?
我在空中连续追尾了多位无辜的机巧鸟然后不幸坠机，是事故中的事故。
I rear-ended several innocent cycranes midair and unfortunately ended up crashing. A series of accidents.
我对交通事故不感兴趣。
I'm not interested in traffic accidents.
嗯？我听说有的人认为「交通事故集锦很下饭」，看来你不是这种人。
Oh? I heard some people say they "love rubbernecking at traffic accidents." I guess that's not your style, though.
你知道「深度学习」吗？我仔细研究了仙舟机巧的交通规则，又观看了<unbreak>500</unbreak>年前到现在为止所有的机巧鸟交通事故影像资料。
Ever heard of "deep learning"? I've been carefully studying traffic rules for Xianzhou cycranes, and also viewed over five hundred years of cycrane traffic accident recordings.
我已经学会了机巧鸟各种情景下遭遇事故的方式，并且又从刚才的实践中采集了一些物理参数，至此，我已经彻底理解了交通事故。
I've mastered the various ways a cycrane encounters accidents, and collected some in situ physical parameters just now. So I now thoroughly understand traffic accidents.
你可以叫我「机巧鸟交通事故大师」。
You can call me "Maestro Cycrane of Traffic Accidents."
大师，接下来有什么打算？
Maestro, what are your plans from here?
我会接着送货，并且再也不会遭遇任何一场交通事故。
I'll keep making deliveries, and never have another accident again.
感觉你学到的经验不太实用。
Seems like you didn't really learn the most practical things.
这你就不懂了，只要能够反向应用，我就不会再遭遇任何一场交通事故。
You don't get it. As long as you can apply things in reverse, I should never encounter another traffic accident ever again.
时间不早，我还得继续运货去。谢谢你，陌生的朋友。
It's getting late and I have to get back to these deliveries. Thank you, stranger.
救…救命…救救我…我、我要不行了……
Please... help me... I—I'm about to break down...
What am I supposed to do?
对了，{NICKNAME}，我这里还有件事想要麻烦你。最近鹤运物流的垣风老哥建议我们做「客制运单」，能够进一步提升客户对我们的信赖。
By the way, {NICKNAME}, I need you to do me another favor. Recently, Yuanfeng from Heron Express suggested that we start "custom orders" to build trust with our customers.
让我想想如何给你举例……
就像是去卖衣服的店里，你看见货柜上摆放着的通用款式，那是「常规运单」——价廉物美、量大管饱，适合客户的大部分日常需求。

Well, if you walk into a clothing store, you'll see regular clothes on the shelves. They're standard quality, affordable, and suitable for most customers' everyday needs. We call those clothes "general orders."
而一些更加高档的服装店里，专业的裁缝要给客人量体裁衣，给出对应的设计，就是所谓「客制运单」——根据客户的需求进行特别的定制，以满足其需要。

But in fancier stores, they have professional tailors take your measurements to make suits tailored just for you — those are "custom orders." In short, we need to customize our services to meet the unique needs of our customers.
没错，客制运单完成之后，客户也会承认了码头物流的业务能力，更加信赖金人巷商会，并且追加更多的合作。

Exactly. Once we start providing custom orders, our customers will really see how good we are and they'll have even more trust in the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. And that means they'll be more willing to work with us down the line.
简而言之，你可以把「客制运单」当作客户的信任挑战，完成之后就有相应的好处。
So basically, you can think of custom orders as special challenges from our customers, and completing them will bring you splendid rewards.
鹤运物流的垣风大哥给我们发来了「客制运单」的需求，要是能顺利完成，能成为其他商户进一步合作的范例。
Yuanfeng from Heron Express will send us the details for custom orders. By completing them, we'll be able to work even better with our other customers.
总之，只要有{NICKNAME}的合理规划，我想这「客制运单」也并非难事，拜托你了。
Anyway, with your amazing skills, {NICKNAME}, I don't think these custom orders will be much of a challenge. I'm counting on you.
辛苦了，垣风老哥对这次「客制运单」的服务非常满意。我们与鹤运物流进构建了长期的信赖关系，加强了合作，会有更多的高价商品进入码头物流。

Thanks to you, Yuanfeng is very satisfied with our Custom Order service. Now that we've built a long-term relationship with Heron Express and strengthened our cooperation, we'll be able to get more high-end goods in at the dock.
垣风老哥真是个靠谱的人。
Yuanfeng is indeed a reliable partner.
鹤运物流是这方面的专家，商会总是能从他们这里得到很有用的建议。
Undoubtedly. Heron Express knows their stuff when it comes to shipping and delivery. They've been giving us really helpful advice.
感觉这样的信赖有些随意。
Can trust be built so easily?
我知道它看上去是「做一件事博取他人信任的事」，但事实并非如此。
I know it might seem like "you just do one simple task and you win their trust," but that's not really how it works.
信赖从来都是逐步建立起来的，商户早就信任我们了，只是我们需要一件微不足道的事来证明「这信赖是值得的」。
Trust is something that's built up over time, and those merchants have been trusting us for ages. This time, we just need to do something tiny to show that "their trust in us has value."
此后肯定还会有更多的商户想要与我们建立更加深厚的合作关系，也都麻烦你多注意了。
I'm sure there will be even more merchants who want to get in on a deeper business relationship with us, so please keep a lookout for them.
之前商会宣传部的同事想了句口号，叫「让金人巷再次伟大！」
My colleagues from the Merchant Guild Promotion Department came up with a slogan, "Reclaim Aurum Alley's Golden Glory!"
鹤运物流的垣风老哥跟机巧鸟称兄道弟，还说自己永不抛弃兄弟。
Mr. Yuanfeng from the Heron Express sees cycranes as family — and he said he'd never turn his back on family.
有人抱怨说「机巧鸟取代了很多人的工作」
People are grumbling about cycranes making our jobs obsolete.
公司业务员要求商铺们保证8小时工作。看来，公司缺乏调研……
IPC sales reps are telling the shops to stay open for at least eight hours a day. They should take a look around them...
听见码头工人摆货前大喊「开摆！」，我总是心里一紧。
The dock workers are always yelling "lay 'em out!" before stocking the merchandise. It scares me to death every time.
金人巷复兴计划还没完成，我们继续加油吧。
There's still more work to do to revitalize Aurum Alley. Let's give it our all.
不管公司想做什么，金人巷都应该做出积极改变。
Regardless of the IPC's wishes, positive changes need to be made to Aurum Alley.
有了你和素裳姑娘的帮助，金人巷胜利在望。
Thanks to you and Sushang, Aurum Alley's success is nearly a done deal!
商会的会计同事要我提醒一下，我们还没有完成阶段的营收目标。
My colleagues from the Merchant Guild Accounting Department want me to remind you that we haven't met our revenue target for this phase yet.
商会储值金现在还不算「很硬气」，我们还得继续加油。
The Merchant Guild's funds are not exactly overflowing right now. We need to work harder.
…这就没钱了吗？商会想办法凑了一些钱，请你省着点花。
Out of money already...? The Merchant Guild has thrown together some funds... Try to spend it more slowly this time.
后勤部的同事说您还没有领商会福利，千万别忘记了。
Workers from the Logistics Department said that you haven't claimed your Merchant Guild benefits yet. Please don't forget to claim them.
我们还有更加紧要的事情，需要优先处理。
There are more urgent issues that need to be taken care of first.
码头的事先暂时放一放，还有更紧急的事情要处理。
We should set the dock matters aside for now. There are more urgent issues at hand.
处理工作需要分轻重缓急，现在有更重要的事情要处理。
Different matters have different priorities. There are more urgent issues that need our attention right now.
码头临时安全检修，先去处理其他的要紧事吧。
The dock is undergoing an unscheduled safety inspection. It would be best if you took care of other urgent issues first.
我收集了很多金人巷的情报，要看看吗？
I've gathered a lot of info on Aurum Alley. Want to take a look?
解决商铺的麻烦，取得商户信任，这才是商会应该做的。
Solving merchants' problems and earning their trust — that's what any good merchant guild should do!
很多人受到你的帮助后，会反过来帮助商会，真好啊。
It's fantastic — many folks began lending the Merchant Guild a hand after you helped them out.
最近金人巷游客变多了，买仙人快乐茶还得排队。
There has been an influx of tourists in Aurum Alley lately. There's even a long line for Immortal's Delight.
游客说街道上机巧鸟变多了，你也要多抬头看看呀。
The tourists say that they've been seeing a lot more cycranes on the streets recently. Take a look for yourself.
如果总是绕远路，最后亏钱的还是我们……
If we keep going the long way around, we'll be in the red...
鹤运物流反馈说，物流规划还没有完成…要不要再确认一下？
Heron Express said that the logistics plans aren't complete yet... Should we double-check them?
目前的规划评级还比较低…也许可以再优化一下？
Our current plan hasn't been rated too highly... Maybe we can improve it a bit?
货运星槎的运输成本不低，尽可能充分利用空间吧。
Transportation via freight starskiffs can be costly. Use the space available to the best of your ability.
码头仓库已经开始积压了…快发货吧！
The dock's storage is starting to overflow... Hurry and start shipping!
金人最重要的部分就在头部，人类也一样。
The most important part of an aurumaton is its head, same as humans.
我很想念过去的金人巷，那时我还能散步。
I miss the old Aurum Alley. I was still able to walk back then.
人们害怕金人智慧程度过高。但我毫无威胁。
People are afraid that aurumatons are too smart, but I pose no threat to anyone.
很多人当着我的面，也不知道我能言善辩。
Many people I converse with are surprised I'm able to speak so eloquently.
我故意没有通过「金人智能测验」逃过一劫。
I purposely failed the Aurumaton Intelligence Test so I'd be able to slip by unnoticed.
商业顾问来了，我们开始工作吧。
The business consultant is here. Let's get to work.
又得麻烦你了，我们开始工作吧。
We will be needing your help again. Let's get to work.
商会搜肠刮肚凑了些钱，请你一定好好规划。
The Merchant Guild has mustered all it can to put together some funds for you. Spend it wisely, please.
商会不会亏待你的，去把商会福利领走吧。
The Merchant Guild will always pay you what you deserve. Go and claim your Merchant Guild benefits.
听说街道上出了不少事情，我没有手脚…只好拜托你去看看了。
I heard big changes are happening, but it's difficult for me to know... Would you mind taking a look?
没有商铺支持的商会是不成立的，去和他们加深合作吧。
The Merchant Guild cannot exist without the merchants' support. Try to establish a more meaningful partnership with them.
你在金人巷做的每件事都对商会有所帮助，放手去做吧。
Everything you do in Aurum Alley helps the Merchant Guild. Don't let anything hold you back.
我听小秘书说你很擅长规划成本，真的吗？
I heard from the secretary that you're good at budgeting — is that true?
I suppose the logistics plans are still being hammered out?
我看你这规划，还有提升空间。
Looking at your plan, I see there is still some room for improvement.
货运星槎成本不低，我们应当充分利用。
Freight starskiffs can be costly. We should make the most of them.
发货仓满了，你应该赶紧发货。
Storage has reached capacity. You should hurry and start shipping.
「前方直行<unbreak>50</unbreak>米」可这前面明明是墙啊，这要怎么「直行」，难不成要从墙根下钻过去？
"Go straight ahead <unbreak>50</unbreak> meters" — but there's a wall blocking the way. How can we "go straight"? Don't tell me we're supposed to dig under.
是有问题，这导航的数据明显对不上……
Yeah, my navigation data is obviously buggy...
这里可没有墙根可以钻…
啊，你误会了，这导航是给机巧鸟准备的，不是我要钻墙根。
Ah, let me explain. That data's for the cycrane, not me. I'm not digging anywhere.
哎，我们鹤运物流的导航数据有点问题，可我才上岗没几天，金人巷的「美食地图」还是一片空白……
Hey, my Heron Express data is a bit buggy. I've only been working this gig a few days, but the Foodie Map over in Aurum Alley is completely blank...
我不了解这里的路况…看你好像很了解金人巷，你能帮我个忙吗？
I don't know my way around here... You seem to know Aurum Alley pretty well. Could you help me out?
给我的「搭档」，喏，就这只新来的机巧鸟，带它去这附近的餐馆转转。
Here's my cycrane and "partner." There you go. Please take it around a few nearby restaurants.
你好，我自己会飞，你给我带个路就行。
Hello, I can fly. Just show me where to go.
咱们启程吧，「美食地图」收录了几家老字号…等我查询一下。
Let's get going. The Foodie Map lists a few old classics... Let me just check those for us.
我看看啊，劳烦您给我指指路，从这里去「美馔阁」该怎么走啊？
Let me see... Could you please show me the way over to the Delicacy Pavilion from here?
Go straight out and turn left. It's right there!
放心，您说得轻巧，我飞得更轻巧，「左转」压根不在话下！
Don't worry. I'm as deft at flying as you are with word. "Turn left" is a cinch!
好的好的，收到指令，「向左直行」！
看来就是这里了，「美馔阁」…地图路径上传中…请稍等。
Looks like this is it. The Delicacy Pavilion... Uploading pathing data... Please wait.
还有一家「尚滋味」的数据是空白，劳烦你能再给我指指路吗？
There's another blank place here, the Spices Supreme... Could you please navigate again for me?
Let me get my bearings first...
方位…方位是哪里…「方」的…建筑…是这个吗？
Bearings... Locating "bearings"... Is this like... a "building"...?
你不确定你们现在所在的方位，于是便打开手机查看了下地图。
You're not sure where you are, so you look it up on the map in your phone.
原来「尚滋味」就在这旁边，我们走——
So the Spices Supreme is right next door. Let's go!
诶？机巧鸟呢，我那么大一只的机巧鸟哪儿去了？
Hm? Cycrane? Where did a cycrane that size duck off to?
你抬起头，这才发现一直跟在你身旁的小机巧鸟早已不知去向何方了。
You raise your head, only to discover the cycrane that has been following along with you all the way has somehow disappeared.
你在找那只机巧鸟吗？我刚才看到它一直往前飞……
Are you looking for that cycrane? I just saw it flying straight ahead...
那个方向…好像是「尚滋味」的后院吧？和「寿考堂」的店面挨着的。
Over there... I think it's the rear courtyard of the Spices Supreme? Right beside the Longevity Hall.
Thank you. I'll be off then!
这里真的是「尚滋味」吗？好像是，又好像不对。
Is this really Spices Supreme? Could be, could be not.
…这里好像是人家的后厨仓库吧？一般人导航不应该去店面吗，定位在这儿是要怎么进去啊。
...Isn't this the back kitchen's pantry? Navigation tools shouldn't be sending people here. How can I get in there?
还有，刚才给你带路的那个好心人呢？人家好心给你指路，你把人家甩在后面了？还是说你把人给跟丢了，你说你，能不能有点职业道德啊……
Also, what about that kind-hearted person who just gave you directions? How could you just leave them behind like that? Please be more professional and don't just lose track of people like that...
啊？{F#她}{M#他}还没来吗？我看看…还真是！
Hmm? {F#She}{M#He} isn't back yet? Let me see... Golly gee, you're right!
您来啦！都怪我，刚刚飞太快了没注意，看来得装个后视镜了……
There you are! It's my fault. I was drifting and not paying attention. I really should install a rear-view mirror...
你光顾着自己飞，都不想想我…
You're so lost in yourself that you've lost track of me...
抱歉抱歉，才到岗几天，业务还不太熟练，下次不会了！
I'm sorry. I've only been in this role a few days and I'm not very experienced. I'll do better next time!
那个，请问「尚滋味」的正门是在哪里啊？
Well then, where is the front entrance to the Spices Supreme?
这里是后院，得调头绕回去。
This is the rear courtyard. You'll have to turn around and skirt across.
金人巷西南角区域地图已更新，感谢你的帮忙，这点辛苦费还是收一下吧，不然我和我的同事可过意不去了。
Thank you for your help. I've updated the southwest corner of the Aurum Alley map. Here's a little fee for your work. Take it, otherwise we'd feel awkward.
这是南是北，我是谁我在哪儿……
Is this north or south? Who am I? Where am I...
我不仅是机巧鸟，我还是鹤运物流旗下的在编员工。
Not just any cycrane: But one who's in the employ of the Heron Express.
…那我还在「罗浮」呢，你是不是觉得自己很幽默。
...Wow, I'm still aboard the Luofu. Do you think you're funny?
这位路过的好心人，你有见过我的搭档吗？他是我们鹤运物流的测试员，我方才去送了个货，回来就没见着他踪影了。
Hello there, kind-hearted pedestrian. Have you seen my partner? He's one of our Heron Express testers. I nipped out to deliver a package — but when I got back, he was gone.
What does your partner look like?
他长得啊不丑也不帅，不高却不矮，普普通通大众脸。
He's not too ugly, not too handsome. Not very tall, nor very short. An average everyman face.
你是机巧鸟，可以给他发坐标。
You're a cycrane. You can send him your coordinates.
我倒是想，可是定位失败了呀。
I wish I could, but positioning systems have failed.
本来我送完货就要返航的，但是金人巷我们才来没多久，物流地图的数据空缺了一大片…我想确认下自己在哪儿都定位不了。
I was meant to return to the base after delivery, but seeing as we only just got here and so much of the map data was empty... I just couldn't confirm my own location.
按照接下来的工作安排，我俩要去「杜氏茶庄」取货，然后再去录入剩下的地图数据。
Next up, we should head over to Du's Teahouse to pick up the delivery, and then fill in the remaining map data.
好心的{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，你能不能给我指指路，带我去一下「杜氏茶庄」？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you have been too kind. Could you please show me the way to Du's Teahouse?
这里的确是「杜氏茶庄」…不过怎么没看到他人影啊？
This is indeed Du's Teahouse... But where is the man himself?
看来他不在这里…按照工作计划，今天原本要去「杜氏茶庄」和「同功坊」的，看来他应该是去了「同功坊」。
Looks like he's not in... Based on work plans, he is meant to visit Du's Teahouse and the Artistry Hardware today. Looks like he's probably gone to the Artistry Hardware.
地图里「同功坊」的数据是空白一片，劳烦你能再给我指指路吗？
The Artistry Hardware is another blank place on the map... Could you please navigate again for me?
Actually, I'm not so sure myself...
没事，大不了就多飞几圈，我的能源提示还剩百分之九十九，保证能飞很久。
Alright, it'll just be a few more laps around the block. My display still shows ninety-nine percent battery left, so I'm good to go for a long time.
好的，不急，你慢慢想，想起来了再出发。
Sure, take your time. It's not urgent. Give me a holler once you remember.
要去「同功坊」的话，我们接下来该怎么走？
How do we go to Artistry Hardware from here?
先往前走，然后左拐试试…
Try going straight ahead, then turn left...
从右边的楼梯上去再左拐？
Go up those stairs on the right and then turn left?
Alright, you got it. Let's go.
…等等，你搞错方向了，我方才明明说的是「先往前走，然后左拐」。
...Hang on, you're going the wrong way. I just said, "Go straight ahead, then turn left."
…啊，我忘了，我搭档今天又忘记给我还原出厂设置了…我前后左右总是分不清，抱歉抱歉！
...Ah, I forgot. And my partner forgot to restore me to factory settings... I always get my lefts and my rights mixed up. Sorry about that!
那我们现在怎么办？要不打个星槎过去？
What do we do now? Should we catch a starskiff over?
那个，你们是要去哪儿啊？机巧鸟还打什么星槎啊，浪费钱。
Where are you going? What kind of cycrane catches a starskiff? Total waste of money.
We want to go to Artistry Hardware.
「同功坊」？那你们没走错啊，接着往下走就到啦。
Artistry Hardware? Then you're on the right path. Keep going and it's right there.
你刚才不是说我走错方向了嘛？还是说…你之前指的位置就不对啊。
Didn't you just say that I went the wrong way? Or is it more a case that... your positioning before was wrong?
...I must've gotten things mixed up there. My bad.
…等等，你搞错方向了，我方才明明说的是「先往前走，然后左拐」。
...Hang on, you're going the wrong way. I just said, "Go straight ahead, then turn left."
…啊，我忘了，我搭档今天又忘记给我还原出厂设置了…我前后左右总是分不清，抱歉抱歉！
...Ah, I forgot. And my partner forgot to restore me to factory settings... I always get my lefts and my rights mixed up. Sorry about that!
诶？！你怎么在这儿？我找了你老半天了，一直追踪不到你的定位，急死我了。
Huh!? What are you doing here? I've been looking for you all day and couldn't keep up with you. I'm at wit's end!
还有…你身边的这位…这位是？
And also... Who's this with you? Who are they?
原来如此…多亏你帮忙，收集了「杜氏茶庄」的路径数据不说，还将它带到我身边。
I see... Thank you for collecting the route data for Du's Teahouse and bringing it back to me.
我原本以为今天下不了班了呢！还好，咱们仙舟上还是好心人多啊！真的太感谢了！
I thought I wouldn't be able to finish my job today! Thankfully there are so many kindhearted people on this ship! Thank you so much!
接下来我们还得去「同功坊」，好心人你能再给我们指指路吗？
We'll need to go to Artistry Hardware next. Could you please point us the way again, kindhearted stranger?
指什么路啊，我知道在哪儿，就别劳烦人家了，你跟着我别再走丢了。时间也不早了，回头再聊！
Don't bother, I know where it is. Just follow me and don't get lost again! Oh, it's getting late. Let's talk later!
走吧走吧，搞不好我搭档就在那儿等我呢！
Let's go there. Maybe my partner is waiting for me there!
Eh, all this work is making my head spin.
真是世风日下，咱累死累活的，倒是让那机巧鸟舒坦完了……
I'm working my tail off while that slumber-bot of a cycrane is slacking off...
哎呀，是{NICKNAME}来了，太好了，我这一个人支起摊来真就忙不开身，刚刚还发愁呢。
Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}! You came at just the right time. I've got myself tied up in knots over what to do about this unruly cycrane.
是这样的，我这摊子接了点外卖订单，但负责配送的机巧鸟却隔三差五地偷懒。
Here's the deal: I've received some take-away orders, but the cycrane that is supposed to deliver them just keeps slacking off instead.
我先前也逮到过它好几次，可惜这小家伙鬼精鬼精的，看到我的人影儿就跑，我根本抓不住它。
I've been on a wild goose... err, cycrane chase trying to catch it, but it's way too quick for me.
跟这家伙成天干仗，我都有经验了，它就<color=#dbc291ff>窝在码头的箱子堆上睡大觉</color>。
At this point I know that bird's habits like the back of my hand — it's probably <color=#dbc291ff>napping on a pile of boxes down at the dock</color> this very moment.
说起来…它今天又不见了，肯定是<color=#dbc291ff>躲在码头上</color>偷懒去了，但我实在忙得抽不开身，你能不能代我去找找它？让它赶紧回来干活。

Speaking of which... it's gone missing again today. I'm pretty sure it's taking a nap <color=#dbc291ff>down at the dock</color>, but I'm too busy to go looking for it myself. Could you track it down and give it a little nudge?
你注意到眼前的箱子里接连不断地传来怪异的呼噜声，想起仙舟上的种种神异传闻，你不禁猜想这或许是某种「箱中仙」吧。
You hear peculiar snores emanating from the box in front of you. Recalling the urban legends you've heard on the Xianzhou, you can't help but wonder if it's a "fairy in a box."
你探头靠近箱子，决定一睹「箱中仙」的真身——然而视线所及之处，只有一只睡着还不忘磨牙的机巧鸟。
Curious, you move in closer to the box, hoping to catch a glimpse of the "fairy in the box." However, all you see is a snoozing cycrane, grinding its teeth, fast asleep.
等等，机巧鸟有牙齿的吗？算了，这也不重要了，总之…那是只睡相奇差的机巧鸟。你试着喊醒它，但它翅膀抖了抖，却装作没听见继续睡。

Wait, do Cycranes even have teeth? Eh, whatever. It's a cycrane that's slouched over and sleeping. You try to wake it up, but it just flutters its wings, pretending not to hear you before drifting back to sleep.
别摇了别摇了，饶了我吧，再摇我就要吐了！
Ahh, stop it! Stop! Or I'll throw up!
Take out the bat and threaten it!
饶命饶命！逃个班而已，不至于动手吧！
Please, have some mercy! I'm just slacking off! You're using excessive force!
在它耳边轻声说「下班了」。
Whisper "you can get off duty" into its ear.
Great! Time to get off work!
…哎，为了让我上班竟雇了专人，真是世风日下啊。
...Wait, they hired someone just to supervise me? What a world we live in.
Tall Auntie asked me to check on you.
…哎呀，我又不是不干活，我只不过想晚点再干……
...You see, it's not like I'm not working. I just want to do the work at a later time...
好了好了，扰鸟清梦就算了，还这么过分…别催了别催了，我这就回去。
All right, all right. I get it. My nap time is over... Sheesh, no need to push me. I'll get back to work now.
到底要闹几次啊，有完没完，这一天天的就知道偷懒！
How long before that bird comes to its senses? It just won't stop slacking off!
不气不行啊，就没消停过，换做是你你也受不了吧。
I wish I could, but it's interfering with our business operations. You'd be at your wits' end too if you were in my shoes!
咳咳，好巧不巧，是咱们鹤运物流的机巧鸟。
Ahem, to be honest... it's one of our cycranes.
{NICKNAME}，本来按照你先前帮忙规划的物流路线，金人巷的商铺生意都红火了不少，没想到反倒是我这里出了岔子。
Thanks to the logistics route you helped plan, {NICKNAME}, our business has been booming in Aurum Alley, but I never expected that something would go wrong on my end.
我这里有只机巧鸟，什么都好，就是有个缺点——不定时地偷懒。这不，眼下就赶在大家正忙着的时候又不知道跑哪里歇息去了。
My cycrane is actually a great helper, but it has one terrible shortcoming: It likes to slack off from time to time. Now I need it for something, but it's nowhere to be found.
我光是回复大家投诉物流的消息就快手抽筋了，正巧你在，我听明曦和素裳姑娘说过，你胆大心细，身手又敏捷——

Now I'm almost overwhelmed by all the complaints from our customers about our delivery service. It's a good thing you're here — Mingxi and Sushang were just telling me that you're a thoughtful and swift helper...
这只机巧鸟有点小聪明，<color=#dbc291ff>发现有人来抓它就会装模作样地宣称是找错鸟了</color>。但它嘴巴很碎，<color=#dbc291ff>老喜欢缠着人讲些自己胡诌的见闻</color>，这一点倒是蛮好辨认的。

That cycrane is a cunning one. <color=#dbc291ff>If it sees someone coming to catch it, it will assert that you've found the wrong cycrane</color>. But the thing about this cycrane is that it's a chatterbox and always <color=#dbc291ff>pesters people with its made-up stories</color>. That's its signature characteristic.
想来这点小事也难不倒你，那就麻烦你帮我把这只不成器的机巧鸟给抓回来吧，拜托了。
I'm sure this won't be much of a challenge for you. So, can you help me catch that pesky cycrane? Thank you in advance.
You see? That's what I said!
…就是说，我运送的货物也不在少数了，但臭成那样的包裹我还是头一回，当时我就想，这个味道莫不是腐烂的肉味？
...I mean, I'd delivered quite a few packages, but that was the first time I ever came across a package with such an awful stench. I thought to myself, "could that stench be rotten meat?"
Sounds horrible, right? So I just...
噢，他们给你升级了新的嗅觉系统吗？真羡慕啊，不像我，我身上的还是老一套，只能识别出<unbreak>300</unbreak>种气味呢。
Oh, did they update your olfactory system? That's so enviable! Unlike me, I'm still using the old one that only recognizes <unbreak>300</unbreak> smells.
又腐烂又肉味的，到底是什么味儿，你能给我们先捋清楚吗？
"Stench of rotten meat." Can't you just tell us what exactly was in that package?
别八卦了，该回去干活了。
Hey, enough chattering. It's time to get back to work.
Work? But I just finished my work...
你什么意思，我还在休假呢。
Back to work? I'm still on vacation.
被我逮到了吧，又在偷懒！
好端端的怎么瞎骂鸟啊，你这家伙啊，真没素质……
Hey, watch your language! Who are you accusing of slacking off, huh?
"Slacking off?" No, you must be thinking of the wrong cycrane.
你别瞎说啊，我们都是老实本分的机巧鸟，在这里聊聊天也有错了？再说了，我聊的可是我在工作中遇到的离奇故事，之前有一个神神秘秘的人托我——

Don't talk nonsense. We're all diligent Cycranes here, and what's wrong with a little bit of chit-chat? Besides, I was just retelling a bizarre story that happened to me at work. You see, I was entrusted by a mysterious person...
好了好了，老哥你能不能别再重复你的开头了，直接说后续行吗？
Come on, mate. Can you just skip the preamble and tell us what happened next?
啊咧，我是真的在轮休啊，我前不久可是连轴转了好久呢。我出来逛逛也不行嘛……
As I said, I'm on vacation. I've been working for such a long time, and now I'm glad I can finally go out for a stroll...
要我说你还是别认错鸟，别冤枉我们好鸟呀。
Anyway, I'm not slacking off. Call out slackers if you must, but don't falsely accuse an honest, hard-working cycrane.
就是就是，你可得看仔细了，别抓错好鸟。
That's right — carry out your investigation carefully, or you'll find the wrong cycrane.
好吧，这你都认得出来，算你厉害，我认了。走吧，聊了这么久，也该回去干活了。
Oh, you finally caught me! You're sharp, I'll give you that. Fine, I guess it's time to go back to work.
嘎嘎！你抓错鸟啦！但我会飞哦，溜了溜了。
Gah! You've caught the wrong cycrane! No worries, I'll just fly away.
我也会飞！等等我，我们一起！
Hey, wait for me! I'm going, too!
你也不怎么聪明嘛，哎，我这鸟生向来善良，看你可怜，算了算了，我这里也散场了，我跟你回去，免得你没办法交差。
I thought you'd be smarter, but I guess I was wrong. Lucky for you, this kind-hearted cycrane won't leave you empty-handed. I'll come back with you so Yuanfeng won't give you a hard time.
你眼神不怎么好使啊，抓错鸟啦！
Hey, do you even know what you're looking for? You've got the wrong bird!
就是，没看到它爪子上的包裹固定器都不在了嘛？你看我，我也是刚从窝里出来，我爪子上也没有，嘿嘿！
Yeah, can't you see there's no package holders on its talons? And look at me, I'm fresh out of the nest, so I don't have any holders either.
我们之中，必有一人是怠工的坏蛋！
There must be slacker among us!
可你也没有，我也没有，那就是说……
But neither of us is. So, that means...
好了不装了，在这里聊了半天也累了，我也该回去休息了！走吧，记住了，我是「自愿且主动提出」回去的，不是被你抓回去的！
Alright, I'll stop playing innocent. I suppose it's time to get back to work. Just to clarify, I'm "taking the initiative" to "voluntarily" follow you back. You didn't catch me at all!
这人恐怕是来胡搅蛮缠的，大家快跑！
This person is a saboteur! Run away!
难怪刚刚它说有化外民对机巧鸟图谋不轨，此事竟是真的……
No wonder it tried to warn us that some Outworlders were plotting against us cycranes. I can't believe it's true...
我早就说过我人脉广消息灵，你们不信嘛，哼。我说，大家都镇定点，别慌。
You see, I was right the whole time — I told you I have connections in high places. But don't worry — there is no need to panic, my metallic friends.
喂，这个谁，你怎么称呼来着——算了，这不重要，总之，这里另外两位机巧鸟是我刚认识的朋友，你是来抓我的，要抓就抓我好了，别伤害它们！
Hey, you there! What's your name... Ah, forget it. It doesn't matter. Anyway, these Cycranes are my friends, and if you're here to catch someone, just take me and leave them alone!
Way to stand up for the flock!
够义气，你这兄弟我认下了！
Your courage is commendable — from now on I'll stand by you through thick and thin.
听见没有，一鸟做事一鸟走，我跟你走——
You hear me? Leave my friends alone. I'll go with you...
咱辛辛苦苦做的菜啊…怎么会这样啊…
Agh, I spent so much time on this... How could this happen...?
哎呀，别提了，外卖单子多到我都忙不过来了，但最近却总是被客人投诉，我就纳闷了，我就说我这厨艺也没退步，怎么就天天吃差评了。
Oh, you know what? All the takeout orders are overwhelming these days, and so are the complaints from my customers. I've never received so many negative reviews before.
但我仔细一看，奇了怪了，投诉全是外卖订单上的，店里堂食倒还是满星好评，这说明我的手艺没问题呀……
At first I thought that my cooking wasn't as good as it used to be, but that didn't seem to be the case. So I took a closer look and found that all the complaints were about takeout orders...
So, something is wrong with the takeout?
你说得没错，问题的确就出在咱家的外卖配送一事上……
Exactly, something is terribly wrong with the delivery...
Maybe the delivery was so slow that the food was all cold?
这怎么可能呢，我都是仔细打包好放在保温食盒里的，再说机巧鸟送货的速度可不慢。
But that's impossible. I packed all my dishes carefully and put them in thermal lunch boxes. And as you know, cycranes fly fast.
我把所有投诉都看了一遍，我发现投诉的内容不是说「外卖丢了」就是「送错餐品」。
Actually, I read through all the complaints, and all of them were about "lost delivery" or "wrong dishes delivered."
我估摸着应该是在外卖配送环节上出了问题。物流公司那边派了这只谛听过来，让我顺着订单的路线去查…但我眼下手里还有一堆订单要处理，实在是抽不开身了。

I realized something was wrong with the delivery, so I contacted the delivery company. They sent me this Diting and asked me to follow the route and find out what had happened... But now I'm having too many orders to look into this issue.
Could you please look into this for me, {NICKNAME}? I could really use your help...
食盒孤零零地被丢在此处，它的外壳和等不到外卖的顾客的心一样冷。
A lunch box is left here alone. Its casing is as cold as the hearts of the customers who haven't received the food they ordered.
你仔细检查了一遍，确信这就是「尚滋味」遗失的外卖。
After checking it carefully, you are certain that it is the missing takeout food from the Spices Supreme.
（虽然没找到「嫌疑人」，但还是先跟燕翠说一声吧……）
(Although I haven't figured out who did this yet, I should inform Yancui anyway...)
尽管这里没有摆放任何「此路不通」的标语牌，但堆积的杂物显而易见地提醒着你。
While there is not a "No Entry" sign, the piles of clutter here have clearly expressed this.
（谛听闻到的气息和墙根相连，偷外卖的家伙该不会是飞过去吧？）
(The smell Diting detected is from the other side of the wall. Did the guy who stole the takeout food fly over this clutter?)
（可我又没长翅膀，算了，还是从旁边绕过去看看吧。）
(But I don't have wings... Well, I guess I'll have to take a detour.)
Agh... I spent so much time on this...
您好，{NICKNAME}大人，我在这里等候您多时了。
Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.
你们十王司这么神出鬼没的吗？
Is the Ten-Lords Commission always so mysterious?
It's {NICKNAME} who didn't pay enough attention.
…你是什么时候出现在身后的？
It's {NICKNAME} who didn't pay enough attention.
你好守灵，这么巧啊你也遛弯？
Hello Shouling. What a coincidence. Out for a walk too?
Shouling isn't out for a walk.
{NICKNAME}大人上次使用「降魔机巧鸟」成功回收天上的「逸散岁阳」，这次守灵也要拜托大人将绥园各处的逸散的岁阳收集完整。

You successfully retrieved the dispersed heliobi in the sky using the exorcist cycranes last time, {NICKNAME}. This time, Shouling would like to ask you to again collect all the dispersed heliobi around Fyxestroll Garden.
你们十王司挺会差遣人…
The Ten-Lords Commission sure loves to delegate chores...
您放心，奖励少不了您的。
Don't worry. You shall get enough compensation.
这园子里到处都有小岁阳…
There are baby heliobi all over this garden...
放心，那些岁阳都在十王司看管之中。
Don't worry. Those heliobi are under the control of the Ten-Lords Commission.
这次拜托大人回收的是那些<color=#dbc291ff>异色的「逸散岁阳」</color>，绝非是随处可见的岁阳。大人操作「降魔机巧鸟」后一眼便知。

What we would like to ask you to retrieve this time are the <color=#dbc291ff>dispersed heliobi of different colors</color> this time. These aren't the heliobi you can see anywhere. You will instantly understand when you start to control the exorcist cycranes.
等到大人完成到一定程度后，守灵会带着谢礼出现——守灵会在需要时出现，不需要时离开，不会耽误大人时间的。
When you have collected enough, Shouling will appear with a token of appreciation. Shouling will appear when there is a need, and leave when there isn't, without taking up too much of your time.
您好，{NICKNAME}大人，我在这里等候您多时了。
Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.
感谢您的协助，十王司成功回收此处的「逸散岁阳」，谢礼就留在此地，希望大人笑纳。
Thank you for your assistance. The Ten-Lords Commission has successfully retrieved the dispersed heliobi at this area. I shall leave your reward here. I hope you receive it well.
守灵有事便先行一步了。
Shouling has other matters to attend to and shall take leave for now.
您好，{NICKNAME}大人，我在这里等候您多时了。
Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.
You keep doing that. It's rather scary.
大人只是太过专注，没有注意到守灵罢了。
You were merely too deep in thought to notice Shouling's presence.
感谢您的协助，十王司成功回收此处的「逸散岁阳」，谢礼就留在此地，希望大人笑纳。
Thank you for your assistance. The Ten-Lords Commission has successfully retrieved the dispersed heliobi at this area. I shall leave your reward here. I hope you receive it well.
守灵有事便先行一步了。
Shouling has other matters to attend to and shall take leave for now.
您好，{NICKNAME}大人，我在这里等候您多时了。
Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.
这些岁阳找起来可麻烦了…
These heliobi sure are troublesome to find...
是这样的吗？{NICKNAME}大人真是帮了大忙了。
Is that so? {NICKNAME} has been such a great help.
这么简单的事情你们也能做吧？
Can't you even do something as simple as this?
…这并非简单之事，{NICKNAME}大人过谦了。
...It is far from simple. {NICKNAME} is being modest.
感谢您的协助，十王司成功回收此处的「逸散岁阳」，谢礼就留在此地，希望大人笑纳。
