Shouling has other matters to attend to and shall take leave for now.
搏击俱乐部挂着不少沙袋，一是用来烘托气氛，二是供选手们赛前热身。
The Fight Club has lots of punchbags hanging around, both to create a cool vibe and to help fighters warm up.
你看着这个沙袋，忽然涌现出了一个念头——是否可以在这里尝试一下那本《贝洛伯格古武术残卷》上记载的秘籍？
Looking at this punchbag, a lightbulb goes off in your head: Could you use this to try out some of the secret techniques shared in the "Fragmented Record of Belobog Ancient Martial Arts"?
毕竟鬼知道这前言不搭后语的残卷上记载的「古武术」可不可靠，搞不好就是史考特那个老东西自己编造的。
After all, who knows if the "ancient martial arts" recorded on these disjointed and fragmented scraps are reliable or not. It could all be a fabrication of that old joker, Scott.
若是在实战中尝试，未免太危险了。不如，先在这里试试看吧。
Trying it out in combat would be risky. Better to first put it into practice here.
你又站在了这个沙袋的面前…大概是想再试试那本《贝洛伯格古武术残卷》上记载的招式吧？
Standing before the punchbag again... Probably wanting to try out those moves again from the "Fragmented Record of Belobog Ancient Martial Arts," right?
你以最快的速度，狠狠打出了两记上勾拳。
You throw out two brutal uppercuts as fast as you can.
你气沉丹田，打出了两记下勾拳，拳风锐利如刀。
You muster your strength and throw two hooks into the punchbag. The force cuts through the air like a knife.
你打出一记左勾拳，紧接着又是一记右勾拳。
You throw out a left hook, closely followed by a right hook.
你打出一记右勾拳，紧接着又是一记左勾拳。
You throw out a right hook, closely followed by a left hook.
几招下去，你竟恍惚间觉得自己并非在这窄小的搏击俱乐部中与沙袋较劲，而是在广阔的战场上与敌人死斗。
After several moves, you start to vaguely feel as though you weren't merely boxing a punchbag in the Fight Club, but rather were fighting an enemy to the death on a vast battlefield.
看起来…这「残卷」并没有发挥出它应有的作用。感觉被史考特这老东西给骗了。
Looks like... this "fragmented record" has not served its intended purpose. Feels like a trick from that old clown Scott.
不过，也可能是你没有严格按照残卷上的记载来训练？也许可以下次再来试试看。
But then again, perhaps you haven't been following the training manual strictly enough? Perhaps you can try again one more time.
又是这熟悉的搏击俱乐部，又是这熟悉的沙袋…不如在这里用那神秘的古代「斗技」来热热身吧。
The same old Fight Club once again, with its familiar punchbag... Why don't we warm up using those mysterious and ancient techniques of "martialism"?
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
真是一场酣畅淋漓的战斗！
What a sumptuous fight that was!
看起来这「残卷」竟然是货真价实的武功秘籍。不过这个招式的作用似乎与想象中不同——并非用来在实战中战胜敌人，而是用来在训练中模拟实战。

Looks like this "fragmented record" really is a genuine lost martial arts manual. But these moves seem to be for a different purpose than you expected: Not useful in actual combat, but rather used to simulate actual combat training.
真是个好东西啊，看起来以后也可以用这招来进行战斗训练了。史考特真是难得办了件人事。
What a fantastic treasure. Looks like we can use these moves to train our combat skills in the future. Scott really has put together something rare here.
搏击俱乐部全新赛季现已开始！若您想要了解详情，或是参加比赛，都请随时告诉我！掘掘博士竭诚为您服务！
An all-new season of the Fight Club has begun! If you want more information or to join the matches, feel free to ask me about it! I will do my best to provide you with all you need!
能给我讲讲比赛规则吗？
Can you please tell me about the tournament's rules?
当然没问题，您想问什么问题呢？
Of course. What would you like to know more about?
积分赛的具体规则是什么？
What are the rules for the point-based tournament?
您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
Have you heard of the Ladder Leaderboard? It's a list recording every boxer's match points. The higher your points, the higher the rank. You will earn points for every battle you win.
换句话说，分数越高的拳手实力越强，您和对手皆是如此。这也意味着随着您胜利的次数增加，战斗强度也会随之增大——不过，这点我猜您早有准备，对吧？
In other words, the higher the points, the stronger the boxer, for both you and your opponent. It also means that the more you win, the harder it gets. But I guess you're ready for that, right?
此外，我们还为不同实力的选手分别设置了不同的赛事，难度由低到高依次为——
Side note, we've also prepared different leagues for participants of different strengths, and they are, in order...
「羽量级」、「轻量级」、「沉量级」、「中量级」、「重量级」——每个排行榜的积分各自独立计算！
Featherweight, lightweight, welterweight, middleweight, and heavyweight... And the score on each board is calculated individually!
您可以任意选择其一，与不同水平的选手对垒。只要您愿意，更可以将自己在全部赛事中的排名全部提升至第一，从而将赛季全部奖励收入囊中！
You can choose one of them and face off with opponents of different levels. You can even place first in all of the matches and take all the rewards of the season by yourself!
不过，五大赛事将依次隔天开启——若您想要体验更加激烈的战斗，可千万别扑空了！
However, each of the five leagues will begin during the subsequent days on an alternating schedule. If you want to experience a heart-racing battle, don't miss out!
「斗技」是个贝洛伯格古武术的术语。是一种不依靠蛮力，注重技巧的综合格斗技术。
"Martialism" is a term from classical Belobogian martial arts. It's a mixed martial arts form that focuses on technical skill rather than brute force.
老板从古籍文献中找到了一本关于古代斗技的书，于是萌生了开办「斗技表演赛」，推广旧文化的念头。
The boss found this ancient manual of ancient training techniques, so he came up with this idea of a Martial Exhibition to promote ancient culture.
我不觉得他有这么高尚…
I don't think he was being that noble...
Why does that sound completely made up?
哎呀，真的假的不重要。反正冠军奖金是真的。
*sigh* Who cares if the story's real or not. I'll tell you what, the first prize sure is real.
总之呢，古代斗技分为「固、烈、流、震、刚、心、气」七种流派。
Anyway, the ancients split their Martialism up into seven different schools: "Solidity, Heat, Flow, Thunder, Firmness, Heart, and Gust."
每场表演赛都对应一种流派，您可以任意选择其一进行挑战。
Each exhibition match is associated with a particular school of martialism. You can freely choose one to challenge.
顺利赢得全部「斗技表演赛」的选手，不仅可以获得奖金，还可以获得史考特商业联盟提供的神秘奖品！
Any contestant who beats all the Martial Exhibition matches not only wins the tournament prize, but there's also a special secret prize from the Scott Business Alliance!
不要听我在这里干巴巴地解释了！您还是亲自去擂台上体验一下「斗技」的魅力吧！
But don't just listen to all these dull details from me! Get in the ring and experience the charm of "martialism" for yourself!
没问题，我立刻为您安排！
No problem. I'll make arrangements immediately!
There's nothing I would like to ask about.
若您有想法了，随时与我联系即可！
No worries. If a question does arise, feel free to ask me anytime!
真是太精彩了！让我们把欢呼声献给，将贝洛伯格古代「斗技」融会贯通的综合格斗大师——
That's amazing! Lay-dees and gentlemen, let's give it up for the master of mixed martial arts, the champion of ancient Belobogian martialism —
恭喜您，{NICKNAME}！您是本届「斗技表演赛」当之无愧的冠军！请收下这份丰厚的奖励，以及——史考特商业联盟提供的神秘奖品！

Congratulations, {NICKNAME}! You are the undisputed champion of the inaugural Martial Exhibition! Please accept your bounteous reward, and also — here's a secret prize for you from the Scott Business Alliance!
记住——史考特商业联盟，只为最强的你！
Remember, the Scott Business Alliance is only made for you, the strongest!
I heard you are looking for me...
我听其他人说「有困难找{NICKNAME}」，就想着不抱期望地试试看…报酬什么的都好说，就是不知道你能不能搞得定。

Yep. I've heard others say "When in trouble, look for {NICKNAME}," so I thought I'd give it a try even though I didn't know what to expect... Of course, you'll be rewarded if you help me with this task, but I just don't know if you're up to it.
诶不对不对！应该先说事儿，再谈报酬吧？你这人有没有点科研精神啊。
Oh no no no! Shouldn't we talk about the task first, and rewards later? Do you even have any scientific integrity?
With the right rewards, no mission is impossible.
口气不小！不过你可别小瞧了世玲的委托了。
You talk big, but don't underestimate the difficulty of my assignment.
我们空间站的绩效考核，需要每季度汇总课题实验报告。这段时间你也知道…发生了很多很多事，世玲手头上的课题报告…这个，有那么一丢丢紧张……
On the space station, performance review requires a quarterly summary report of research projects. As you know, a lot of stuff has happened recently. And I'm a bit nervous about my research report.
所以，特聘助手{NICKNAME}！协助我在这段时间内高效稳妥地完成多项课题实验并整理成报告就是你这次的工作啦！
So, Special Assistant {NICKNAME}, your mission is to assist me in completing multiple projects efficiently and safely during this time and compiling them into reports!
放心，你只需要为我搜集实验样本和实验用品。其他的工作就交给世玲就好了！
Don't worry, you just need to collect experimental samples and supplies for me. Just leave the rest of the research work to me!
咳咳，场面话就到这里吧，我们直接进入正题。
Ahem, that being said, let's get down to brass tacks.
第一轮的实验，主要围绕「反物质军团」中的「虚卒•践踏者」进行。课题就叫作…我想想…就叫作《浅析践踏者四足是否受力均匀》。

The first round of experiments mainly revolves around the "Voidranger: Tramplers" of the "Antimatter Legion." The research title shall be named... Let me think... It shall be named "A Brief Analysis of Force Distribution on Quadruped Tramplers."
除开一些和践踏者本身有关的样本素材，你还需要去搜集一些<color=#dbc291ff>金属</color>。数量我都整理成备忘录给你啦。
In addition to getting some samples on Tramplers, you'll also need to collect some <color=#dbc291ff>Metal</color>. The exact amount has been specified in this memo I wrote for you.
这样就搞定啦！来，报酬拿好，一分不少！什么？你问这<color=#dbc291ff>「你好剂」</color>是个啥？
And that should be it! Come, here are your rewards! What? You don't know what this <color=#dbc291ff>"All Good Potion"</color> does?
这个…你自己看着点用！虽然科员之间都默认这个液剂没有危害，但是具体有什么效果，世玲可没法给你保证。
It's... you can try it out for yourself! The researchers all agree that this liquid is harmless. But, still, don't come blame me if anything goes wrong.
How much research is there afterward?
喏，这个是我的报告笔记，不仅有今天的报告文本，还有之后的一些…研究规划吧。
Here! These are my report notes — some are today's reports and some are... future research plans.
稍微有点粗略凌乱，你将就着看，看不懂的也别问我，我恐怕也还没想明白呢！
They're all a bit rough and messy, so just go with it. Don't even bother asking me if you can't understand, since I myself haven't figured them all out yet!
等搜集齐了再给我吧。世玲现在手里还有别的事情要忙呢……
Just hand the stuff to me once you're done collecting. I have other matters to attend to right now...
开工开工！上一次你的助手工作完成得很好～这一次也要加油哦！
Time to get to work! Your assistance was great the last time~ Hope you can keep it up for this mission as well!
第二轮的实验还是围绕「虚卒•践踏者」进行的，不过侧重点不再是它的四足，而是它的「尾巴」。这次的课题就叫做《浅析践踏者的尾巴是否防水》！

The second round of experiments still revolves around "Voidranger: Tramplers." However, the focus is no longer on its legs, but on its "tail." This time around, the research topic shall be "A Brief Analysis of the Hydrophobic Nature of Tramplers' Rear Appendage"!
除开一些和践踏者本身有关的样本素材，你还需要去搜集一些<color=#dbc291ff>固态净水</color>。数量我都整理成备忘录给你啦。
In addition to getting some samples on Tramplers, you'll also need to collect some <color=#dbc291ff>Solid Water</color>. The exact amount has been specified in this memo I wrote for you.
搞——定！这份报告非常完美！等我提交给小组长之后就来准备下一场实验哦！
And thaaaat's that! This report is perfect! After I submit it to the team leader, I will prepare for the next experiment!
嘿嘿嘿，上次的践踏者尾巴报告被小组长表扬了…说世玲的切入点非常刁钻！
Hehehe, the team leader commended me for that Trampler Tail report, and said that my analysis was very crafty!
看来是时候对新的研究对象出手了！就选那个…那个那个「外宇宙之炎」吧！至于研究内容…嗯！就决定是你了《浅析外宇宙之炎的温度》！

So, it seems to be a good time for a new subject of research! How about that... that... "Blaze Out of Space"! As for the research title... Well, I suppose it should be "A Brief Analysis of the Thermal Properties of Extraterrestrial Blaze"!
Is it okay to be this casual about research...
哎哟，世玲可是空间站的正规科员！「科研」！「科研」的事怎么能随随便便说随便呢？！
Hey! I'm a bona fide researcher of the space station! It's science! How can you just casually call it "casual"!?
你就尽管去搜集素材就好，别的事不用操心！这次记得多带点<color=#dbc291ff>冰之芯</color>回来哦。
You just go along and collect materials. Leave the rest to me! Just remember to bring back more <color=#dbc291ff>Core of Ice</color> this time.
世玲的实验工作非常顺利～基本已经过半啦！尤其是上次针对外宇宙之炎的报告，小组长说世玲的结论那是相当的大胆！
My experimental work is going very smoothly~ Already more than halfway through! For that last report on Blaze Out of Space, the team leader said my conclusion was quite bold!
不枉世玲提前打听，小组长平时最喜欢喝的就是咖啡了……
Good thing I found out the team leader's fave drink is coffee beforehand... Hehehe...
现在看来绩效考核问题已经不大了，剩下的就是为了满足数量。我们干脆将计就计，跟着上回的「外宇宙之炎」，研究它在金属冶炼方面的应用吧！

Anyway, now it seems the performance review matter is no longer a big issue. All that's left is to hit the quota. We'll beat them at their own game and use the previous "Blaze Out of Space" to study its application in metal smelting!
这次记得多带点<color=#dbc291ff>金属</color>回来哦，这是实验必备的！
Remember to bring more <color=#dbc291ff>Metal</color> back this time, which is essential for this experiment!
哎，世玲在想，要不要做一些更前沿的课题实验，开拓一些未知领域呢？
Hey, I was thinking, should I do some more "avant-garde" projects and venture into the lesser-known areas of study?
诶？嘿嘿，确实小组长也有这么夸世玲的啦！
Oh really? Haha, I guess you're right. The team leader did say something similar when he praised me.
You wanna redefine the whole concept of research itself?
对对对，小组长也是这么评价世玲之前的实验报告的！
Yep yep, You're right! The team leader did say something similar when he praised me for my last research report!
但归根结底，世玲不能满足于眼下的成绩，我需要更多的独创性！为此，我查阅了诸多资料…发现了一个只有在你的协助下，才能完成的实验！

But at the end of the day, I can't be satisfied with the current results, I need more innovation! For this reason, I consulted a lot of resources... and found an experiment that can only be completed with your assistance!
实验样本来源于一个胖乎乎的机器人，世玲没有见过，不过拜托你的话，拿到一些样本材料应该没有问题吧？
The experimental sample comes from a chubby robot. I've never seen it before, but acquiring some sample materials shouldn't be an issue, right?
除开这个机器人相关的素材，世玲还需要一些<color=#dbc291ff>陨铁</color>，交给你啦！
In addition to the materials related to this robot, I also need some <color=#dbc291ff>Meteoric Alloy</color>. I'll leave this to you!
我就是这个「机器人」大课题的持有者，温世玲！啊不对…这样说是不是有点太不谦虚了？
I, Wen Shiling, am the owner of this robot project! Oh no... That sounds a bit cheeky, doesn't it?
白日梦做完记得做实验。
Remember to do the experiments once you finish daydreaming.
还没下班就开始说梦话？
Already sleep-talking even before getting off work?
我…我没做白日梦！我刚才那是…学台词呢！
I—I'm not daydreaming! I was just... practicing lines!
上次的实验报告，小组长看了直接没说出话来！其他组员看了，也都敬佩得浑身发抖，大热天的手脚冰凉浑身冷汗。

The team leader was at a loss for words after reading my last experiment report! And the other team members were also blown away and couldn't stop shaking in admiration. They were so impressed that they were sweating bullets.
最后小组长说，我这次的报告交上去之后，就帮我申请科室独立实验资金。你瞧瞧，已经提前给我放权了！
In the end, the team leader said that after I finish this round's report, they're going to help me with funding for my independent research. You see, they're starting to move me up now!
所以这次，你除了给我再拿点那个机器人的素材，你还需要带些<color=#dbc291ff>基本食材</color>。毕竟做研究是很消耗能量的嘛……

So this time, in addition to bringing me some materials for that robot, you also need to bring some <color=#dbc291ff>Basic Ingredients</color>. After all, doing research can take up a lot of energy...
哼哼，其实世玲不用做完最后一个实验，也能通过绩效考核。毕竟机器人这个课题，已经让小组长对我刮目相看了！
Well, actually, I can pass the performance review without finishing this last experiment. After all, my robot project has already immensely impressed the team leader!
作为资金申请的基础课题报告已经提交上去了，最后这个…就是纯凑数了！毕竟咱们科研的关键就是个严谨，七份报告，一份都不能少。

The project report for the funding application has already been submitted. This last one... well, it's just to fill the quota! After all, the key to scientific research is rigor, so there must be no less than seven reports.
不过严谨那都是基础，最关键的还得是创新！从此科研领域，就要留下世玲的大名了！
But rigor is just the foundation. The most important thing is innovation! Henceforth, the name "Shiling" will be forever etched into the field of science!
至少数量上是很严谨的。
It's pretty rigorous indeed, at least by the numbers.
你在做一种很新的东西。
You're doing some new stuff alright.
哼，世玲不是那种过河拆桥的人。你的名字也被我写在实验助手那一栏了，等着站长给你发奖励吧。
Hey, I am not the kind of person who forgets those who have helped me. I also noted you down as my experimental assistant, so you can wait for the Lead Researcher to give you your reward.
总之这次，你就随意发挥吧。之前做过研究的三个课题样本，你随便选一个就行。
Anyway, this time, you can do as you please. Choose any one of the three research topics that have been studied before.
除了样本材料之外…再带点<color=#dbc291ff>蛋白米</color>回来吧！哼哼…最后的课题报告，就围绕蛋白米与神秘生物之间的联系展开！

In addition to the sample material... bring back some <color=#dbc291ff>Protein Rice</color>! Hmph... The final project report revolves around the connection between Protein Rice and mysterious creatures!
报告，点击，提交！嘿嘿～之后就会收到绩效考核汇报邮件了。嗯…不知道是升职还是升职还是升职呢？世玲好期待哦！
Report, submitted! Hehehe~ Now I'll just wait for the performance review result. Hmm, will I get a big promotion or an even bigger promotion? I'm so excited!
话说回来，你作为助手还是很靠谱的嘛。怎么样？有没有兴趣跟着世玲以后搞科研呀？我看你很有天赋嘛。
By the way, you turned out to be a pretty reliable assistant. So, are you interested in working for me in the field of science? You seem pretty gifted at this.
I'm not as gifted as you are.
哎，不必客气，你这块璞玉，世玲稍加指点，以后也能在科研圈发光发热！
No need to be modest. With my brilliant guidance, even someone as plain as you can have a bright future as a researcher.
Research is too hard for me.
哎，你是懂科研的。干咱们这行，哪儿有容易这个说法呢？
You sound like you understand the struggle. No such thing as easy in scientific research.
我也不急着你现在做决定，先把这个拿着吧——上面可是记录着「你好剂」的制作配方，世玲亲手整理的。
But no need to make a decision right away. I can wait. For now, just take this. It's the recipe for the "All Good Potion," which I formulated myself.
正所谓「投资艺术家的最佳时机，就是在艺术家还没出名的时候」。等世玲之后名气大了，这份配方可就有说法了！
You know the saying, "Get in on an artist early before they blow up." My recipe is gonna be worth a lot when I become famous in the future.
但是你可别拿去商用啊！我还没来得及上交认证呢。我私下做了几次试验，产出都挺稳定的，你自己拿着用应该没问题。

But this is not ready for commercial use. I haven't gotten around to applying for safety verification yet. I did a few experiments in private which produced consistent results. You should be fine using it on yourself.
嘿嘿，不知道独立实验的资金什么时候发放呢。
Hehehe, I wonder when the funding for my independent research is gonna come through.
喏，作为实验助手，我也给你备份了一下这段时间我写的实验报告。不可商用，但作为其他研究用途是没问题的。
Look, I've put together some copies of the research I've done recently. You can have these, but they're for research purposes only, not for commercial use.
世玲可不算亏待你吧！要是换成别人做助手，我可不会给他这么好的「大福利」！
That's pretty sweet, right? If it weren't for you, I wouldn't have gone through the trouble of preparing such a big bonus for an assistant.
They can be used for other research?
那是自然，这些报告可都是很珍贵的，其他人可没有世玲这样的天赋！你不信的话就看看！
Yes, of course. These reports are all very valuable. No other researcher is as talented as I am. Just take a look, and you will see.
哎，别跟世玲客气，给你就拿着！拿着了也就再看看吧，说不定能发现一些新思路，留给我下次使用。
Come on, don't be shy. Just take these already. Read them through, and maybe you'll come up with some fresh ideas that you can pass on to me later.
我手头上还有别的活儿没忙完呢！这件事的优先级可以稍微延一下，你等我通知再来吧。
I still have work I need to get done! This can go on the backlog. Come back when I tell you to.
想不到你还这么关心我的宝贝感应仪！
You care so much about my precious sensor! That's unexpected!
这次的研究如果顺利发表，我打算再给它做点宣传包装，看看能不能推广成什么…「年轻人的第一件科学探索仪器」之类的。
If this study can be published without complications, I plan to give it some publicity, see if it can be promoted as "Young people's first scientific exploration sensor" or something.
你可以看看我的研究笔记，说不定你能帮我找到一些别的包装角度呢？
Have a look at my research notes, maybe you can find another angle to sell this?
你之前说的信息我仔细思考了一下，感觉应该和「大宇宙时间隧道」有点关系。
I have carefully considered the information you mentioned earlier, and I feel this has something to do with the big universe time tunnel.
你在现场还有没有发现别的什么东西？给我看看，说不定可以推进研究！
Did you find anything else at the scene? Show it to me. Maybe it can move the research forward!
啊！这是我的研究手稿！之前丢了一部分，我还以为找不回来了！
Ah! Those are my research notes! I've lost some of them before and thought I'd never get them back!
不过…怎么是碎片？难道说是那个什么「神奇的扑满」偷走了我的手稿，甚至还撕碎了它！
But... why are they in pieces? Did that Mystery Trotter steal my notes and rip them apart?
天哪，要不是我有誊抄笔记手稿的习惯，那可就损失惨重了！
My goodness! I'd be in serious trouble if I didn't have the habit of copying my notes!
不过它们是什么时候偷走的呢…难道潜伏在我的身边？难道就是你！
But when did they manage to steal it...? Could they be hiding next to me? Are you the thief!?
算了算了！疑神疑鬼可不是科学的态度。你没事也多看看我的研究笔记，说不定能给我提供点新思路！
Never mind. Being suspicious isn't the right attitude for science. You should read my notes more when you have the time. Maybe you can give me some new directions, too!
啊？哦…哦！确有此事！没想到来的人会是你。
Huh? Oh... oh! Indeed! I didn't expect you'd be the one to show up.
算了，本来我这个发现也不能让内行的家伙知道…你这外行，倒是正好！
Ah well, I don't think my discovery can be told to people on the inside, and you, an outsider, are perfect for it!
不过，你必须向我保证，绝对不会将这事儿告诉别人，甚至不能让人知道委托你的人是我。
However, you must promise me that you will never reveal anything to others, not even the fact that I was the one who asked for your help.
不错，看上去你已经有为科学献身的觉悟了。
Not bad, looks like you already have the resolve to sacrifice for science.
I can zip it, but that's gonna cost you extra.
哎，现在的人怎么都这么势利？收费的事情回头细说。
What? Why are people nowadays so pragmatic? We'll talk about the fees later.
好了，我这里也赶时间。简单来说：我的「第<unbreak>223</unbreak>号自制感应仪」最近有了反应。
Fine, I'm rushing anyway. Simply put, my Homemade Sensor No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> has begun to react recently.
但…这东西做出来太久了，我也没办法确定它是用来追踪哪种波长的…所以需要有个人帮我去考察验证下。
But... this thing has been in use for so long, I can't determine what wavelength it is detecting... So I need someone to help me ascertain.
总之，我会给根据感应仪指向的方位，给你一个大概的坐标。而你需要去那里帮我看看，有没有什么异常情况。
To make long story short, I will give you a direction based on the general location the sensor is pinging. And you just need to go to the spot and look around for anything abnormal.
那肯定是你观察得不够仔细！难不成还会是我的感应仪有问题？
That's because you're not detailed enough! Or are you trying to say there's something wrong with my sensor?
和平常不一样就是异常啊！哎，你到时候去看了应该就知道了。
"Abnormal" is something that's out of the norm! Gah, you'll know when you get there.
科学精神的可贵之处就在于探索与发现，我就是怀揣着这样的信念才能研究「大宇宙时间隧道」…
The value of the scientific spirit lies in exploration and discovery. It is with this belief that I can study the big universe time tunnel theory...
诶！诶有反应了！感应仪有反应了！
Hey, it's a ping! The sensor picked up something!
这「感应仪」看着不太结实…
The sensor doesn't seem very sturdy...
结不结实不重要！我小心点用就没问题！重要的是：你看到这个反应了没！
Its sturdiness doesn't matter as long as I'm careful while operating it! The more important thing is: Do you see the object giving out the reading?
哦！有反应了！真有反应了！
Oh, a reading! There's a reading!
看吧看吧！我没骗你吧！哈哈！这就是我雷金的科学时代！
See! What did I tell ya? Haha! The Scientific Age of Regin is upon us!
我整理了一下过去的随笔记录，大概还原了「<unbreak>223</unbreak>号」的初始情况。可惜具体的设计用途我不太记得…只知道这个仪器会给我反馈一些「异常」坐标。

I tidied up the notes I had and have roughly reset No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> to its default stage. Pity I don't quite remember the exact use for it... All I know is, this machine will give me some coordinates of "anomalies."
所以我需要找一位身手矫健，同时对科学也有一定了解的人替我去坐标所在地考察一下是否真的有「异常」。
So, I'm looking for someone athletic and who also has a good scientific background. They need to go to these coordinates and find out if there are actually any "anomalies."
你可以先看一下我整理的「研究笔记」了解了解。现在「<unbreak>223</unbreak>号」还暂时没有反应……
You can look at my research notes first. No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> hasn't responded yet...
诶！诶！你瞧瞧，这不就有「反应」了！赶紧赶紧，你来帮把手，我来记录一下坐标！
Oh! Oh! Look, it's responding now! Hurry and give me a hand! I need to note down this coordinate!
哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「交易」</color>有关的「物体」…我不好说，你就当是我的小小建议吧！
Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with <color=#dbc291ff>transactions</color>... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!
这台售货机并无明显的异常，但眼见不一定为实……
The vending machine doesn't seem to have any obvious anomaly, but don't judge a book by its cover...
虽然看上去它十分冰冷，但摸上去却似乎有一些温度？你不确定这是否是错觉。
It looks like it was supposed to be cold, but it felt... warm? You're not sure if your senses are lying to you.
沉闷的回音是唯一的回应，但似乎隐约听见了一些窸窸窣窣的杂音。你不确定这是否是错觉。
The only response you get is a deep, hollow echo. You do vaguely hear some rustling sounds. You're not sure if this is your imagination.
似乎并没有办法确认这台故障的售货机是否是「感应仪」指向的异常情况。但有一个绝妙的办法可以得到答案。
There doesn't seem to be a way to confirm whether this malfunctioning vending machine is abnormal as picked up by the sensor. But there is a brilliant way to get an answer.
好像是错觉，你感受到眼前的售货机似乎正在…瑟瑟发抖？
You may be hallucinating, is the vending machine... shivering?
（雷金所说的异常情况，应该就是指这个了…吧？）
(This should be the anomaly that Regin was talking about... right?)
（所以扑满原来还有这种奇怪的能力设定吗？！）
售货机并没有吐出任何的货物，但却显示交易已完成。
The vending machine didn't spit out any merchandise but shows the transaction as complete.
这样的「特殊情况」，只能采取一些「特殊措施」了……
拿出魄力就可以解决问题！尤其是这样的售货机，卡住了就可以帮它「踢」出来嘛！
Use your charisma to solve the problem! Vending machines like this can be kicked if they're stuck!
拿出魄力就可以解决问题！尤其是这样的售货机，卡住了就可以帮它「摇」出来嘛！
Use your charisma to solve the problem! Vending machines like this can be shaken if they're stuck!
（怎么感觉这个售货机正在…微微发抖？这就是雷金之前说的「与交易有关的物体」吗？）
(Why is this vending machine... shaking? Is this the "thing involved with transactions" Regin talked about?)
瞧见没？这就是科学的力量！坐标已经给你标好了，快去快去，趁着感应还热乎！
Did you see that? This is the power of science! I've already given you the coordinates, go go go while the track's hot!
（接下来，只需要前往雷金标记的坐标附近探索异常情况就好了……）
(Now, just need to go to the location Regin marked and look out for anomalies...)
诶，这个怎么没有反应啊？
Hm? Why is this not working?
是不是…坏掉了？我听别人说，可以踢它两脚。
Did it... break? I hear you should kick broken stuff twice.
可要是被我们踢坏了，不会需要赔偿吧？我不敢……
But if we broke it, they won't want us to repay them, would they? I can't...
我总觉得怪怪的…昨天我们来这里，有见过这个吗？
It feels weird, somehow... When we were here yesterday, did you see this thing?
不会是我看错了吧？这里刚才应该有个售货机的啊……
Am I mistaken? There should be a vending machine here...
是不是走错了？我们再往前走走看？
Did we get the road wrong? Do you want to move over there?
不应该，不应该啊！我再看看……
No, it shouldn't be! I have to see...
Stop! Don't look for it! Let's go!
上次的售货机异常我还没有调查清楚，但感应仪就立刻又有了反应。
I haven't even gotten to the bottom of the last vending machine, and the sensor's already picked up another signal.
尤其是这次的位置…我不是很方便去。你自己也最好多注意安全！
The location this time... It's not very convenient for me to go myself. Be on the lookout for any danger!
又加钱？！加加加，前提是你得出意外。
Again!? Fine, I'll agree to it, but you have to get the job done.
我又不像是你这么神通广大，上天入地样样都行！自然也有能力受限的时候……
I'm not as powerful as you are, I can't do a tenth of the things you can! Naturally, my personal power is limited...
雪堆下面似乎藏着什么东西…你能感受到积雪正在微微颤抖。
Something seems to be hiding beneath the Snow Drift... You can feel the layer of thick snow trembling lightly.
雪堆下的东西跳了出来……
Something jumped out of the Snow Drift...
（躲在雪堆底下这么久，看来是真的不怕冷啊！）
(It must be cold-proof if it can hide underneath the Snow Drift for so long!)
虽然科学需要献身精神…但你还是要以个人安全为第一考量，量力而行！
Science requires sacrifice, but you should still prioritize your personal safety and act according to your capabilities!
雪堆下面似乎露出了衣服的一角，这场面似乎有点眼熟。
A piece of clothing sticks out from underneath the Snow Drift. This feels familiar.
一脚下去，只有蓬松的积雪，并没有踢到什么实际的东西。
You kick the Snow Drift and only find purchase on soft, fluffy snow. There is nothing solid in there.
你将积雪清扫掉，埋藏在下面的东西逐渐露出了真面目。
You sweep the pile of snow aside and unveiled the item buried in the snow.
一堆杂乱的衣物被埋在雪堆之下，似乎是在伪造某人躲藏在雪地中的假象。
A mishmash of clothing articles was buried under the Snow Drift, seemingly to create the illusion that someone was hiding in it.
看这个衣服的配色——紫蓝相间，让人忍不住联想一位名叫桑博的「老朋友」。
The color palette of the clothes — shades of purples and blues — reminds you of an "old friend" named Sampo.
雪堆下面似乎露出了盔甲的边缘一角。
A piece of armor sticks out from underneath the Snow Drift. This feels familiar.
Hey! Who's messing up my spot?

(Is he giving a lecture? Preaching this to children... isn't it a little too deep?)
（而且这个「小宇宙时间隧道」理论…听上去总感觉有点耳熟？）
(And this "small universe time tunnel" theory... sounds familiar?)
（还是先勘测雷金委托的异常现象吧！）
(I should keep surveying the anomalies Regin tasked me with!)
我稍微花点时间给你科普一下：你知道光是一种粒子吗？
I'll show you some basics: Do you know that light is a particle?
光是什么？例子是什么？科普是什么？
What is light? What is par-day-kal? What's a baysick?
光作为粒子，它携带信息；那我接触光，本质就是在接触信息。
Light as a particle carries information. Building on that, if I am exposed to light, I am exposed to information.
信息是什么？你讲慢点，我听不懂！
What is infer-mayshun? Speak slower, I don't understand!
根据我的「小宇宙时间隧道」理论，宇宙是多个相互关联的平行实体。
My small universe time tunnel theory holds that the universe consists of multiple interconnected entities that are running in parallel.
你别烦，我还要问他问题呢！这人怎么不听我提问呀？
Stop it, I have questions! Why doesn't this man listen to me?
嗯嗯嗯…讲得太快了，无法理解。
Uh huh, uh huh... He's too fast, I can't understand it.
我稍微花点时间给你科普一下：你知道光是一种粒子吗？
I'll show you some basics: Do you know that light is a particle?
哎！又回到最开始了！我的问题还没回答呢！
Ah! He looped back! And still hasn't answered my question!
他重复这几句话，已经好几十遍了……
He repeated this at least several dozen times...
（总感觉这个人很奇怪。不仅是说的话很耳熟，仔细一看…好像长相也很眼熟。）
(This person is weird. Not only is his spiel familiar... he looks similar too.)
我是不是在哪儿见过你？
…稍微花点…点…点…时间给你科普……
啊，又来了个奇怪的大人。
你知道？那你快告诉我！什么是光，什么是粒子，什么是科普，什么是…哎哟，太多了！
You know this? Tell me please! What is light, what is a particle, what is basic, what is... oh, I have so many questions!
根…据我的…的「大小眼…大…宇宙时间隧道」理…论……
My small-big... big... universe time tunnel theo... rem holds...
确实，他一直都在重复地说这几句，好奇怪。
It's true, he kept repeating these few sentences, what a weirdo.
给小孩讲这些还太早了吧。
It's too early to be teaching children these things.
哎呀，想不到还有大人会帮我们小孩子说话！
Oh! I didn't think an adult will speak for us kids!
他讲得太快了，而且就那么几句话，我早就不想听了。
He speaks too fast, and he kept repeating the same few sentences, I got bored.
（继续追问这个人没有什么价值了，不如从小朋友这里找找线索吧。）
(There's no value in continuing to ask this person. Might as well look for clues from the children.)
你是谁？为什么一直盯着我们？
Who are you? Why do you keep staring at us?
难道你也是来听他讲科学研究的？
Are you here to listen to his science research?
他说自己是什么…民间科学家？
He said he's a... civilian scientist?
He's telling us about the theories of the universe!
虽然翻来覆去就只有那么几句…但好像确实是比较靠谱的科学研究。听一听总没坏处吧？
It's always the same sentences... but it does sound like a real scientific study. Wouldn't hurt listening to it, would it?
不记得了，他好像说过，但我一直在听科学研究，没在意。
Don't remember. He must've said it, but I was trying to focus on his study, so I didn't pay attention.
好像是李…哦不，是冷…哎呀，忘了！
Sounds like a Ree... oh, wait, no, it's a Lay... Gah, I forgot!
你们记性真差，我记得！他说他叫雷…哈欠——雷金！
You're so forgetful. I remember! He calls himself Re... *yawn* Regin!
（雷金？这么一说好像确实有点像！虽然个人气质方面差别很大……）
(Regin? Now that they pointed it out, he does look like him! Even though the demeanor and personality seems heaven and earth...)
（不过雷金今天口口声声拒绝了和我一起来，怎么现在还提前跑过来做起科普讲座了？）
(But Regin refused to come with me today, why would he come over even before me and give lectures?)
（就是这附近了。根据前几次的经验，「异常」不就摆在眼前？稍微调查一下就行。）
(This should be the place. Based on previous experiences, shouldn't the "anomaly" be out in the open? Just a bit of investigation should be enough.)
（去问问那边的孩子有没有观察到什么特殊情况，说不定会有新的线索。）
(Go ask the kids over there whether they saw anything odd. Maybe you can find a new clue.)
我的宝贝即将推开贝洛伯格科学界的大门，到那时候，我将不再是普通的我！
My precious will open the gates to Belobog's scientific academia. By that point, I will not be the Regin everyone knows!
（这里应该就是路灯下面了…但好像都挺「正常」的？）
(This is beneath the streetlamp... but everything seems "normal"?)
（不过根据之前几次的经验，「正常」也是一种「异常」，还是再勘测一下。）
(But according to the past few experiences, "normal" can be a form of "abnormal." I should check it thoroughly.)
（路灯之下的异常…难道说的是那群小孩子附近？再去听听看他们在干什么吧。）
(The anomaly beneath the streetlamp... Is it near the kids over there? I'll go and see what they're doing.)
精彩！打得太精彩了！我都不困了！
Wow! This is interesting! I'm not even sleepy anymore!
这不比听科学研究有意思？你收我为徒吧！
Isn't this so much more interesting than listening to scientific studies? Take me as your apprentice!
这…大宇宙理论终究是败给了暴力的武器！
So... the big universe theory lost to weapons of violence!
（这个声音…「异常」应该就在附近。）
(This sound... the "anomaly" should be close by.)
（售货机里的商品之前没有见到过，再仔细看看到底是什么。）
(You've never seen these goods being sold in the vending machine. Take a closer look at what they are.)
你真的没有孪生兄弟吗？
Do you really not have a twin brother?
为什么你会问这个问题？难道你见到了一个长得很像我的人？
Why would you ask a question like this? Did you meet someone who looks like me?
这没啥奇怪的，贝洛伯格人长相多少有点相同！你应该是看错了，我可没有孪生兄弟。
This isn't surprising. Most Belobogians look similar in one way or another! You must've been mistaken, I don't have a twin brother.
会不会是平行世界的你…
Could it be you from a parallel universe?
平行世界？你还真是富有想象力！不过那种设想不属于我的研究领域。
Parallel universe? You're so imaginative! But that kind of hypothesis is not within my research area.
哎…你是不是还没从之前的异常勘测中恢复过来呀？不然还是老实休息吧？
Hey, have you not recovered from your anomaly detection earlier? Why don't you take more rest?
那个异常现象变成了你！
啊！你这是什么阴谋论啊！异常现象不是那个什么…什么噗蛮吗？怎么会变成我呢？
Ah! What is this conspiracy theory!? Isn't the anomaly that... that Trodder thing? How did it turn into me?
哎呀，你呀你，科学不能基于幻想做延展，这个思想很危险啊！
Oh, hey, you um... Science cannot be based solely on the extension of imagination, that mindset is dangerous!
哎，应该就是那帮老家伙嫉妒我的才华，故意针对我吧！天才就是要背负这样的压力…我了解！
*sigh* It must be the act of those old guards being jealous of my talents. They must be deliberately targeting me! Such is the pressure a genius faces... I can understand!
看你的样子还算正常我就放心了。要是你出了啥意外，恐怕铁卫也不会放过我。
I'm relieved to see you're doing alright. The Silvermane Guards probably wouldn't let me go if something were to happen to you.
至于感应仪的事儿…哎！说来我就一肚子气！
As for the sensor... I'm so mad!
那帮老家伙，居然说我之前已经提交过一份类似的论文，还全都是错别字，让我别再添乱了！
Those old geezers said I had already submitted a similar paper and that it was full of typos. They said I should stop creating trouble for them!
你自己看看，我这「研究笔记」内容清清楚楚，怎么可能全是错别字呢？
Just look at this! My research notes are perfectly clear. How can there be typos?
我怀疑，应该就是那个「异常」偷走了我的笔记，卖给了某个没文化的势利眼，誊抄整理的过程中就暴露了他的无知！
I suspect that "anomaly" stole my notes and sold them to some uneducated brute, and their ignorance was exposed when they copied the notes!
真后悔，要是你头一回给我手稿残页的时候，我就提高警惕该多好！
I wish I took more steps to protect myself back when you first gave me the note pieces!
不过，那些个「异常」到底把我的手稿卖给谁了？这家伙，未来就是我雷金的头号眼中钉！
But who did that "anomaly" sell my notes to? I'm gonna hunt that person down!
以后我肯定会守护好我的研究笔记，再也不会让它们抢走了！
I'm gonna protect my research notes extremely well now. They won't ever be stolen again!
哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「冰雪」</color>有关的…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>ice</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!
哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和「色彩」有关的<color=#dbc291ff>「变化图案」</color>…我不好说，你就当是我的小小建议吧！

Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>changing shapes</color>" and "colors"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!
哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「钥匙」</color>有关的…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>keys</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!
哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「影像」</color>有关的「设备」…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！

Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's an "equipment" that's got to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>images</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!
哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「住所」</color>有关的…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>residences</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!
哎！留步！这次的灵感让我「头皮发麻」…啊！这种熟悉的陌生感让人好难受。我要缓会儿，你先走吧！
Ah! Stop! The intuition this time makes my scalp tingle... Ah! This feeling of déjà vu is so weird. I need to rest for a bit. You go on!
{NICKNAME}，我听艾丽斯小姐说了，你打理起博物馆相关的事务得心应手，简直就像个熟练经理人——真令人佩服！
{NICKNAME}, Eris told me you managed the museum so well that it was as though you had done it for years. I'm impressed!
出于成本控制的缘由，我们之前计划只开放综合馆的外部展区…不过以目前的进度来看，综合馆的内部区域应该也可以对公众开放了。
Previously, we planned to only open the external area of the General Hall to manage the costs... Now that we're doing so well, I think it's time we open the internal area to the public.
那就这么决定了，{NICKNAME}经理！希望在你的协助下，博物馆能实现稳步复兴。
Let's do it, Manager {NICKNAME}! I hope the museum will be revived steadily with your help!
去找艾丽斯小姐吧，她会告诉你该如何同时经营多个展区的。加油！
Go ahead and talk to Eris. She will tell you how to manage multiple exhibition areas simultaneously. Keep up the good work!
真是不可思议…{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，在您的帮助下，历史文化博物馆已经成为贝洛伯格最热闹的景点了！
How unexpected... {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, with your help, the History and Culture Museum has become the most popular spot in Belobog!
在黄金歌剧院工作的朋友还和我抱怨，说最近大家闲时消遣都爱往博物馆钻，连去看歌剧的观众都变少了……
A friend of mine who works at the Golden Theater was ranting to me about how everyone spends their free time going to the museum that even the number of opera-goers has decreased...
看着您工作的身姿，让我又找回了最初申请来博物馆工作时的热情。谢谢您，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
Watching you work, I feel like I've re-ignited the passion I had when I first applied to work at the museum. Thank you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!
未来的经营工作就请交给我吧。您忙碌了这么久，也该有时间欣赏一下自己给这座博物馆带来的变化了。
Leave the future management work to me. You have been busy for so long, you should have the time to appreciate the changes you have brought to this museum.
希望我们以后还能常见，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
I hope we can see you often, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
馆长于尔丹先生好像在找您…完成他的委托之后再继续经营吧？
Curator Uldan seems to be looking for you... Why don't you continue operating the museum after completing his assignment?
I heard there's an event going on here?
你来得刚好！我们确实在做活动：买一块蛋糕，送一个杰伊特制皮皮西笑话！
Perfect timing! We do have an event going on: Buy a slice of cake, and you'll receive a special Pepeshi joke from Jay as a complimentary treat!
真可惜，你错过了匹诺康尼下一位脱口秀大师的出场秀！
What a pity. You missed the debut show of the next stand-up comedy mater in Penacony!
In that case, I'll just order a joke.
Ahem... Oops, I forgot the lines.
杰伊特制笑话仍在烹饪中，我还是先给你介绍一下餐厅的活动吧。
The Jay's special joke is still in the making, so let me introduce you to the restaurant's activities.
哎呦别走，别走啊！咱们餐厅还是有正经活动的！
Hey, don't go! We have some legitimate activities in our restaurant!
「十二时刻商业区联合举办，年度感恩大酬宾！」——这是一年一次的美食庆典，你准备食材，我们为你加工美味。

Twelve Hours Commercial District is joining forces to host the annual celebration as thanks to our customers! It's an annual culinary festival where you provide the ingredients and we'll whip up delicious dishes for you.
得益于家族最新研发的梦泡压缩技术，我们得以将那些只存在于梦境中的独特风味带到现实。「仰望星空」蛋糕、「鲱鱼先生」柠檬挞…只要你想要，没有我们提供不了的美味！

Thanks to The Family's latest Dream Bubble Compression technology, we can now bring unique dream-inspired flavors that used to exist only in Dreamscape to reality. Whether it's the Stargazer cake or Mr. Herring's lemon tart, there's no delectable dish beyond our reach!
至于其他的…完蛋，我又忘词了……短信上还说有啥活动来着？
As for the others... Oh dear, I forgot the lines again... What did the message say about the activities?
哦没错！还有这条——参与活动即可获得多份实体化的匹诺康尼美食，你可以将它直接寄给自己在其他星系的好友，让他们也体验一下梦境特色风味。

Oh, that's right! Here's another one — participating in the event earns you various materialized Penacony delicacies. You can have them shipped directly to your friends in other star systems, allowing them to savor the dream-inspired flavors.
比如今天的活动餐品：「交叠的美梦」！
Such as today's featured dish: Interwoven Dreams!
以一百位顾客最甜美的梦境为灵感，层叠交织出冰淇淋绵密浓郁的口感——这就是甜点好评榜排行第一的「零卡百层圣代」。

Inspired by the sweetest dreams of a hundred customers, the Zero-Calorie Hundred-Layer Sundae layers and weaves together to create a rich and indulgent ice cream texture, securing its top position on the dessert reviews list.
…虽然只能还原部分口感，但有限的美味才更加迷人，不是吗？
...Although it can only replicate some of the textures, the limited flavors are even more enchanting, wouldn't you agree?
Sounds good, I'd like to try it!
太好了！真希望下次听笑话时你也这么爽快。
That's great! I hope you'll be just as delighted the next time you hear a joke.
哎呦老朋友别走别走别走——来玩玩吧！说不定老板看着热闹高兴了涨涨工资，我就能早日脱离服务员生涯了！

Hey, my friend, don't go, don't go just yet — come and join the fun! If the boss sees the place buzzing and gets in a good mood, I might snag a raise and bid farewell to my waiter days soon! You never know!
请拿好你的参与奖励——哦！看来你的朋友们也收到这份特别礼品了。
Please accept your participation reward — Oh! It looks like your friends have received this special gift as well.
感恩庆典活动会持续七天，每天都会提供不同美食，你可以随时过来参加。
The celebration event will last for seven days, with different delicacies offered each day. Feel free to drop by anytime to participate.
这是本次活动的宣传单，一天一款特色美食，打卡满七次还可以兑换特别好礼哦~
Here's the promotional flyer for the event. Each day features a unique specialty dish. You can redeem a special gift if you check in for all seven days!
基本就是这样。我要去琢磨新段子了，有问题再说！
That's the gist of it. I'm off to work on some new jokes now. Let me know if you have any questions!
哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.
今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！

今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
Is today's set of ingredients ready?
我准备了一个关于「酸梦」牌糖果的新故事，你要不要听听看？
I've prepared a new story about "Sour Dreams" soft candy. Would you like to hear it?
很久很久以前，有个小女孩靠卖酸梦糖维持生计。她每天都站在广场附近叫卖：「便宜好吃的酸梦糖，一颗就能忘记饥饿。快来买呀，快来买呀——」

Once upon a time, there was a young girl who made a living by selling Sour Dream soft candies. Each day, she would stand near the square, hawking, "Affordable and scrumptious Sour Dream soft candies, one bite and hunger fades away. Come and get 'em, come and get 'em—"
总觉得这个故事在哪听过？
I feel like I've heard this story somewhere before.
嘘，别打岔，故事还没讲完呢！
Shh, don't interrupt. The story isn't finished yet!
在某个饥寒交迫的夜晚，卖不掉酸梦糖的小女孩决定以糖果充饥，她吃了一颗又一颗，极致的酸甜让她眼前产生了幻觉：华丽的房间、温暖的壁炉、香气四溢的大餐，她忍不住向幻觉伸手，然后……

On a particularly cold and hungry night, the young girl who couldn't sell her Sour Dream soft candies decided to satisfy her hunger with the candies. She ate one after another, and the extreme sweetness and sourness created hallucinations before her eyes: A magnificent room, a warm fireplace, and a delicious feast. She couldn't resist reaching out to the illusion, and then—
可惜，那些美景都是真实存在的——她因为酸梦糖吃的太多，不小心从定制的梦泡中酸醒了！哈哈！
Unfortunately, those beautiful scenes were all real — she had eaten too many Sour Dream soft candies and accidentally woke up from the customized dream bubble! Ha-ha!
怎么，不好笑吗？这可是某个客人跟我讲的真人真事！不过梦泡难得，酸梦糖还是很好做的——
Aren't you amused? This is an actual story a guest shared with me! But dream bubbles are rare, and making Sour Dream soft candies is relatively straightforward—
今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!
哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.
今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
Is today's set of ingredients ready?
嘿朋友，你听说过「仰望星空」吗？
Hey, friend, ever heard of Stargazer?
这是匹诺康尼最经典的传统小吃之一。传闻这种做法最早诞生于大逐梦时期，由伟大逐梦客「钟表匠」发明：在物质匮乏的梦境开拓时代，一份切片蛋糕就是劳动后最好的犒劳。

It's one of Penacony's most classic traditional snacks. Legend has it that this method was originally created during the age of the Great Dream Expedition by the renowned Dreamchaser known as the Watchmaker. In a time when resources were scarce during dream exploration, a slice of cake served as the ultimate reward after a day's labor.
为了纪念「钟表匠」的伟大功业，我们将这份食谱连同它的口味再度还原——成为了今天的「仰望星空」蛋糕！
To commemorate the great achievements of Watchmaker, we've recreated this recipe along with its flavor — giving birth to today's Stargazer cake!
今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!
哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.
今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
Is today's set of ingredients ready?
无数伟大的脱口秀都源于其表演者上台前喝下的那一小口美妙甘露——没错，今天的活动餐品正是匹诺康尼的传奇饮料，「经典苏乐达」！

Countless great stand-up comedy acts have been born from a small sip of divine nectar imbibed by the performer before going on stage — yes, today's featured item is Penacony's legendary drink, the Classic SoulGlad!
我听过一个小道消息：似乎苏乐达的创始人并不是如今人们熟知的艾迪恩老板，而是一个名为苏萨的星际囚犯！
I've heard an obscure gossip: The founder of SoulGlad wasn't Aideen, the owner we all know today, but rather a cosmic prisoner named Sousa!
不过事到如今，苏乐达早已不只是一款饮料，它所代表的糖浆主义已经渗入了匹诺康尼的方方面面，每个脱口秀演员都离不开它——要我说，谁还在乎那创始人是谁呢！

But at this point, SoulGlad is more than just a drink. It embodies the syrupism that has seeped into every corner of Penacony. Every stand-up comedian relies on it. Who cares about the founder anymore!
今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！

今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
Is today's set of ingredients ready?
Here's to you as well, my friend!
嘿嘿，还得是「鲱鱼先生」的广告词最有趣！
Hehe, Mr. Herring's has the most amusing tagline!
当然不是！天哪，你真是缺了点幽默细胞…这可是「鲱鱼先生」柠檬挞的广告词啊！
Certainly not! Oh my, you're seriously lacking a sense of humor... That's the tagline for Mr. Herring's lemon tart!
这是大逐梦时期后最受欢迎、也是最具匹诺康尼精神的创意餐品——鲱鱼先生畅游在红鱼子与柠檬果酱中，向每一位来到梦境的客人问好，「向你致敬，我的朋友！记得享受当下！」

This is the most popular creative dish after the Great Dream Expedition, and one that quintessentially represents the spirit of Penacony the most. Mr. Herring's swims in a sea of red caviar and lemon sauce, greeting every guest in Dreamscape with a hearty, "Cheers, my friend! Remember to savor the moment!"
也感谢主厨最终决定把它从一道主菜改为一道甜品。说真的，你不会想在柠檬挞里吃到一只真鲱鱼的。
And we're thankful that the head chef ultimately turned it into a dessert and not a main course. Honestly, you wouldn't want an actual herring in your lemon tart.
今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!
哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.
今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
Is today's set of ingredients ready?
你了解过本餐厅的招牌美食「钟表披萨」吗？
Have you ever heard of our restaurant's signature dish, the Clockie Pizza?
披萨，最便捷的美味，最直接的热量！每份<unbreak>12</unbreak>片，足够四个皮皮西人吃上一整天！
Pizza is the epitome of convenient delight and a direct source of calories! Each serving comes with <unbreak>12</unbreak> slices, enough to keep four Pepeshi folks satisfied for an entire day!
最初，只有那些在折纸大学上课的筑梦师们吃披萨，他们喜欢以这种手拿式的快餐充饥。但人们很快就发现圆形披萨的社交作用——现在，它已经是所有宴会上必不可缺的派对美食了。

Initially, it was only the Dreamweavers attending classes at Paperfold University who indulged in pizza. They favored this handheld fast food for a quick bite. However, people soon realized the social significance of circular pizza — now it's become an indispensable party delicacy at all gatherings.
但…天哪，真有人能凑够<unbreak>12</unbreak>个朋友出来吃披萨吗？
But... Oh my, can anyone really round up <unbreak>12</unbreak> friends to share a pizza?
I can finish the whole serving by myself!
无论如何，我们贴心地为你准备了单人份钟表披萨！编号随机，即使没朋友也可以愉快享用~
Anyway, we've thoughtfully prepared a single serving of Clockie Pizza for you! The numbers are random, so you can enjoy it even if you don't have any friends.

Is today's set of ingredients ready?
酸的…甜的…苦的…哎呦，这颗好像是苏乐达味的！
Sour... sweet... bitter... Oh, this one appears to carry the taste of SoulGlad!
朋友，你来得正好！快来试试最近新出的多味糖，每颗都不一样，每颗都有惊喜~
Friend, you've come just in time! Give the newly released mixed-flavor candy a try. Each candy is unique and promises a delightful surprise!
浓郁的奶油草莓味瞬间在你口中爆开，过于馥郁的甜味几乎让思绪都停摆一秒。
The rich and creamy strawberry flavor instantly bursts in your mouth, and the exceptionally sweet taste nearly causes your mind to pause for a moment.
新鲜的青草、雨后的泥土、秋季的落叶…似乎短短一秒，你就从这颗糖上品味道了某颗植物的一生。
Fresh grass, rain-soaked earth, autumn leaves... In a mere second, it's as if you've tasted the entire life of a particular plant through the taste of this candy.
这是一颗跳跳糖，但那在你舌尖蹦跳的节奏似乎颇有规律，你甚至觉得它们在你耳边组成了一只摇滚乐队——不算太吵的那种。
This candy bounces on your tongue with a surprisingly regular rhythm, and it even feels like they're forming a rock band in your ear — not too loud, though.
真可惜，这一颗的口感真的很有趣——当然，没我的笑话有趣。
What a pity, the texture of this one is really interesting — of course, not as interesting as my jokes.
请允许我介绍本次美食庆典的压轴之作：「彩梦」什锦糖果！
Please allow me to introduce the grand finale of this gourmet festival: The "Dreamlight" Mixed Sweets!
这绝对是会影响匹诺康尼甜点史的伟大作品。它就像枚微型梦泡，一颗就是一小段新体验，比梦泡更快速也更安全。

This is undoubtedly a masterpiece that will influence the confectionary history of Penacony. It's like a miniature dream bubble, each piece offering a new experience, quicker and safer than dream bubbles.
我已经能预见它恐怖的销量了！
I can already foresee its terrifying sales!
今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!
哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.
今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
Is today's set of ingredients ready?
以上就是参与本届美食庆典的所有餐品了，感谢您一贯对商业街与钟表餐厅的大力支持，咱们明年再会！
Those are all the dishes featured in this year's festival. Thank you for your ongoing support of the Business District and Clock Diner. See you next year!
Wait, what about my special reward?
我们为所有参加完整七日活动的顾客准备了特殊礼品：免费的「彩梦」什锦糖体验装一份！
We have a special treat for all customers who completed the entire seven-day event: A complimentary "Dreamlight" Mixed Sweets experience kit!
您可以选择寄送对象，我们会帮你直接送至对方手中。
You may select a recipient, and we'll deliver it directly to them.
（来自匹诺康尼的特产美食…该送给谁好呢……？）
(A specialty food from Penacony... Who should I send it to...?)
Pom-Pom, who can never leave the Express
Dan Heng, who is guarding the Express
Mr. Yang, who has been looking after everyone
特殊礼品已为您寄出！如果您还想购置更多特产，可以咨询酒店员工，我们同样提供上门送货服务。
Your special gift has been dispatched! Should you wish to acquire additional specialties, feel free to consult our hotel staff. We also provide delivery services.
好嘞，到点下班，该去准备「奇异果」的第十二次投稿了…
All right, it's time to call it a day and prepare for the twelfth submission to the Kiwis...
感谢你的参与——礼品寄送已完成，记得明天再来啊！
Thank you for your participation! Your gift has been sent. Please come again tomorrow!
星穹列车的开拓客，又见面了！
Trailblazer from the Astral Express, we meet again!
不来爱德华医生的梦境贩售店看看吗？我这里又有一批新梦泡上市了——
Fancy a visit to my Dreamscape Sales Store? I have a new batch of dream bubbles coming to the shelf...
——是个相当劲爆的题材，体验过的客人全都好评如潮…保准符合您的口味！
The batch has a pretty exciting theme. Those who have tried it are full of praise... I'm sure you'll like it!
哈哈，我就知道您肯定会感兴趣！还记得本店的标语吗？「爱德华医生比您更了解您内心的喜好！」
Haha, I knew you would be interested! Still remember the slogan of my store? "Dr. Edward knows more about your preferences than you do!"
不过这里容我暂且卖个关子，毕竟现在每多说一个字都算是一种剧透。这梦泡的内容，还请客人您亲自体验吧！
Please allow me to keep the suspense going for now, as I don't want to give any spoilers. You'll have to enter the dream bubble yourself to find out what it's about!
Hey, you need to snap out of it.
你动作好慢啊，车…我是说球笼都准备好了。大部队已经基本撤离，我们差不多也该跟上了。
You're moving too slowly. The car... I mean, the spheroid is all set. Everyone else has left, and we should catch up soon.
美梦小镇的监狱啊。难道你以为自己已经自由了？
The Dreamville prison. Do you actually think you're already a free man?
逃狱啊。难道你以为自己已经自由了？
We're breaking out of prison. Do you actually think you're already a free man?
一周前，当上典狱长的石头老板宣布将苏乐达列为禁品——当时你可是愤怒到对空气挥拳、险些打坏吊灯啊。
A week ago, Boss Stone became the Prison Warden and listed SoulGlad as contraband. You flipped out over that decision so much that you kept punching the air and nearly broke the chandelier.
从那时起，咱们就计划好要给他们一个教训了。现在正是难得的机会。
We decided to teach them a lesson at that time. Now, the best opportunity has come.
我懂了，你在交代背景设定。
Ha, I got it! You're now doing the exposition!
什么背景设定？你今天说话好怪啊。算了……
What exposition? There's something off about you today. Forget it...
不让喝苏乐达的都是坏人！
Whoever prohibited SoulGlad must be the bad guy!
说的是啊！所以兄弟们才要逃狱嘛。
Exactly! That's why we decided to get out of this place.
坏消息是，那些狱卒刚刚破坏了航道，我们必须手动调整路线才能继续前进。
The bad news is that the prison guards have just damaged the track. We need to fix it manually to proceed.
听说你进来之前有两把刷子。修复工作就交给你了，我去为你打掩护。咱们汇合点再见。
I heard you were good at these things, so I'll leave the repair work to you. I'll cover for you. See you at the meeting point later.
不错嘛，你还真有两把刷子。咱们都成功活下来了。
Wow, you really know your stuff! We have both made it.
那群狱卒的手段肯定不止这些，前面还会有更多障碍的。
I bet those prison guards have more tricks up their sleeves. There will be more obstacles waiting for us ahead.
继续前进吧。为了自由，为了苏乐达！
Let's move forward. For freedom! For SoulGlad!
当心，这片区域的障碍物比之前更多。
Watch out. There are more obstacles in this area than before.
我们成功了。看，是哈努老大！哈努老大亲自来接应我们了！
We made it! Look, it's Boss Hanu! He's here to pick us up!
球笼已经运行到了尽头。哈努兄弟，美梦小镇最著名的人物之一，正抖动自己的大鼻子对你们表示欢迎。
The Spheroid reaches the end of its track. Hanu, one of the most famous figures in Dreamville, is twitching his big nose to welcome you.
哈努兄弟发出了一声很酷的「哼」，看来他明白该如何表现得像个高手。
Hanu lets out a snort in an attempt to sound cool. He seems to know very well how to behave to come across as a big shot.
哈努老大说，感谢你们为大家殿后。所有伙伴都安全逃了出来。
Boss Hanu appreciates you two for providing cover for us. Everyone has made it out safely.
我们的下一步计划是解救其他监狱分区内的囚犯，将他们收作同伴、壮大队伍。也许有一天，我们能彻底打碎身上的枷锁。
Next, we plan to free the prisoners from other divisions and take them in to expand our team. Perhaps, we can break free from our chains for good one day.
为了美梦小镇的福祉，让我们今后也继续并肩奋战吧！
Let's work hard together for a better Dreamville!
逃亡行动成功后，哈努兄弟决定向其他囚犯伸出援手，以此拉拢他们加入反抗监狱的队伍。
After a successful prison break, Brother Hanu decided to reach out to the other prisoners as a means of recruiting them into the resistance against the prison.
大量物资源源不断地送进了临近的分区：食物、武器、服装…当然，还有最重要的苏乐达。
A steady flow of supplies that include food, weapons, clothing, and most importantly, SoulGlad is provided to the neighboring division.
而你接到的任务，便是用通风口运送一批新交付的苏乐达……
You are assigned with the mission of delivering a batch of newly arrived SoulGlad through the vent...
你成功交付了这批苏乐达，但监狱的严打并未因此减弱——隔壁分区的狱卒每天都会打开牢房，搜出一瓶又一瓶苏乐达，然后将它们尽数摔碎。

The batch of SoulGlad is successfully delivered, but the crackdown on SoulGlad within the prison has yet to abate. The prison guards carry out spot checks in the cells every day, confiscate bottle after bottle of SoulGlad, and then smash them all.
不满开始积攒。只要假以时日，它终会演变成怒火……
Discontentment among the prisoners is growing. Over time, it will soon escalate into anger...
在哈努兄弟的授意下，你和同伴们将成箱的苏乐达偷运进隔壁的监狱区划。
With Brother Hanu's permission, you and your companions smuggle crates of SoulGlad into the neighboring prison block.
这带有甜味的汽水让囚犯们的精神大为提振，就像在黑暗中看到了光……
The sweetness of the soda lifts the spirits of the inmates — as if they can see the light in the darkness...
苏乐达走私运动持续了六个月，囚犯和狱卒们的拉锯战每天都在上演——刚拿到的苏乐达还没来得及喝就被抢走，咒骂与哀求声充斥着牢房内外。

The SoulGlad smuggling operation lasted for six months, with a daily tug-of-war between the prisoners and the guards. Newly acquired SoulGlad was snatched away before consumed, filling the cell with the sounds of cursing and pleading.
新入手的冰镇苏乐达还没来得及喝就被抢走，咒骂与哀求声不绝于耳。
The sound of the prisoners cursing and begging can be heard all the time. Their nicely chilled SoulGlad is seized before they even manage to take a sip.
就这样，隔壁区划的压力逐渐到达顶峰，只差一粒火星就要爆发……
Just like that, the feeling of displeasure in the neighboring division reaches an all-time high. A spark is all it needs to erupt...
深层梦境的全部章节都已为您解锁，您可以尽情选择想要游玩的关卡。
All chapters of Deep Dreamscape have been unlocked for you. You are free to choose the stage you want to play.
这些关卡比较有挑战性。如果被某一关难住了，不妨先去其他的章节换换思维哟。
These stages are more challenging. If you're stuck somewhere, you can visit another chapter for a change.
欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!
此时此刻，您想体验一个什么滋味的梦境？
What kind of a dream would you like to experience now?
又一批苏乐达被大规模破坏后，囚犯们的怒火爆发了。
After another batch of SoulGlad is destroyed, the inmates see red.
有人发出了第一声呐喊，随后众人热烈响应。监狱内的暴力行为数量飞增，动乱波及了整个分区……
Following the first cry of rebellion, the other inmates respond enthusiastically. The number of violent incidents in the prison skyrockets, plunging the entire division into pandemonium...
你们趁机发出邀请，反抗队伍扩大到了前所未有的地步。对自由和美好的追求感染了每一个人……
You and your team take advantage of the chaotic situation to invite the prisoners, and the number of rebels grows rapidly. Everyone's desire for freedom and a better life has been awakened.
总之，我要先去为哈努兄弟助力了，你也赶快跟上吧。
Anyway, I'll go ahead and help Brother Hanu. You should hurry along.
你来了，伙计。有一个好消息和一个坏消息，我先讲好的。
Hey, buddy. I have good news and bad news. Let me tell you the good one first.
多亏之前的那步奇招，我们已经占领了整个美梦小镇监狱一半的分区。石头老板和他手下那群饭桶再也没可能把我们抓回牢房里去了。
Thanks to that unusual move we pulled off earlier, we've taken over half of the prison in Dreamville. Boss Stone and his underlings can never take us back to the prison again.
坏消息是，他们依旧手握监狱系统的控制权。如今我们半区的生产设施基本停运，所有出口也都被隔离门封锁了。照这么下去，大伙很快就会支撑不住……

The bad news is, they are still in control of the prison system. The production facilities in our divisions have stopped operating, and all the exits have been blocked by quarantine gates. If this goes on, we won't be able to hold on for much longer...
必须有人从通风口潜入对面半区的储藏室、取得控制监狱系统的秘钥——试问谁会比哈努兄弟更擅长这项任务呢？
We need someone to sneak through the vent into the storage room located in the other half of the prison and find the key to the prison system. Obviously, Hanu is the best candidate for this mission.
不过英雄也并非万能，仅凭他一人很难对付整个分区的警卫。所以我们必须通过电视机，将梦境力量传递给他。
But even a hero like him isn't invincible and can't deal with all the guards by himself. We need to channel the Dreamscape energy to him through the television.
Sounds like the plot has just jumped the shark...
总之就是要我亲自操作对吧？
（毕竟梦泡还是需要以客人的体验为重——如果哈努兄弟靠着自己把一切都完成了，这部作品不就少了很多可玩内容吗？）
(After all, first-hand experience is what a dream bubble is all about. If Hanu does all the work, then there will be very little playable content in this dream bubble.)
（去体验一下这枚梦泡里的「小小哈努行动」玩法吧。我向您保证，他们的关卡设计相当出色！）
(I recommend you try the "Hanu's Adventure" stage in this dream bubble. The stage is very well-designed!)
啾，你是来找这把钥匙的吗？
Tweet, are you looking for this key?
给你吧啾，石头老板一直拖欠我的工资。我可不想再给他卖命了啾！
Keep it, tweet. Boss Stone has not settled my wages for a long time. I'm not going to work for him anymore, tweet!
Let me go back to bed, tweet!
我知道你啾，你是掀起这场动乱的哈努兄弟。
I know who you are, tweet. You're Hanu, the guy who started this turmoil.
我不喜欢战争啾，我希望大家早点握手言和。
I don't like conflicts, so I hope to see you guys making peace with each other soon.
如果要拿到这把钥匙才能停止纷争的话，那就拿去吧啾。
If this key can put an end to the conflict, then you can take it, tweet.
哦，是你啊啾——想要打倒石头老板的家伙。巧了啾，我也一早就看那家伙不顺眼。
Oh, it's you, tweet. You're the guy who wants to take down Boss Stone. What a coincidence! He has rubbed me the wrong way, too.
别误会，这可不是我们能成为同伴的意思啾。我要借你们的手，狠狠削弱那个鳄鱼头，好为我的鸟之帝国开辟道路。
Don't get me wrong. I'm not saying I'm on your side. I just need you guys to weaken that crocodile so that I can pave my way to the founding of my Bird Empire.
拿走这把钥匙吧啾。只有在你手里，我才能让它完成我的计划。
Take the key, tweet. I need you to have it for my plan to work out.
别，别伤害我啾…我是被迫才给石头老板干活的！
D—Don't hurt me, tweet... I'm coerced into working for Boss Stone!
你，你想要这把秘钥是吧？拿去吧…只要你别伤害我啾。
Y—You want this key, right? Take it... as long as you don't hurt me, tweet.
啾！原本只是想修缮一下房间里的老旧设备，没想到被压在这里了…感谢你啾。
Tweet! I just wanted to repair the old equipment in the room, but ended up being trapped here... Thanks for your help, tweet.
看来美梦小镇的危险还没解除，之后我会更小心一点的啾。
Looks like Dreamville is still not totally safe yet. I'll be more careful in the future, tweet.
啾！我在为美梦小镇开拓边疆呢啾！
Tweet! I'm expanding the territory of Dreamville, tweet!
至于刚才发生的…是意外啾！我要回去提醒大家啾！
What happened earlier was... an accident, tweet! I must go back and remind everyone of this hazard!
啾！我才没有被困住，我要继续跟那些坏人干架啾！

不过英雄也是有极限的…是时候回去休整一下了啾。

啾，迷途的人啊，是你将我从危难中拯救。但是谁又能拯救你的灵魂呢？
Tweet, you have rescued me from danger, wanderer. However, who's there to rescue your soul?
（哦呀，密钥居然被藏在了折纸小鸟身上？真是令人意想不到呢~）
(The key is hidden on that origami bird! How unexpected!)
（不过这样的密钥似乎有许多把，看来得全部集齐才行。）

This is the way to the core area. Let's offer our support to Hanu!
哈努兄弟拿到了全部四把钥匙，用它们打开了监狱的电脑核心。
Hanu has obtained all four keys and used them to open the computer core of the prison.
灯光亮起，所有设备都已宣誓效忠。人们高举苏乐达庆祝，金色的糖浆如雨而下。
The lights come on, with all the equipment pledging their allegiance. Everyone raises bottles of SoulGlad in celebration while the golden syrup rains down from above.
然而，整座监狱却因此发生了异变……
Yet, the entire prison is transformed as a result...
我们所做的一切终究是如幻泡影，美好生活仅能在梦中觅得。
Everything we've done is just an illusion. The pursuit of a better life is only possible in a dream.
前方究竟有怎样残酷的道路在等待着你，我无法想象啾。
I can hardly imagine how harsh the path ahead of you will be, tweet.
你——准确的说，梦泡的主要角色——揉着发痛的脑袋苏醒过来。
You — or more precisely — the protagonist of the dream bubble, wake up with a throbbing head.
熟悉的走廊已经变成了截然不同的模样，一同奋战的伙伴们此时也都不见踪影。
The once-familiar corridors have become completely different, and your companions, who have been fighting alongside you, are nowhere to be found.
你明白，必须有人站出来拯救大家。成为英雄的时候到了。
You realize that someone has to step up and save everyone. It is time to become a hero.
就在哈努兄弟取得监狱控制权的一瞬，变故发生了：混乱的联觉梦境吞噬了你们，连带着将整座监狱也全部卷了进去，
Right when Brother Hanu takes control of the prison, an accident occurs: A chaotic Synesthesia Dreamscape engulfs you all, and pulls the entire prison in it.
啊，是你啊。能再次看见一张熟悉的脸可真好。
Oh, it's you. It's great to see a familiar face again.
真见鬼，监狱怎么突然变成了这个样子？其他人都去哪儿了？
Woah, what happened to the prison? Where's everybody else?
I think they are being trapped elsewhere.
…看来只能靠自己了。走吧，咱们去找其他人——至少要找到哈努老大，他有团结其他囚犯的办法。
...Looks like we're on our own. Let's go find the others, or at least locate Hanu. He has a knack for uniting the other prisoners.
简单收拾过后，你和狱友踏上了寻找哈努兄弟的旅程。
After a quick cleanup, you and your cellmate begin the journey to find Brother Hanu.
看，是哈努老大他们！但怎么过去呢……
Look, it's Hanu and the rest! How do we get over there...
哟，你们居然自己找了过来，真让人刮目相看。
I'm impressed you guys made it here.
现在的情况你们也看到了，整座监狱都变成了一团糟，路不像路、墙不像墙的。唉，这可如何是好……
As you all can see, the prison is now a total mess. Everything is ruined and destroyed. Alas, what should we do about this...
哈努兄弟一连说了三个「哼」，这大概是他言辞最为激动的一次。
Hanu grunts three times in a row. This is probably the most agitated he has ever spoken.
哈努老大说，这次事件是个意外，但它并不能击败我们。
Boss Hanu said this was an accident, and it couldn't defeat us.
在过去，苏乐达就是我们的美梦。石头老板想要夺走我们的梦、强迫我们在淤泥里苟活，所以他们被打倒了。而这次，我们也将打倒一切困难！
Back then, SoulGlad was our dream. Boss Stone took it away and forced us into a life of abject despair, so he and his men were overthrown. This time, we'll do the same and overcome all challenges!
接下来，我们要去寻找其他失散的同伴，然后用自己的意志改变这里，让美梦小镇变成真正的乐园。
Next, we'll look for our lost companions and transform Dreamville into a true paradise through sheer determination!
Did he really say all that?
咳，艺术加工必不可少嘛……
Ahem, it's important to add a little artistic flair to words...
总之，是该出发的时候了。为了自由，为了苏乐达！
Anyway, it's time we hit the road. For Freedom! For SoulGlad!
就这样，你们和哈努兄弟一同踏上了解救伙伴的旅程。而那是另一个故事了……
Just like that, the two of you and Hanu embark on a journey of rescuing the other companions. And that will be another story...
恭喜您，您已经体验完了梦泡的全部剧情内容！
Congratulations on completing the full story in the dream bubble!
如何，这一套下来您有什么感想？

Dr. Edward doesn't give guarantees on the veracity of the dream bubble content. A dream is a dream. Just enjoy it!
这就算是成功了，客人！毕竟这里是匹诺康尼，不是历史博物馆！
The dream bubble is already quite a success, my dear! After all, this is Penacony, not a museum!
这是对梦泡作品最高规格的赞赏了，感谢您！
That's the highest praise a dream bubble can get. Thanks!
这枚梦泡仍在测试和开发阶段。关于它的内容，梦泡制作组委托我做些反响调查，所以接下来我会问您几个问题。
As the dream bubble is still undergoing the testing and development stage, the developers have enlisted my help to carry out a survey regarding its content. Now, I'll ask you a few questions.
您认为，囚犯们暴动的真正原因是什么？
What do you think was the true reason behind the prisoners' riot?
嗯…了解。那么您认为，这次反抗成功的关键因素是什么？
Hmm... Noted. In your opinion, what was the key factor that led to the success of the rebellion?
我明白了…最后，您认为囚犯们改造美梦小镇的计划成功了吗？

It's hard to say. I'll wait for the upcoming DLC.
哈哈哈，您真幽默。放心，我会把您的需求反馈给制作组的！

Anyway, I hope you enjoy the experience! If you find the gameplay of this dream bubble fun, I'd suggest that you try the stage that follows: Deep Dreamscape.
虽然后面的关卡没有太多剧情内容作为串联，但我们的梦泡玩法制作组依然为您准备了丰厚的挑战和对应的奖励——您千万不能错过！
There will be fewer plot elements in this stage, but the developers have prepared various challenges that come with amazing rewards! Don't miss it!

没问题客人，这就为您接入梦泡内容

滴答！欢迎来到美梦小镇！
滴答！我是钟表小子！欢迎来到美梦小镇……
Tick-tock! I am Clockie! Welcome to Dreamville...
奇怪的钟表重复着同样的台词，似乎不想跟你交流……
The strange clock repeats the same dialogue over and over, apparently not interested in speaking with you...
Tick-tock... What do I do, tick-tock...
滴答！宾客！宾客你好，我是钟表小子，欢迎来到美梦小镇！
Tick-tock! Guest! Hello! I am Clockie! Welcome to Dreamville!
我好像收到了你的短信…
I got a message from you...
滴答？原来是宾客在帮忙，真是惭愧……
Tick-tock? So you are the one helping out. I am ashamed...
给我发骚扰短信的人就是你吗？

滴答，亲爱的宾客，很抱歉让你看到我们迷钟的丑态。

Tick-tock, we're the Sweet Dreams Troupe of the Iris Family, outfitted as attendants in the image of the cartoon star Clockie, and are used to bring joy to our guests via our adorable aesthetics!
滴答…宇宙审美是很多元的，很多宾客都喜欢我们哦。

滴答…我也不知道造我们的人是怎么想的，但按设定来说就是这样的！

Middle-management Dream Tickers like us fear that our subordinates will turn into the Dreamjolt Troupe, which is why we brought some building blocks to help them decompress.

滴答，再这样下去，搞不好我们这个部门全都要被优化了…但有个迷钟告诉我，出现了一个能修好我们的人——就是您，亲爱的宾客！
Tick-tock, if this keeps up, our entire department will be optimized... But a Dream Ticker told me that someone who could fix us showed up — and that's you, my dear guest!
滴答，是的！既然您能修好我们，一定有特殊的本领，请帮帮我们吧！

滴答，您真是个大好人，我会让下属们为您准备谢礼的！

Tick-tock, our internal structures are very complicated. Your average Dreamweaver wouldn't even begin to know how to navigate them... They would only find an excuse to dispose of the faulty Dream Tickers to cover up their incompetence!
请去美梦中找找那些故障的迷钟吧，滴答，记得要把那些奇怪的积木也收回来哦！
Please look for the faulty Dream Tickers across the dreams. Tick-tock, and remember to bring those strange blocks back too!

滴答，好呀，我们的工作就是陪伴宾客。
