Thank you! You've been so kind!
Alright, enough with the public display of affection.
嘻嘻，像您这样温柔体贴的人，到哪都会受欢迎的。觉得孤独的话，下次我约您出去玩呀。
Hee-hee, a gentle person like you will be popular wherever you go. If you ever feel lonely, I'll ask you out next time.
不过，现在请先祝福我们吧~
But for now, please give us your blessing.
（求救声…是从酒吧外面传来的？）
(That cry for help... is coming from outside the lounge?)
酒吧还未恢复平静多久，不远处突然传来了呼救的声音。
Not long after the lounge had returned to calmness, cries for help suddenly came from nearby.
呜…呜啊啊啊！我还不想死！明明才下定决心以后要快乐生活，我才不要……
Waaa... Waaaahhhh! I don't want to die yet! I just decided to live a happy life from now on! I don't want...
亲、亲爱的别怕…人…人家会保护你……
C—Calm down, darling... I... I'll protect you...
汪！醒醒哇。你、你认不出我们了吗？
Woof! Get back to your senses! You... you don't recognize us?
汪！我不会让你伤害它们……
Woof! I won't let you harm them...
新来的调饮师，快来帮忙哇——小星星失去理智了汪！
Come help, new drinksmith! Starlet has lost his mind!
怎会如此？怎会如此！就连我们之中最智慧的思考者都变成了这副模样！
How could this be? How!? Even the wisest thinker among us has lost his sanity!
果然欢喜瞬息即逝、当真悲苦方为永恒——谁能告诉我，啊！既然注定要走向毁灭，如我们这般存在，又为何要降生于这不真切的「美梦」之中……

As I thought, it is indeed that happiness is transient while sorrow seems everlasting... Who can tell me... if we are doomed for ruin, why were we brought into this illusory "sweet dream" in the first place...?
（上次见面时还好好的，怎么突然就发狂了？）
(He was fine the last time we met. Why did he suddenly become frenzied?)
(I should inform Siobhan as soon as possible...)
怎么办哇？新来的调饮师，你那么聪明，一定有办法的吧！
What should we do? You're a smart one, new drinksmith! So there must be something you can do!
Let's bring him back to the lounge first.
汪！看起来没事了。明明平时都有来酒吧，为什么会突然失去理智哇！
Woof! Looks like he's okay. He's a regular at the lounge, but why did he lose his mind all of a sudden?
人家不会有天也变成那样吧，好可怕呀。
Will I end up like that someday? That's scary.
唉，我们终将抵达命定的终点。
*sigh* We all meet our destined end someday.
汪…为什么这种时候，舒翁偏偏不在哇。
Woof... why isn't Siobhan here at a time like this?
我们就先回去了汪。新来的调饮师…你也要好好保护自己哇。
We'll go back for now, woof. As for you, new drinksmith... stay safe, alright?
怪物们纷纷离开了酒吧，没过多久……
The monsters all left the lounge one after another, and not long after that...
…我收到你的消息了。怪物们还好吗？
...I've received your message. How are the monsters doing?
你向舒翁讲述了在梦境酒店里遇见的事。当说起那些发狂的怪物时，你注意到她似乎并未感到惊讶，平静的神色间夹着几分疲惫，仿佛对现状早已知晓。

You tell Siobhan about what happened in the hotel in the Dreamscape. When you mention the frenzied monsters, you notice that she doesn't seem all that surprised. Instead, a touch of fatigue appears on her calm face, as if she has been expecting it.
我刚才查看了它的情况，没什么大问题，过段时间就能恢复清醒。
I just checked on him, nothing serious. He'll regain his senses soon.
…抱歉，我没想到会发生这种事。辛苦你了。
...I'm sorry. I didn't see it coming. Thank you for your help.
你…是不是有事情瞒着我？
Are you... hiding something from me?
别紧张。我才刚从外面回来，有些累了。你不是个熟练的调饮师嘛，给我调杯饮料呗？
Chill out. I just came back, and I'm a bit tired. You're a skilled drinksmith, so how about whipping up a drink for me?
调饮的手艺进步不小嘛，说不定都可以把这家酒吧整个托付给你了。
You've gotten so good at mixing drinks. Maybe I can trust you with this lounge.
随着梦境加速坍塌，怪物发狂的情况会越来越多。我们调制的这些饮品，充其量只能暂时安抚它们的情绪，不知道什么时候是个头啊。
As the Dreamscape collapses faster, more monsters will go frenzied. The drinks we whip up will only calm them down temporarily, and we have no idea when this whole mess will end.
或许吧。有时候也止不住地会去想，自己究竟想做的是什么。
Perhaps. Sometimes I can't help but wonder what my true desire is.
是么？但…说实话，这或许只是你的看法。
Oh, really? But... to be honest, maybe that's just your opinion.
即使是在梦里，生活也不会那么单纯，努力并非一定能得到结果，这世界总是这样。
Life isn't simple even in a dream, and hard work doesn't always pay off. That's just how the world works.
我还有些必须解决的麻烦事，那群孩子就拜托你了。
I've got some troubles I need to sort out. Please take care of those kids while I'm gone.
I hope... you enjoy it here.
汪！…这边，到这边来，有点事情想和你商量哇！
Woof! ...This way, come this way. I've got something to talk to you about!
汪！你不觉得舒翁最近的行为很可疑嘛，成天不在酒吧，到底去哪了哇！
Woof! Don't you think Siobhan has been acting suspiciously lately? She's never around the lounge these days. Where has she gone?
果然你和我们想得一样哇！
I knew you'd feel the same way!
你也知道，舒翁是个很厉害的人，然后我们就在想……
As you know, Siobhan is an amazing woman, so we've been wondering...
要是舒翁这么厉害，最近又常常不在，会不会…她不想要我们了哇？
Since she's been away a lot lately, could it be that... she doesn't want us anymore?
最近大家的情绪不太好，惹了不少麻烦，会不会…是被她讨厌了哇？
We've been a pain in the neck lately and have caused a lot of trouble. Maybe... she's not into us anymore?
她总是说有事情要忙，却从来不肯告诉我们细节……
She always says she's busy with something, but never spills the beans...
（仔细想想，舒翁确实从来没有透露过自己在忙些什么。）
(Come to think of it, Siobhan never mentioned what she's been busy with.)
新来的调饮师！我们去外面找舒翁吧！要是能帮上她的忙就更好了汪！
Hey, new drinksmith! Let's go outside and find Siobhan! It'd be great if we could help her out! Woof!
汪汪！我先去做准备！调查舒翁可能会在的地方哇！
Woof! Let me make some preparations and figure out where Siobhan might be!
我需要先处理完酒吧的工作。
I need to finish my work at the lounge first.
汪！没问题哇！我先去做准备，调查舒翁可能会在的地方哇！
Woof! No problem! Let me make some preparations and figure out where Siobhan might be!
（约好了要去找舒翁，不过得先把酒吧的事忙完……）
(I've promised him to look for Siobhan, but I need to finish the lounge work first...)
（没记错的话，应该只有小星星的问题还没解决了吧？）
(If I remember correctly, Starlet is the only one who is still troubled by his problem, right?)
…最真实的想法，究竟是什么呢？
要是轻易就把真心表露出来…不是会显得太急躁了吗？
If I reveal my true feelings so easily... won't I seem too impatient?
猜呀，猜呀，怎么都猜不透…想要再一次确定……
I keep wondering but never get an answer... I want to be reassured...
（…那个闹钟先前这么威风，情绪平静下来后还是挺懂事的。）
(...That alarm clock was a pain, but now he seems quite prudent when he is calmed down.)
（准备得差不多，该开始营业了。）
(Almost ready. Time to open for business.)
我说我说，您不是有些特别厉害的能力嘛？能不能麻烦您进到人家的心里，看看到底是哪里堵住了呢？
Hey, there? Don't you have some awesome powers? Could you dive into my heart and see what is blocking me?
Sure, I'll help you solve your problems.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
您先去忙吧。人家就在这等着。
Please go ahead. I'll be waiting here.
没有人会喜欢，我只是一个笑柄…好冷，我好孤独……
Nobody likes me. I'm just a standing joke... I'm feeling so cold, so lonely...
我试过销声匿迹…却发现根本无人问津…
I've tried to disappear... only to realize that no one cares at all...
呜呜！！我知道这样很丢脸…可悲伤它始终围绕着我，我控制不住自己呜哇哇哇！
*sob* I know it's awkward... but I just can't shake off my grief... Waaaaah!
I've got something else to do.
呜呜呜呜呜呜。你去吧，就让我在这自生自灭好了。
Boohoooo... Just go ahead and leave me be.
（淑女和忧郁派的关系还真好啊，喜欢它们表演的人挺多的嘛。）
(Lady and Melancholy are really close. Lots of people are fond of their performances.)
（不知道小星星恢复得怎么样，它今天还会来酒吧吗？）
(I wonder how Starlet is doing. Will he show up today?)
（…有点好奇，不过还是先开始营业吧。）
(...As curious as I am, I should get the business started first.)
（结束了手头的事，就去看看舒翁究竟在忙什么吧。）
(I'll go see what Siobhan is up to when I'm done here.)
(Now, I need to have a chat with Starlet.)
开始吧。反复辩论没有意义，只有事实才能指明方向。
Let's get it started. There's no point in repeated arguments, as only facts can guide us to the path.
我为你准备了用于模拟的思维空间，看清楚了——我们，所谓的「美梦剧团」究竟过着怎样的生活。
I've prepared a Mindspace for simulations. Watch closely and see what kind of life we Sweet Dreams Troupe members are actually living.
如果你站在道路的分岔点，又会如何选择呢？
What would you choose if you were the one at the crossroads?
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
不用着急，我就在这等你。
No need to rush. I'll be here waiting for you.
做好进入特殊空间的准备了么？在那里你可以看到——我们，所谓的「美梦剧团」——究竟过着怎样的生活。
Ready to dive into the special space? There, you'll find out what kind of life we so-called Sweet Dreams Troupe members are actually living.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
不用着急，我就在这等你。
No need to rush. I'll be here waiting for you.
（做这个梦可比战斗要累多了……）
(Diving into this dream is much more tiring than a fight...)
舒翁说的没错，我承认你是一位极为优秀的调饮师。
Siobhan was right. Now I admit that you're an extraordinary drinksmith.
你很适合「惊梦酒吧」。我代表所有成员向你表示欢迎。
You're a perfect fit for Dreamjolt Hostelry. On behalf of all the members, welcome aboard.
这段时间辛苦了。我还会来光顾的。
Thank you for what you've done. I'll drop by next time.
（好了，现在怪物们的问题都得到了解决…该出发去调查舒翁了！）
(Now that I've resolved all the monsters' problems... it's time to investigate Siobhan!)
Woof! There you are! I've been waiting for you!
我和它们都说过了，不会过来酒吧哇，我们可以自由行动！
I told them that we wouldn't be at the lounge today! Now we can do whatever we want!
放心吧，汽水狗狗永远是你最可靠的伙伴！
No worries! Soda Doggo will always be your most reliable partner!
虽然我从来没离开过酒店，但我帅气又灵敏的鼻子会带我们找到舒翁的汪！
Although I've never left the hotel, my handsome and keen nose will lead us straight to Siobhan! Woof!
汪汪！听说那个「黄金的时刻」特别大、人也特别多，你可要跟紧了，别走丢了哇！
Woof! I hear that Golden Hour is huge and crowded, so stick close and don't get lost!
你们——在大街上遛什么狗呢？跑得还挺欢，嘻嘻，我看是狗在遛你才对吧！
Hey, guys... walking your dog, huh? He looks so happy, hee-hee! You know, I think he's the one taking you for a walk!
我想在哪逛，你管得着嘛？再说，现在梦里乱成这样，好多烂摊子等着我收拾呢。
I'm going wherever I want! Plus, the Dreamscape is a mess, and I've got mountains of clean-up tasks to do.
咦，有吗？没有吧，我跟许多人都长得很像，肯定是你记错了。
Huh? Nah, I don't think so. I look like a lot of people, so you must be mistaking me for someone else.
汪！我们是有很重要的事要去做哇！
Woof! We've got something super important to do!
知道啦知道啦。会说话的狗狗，真可爱。下次再给你带礼物哦。我还有事要忙，先走啦。
Yeah, yeah. Talking dog, so cute. I'll bring you a gift next time, but for now, I've got work to do, so I'm outta here.
汪！闪闪亮亮的！好多人！外面原来这么热闹哇！
Woof! Look at all the shiny stuff! And so many people! It's so lively out there!
汪！这就是钟表小子哇！这里好宽敞，特别适合玩飞盘！
Woof! So that's Clockie! This place is so spacious, perfect for a game of floatdisc!
差点忘了正事！我、我们还是先去找舒翁哇！呜汪…这里气味有点杂……
Oh, I almost forgot! L—Let's find Siobhan first! Woof... so many scents mixed up here...
别紧张，开个玩笑而已。你似乎有些烦恼，让我为你抽张牌如何？
Chill out. Just kidding. You seem a little troubled. How about I draw a fortune card for you?
就是顺手帮你个忙，稍微还点人情罢了。呵呵，完成了。
Just doing you a favor and returning the favor. Well, it's done.
汪！我找到舒翁的味道了，走走！
Woof! I've caught Siobhan's scent! Let's go!
快去吧。时机这种东西，若是不好好把握，可是会溜走的。
Now, go. Seize the opportunity before it slips away.
汪！快看，是舒翁！旁边那个人好像在哪见……
Woof! Look, it's Siobhan! And the person next to her... I think I've met her before...
是那个想把舒翁从酒吧带走的坏人哇！她们怎么会在一起！
Hey, it's the baddie who tried to take Siobhan away from the lounge! How did they end up together!?
汪汪汪——我去把舒翁拽回来！
Woof, woof! I'll drag Siobhan back!
你也不想被舒翁讨厌吧？
You don't want Siobhan to be mad at you, right?
汪…那我们偷偷过去，听听她们在说什么吧！
Woof... then let's sneak over and eavesdrop on their conversation!
我就说，天天守在那个破酒吧里，简直就是在白白浪费你的才华！
As I said, staying at that rundown lounge is a total waste of your talent!
要是早答应我，你也不至于落到现在这样…哎，还好最近家主的心情不错，我带你去见她，这次可得注意点说话啊。
If you had just listened to me earlier, you wouldn't be in this mess... Lucky for you, The Family Head is in a good mood, so I'll take you to see her. Just be careful with what you say.
…别担心，忘了最初的表演课是谁教你的了？我当然会有分寸。
...Don't worry. You haven't forgotten who taught you the basics of acting, have you? I will be careful.
哼，你清楚就好，别整天惦记着你的那些怪物了，我来处理它们。走吧。
Hmph, good to know. And don't spend all day obsessing over those monsters of yours. I'll handle them. Now let's get going.
呜…我们…我们先回去吧汪……
Woof... Let's... let's head back... woof...
可算回来啦，人家好担心你们呀！
Hey, you're back! I was so worried about you guys!
汪！舒翁…舒翁不要我们了呜呜呜呜呜！
Woof! Siobhan... she doesn't want us anymore... Boohoooo!
哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！说什么蠢话呢傻狗，就凭你那可怜的小脑瓜…嘿，还想骗我们？
Mwahahahaha! What nonsense are you talking about, silly dog? You think you can fool us... with that pathetic tiny brain of yours?
汪！不是假的哇，调饮师也看到了……
Woof! I'm telling the truth! The drinksmith saw it too...
舒翁…舒翁和上次来酒吧的那个坏人一起走了，她再也不愿意待在这里了哇！
Siobhan... She left with the baddie who showed up at the lounge last time! She doesn't want to stay here anymore!
天呐！——谎言、全都是谎言！信赖自始至终都不存在……
Oh, my god! ...Lies, nothing but lies! Trust has never existed from the beginning...
别傻愣着了，外面来了好多砸场子的人！
Don't just stand there. There are troublemakers out there everywhere!
小心点，这些怪物都没有理智，凶得很，可别放松警惕了。
Watch out. These monsters are feral and aggressive. Don't let your guard down.
什么情况，这鬼地方怎么有人？
What the heck? Why is there a human in this hellhole?
我们收到的命令是把梦境酒店的怪物彻底清理干净，别管那么多，直接动手吧。
We've been ordered to wipe out all the monsters in the hotel in the Dreamscape. Let's just do our job.
汪！这是我们的酒吧，不准随便干坏事哇！
Woof! This is our lounge! We won't let any baddies do anything bad!
（…没时间解释了，先阻止他们吧！）
(...No time to explain. I've got to stop them first!)
我们的职责是维护梦境安全！
It's our duty to keep this Dreamscape safe!
把这里的怪物全部清除掉，一个都不许留！
Get rid of all the monsters here. Don't leave anyone behind!
不是…这个灰色的家伙太强了吧？
No way... This gray-hair is way too tough...
呼…你在做什么，这些可都是怪物啊。帮着怪物和我们对抗，你是疯了吗？！
Phew... What the heck are you doing!? You're helping those monsters fight against us! Are you nuts!?
开什么玩笑？别说这种天真的傻话了。
Are you kidding me? Stop talking nonsense!
「惊梦剧团」就是怪物，到处游荡，伺机伤人，不少宾客都被袭击过，现在你说它们很安全？没人会信的。
Dreamjolt Troupe is just a bunch of monsters! They roam around and attack people, and many guests have been attacked. And now you're saying they're safe? No one will believe that nonsense.
更何况，这种供人娱乐的道具在梦境里要多少有多少，就是群会动的物件而已，它们存在的意义就是为宾客服务，值得费这么多心思去维护？
Moreover, they're just animated objects to entertain guests. They can be easily replaced. Is it really worth all this trouble to protect them?
收起你那些无聊的善心。要是有人被怪物伤到了，你能负责么？
Enough with your naive kindness. Can you take responsibility if someone gets hurt because of those monsters?
并且，它们遭到了噩梦侵袭，就算现在看起来温和，只要稍微受点刺激，瞬间会暴露出本性。怪物就是怪物，你拯救不了它们。
What's more, they're corrupted by the Nightmare. Even if they seem harmless now, they'll show their true colors at the slightest provocation. Monsters are monsters, beyond redemption.
最后给你点时间，仔细想清楚。
I'll give you one last chance to think it over.
丢下几句狠话后，猎犬家系的成员暂时离开了。你清楚听到了身后传来的呜咽声。
After leaving a few harsh words, the Bloodhound Family members take their leave for now. You can clearly hear sobbing from behind you.
那群猎犬…他们来过了？我现在就去联系猎犬家系的家主。
Those hounds... they've been here? I'll contact the head of the Bloodhound Family right away.
舒翁。现在最要紧的问题不是这个。
That's not the most urgent problem now, Siobhan.
他们…他们打算把我们全部抓走，还说…我们就是群被抛弃的废物……
They... they wanted to capture all of us, and they said... that we're just a bunch of worthless trash...
怎么办？该怎么办？呜呜呜，好可怕，又要被关起来，用鞭子狠狠地抽！
What should we do? Boohoo... It's so scary... They'll lock us in and lash us like hell!
…绝望紧紧攥住了我的心脏，压迫得仿佛将要窒息！
...Despair is clutching my heart, so stifling. I'm about to suffocate!
这口气人家怎么都咽不下去！说话难听就算了，他们还打伤了铁皮人！
It's too much to handle! They said mean things and even hurt Tin Man!
我非得跟那群混蛋拼了！
I'll fight those scoundrels no matter what!
汪…舒翁，你是不是…不打算要我们了……
Woof... Siobhan, are you gonna... abandon us...?
所以才派那些坏人过来，想要把我们都清理掉…对不对哇！
That's why you sent those baddies to get rid of us... right?
你在说什么蠢话？我从来没想过要抛弃你们。
What nonsense are you even talking about!? I never wanted to abandon you guys.
但我都听到了汪！你们讨论的事，我都听到了！
But I heard it all, woof! I heard everything you guys talked about!
你打算回到家族…继续你以前的事业…我们这些不听话的怪物，只会是你的累赘。
You want to go back to The Family... and continue your former career... We're nothing but unruly monsters, just a burden to you.
汪…我们什么都做不到，整天吵吵闹闹，随时可能发狂…逼得你只能呆在这个小酒吧里。
Woof... we can't do anything useful... We bicker all day long... and we may lose control anytime... so you have to stay in this lounge forever.
所以你找来了代替的调饮师，你早就想好了要离开哇！！
That's why you hired a new drinksmith! You've been thinking about leaving a while now!!
不是。我委托{NICKNAME}真的是因为……
它们现在的情绪太过强烈，已经很难靠对话平复下来了。
Their emotions are too intense to be calmed down by words.
要是处理不好，恐怕它们会再次陷入狂乱。
If we don't handle it well, they might go into a frenzy again.
怎么啦？你以前不是挺能说会道的嘛，到了重要时候，为什么突然变哑巴了呢？
What's wrong? You used to be so articulate, but when it really matters, why don't you say anything?
哎呀，该不会是害怕说错了什么，更加激怒它们的情绪吧？
Is it because you're afraid of saying the wrong thing and making them even angrier?
哼，现在的你可管不着，我偏要说。
Hmm? Don't think you can order me around. I'm not listening.
那时候啊，有个大傻瓜丢下好好的演艺事业不做，非要跑去当什么调饮师，还总是自信满满地和我说——<color=#dbc291ff>「调饮，就是沟通的艺术」。</color>
Back then, there was a fool who gave up her acting career to become a drinksmith, and she always said with confidence that <color=#dbc291ff>"Drinksmith is an art of communication."</color>
既然自认为是调饮师，就用你最擅长的方式来解决问题呗。
Now that you're a drinksmith, why don't you solve the problem the best way you know how?
{NICKNAME}，现在能请再给我调杯饮料吗？
Could you please make me a drink now, {NICKNAME}?
...Time is limited, so I'll be straightforward.
我会撤去对内心的防护，请你用那种神奇的能力，将我的心境彻底展现在所有人面前。
I'll remove the protection for my heart. During this time, please use your powers to let everyone know how I'm really feeling.
这代表我对在场的各位不会再有任何隐瞒，你们将看到——最真实的我。
I won't hide anything anymore. You'll all see the real me... the authentic me.
我会撤去对内心的防护，请你用那种神奇的能力，将我的想法彻底展现在所有人面前。
I'll remove the protection for my heart. During this time, please use your magical ability to let everyone know how I'm really feeling.
可以开始了吗？我做好准备了。
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
没关系，你先去处理吧，不过可别耽搁太久，怪物们等不了那么长时间。
That's fine. Go ahead and do your own business. Just don't keep the monsters waiting too long.
我们不该怀疑你的哇。你为我们付出了这么多……
We shouldn't have doubted you... You've done so much for us...
我最近在酒吧里的时间太少了，很多事也没来得及向你们解释。抱歉。
I'm sorry. I haven't been spending much time at the lounge lately, and I haven't had a chance to explain everything to you guys.
将酒吧暂时托付给{NICKNAME}，是因为听说了家族打算彻底清理梦境酒店。想要阻止他们，我必须重新取得鸢尾花家系的支持。

The reason I entrusted this lounge to {NICKNAME} for now is that I heard about The Family's plan to eliminate all monsters in the hotel in the Dreamscape. To stop them, I need to regain the support of the Iris Family.
调饮…就是对话的过程。但我自己都没能做到。
Mixing drinks... it's like having a conversation, but I couldn't do it well on my own.
舒翁，瞧瞧你现在的样子，当时那股敢和整个鸢尾花家系对抗的气势呢？还记得那天，你兴奋地跑来找我——「艾米绮！捡了只狗，它想跟我回家！」

Look at you now, Siobhan! What happened to that boldness you had when you confronted the entire Iris Family? Remember when you came to me all excited, saying, "Hey, Amiky! I found a dog, and it wants to come home with me!"
既然决定了要经营这家酒吧，就好好负起责任来。
Now that you've decided to run this lounge, take responsibility for it.
艾米绮，我说过要逃避吗？反倒是你，有段时间没见，游说的本事进步不小嘛，总算是比以前成熟了，我很开心。
Did I ever say I was running away, Amiky? Well, you've become quite the lecturer, haven't you? I'm happy to see you've grown more mature.
...Hey, don't try to change the subject!
走吧。我们去会会那群猎犬。
Let's go. We'll go meet those hounds.
又来了两个？别妨碍我们执行任务，不管你是谁，都阻止不了猎犬家系！
Two more? Don't get in our way! Whoever you are, don't think you can stop the Bloodhound Family!
真的不管我们是谁嘛？太执拗可是会吃苦头的。
Oh? You really don't care who we are? Being too reckless will get you into trouble.
别想威吓我，猎犬家系成员的意志坚如钢铁！
Don't threaten me! A Bloodhound Family member's will is resolute as steel!
没有威吓的意思，但或许各位可以给鸢尾花家系一个面子？
I don't mean to intimidate, but perhaps you could do the Iris Family a favor?
这位艾米绮小姐，是梅芙恩家主最宠爱的孩子，如今是梦境里炙手可热的明星，有她作为担保，是不是你们就愿意听听我的话了？
This lady, Amiky, is the favorite daughter of Lady Maeven, head of the Iris Family, and she's now a superstar in the Dreamscape. Are you willing to listen to what I have to say for her sake?
你不也是鸢尾花家系的核心成员嘛，真把自己当路过的调饮师了？
Hey, you talk as if you're not a core member of the Iris Family. Do you really see yourself as just a random drinksmith?
这些怪物没有攻击性，你们看，稍微吓吓就怕成那样，不会对宾客的安全造成威胁。
These monsters aren't aggressive at all. As you can see, a little scare is enough to frighten them. They won't pose a threat to the guests' safety.
更何况，{NICKNAME}最近的行动也证实了，它们的状况能够得到控制。
What's more, {NICKNAME}'s recent actions have proven that they can be controlled.
Those "monsters" are actually more reasonable than you guys.
即使是遭到噩梦侵袭的「惊梦剧团」，依旧能与我们和谐相处。这段时间来到酒吧，对怪物们感兴趣的人们，也会向你们讲述相同的见闻。
Even the Dreamjolt Troupe, corrupted by the Nightmare, can live in harmony with us. Those who are interested in those monsters and have visited the lounge will tell you the same thing.
还不愿相信的话，去打听打听呗？
If you don't believe me, why don't you ask around?
要是有兴趣，我可以拜托家主来找你们聊聊，想必…她的话肯定会更加有说服力吧？
And if you're truly interested, I can ask our family head to speak with you guys, and I'm pretty sure... her words will be more convincing. Don't you think?
你是跟他们过来的「惊梦剧团」？
Are you members of the Dreamjolt Troupe who came here with them?
被当作道具对待，随意使唤的感觉，不太好吧？
It feels terrible to be treated like lifeless objects and bossed around, doesn't it?
可以试着离开，你不需要按照他们的指示去生活。
Well, you always have the choice to leave. You don't have to spend your life obeying their orders.
「惊梦酒吧」永远欢迎新成员的加入。
All new members are welcome at Dreamjolt Hostelry.
怎么回事，带来的怪物都逃走了？
What's happening? The monsters are running away?
…被噩梦影响而发狂了？只凭我们还怎么执行任务啊！
...Are they affected by the Nightmare and going frenzied? How are we supposed to carry out this task without them?
那些怪物没有变得狂乱，只是不愿再听从命令而已。
They didn't become frenzied. They simply just don't want to follow orders anymore.
它们意识到了，在作为工具为家族服务的命运外，还有其余的选择。
They've realized that they have options other than being mere tools for The Family.
还不赶快走？需要我帮你们向猎犬家系请示吗？
Why are you still here? Do you want me to say hi to your boss?
不用了，不用了…我们现在就离开梦境酒店，打扰了……
No... of course not... We'll leave right now. Sorry for the disturbance...
哎，我留在冷清的梦境酒店里，就是为了摆脱家族事务的烦扰，没想到，到最后还得靠在家族的身份才能保住这家酒吧。
Well, I chose to stay in the desolate hotel in the Dreamscape to stay away from Family issues, but in the end, I had to rely on my Family connection to protect this lounge.
所以说嘛，你的理想解决不了任何问题，别那么纯粹了，现实点吧。
That's why your idealism can't solve any problems. So, stop being naive and be more realistic.
另外，答应的我的事…会做到的吧？对吧对吧？
Besides, you will fulfill... what you promised me, right? Right?
放心，我什么时候骗过你？和经纪人签约的事，等酒吧这边都安排好了再谈呗。
Don't worry. Have I ever lied to you? We'll discuss the business once we've taken care of everything in the lounge.
那些坏人说的没错，我们被噩梦侵袭的命运不会改变哇？
Those guys were right. We'll be corrupted by the Nightmare one day, right?
是啊。什么都不会改变，我没有彻底拯救你们的能力。对不起。
Yeah, nothing will change. I can't help get rid of the nightmare completely. I'm sorry.
汪…没有责怪你的意思哇。
Woof... I didn't mean to blame you.
就像人类会生病，「美梦剧团」也会受到负面情绪的影响而陷入狂乱。
Just like humans can get sick, members of the Sweet Dreams Troupe can be affected by negative emotions and become frenzied.
「活着」本来就是永恒变化的过程…没有什么可以一劳永逸。问题总会源源不断地冒出来，而我们也会一刻不停地去解决它们。
Life is a process of constant change... and there's no permanent solution. Problems will always arise, and we'll keep solving them moment by moment.
但是…不管你们发狂多少万次，我都会留在这里，帮你们找回自己。
But... no matter how much you all flip out here, I will stay here and help you find yourselves.
在我看来，你们已经是和我完全相同的生命了。我会永远陪着你们，直到梦境彻底崩塌。
In my eyes, you're no different from me. I'll stay with you forever until the Dreamscape collapses completely.
而且…就算哪天我真的不在了，不是还有愿意把你们当作家人看待的人吗？
And... even if I'm gone one day, there's someone else who's willing to treat you all like family, right?
「惊梦酒吧」恢复了平静，但并非所有事都得到了解决，譬如……
The Dreamjolt Hostelry may have returned to its peace and quiet, but not all matters were resolved. Such as...
——舒翁！这和我们约定的不一样哇。
...Siobhan! This is not what we agreed on!
汪！你说话的方式好像我哇！
Woof! You're starting to talk like me now!
明明说好了，我帮你修复和鸢尾花家系的关系，保住这家酒吧，你答应我要复出，重新回到舞台上，和我共同演出才对！
We agreed that I'd help you restore your relationship with the Iris Family and keep this lounge. In return, you promised me a comeback to the stage and to perform together with me!
怎么、怎么…这张宣传海报上，写的都是怪物们的名字呢？
But why... why are all the monster names listed on this promotional poster?
「金牌荷官黑桃」、「忧郁派戏剧」、「汽水司令」、「淑女与正义」、「钢棍铁皮人」、「哲学王小星星」。
Ace Dealer Spade, Melancholy Dramatist, Soda Bigwig, Lady and Justice, Steel Tin Man, and Starlet the Philosopher King.
哇嘎嘎嘎！小姐，你是瞧不起我们的演出水平嘛？来看我的专场，不会失望的！
Mwahahaha! Are you underestimating our performance skills, dear lady? Come to my show, and you won't be disappointed!
我记得和你约好的是，「惊梦酒吧」的所有者会协助鸢尾花家系的演艺事业，这里是怪物们的酒吧，所以由它们参与演出…有什么问题吗？

What we agreed was that the owners of Dreamjolt Hostelry would assist the Iris Family in their performances. Since this lounge belongs to those monsters, they'll be participating in the show... Is that a problem?
为了拯救濒临闭店的酒吧，人家可是决定成为偶像了呢。
I've even decided to become an idol to save our lounge from closing down.
我和猎犬家系那边打过招呼了，他们决定推迟对梦境酒店的清理工作。就是说，这些怪物不会有危险，「惊梦酒吧」也将继续经营下去。

I've contacted the Bloodhound Family, and they've agreed to postpone the cleanup of the hotel in the Dreamscape. In other words, these monsters will be safe, and Dreamjolt Hostelry will continue to operate.
这段时间辛苦了。要不是有你接替调饮师的工作，我都没时间去处理家族的那些麻烦事。
Thank you for everything. If it weren't for you taking over as the drinksmith, I wouldn't have had time to deal with all the troubles within The Family.
...Thank you. We really appreciate your help.
我一直都觉得玩调饮很开心。
I've had a lot of fun mixing drinks.
就知道你会这么说。什么时候有了兴致，可以随时过来，我们的酒吧永远欢迎你。
I knew you'd say that. Whenever you feel like it, feel free to drop by. You're always welcome here.
好啦。忙碌了那么久，现在去给你自己调杯<color=#dbc291ff>专属饮料</color>吧，就当是留个纪念。
Alright, now go make yourself an <color=#dbc291ff>exclusive drink</color> as a souvenir of your drinksmith career.
——也让我看看，你的内心究竟是什么样的呢？
...And show me what you're really like on the inside.
这杯饮料是只属于你的特调，我会把它列进「惊梦酒吧」的饮品单里，来店的客人都能尝到，最好慎重点哦。
This drink will be made specially for you. I will add it to the Dreamjolt Hostelry's drink menu. Customers will get to taste it, so you better consider your choice carefully.
很有趣的想法。果然，就像加拉赫说的那样，和你的每次接触都能带给我惊喜。
An interesting thought. Looks like Gallagher was right — it's always a surprise with you around.
属于你的这杯特调将长期保留在「惊梦酒吧」的饮品单上，以此纪念我们永远的朋友。
This special drink that belongs to you will be kept on the Dreamjolt Hostelry drink menu, to commemorate those who will forever be our friends.
——欢迎你随时到访，匹诺康尼出色的调饮师！
You're always welcome, amazing drinksmith of Penacony!
注意到你靠近了包裹之后，帕姆兴奋地从别处走了过来。
After noticing that you got close to a package, Pom-Pom excitedly came over from somewhere else.
这不是{NICKNAME}乘客嘛，怎么，对这个包裹感到好奇吗？肯定很好奇帕～
Oh, hey there, {NICKNAME}! What's the matter? Are you interested in this package? I bet you are~
我是节能主义，我不好奇。
I'm all about conserving my body's finite life force, so I ain't curious.
嘴上说着不好奇，但你还是走到了包裹前面帕。
Your lips are saying you're not curious, but your feet have taken you next to the package.
怎么是「鹤运物流」的快递箱？
What's a Heron Express courier package doing here?
你的关注点总能是这么奇怪吗？别在意这么多啦～
Do you always fixate on the strange things? Never mind these trivial details~
{NICKNAME}乘客，你不想看看包裹里面是什么吗？
Don't you want to know what's inside, {NICKNAME}?
这是银河里其他的无名客寄来的礼物，列车之前也有收到帕！大家都行于「开拓」的命途上，即使没有见过面，也是开拓的好伙伴。

This is a gift from another Nameless in the cosmos. The Express had received one before. There're many who walk on the Path of Trailblaze. Even if you've never met them, they're good companions of Trailblaze.
现在列车上的储物室里还放着不少无名客寄来的礼物呢……
The storage room on the Express still holds plenty of gifts sent by many of the Nameless.
对啊，阿基维利虽然不在了，但无名客们继承着「开拓」的意志，他们穿梭于银河间，践行着「开拓」的信念。
That's right. Although Akivili is no longer with us, many Nameless continued to hold onto the will of Trailblaze. They stream across the cosmos to fulfill the creed of Trailblaze.
其中有一些人曾是星穹列车的搭车客，有一些人从未上过列车…不过我保证，他们都是一群有趣的家伙。要是有一天，你也能认识他们就好了帕。
Some of them were once passengers on the Express. Others have never boarded it... But I guarantee you that they're all interesting people. It'll be good if you can meet them one day.
别心急嘛，我们这就打开帕。
Cool your jets. We're opening it now.
你和帕姆拆开了包裹，发现了一个卷轴样式的投影装置。
You and Pom-Pom open the package and discover a projection device in the style of a scroll.
嗨！这次见到的是…啊！星穹列车的列车长帕姆，好久不见，以及这位是…？
Hey! This must be... Conductor Pom-Pom of the Express. It has been a while. And this is...?
I am {NICKNAME} from the Express Crew.
欸，你就是大名鼎鼎的开拓者{NICKNAME}？
Ah, you must be {NICKNAME}, the famous Trailblazer, yes?
银河球棒侠，是很有名的意思？抱歉，我不是你们这个年代的人。
Does being the Galactic Baseballer mean you're really famous? Sorry, I'm not part of your generation.
{F#她}{M#他}是{NICKNAME}，是列车组的新加入的成员。
This is {NICKNAME}, a new member of the Express Crew.
好丑的新年贺卡，还是退货吧！
What an ugly New Year card. I want to return it!
等等，别退别退，我不是新年贺卡，再说了…现在是哪个世界的新年吗？
Wait! Don't. I'm not a New Year card. And for that matter... what world is celebrating New Year right now?
{F#她}{M#他}是{NICKNAME}，是列车组的新加入的成员。
This is {NICKNAME}, a new member of the Express Crew.
我是前无名客•玛姬，从银河遥远的过去向你发来最新的问候！
I'm Mag, a former Nameless. I bid you the latest greetings from the distant cosmic past!
很高兴认识你，{NICKNAME}，看来你…就是列车长选中的无名客了？
A pleasure to meet you, {NICKNAME}. Looks like... you are a Nameless that was chosen by the conductor of the Express.
帕姆你是不是有事瞒着我？
Pom-Pom, is there something you've been hiding?
我可没有！这是一件好事，我觉得很适合{NICKNAME}乘客。
I didn't! This is a good thing, I think it really suits {NICKNAME}.
还以为是礼物呢，结果又是活…
I expected a gift, but it looks like another job...
这既是礼物，也是开拓的使命。
This is both the gift and the duty of Trailblaze.
看来列车长没有告诉你要做什么呢，你尽管问，我会回答的。
Looks like the conductor hasn't told you what you're supposed to do. Well, ask away. I'll answer your questions.
是的，要是按琥珀纪年法来说，我应该是<unbreak>2150</unbreak>纪的人？距离现在有好几个琥珀纪了，我早就已经去世了，所以我说自己是前无名客…没有说错吧？

Yes. If we are talking about Amber Eras, I should be from AE <unbreak>2150</unbreak>, I believe? It's several Amber Eras away. I've been dead for a long time, so that's why I say I'm a former Nameless... I think I'm right, aren't I?
You're someone from hundreds of years ago?
The cosmos moves in mysterious ways!
所以是谁在和我说话呢？
So who am I talking to?
你肯定有过和什么「回响」、「模因」之类的存在聊过天吧。我现在大概是这样的存在。
I bet you've probably talked with something like a resonance or a memetic entity before. That's pretty much what I am.
关于我的事，之后再问吧。
Let's talk about me later, okay?
能问问，这有什么好处吗？
Can I ask what's in it for me?
你这种不肯吃亏的样子，让我想起了一些老朋友。
That face you're making reminds me of some old friends. They were reluctant to work for no pay, too.
你作为列车组有去过什么寒冷的地方吗？或者是极端炎热的地方？
As part of the Crew, have you ever been somewhere bitingly cold or blazingly hot?
我听说过雅利洛-Ⅵ，那不是一个宜居的星球吗？
I've heard of Jarilo-VI. But isn't it supposed to be quite a hospitable planet, no?
现在已经变成白雪皑皑的世界了。
It has become a world blanketed in snow.
我去过非常寒冷的地方。
I've been to some extremely cold places.
Then this will be easy to explain.
我们能携手为「开拓」献上*微不足道*的祝福——它可以为寒风中的无名客带来一丝温暖，也可以为行于酷暑土地上的无名客带去一丝微风……
We could offer an insignificant blessing for the Trailblaze — we can give the Nameless just a bit of warmth in the winter wind, or a cool breeze in places of excruciating heat...
即便行于坦途之上，无名客也能收获一丝不易察觉的好运气…这就是我能给你、给其他无名客们带来的好处。
Even on a smooth ride, the Nameless can gain and use some almost imperceptible luck... That is the benefit that I can bring to you and the other Nameless.
透过你的眼睛，我看到了历史上那些伟大的「无名客」，你一定会回应我的。
Looking into your eyes, I can see the incredible Nameless throughout history. I think you'll accept my offer for sure.
在我的那个年代，「万界之癌」到处扩散，银轨阻塞，极端的气候变化也层出不穷…「开拓」一直都不是件容易的事，在星神阿基维利陨落之后更是如此。

In my time, the Cancer of All Worlds was spreading everywhere. The silver rail was blocked, and extreme climate alterations raged to no end... Trailblaze has never been an easy task, and after the fall of the Aeon Akivili, that was more true than ever.
为了共同的目标「开拓」，不同世界的无名客们都站了出来——有人不断深入未知的星域，有人传唱无名客的故事，都是为了让「开拓」更强大一些。

To complete our shared goal of Trailblaze, the Nameless on different worlds all rose up. Some continued to go out and explore unknown segmenta and others shared the story of the Nameless through songs. Everything they did was to make Trailblaze a little stronger.
而我的方法，则是收集无名客的「开拓经历」。
The way I help is by collecting the trailblazing experiences of the Nameless.
在我这里，封存着名为「遥祝启程」的力量——它向无名客们收集「开拓经历」，收集冒险中的好运，为遥远的无名客献上启程的祝福。

This power of the Graced Voyager is sealed with me — it collects trailblaze experiences from the Nameless, collects the luck accrued in their adventures, and offers blessings for the journeys of distant Nameless.
我会效仿忆庭提取忆质的做法，用你熟悉的情景，熟悉的伙伴，构建起你熟悉的「开拓经历」…以一种更加柔和、更加亲切的方式…

I'll mimic the memoria extraction process used by the Garden of Recollection and construct a familiar trailblazing experience using situations and companions you're familiar with... I'll use a kinder and gentler approach...
在这里，你会再次体会「探索」、「了解」、「建立」、「连结」…
You will experience the process of exploring, understanding, creating, and connecting once again here...
你所经历的…一切，都化为开拓的…助力……
Everything you have experienced... will help support... Trailblaze...
具体做法嘛…解释起来会非常抽象，你直接上手试一次就明白了。
As for specifics... Well, the explanation can get a little abstract. I think if you try it out for yourself, you'll get it.
从银河遥远的过去向你发来最新的问候！无名客•{NICKNAME}，准备好进入「银河强手棋」了吗？
I send you the latest greetings from the distant cosmic past! Nameless {NICKNAME}, are you ready to enter Cosmodyssey?
开始「银河强手棋」的冒险。
想了解一下「银河强手棋」…
I wish to learn more about Cosmodyssey...
I'll tell you everything I know.
我这开拓经历真的有用吗？
Will my trailblaze experiences really be useful?
有用的，它是无名客开拓过程中最重要的收获。
Absolutely. That experience is the most valuable thing a Nameless will gain in the trailblazing process.
相信我，即便没有「遥祝启程」，开拓经历依然是无名客最重要的宝物。
Trust me, even without the Graced Voyager, trailblaze experiences are still the most precious treasure of all Nameless.
曾有无名客建起石桥，后来它毁于潮汐；曾有无名客寻得古城，后来它毁于沙风…物质世界总是在不停变化，而你收获的经历历久弥坚。

A Nameless once built a stone bridge that eventually was destroyed by the tide. There was once a Nameless who sought an ancient city that had later been decimated by a sandstorm... The material world is forever in a state of change, but the experiences you gain will always endure.
请放轻松，将「银河强手棋」当作是美好的体验。它会收集你迄今为止的开拓经历，而它真正想告诉你的是——你以后还会有更多这样激动人心的冒险！

Please relax, and treat Cosmodyssey as a wonderful experience. It will record all of your trailblaze experiences up until this point, but what it actually wants to show is that you will have even more heart-stirring adventures like these in the future!
我感觉真的是在玩强手棋…
This really feels like playing Cosmodyssey...
你说的没错。「遥祝启程」的呈现形式与我的诠释方式是有关系的。
You're right. The way how the Graced Voyager is presented does relate to my interpretive method.
你一路走来，不断前进，不断发生意外，不断做出选择…这跟「强手棋」很相似，在我的诠释下，「遥祝启程」就变成了这样。

On your journey, you have continued to press forward, encountered unexpected moments, and made countless choices... It's much like Cosmodyssey. Through my interpretation, the Graced Voyager has turned out this way.
在此，请让我问一句，它…还算好玩吧？
Let me ask you a question... Are you having fun?
欸，我还以为已经很有意思了。
Eh, and here I thought it was already pretty interesting.
不过嘛，你在「银河强手棋」中所经历的一切冒险，都来自你自己的经历…你肯定已经见到不少的老朋友了吧？
But, all the adventures that you experience in Cosmodyssey originate from your own trials... You must have seen many of your old friends, no?
感觉帕姆是不是有点多？
It seems like Pom-Pom comes up a bit often?
这是我的私心，你不觉得列车长很可爱吗?
That's just my personal preference. Don't you think the conductor is cute?
这些事现实中到底发生过吗？
So, did these things all really happen?
...Who knows? I'm not sure myself to be honest.
为了帮助你们这些无名客回想起开拓经历，我可是费了不少脑筋。
I put a lot of thought into how I could help you Nameless remember your trailblazing experiences.
Cosmodyssey is such a slapdash name...
我以为这个名字取得挺好的……
I think the name is pretty good...
在我们那个时代，我经常和其他搭车客坐在一起玩「强手棋」，他们在这小小棋盘上试试运气，以便下车时能够带着好运启程。
In our time, I used to play Cosmodyssey with other passengers. They tried their luck on this small board, so they could bring their good luck with them when they disembarked.
「银河强手棋」便是我对「遥祝启程」的想象——每一位无名客都需要这样的「好运」，所以我将这个形式从过去带到了未来。
Cosmodyssey is how I imagine the Graced Voyager to be — each Nameless needs such luck, and so I have brought this form from the past to the future.
你与银河中无数无名客分享的开拓经历，都将成为未来无名客启程时的祝福。
The trailblazing experiences that you and Nameless across the stars share will become a blessing for future Nameless as they start their journeys.
——还有比这更棒的「银河强手棋」吗？
...There's a better version of Cosmodyssey than this?
That's all I wanted to ask.
I want to know more about you...
You really went right for it, huh?
我倒是认识一些长生的无名客，他们可能还活着吧…我肯定已经没了，没了没了没了，毕竟我又不是什么长生种嘛。
I've met some long-living Nameless in my day. Maybe they're still alive... I'm certain that I've already died. Dead, gone, kaput. I'm not from a long-life species after all.
Have you become a memetic entity, Mag?
非要说的话，应该是玛姬留在「遥祝启程」中的开拓意志吧。
If I had to say, it'd probably be the trailblazing will that was left behind in the Graced Voyager by Mag.
「开拓」就像是发令枪一样，等我听到「开拓」一声令下时，自己早就已经行动起来了。相信我，你也会明白那种感受。
Trailblaze is like the sound of the starting pistol. Once I hear the word "Trailblaze," I am already on the move. Trust me, you'll feel that way too someday.
虽然这份「意志」没有形体，却能将「遥祝启程」带往未来；而你，能将「开拓经历」转化为开拓的祝福…我们都有各自的使命。

Although my will is formless, it can lead the Graced Voyager to the future. As for you, you'll be able to take the trailblazing experience and turn it into Trailblaze's blessing... We all have our duties.
我做到了我能做的，接下来就要多拜托你啦～
I've done all I can do. The rest is up to you~
听起来，你之前来过列车？
It sounds like you've been on the Express before?
嘿嘿，在你成为列车组成员之前，在姬子成为领航员之前…在很久很久以前，列车上还有着彼时的列车组…那个时候，我曾登上过星穹列车。
Hehe, before you became a member of the Crew, before even Himeko became a Navigator... A long time ago, the Express had another Crew... I was aboard once during that period.
在那之后…想不起来是什么时候了，「银河强手棋」也有好几次被寄到列车上了…没错，我可是你的列车前辈哟。
After that... I don't remember when, but the Cosmodyssey was also couriered to the Express a couple of times... That's right, I'm your senior on this Express.
That's all I wanted to ask.
I've got other things to do.
——真是太棒了，不愧是列车长亲自推荐的无名客•{NICKNAME}。
Fantastic. Just what I'd expect from Nameless {NICKNAME}, someone highly recommended by the conductor.
至此，你已经光荣地完成了一名无名客的使命！恭喜你，同时我也很感谢你。
And with that, you have gloriously completed the mission of a Nameless! I would like to take this opportunity to both congratulate and thank you!
在这段期间，你所付出的一切，或多或少，都会为那些即将踏上旅途的无名客献上一份助力…即便是最遥远的未来，新启程的无名客也会收到你的祝福。

Every effort you have put in during this time, no matter how big or how small, will become a source of strength for all the Nameless who are about to start their journeys... Even in the distant future, new Nameless who begin their adventure will be recipients of your blessing.
Why'd you get so formal all of a sudden?
要是一直跟你开玩笑，你要怎么才知道自己完成了什么惊人壮举嘛～
If I am always joking around with you, how would you know that you accomplished something incredible?
我能否对开拓祝福进行收费？
Can I charge a fee for this Trailblaze Blessing?
不行不行！你真是在任何时候都能开玩笑啊……
You gotta be kidding me! You really can crack a joke at the drop of a hat...
现在，这是我最后一个请求了——
I will now give you my final request —
等等…在我请求之前，你难道不想问问，到底是谁把包裹寄到列车的吗？
Wait... Before I do that, don't you want to ask who sent the package to the Express?
当然不是我啦！我能做到的事很有限。
Of course not! I'm very limited in what I can do.
这个时候就稍微假装好奇一下嘛～
How about you just feign you care a bit this time, okay?
其实包裹是从一位无名客手中寄出的，而那位无名客手里的包裹是由更早的无名客寄出的…无数的「无名客前辈」、以及无数次传递，它才来到了你的手里。
The package was sent by a Nameless, and that Nameless received it from another one from long before... Countless generations of Nameless have passed this package down, and now it has reached you.
这是属于无名客的传承，所以你明白我的请求了吗？
This is a legacy that belongs to the Nameless, so you probably know what my request is, right?
你想让我把「银河强手棋」寄出。
You want me to mail Cosmodyssey out.
Absolutely. You picked up on that right away.
哦，列车的储物室还蛮大的。
Oh, the storage room on the Express is pretty big.
没错没错，姬子的咖啡也蛮好喝的…喂！你是故意等我吐槽吗？
That's right. Himeko's coffee is also quite good... Hey! Are you waiting for me to spell it out for you on purpose?
我的请求是让你把「银河强手棋」再次寄出去。
I would ask that you mail Cosmodyssey out again.
我的目标是，从银河遥远的过去向更多无名客发去最新的问候！
My objective is to send the latest regards to more Nameless from the distant cosmic past!
现在，你已经是一名成熟的无名客前辈了，将这份启程的「好运」传递下去吧！
Now, you are a veteran Nameless. Spread the luck of this departure!
我就知道你会和历史上那些最出名的无名客做出一样的选择。
I knew that you'd make the same choice as all the greatest Nameless throughout history.
没想到我就要成为前辈了。
I didn't realize I'm about to become a seasoned veteran.
没错，你已经成为那些满怀希望的「新无名客」们的前辈了。
That's right. You are now a veteran to all of the new Nameless brimming with hope.
无论你将去向何方，也许你会一直留在列车上，也许你会走下列车…我不知道。
No matter what where you go, maybe you'll remain on the Express, maybe you'll get off... I don't know.
但是可以肯定的是，后来踏上旅程的人们一定会想起你，当他们遇上寒风时，他们会想起这一丝温暖；当他们遇上酷暑时，他们会想起这一丝凉爽……

But what I am sure of is this, the people who join this journey later will certainly think of you. When they encounter chilling winds, they will remember your warmth. When they endure brutal heat, they'll think of your cool breeze...
当他们遇上困难时，他们会想起那些伟大的开拓经历…嘿，别忘记了，那里就包括你！
When they encounter trouble, they will think of all the incredible trailblazing experiences from before... Heh, and don't forget that includes yours!
随后，「银河强手棋」被顺利寄出，寄向了未来的无名客。
And so, the Cosmodyssey was sent out, delivered to the future Nameless.
「从银河遥远的过去向你发来最新的问候！」
"I send you the latest greetings from the distant cosmic past!"
(Why is the package still on the table?)
（刚才上了那么多情绪、那么多价值，最后却没有寄出去？）
(After I poured so much emotion and value into it, the package still didn't end up getting sent out?)
（…不对，这好像不是「银河强手棋」？）
(...No wait, this doesn't look like Cosmodyssey?)
你打开包裹后，看到了玛姬的留言。
You open the package and see Mag's message.
「我看你玩得挺开心的，担心你意犹未尽，所以我特意给你留了一个『银河强手棋（没有奖励版）』，喜欢就接着玩吧！——无名客•玛姬」

"You seemed to be having a blast, and I was kinda worried that you couldn't get enough of it, so I left you a Cosmodyssey (that doesn't have prizes). Keep playing on if you like it! — Mag the Nameless"
似乎还有一些不认识的人……
Looks like there are still some unfamiliar faces...
…「遥祝启程」的未知还是有些太多了。
...There is still so much unknown about the Graced Voyager.
这是玛姬寄给你的「银河强手棋（没有奖励版）」。它果真没有奖励吗？也许只是玛姬希望你玩桌游时别有太多的负担——喜欢就玩，累了就休息！

This is prizeless version of Cosmodyssey that Mag mailed to you. Does it really have no rewards? Maybe Mag hoped that you could play a board game without any stakes — play it if you like it, take a break if you're tired!
开始「银河强手棋」的冒险。
I've got something else going on.
初次见面，你比我想象的要年轻不少。
Pleased to meet you. You are much younger than I thought.
不过闲聊的部分先放到后面，我来为你简单捋一捋现场的状况。
But I shall leave the banter for later. I have come to explain the circumstances on the ground in simple terms.
「秩序」的残党一事，作为亲历者的你想必已经很清楚了，选择你来协助搜查，也有保密的考虑。

I'm sure that you, as one of those who are involved in the incident, are highly aware of the situation regarding the Order's remnants. The decision to have you assist in the search also took confidentiality issues into consideration.
星期日是落网了，但梦主苦心经营多年，培养的叛徒自然不可能只有他一个。
Sunday has indeed been caught. However, as the Dreammaster had toiled for so many years, he must have nurtured more than one traitor.
你能想到吗？这么多年，猎犬掘地三尺都抓不到的叛徒，他们的藏身之地，居然就在这个大剧院，就在我背后的那幅画里。

Can you even imagine this? The Hounds have been searching for these traitors all these years, never finding a trace of their whereabouts — And yet they were hiding right in this Grand Theater! In the painting right behind me!
This is why the spot underneath the lamp is always the darkest.
A superb move. I'll remember it.
过了太久安稳日子，心态也变得怠惰，因为大剧院在匹诺康尼的地位，就理所当然地认为叛徒不可能在这儿，这都是我们失察的过错。

After enjoying an extended period of peace, our attitudes have indeed grown indolent. We thought the traitor would never be in the Grand Theater because of the building's status in Penacony. This error is a result of our own ignorance.
叛徒们躲的躲，跑的跑，但匆忙逃窜间一定难以顾及全局。
The traitors all hid or ran, but it must have been difficult for them to clean up the scene in the rush.
他们布下重重机关，把画里的房间变成迷宫，就是为了阻碍我们的搜查——反过来想，房间里必然还藏着大量的赃物。
They set many traps, turning the room in the painting into a maze to impede our search. Come to think of it, there must still be plenty of stolen loot in the room.
现在有了你的帮助，叛徒的伎俩再厉害，也挡不住猎犬的脚步。让我们去到画里，为匹诺康尼伸张正义！
Now, with your help, those traitors won't be able to stop the Hounds no matter how crafty they are. Let's step into the painting and carry out justice for Penacony!
这些东西上沾染的记忆，我记得他！
I remember him... I remember these memories these things are tainted with!
二十年前，他还是折纸大学的教授，直到有一天他走进图书馆，借走一批只允许内部学者翻阅的历史文献，从此消失不见。

He was a professor at the Paperfold University twenty years ago. Then, one day he walked into the library and borrowed a collection of historical documents only available to internal staff, then vanished without a trace.
我们一度以为，他是混入家族的虚构史学家。现在看来，他想要藏起来的，原来是审判「秩序」残党的这份文书报告。
We once thought he was a History Fictionologist who infiltrated The Family, but now it seems like he wanted to hide this report regarding the trial of the Order's remnants.
从现在的视角来看，并没有。
毕竟…那场审判的见证者有不少还活蹦乱跳地活着。
After all... many witnesses of the trial are still alive.
既然他都在这儿，画里绝对还有更大的收获，咱们再回去一趟吧。
If even someone like him is here, then there will definitely be more rewarding items inside the painting. Let's go back again.
负责处理白日梦酒店事务的高级管家，几个琥珀纪来兢兢业业的家族心腹——他的手里，可掌握了不少重要客户的信息。
The senior butler overseeing The Reverie's affairs, and trusted members of The Family who have been serving faithfully for many Amber Eras — He's got information on lots of important clients.
就在不久前，这人宣称要去匹诺康尼外找个安静世界来休假，然后就不见了踪影。
He announced that he was leaving Penacony to find a peaceful world for a holiday a while ago, then disappeared.
没想到，是躲在这儿等着「秩序」为他们创造天堂。
Who knew that he was hiding here and waiting for the Order to create Paradise for them?
里面应该藏着不少大鱼，真好奇他们看到这份名单时的表情。
A few big fish have gotta be in there. I wonder what their faces would look like when they see this list.
这么重要的东西也不带走？
He didn't take such an important item with him?
自己都要被抓了，别人的死活也就没那么重要了。
He was on the edge of getting caught himself, so the fate of others naturally seemed less important than before.
被「秩序」压抑了欲望，躲得再久也不会有「闷」这种情感的。
With the Order suppressing your desires, a human won't feel "bored" no matter how long they spend holed up in hiding.
以筑梦师的工作效率来估算，他们在逃亡时匆忙改造的房间，最多只会出现三个空间叠层。
Going by the efficiency of the Dreamweavers, there can only be a max of three spacial overlays in a room that they modified while on the run.
为了以防万一，咱们最后再回画里搜索一趟。
Just to be sure, let's go make a final round in the painting.
让我们见识见识，到底是什么宝贝，能藏得这么深？
Let's see... just what kind of treasure would get tucked away so deep?
一张…照片？这不是我吗？可为什么——我好像知道照片的主人是谁了。
A... photograph? Isn't this me? But why — I think I know who the owner of the photograph is.
该死，该死！不是说在讨伐迷因的时候牺牲了吗？为什么会丢下我和妈出现在这里？
Darn it! Darn it! Didn't you die during the expedition against the memes? Isn't that the reason why you abandoned me and Ma?
有什么苦衷值得他背叛家族！背叛神主！
What kind of reason would get him to betray The Family!? Betray the Great One!?
谁知道呢？在我的记忆里，他一直是个温柔的好老爸。
Who'd have known? In my memory, he was always a great and gentle father.
一个肉体已经死掉，但意识还活在梦里的罪人。
A criminal whose body's long moved on but his mind's still kicking in the dream.
我要亲手抓住他，哪怕他现在只是一段支离破碎的记忆，一个残存的梦泡。
I'll catch him with my own hands, even if he's just a shattered memory or a fragment of a dream bubble.
到底发生了什么？他必须给我一个满意的答案，这是他的责任。
What exactly happened? He has to give me an acceptable explanation. It's his responsibility.
感谢你的协助，原本想找你要个签名的，但现在有更重要的事情需要我去做，在他逃掉以前。
Thank you for your help. I actually wanted your autograph, but now there's something more important that I must do... I need to do it before he manages to escape.
这是你的酬劳，大英雄，期待和你的下一次合作。
Here are your rewards, great hero. I look forward to working with you again.
千万不要放松警惕，危险随时都可能出现。
Stay vigilant. Danger lurks in every corner.
我们已经有好几个弟兄折在这个迷宫了。
We've already lost a few of our brethren to this maze.
用这么奢华的箱子来装东西，可真有他们的。
Using such a luxurious chest to store stuff... they are really quite something.
究竟心里想的是秩序，还是自己的利益呢？
Were they thinking of Order... or self-interest?
呼，多亏有你在，否则我真要被他们抬出来不可。
*sigh* Thank goodness you're here, or else they might have had to carry me out in a board.
趁我还走得动，咱们赶快到外面看看，这群叛徒都藏了些什么。
While I still can walk, let's hurry outside and see what else the traitors are hiding.
太兴奋把这茬给忘了，不该这么快回来的。
I was so excited that I forgot about this. We shouldn't have returned so quickly.
我现在感觉整个世界都在旋转。
I feel like the whole world is spinning.
这堆赃物可真沉啊，难怪没被带上一起跑。
These filthy loots weigh a ton. It's no wonder they left them behind during their escape.
我有预感，里面绝对有什么了不得的东西，咱们快出去看看吧。
I've got a feeling that there's probably something incredible in here. Let's head out and look it all over.
果然，以迷宫的改造程度看，叛徒里还藏着几位非常老练的筑梦师。
As expected — with how extensively they've modified the maze, those traitors must have some seriously seasoned Dreamweavers on their team.
被猎犬扣押在大剧院里的那几位，待会儿得好好审审。
We'll have to interrogate those few that the Hounds have got detained at the Grand Theater.
专门放得这么正式，生怕别人不知道东西藏在哪儿。
It's positioned so formally, almost as if they're afraid nobody will discover it's hidden there.
要是我，就把重要的东西全砌到地板下面。
If it were up to me, I would have hidden everything of value underneath the floor.
不愧是拯救了匹诺康尼的大英雄，没有你，这些赃物就得永远藏在画里了。
You're indeed the hero who saved Penacony. Without you, these loots would have been hidden in the painting forever.
我们回去吧，这迷宫搞得我脑子都快炸了，也不知道能不能算工伤。
Let's head back. This maze is giving me a splitting headache. I wonder if I can consider this an occupational hazard.
哈哈哈！哈努兄弟，你现在变得又小又孤独，小镇马上就要成为我的囊中之物了！
Hahaha! Brother Hanu, you're small and lonely now. Soon the whole town will be under my control!
你现在赶快出来，学小狗汪汪求饶，我就饶你一命——不然就等着被我一口吃掉吧！
Come out now and whimper at my feet like a pathetic dog, and I'll spare your life! Else, I'll swallow you whole!
哦，瞧瞧我最强大的好伙计——刀枪不入的「钢铁鳄鱼」！
Oh behold! My strongest buddy — the invulnerable Steely Gator!
为了打造它，我耗费了家里所有的石头，你那弱小的哈努飞弹对它一点用处都没有！
I used all the stone in my house to create it. Your feeble Hanu Rocket stands no chance against its tenacity!
哈哈，我早就说过了，你的飞弹对它没有用处，不要再挣扎了！
Haha, I told you so ages ago! Your weak missile is useless against it. Stop struggling!
哦——你拿到了火箭筒，但这次没有用了，钢铁鳄鱼是无敌的。
Oh — seems like you've gotten your hands on the rocket launcher, but it's useless this time. The Steely Gator is invincible!
哈哈哈，除了<color=#dbc291ff>猫头鹰老师制造的烟花</color>，没有东西能伤到它！
Hahaha, other than the <color=#dbc291ff>fireworks created by Professor Owl</color>, nothing can so much as scratch it!
天呐，我的钢铁鳄鱼！是我这张关不上的嘴巴害了你！
Oh dear! My Steely Gator! It's my yapping mouth that got you into trouble!
该死的哈努兄弟，别以为这就结束了，钢铁鳄鱼没你想得那么简单！
Darn it, Brother Hanu! This isn't over! The Steely Gator will be back for more!
上啊，钢铁鳄鱼，给我狠狠咬哈努兄弟的屁股！
Go forth, Steely Gator! Go bite Brother Hanu's butt!
该死的哈努兄弟，愿所有的石头都诅咒你，让你永远都这么渺小，这么孤独！
Darn you, Brother Hanu! I hope all the stones curse your name, so that you will be small and lonely for the rest of your life!
我不会放弃的，我的家里还有好多好多石头，还有好多好多鳄鱼……
I'll never give up. I still have plenty of stones and crocodiles back at home...
而你！你没法保护这里一辈子，你已经失去了力量，失去了朋友，你还会失去更多！更多！
But you! You won't be able to defend this place forever. You've lost your powers and your pals. Mark my words, you're gonna lose even more! More!
猫头鹰老师准备的烟花耗尽了，这样是无法击败钢铁鳄鱼的……
The fireworks prepared by Professor Owl are all used up. We can't beat Steely Gator this way...
Ah! Steely Gator, are you alright?
不要倒下，想想我们的友谊、羁绊，还有你的工资！
Don't fall yet. Think of our friendship, our history... and your wages!
哦呦，这不是我们尊贵的名誉游客吗？终于等到你了。
Huh. If it isn't our esteemed guest. I finally found you.
说真的，看了您的作品，《狼之道》剧组那边都自愧不如了——他们领着工资都创作不出这么精彩的内容！
I gotta say, after seeing your work, the production crew of the Way of the Wolf had to admit they couldn't compete with the pulse-pounding content you made even as paid employees!
剧组把近期的工作重心放到了构建更有趣的外传拍摄体验工程上，为你们这些有爱又有才华的游客提供更多发挥空间！
The crew has been putting their focus on filming more interesting extra stories, with hopes of giving devoted and talented guests like yourself more room for expression!
Haha, I knew you'd like it!
You want me to keep working for free?
诶，话不能这么说，这叫「用户生成内容」，我们是在贩卖一种创作体验！
Don't put it that way. Think of it as "user-generated content." We're selling a creative experience!
好了，快去试试看吧，这次的故事已经步入高潮…与「石头老板」的战斗绝对很刺激！
Alright, go try it out. This story is reaching its climax... the battle against Boss Stone is absolutely thrilling!
My brain hurts... Kinda wanna get off work already...
感觉自己已经变成苏乐达的形状了……
Feel like I'm already turning into the shape of SoulGlad...
呜呜…终于有人和我说话了……
*sob*... Someone is finally speaking to me...
You can't get off work yet!
吓我一跳，你讲话的样子怎么跟艾迪恩先生一模一样……
Gosh, you scared me! Why do you sound so much like Mr. Aideen...
咳咳，亲爱的朋友，我在这里等一个有缘人。
*cough* My dear friend, I'm waiting for a fated one.
一看到您，我就好像鱼看到了水，鸟儿看见了天空，蜜蜂看到了花朵，顿时感到了生活充满希望，工作充满干劲…如果我猜的没错——

Ever since I set eyes on you, it's like I'm a fish finding water, a bird taking flight, and a bee savoring nectar. It's as if my life had been bathed in light and hope, fueling my drive to excel at what I do... If I'm not mistaken...
您一定是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
You strike me as a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!
You're so good at buttering up. Keep going!
台词上只写了这么多呀……
But the script only has so much...
It's so embarrassing. Lower your voice!
Did SoulGlad get into your brain?
啊啊啊…怎么说，好像的确是这样……
Aahhh... What should I say... I think that's indeed what happened...
说吧，准备给我推销什么？
Spill it. What do you want to sell to me?
您果然是一位极具谋略与智慧的选手！
As expected, you're indeed a contestant with immense intellect and astuteness!
Ahem, it's time to get to the main point.
传说中，热砂会场的建造者在不为人知的地方藏了宝物，等待着像您这样优秀的选手去发现。
Legends speak of how Scorchsand Hall's builders concealed a treasure within its walls, awaiting discovery by an exceptional contestant like yourself.
听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.
想要知道更多的线索，您可以去会场寻找我的同伴，他们会给你指引方向！

I'm not going anywhere. If you find that I'm lying to you, you come back and find me anytime!
