如果传说中的苏萨先生真是这样的人，那可比苏乐达广告里的同谐圣人要有趣多了。
If the Mr. Sousa of legends really was like that, then he was far more interesting than the saint of Harmony the SoulGlad ads portrayed him as.
苏萨先生是苏乐达的创始人，据苏乐达企业所说，是他在监狱中发明了美味的苏乐达，用甜美安抚犯人们的痛苦。
Mr. Sousa was the founder of SoulGlad who, according to SoulGlad Enterprise's statements, invented the refreshing taste of SoulGlad while in prison to sweeten the bitter pain of the prisoners.
但后来他遭到公司迫害，被打入大牢，制作苏乐达的「梦见草」也被灭绝——直到艾迪恩先生来到匹诺康尼，才在梦中重新复原了这种口味。
But he was persecuted by the IPC and locked up, with the Dreamleaf used for SoulGlad made extinct as well... that is until Mr. Aideen came to Penacony and restored the flavor inside a dream.
这个故事想想就有点不对劲，但真相是什么，估计除了「钟表匠」也没人会知道了……
There's something not quite right about this story. Whatever the truth is, anyway, I suspect no one will ever get to know besides Watchmaker...
咕噜噜是汽水先生的口癖啊，就跟钟表小子的「滴答」和哈努兄弟的「哼」一样，我学的不像吗？
Gurgling is Mr. Soda's catchphrase, just like Clockie's "Tick-tock" and Brother Hanu's "Hmph." Did I get that right?
这是个人物设定的小技巧，只要有个性的口癖，观众就会对他有更深的印象，甚至成为一种文化符号！
It's a small trick when designing a character to drop a catchphrase in there. The audience gets a deeper impression of them and it sometimes even can leave a cultural legacy!
再见，咕噜噜，祝导演拍摄顺利！
So long, *gurgle*. All the best with the film shoot, director!
再见，咕噜噜，祝导演拍摄顺利！
So long, *gurgle*. All the best with the film shoot, director!
唉，该死的工作，该死的石头老板！
Tsk, curse this job and curse Boss Stone!
戴着鳄鱼头套的家伙正在生闷气，没有注意到你的存在…找点能让他平复心情的消息吧。
The guy in the crocodile hoodie is sulking and doesn't seem to have noticed you... Come up with something to calm him down.
唉，该死的工作，该死的石头老板！
Tsk, curse this job and curse Boss Stone!
石头老板外传的广告上映了。
The trailer for Boss Stone's extra story has been released.
天啊，噩耗来得如此突然，克劳克影业不如要了我的命吧！
No way, such terrible news and so soon. Clock Studios may as well just take my life and be done with me!
如果石头老板是一个强大冷酷的机器人，我也就不用发愁了，那样的反派随便就能吸引一大批粉丝…但他是一只又蠢又坏的肥鳄鱼！连气球周边都卖不出去！

If Boss Stone were a powerful and clinical robot, I wouldn't be so worried. That kind of bad guy would bring in a stack of fans... But him, he's just a stupid fat crocodile! You can't even sell crocodile balloons as merch!
抛开人气不谈，他的故事我也不知道该怎么写。石头老板是美梦小镇的敌人，也就是匹诺康尼的敌人——但你看看这亲仁善邻的盛会之星，谁会视此处为敌呢？

Putting aside his popularity for now, I have no idea how to write his story. Boss Stone is the villain of Dreamville and, therefore, is the enemy of Penacony... But just look at this harmonious and friendly Planet of Festivities. Who could ever view this place as the enemy?
哦，很有可能！当年匹诺康尼就是公司手底下的监狱，这和美梦小镇过去是「噩梦小镇」的故事一模一样。
Oh, it's possible alright! Back then, Penacony was an IPC prison, just as Dreamville used to be known as Nightmareville.
不过现在的公司跟匹诺康尼关系也不差，「钟表匠」先生怎么还惦记着几千年前的旧仇，真是小心眼……
But the IPC has a good relationship with Penacony now, so I don't know what Mr. Watchmaker is going to worry about a grudge from a thousand years ago. That'd be super petty...
哎哟，我的老天，大导演，这种话可不敢乱说！
Oh, my word! Director! Please! Can you not say such crazy things?
不过…咱家老板确实跟家族不怎么对付，说不定还真有可能……妈呀，我真不敢细想了。
However... our boss really doesn't get on with The Family well at all, so maybe actually... *shivers* I can't bring myself to think seriously about it.
啊？不能吧，我听说星穹列车上的无名客都是乐善好义的好人，怎么会是无恶不作的石头老板呢？
Ah? No way, I heard those Nameless aboard the Astral Express are all good folks with hearts of gold. No way they could be someone as unfathomably evil as Boss Stone?
不过听说最近梦里有个喜欢搞事的无名客，招惹猎犬家系、骚扰王下一桶、乱摸皮皮西的绒球——倒也像是石头老板的作风。

However, I did hear about one Nameless who likes messing around in the Dreamscapes. Getting tangled up with the Bloodhound Family, harassing the Lordly Trashcan, even randomly stroking Pepeshis' fluff balls... That kind of style doesn't seem too dissimilar to Boss Stone.
但不管他是啥，我都对这只鳄鱼一无所知——亲爱的导演，要不你来帮我想点好点子吧！
But no matter who that person is, I know absolutely nothing about this crocodile — so could you help me riff some good ideas please, Director?
天呐，你可真是我的大救星，那就全靠导演了！
Thank goodness, you're a lifesaver! You can handle the whole thing, then!
哦？那也没事，反正出了问题不用我担责……
Huh? That's fine, I don't have to shoulder any responsibility anyway if anything goes wrong...
咳，我的意思是——能力越大，责任越大，而且大导演的点子怎么会出问题呢？
Well, what I mean is... with power comes great responsibility. How could a great director's idea ever go wrong?
别啊，我的好导演！要是你不帮忙，克劳克影业就得赔上一部外传的预算外加一个好员工了！
No, my dear director! Without your help, Clock Studios is going to lose the budget for an awesome extra story — not to mention a good employee!
行了，咱也别多说了，马上开始吧——
Fine, let's say no more and just get started right now...
「嘿，亲爱的观众，这次故事的主角是我们熟知的超级大坏蛋——石头老板！
"Hey there, viewers. The protagonist of this story is one big bad egg who we're all very familiar with: Boss Stone!"
「很久以前，他奴役着『噩梦小镇』的镇民们，在镇中无恶不作，只为得到……」
"A long time ago, he subjugated the townsfolk of Nightmareville and did all kinds of wicked deeds — all so he could get..."
对对，就是石头。在《钟表小子》的世界观里，石头貌似是很重要的东西，整个美梦小镇是靠石头搭起来的。
Yes, yes — stones. In the worldview of Clockie, stone seems to be super important. All of Dreamville is built upon stones.
啥？他要垃圾干什么…我懂了，你想给反派一点恶心的怪癖，好让观众加深印象，真是高超的创作技巧！
What? What's he gonna do with trash... I get it, you want to give the villain an odious character trait to create this deep impression on the audience. That really is incredible creativity!
嗯？虽然不知道奴役镇民和获得爱情有啥关系，不过现在观众好像挺喜欢这种套路的——让大反派为爱作恶，似乎就没那么可恨了。

Huh? I have no idea what subjugating the townsfolk has to do with love, but it's a trope that plays out well with audiences nowadays — getting the villain to do all this evil out of love makes them seem less hateful.
那我们继续——「石头老板在镇中无恶不作，只为得到{TEXTJOIN#91}。但他的行径越来越过分，镇民们压抑的怒火愈发高涨……」

Let's continue, then: "Boss Stone did all kinds of wicked deeds to the townsfolk, all so he could get {TEXTJOIN#91}. But his behavior grew increasingly excessive, and the stifled rage of the townsfolk began to grow and grow..."
「一天，一颗流星坠落在了小镇中。这场灾难让鳄鱼们手足无措，也给镇民们创造了反抗的机会。
"One day, a meteor crashed into the town. The crocodiles were at a loss for what to do, creating a chance for the townsfolk to launch a counterattack."
「面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了……」
"Faced with townsfolk openly hostile against him, Boss Stone decided to..."
嚯，真是个残忍无情的大坏蛋！
Ooh, what a brutal and ruthless bad guy!
嘿，你瞧瞧这诡计多端的鳄鱼。
Hey, would you just look at this cunning crocodile?
啊，石头老板居然会选这么理智的办法吗？
Huh? Would Boss Stone really ever choose to follow that kind of logic!?
我们继续后面的故事——「面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了{TEXTJOIN#92}…但他最后还是失败了，镇民们把他赶出了小镇。」
Let's continue with our story: "Faced with townsfolk openly hostile against him, Boss Stone decided to {TEXTJOIN#92}... But in the end, he failed. The townsfolk chased him out of town."
「『噩梦小镇』也变成了『美梦小镇』，然而石头老板并没有放弃，他发誓一定要夺回这个原本属于自己的地方。他封锁了小镇的资源，发起激烈的进攻…」

"Nightmareville soon became Dreamville. However, Boss Stone had not yet given up and vowed to take back this place that once belonged to him. He blocked off the town's resources, and launched a punishing offensive..."
「美梦小镇很快陷入了绝境，镇民们争执不断——还好聪明的钟表小子找来了木头老爷帮忙，在木头老爷的劝说下，镇民重新团结了起来。」
"Dreamville soon fell into desperation and the townsfolk bickered endlessly — but fortunately, clever Clockie sought out help from Old Man Wood who persuaded the townsfolk to reunite once again."
「石头老板也不敢肆意妄为了，只能……」
"Boss Stone didn't dare play up anymore. All he could do was..."
Cause trouble for the town from the shadows.
哦，这只该死的坏鳄鱼，真符合他的作风！
Huh, that darned crocodile. That is SO like him!
Turn over a new leaf as a new crocodile.
不错，很有教育意义…但之后的故事该怎么拍呢？
That's good, a nice moral in it... But what about the rest of the story?
和大家幸福地生活在一起。
Live happily ever after together with everyone.
经典的大团圆结局！不过这转折是不是太随便了……
The classic happy ending! But isn't that twist a little bit too much of a non-sequitur?
行了，搞定！让我们看看这份外传故事——
Great, all done! Let's dig into the plot of this extra story then...
「嘿，亲爱的观众，这次故事的主角是我们熟知的超级大坏蛋——石头老板！很久以前，他奴役着『噩梦小镇』的镇民们，在镇中无恶不作，只为得到{TEXTJOIN#91}。」

"Hey there, viewers. The protagonist of this story is the one big bad egg who we're all very familiar with: Boss Stone! A long time ago, he subjugated the townsfolk of Nightmareville and did all kinds of wicked deeds — all so he could get {TEXTJOIN#91}."
「一天，一颗流星坠落在了小镇中。这场灾难让鳄鱼们手足无措，也给镇民们创造了反抗的机会。面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了{TEXTJOIN#92}！」

"One day, a meteor crashed into the town. The crocodiles were at a loss for what to do, creating a chance for the townsfolk to launch a counterattack. Faced with townsfolk openly hostile against him, Boss Stone decided to {TEXTJOIN#92}!"
「但他最后还是失败了，镇民们把他赶出了小镇，『噩梦小镇』也变成了『美梦小镇』。」
"But in the end, he failed. The townsfolk chased him out of town, and Nightmareville soon became Dreamville."
「然而石头老板并没有放弃，他发誓一定要夺回这个原本属于自己的地方。他封锁了小镇的资源，发起激烈的进攻…美梦小镇很快陷入了绝境，镇民们争执不断。」

"However, Boss Stone had not yet given up, and vowed to take back this place that once belonged to him. He blocked off the town's resources, and launched a punishing offensive... Dreamville soon fell into desperation and the townsfolk bickered endlessly."
「还好钟表小子找来了木头老爷帮忙，在木头老爷的劝说下，镇民重新团结了起来。石头老板也不敢肆意妄为了，只能{TEXTJOIN#93}。」
"But fortunately, clever Clockie sought out help from Old Man Wood who persuaded the townsfolk to reunite once again. Boss Stone didn't dare play up anymore. All he could do was {TEXTJOIN#93}."
「日子一天天过去，镇民们逐渐忘记了石头老板的凶恶，但这个坏蛋一定还在觊觎着美梦小镇。终有一日，他和他的爪牙会再次归来……」

"As the days passed by, the townsfolk gradually forgot about how brutal Boss Stone was. But still, this bad guy coveted Dreamville for himself. The day would come when he and his lackeys would rise up once again..."
——大导演，咱们的故事这样就讲完了吧？
...Director, is that the ending for our story?
Cool, let's shake it up a little...
太好了，这下外传就能开拍了，苦差事总算有着落了。
Great, we can start shooting the extra story now that all the tough stuff is out of the way.
导演，你的创意真有意思！跟你聊了一会儿，我居然对这个坏鳄鱼感兴趣了…这份剧本就给你留个纪念吧！
Director, you really are a fresh creative! Just chatting a little bit with you has piqued my interest in this crocodile... This script really stays with you!
嘿，我的大导演，我的大救星！
当然，你帮我解决了一个大麻烦，我肯定随时奉陪。
Of course, you did me a massive solid for me, so I'm there for you whenever you need me.
哦，该死的石头老板是美梦小镇的敌人，一条邪恶又奸诈的大鳄鱼，《钟表小子》里最大的反派。
Oh, that blasted Boss Stone is the nemesis of Dreamville. He's this vile and treacherous crocodile who's the main villain in Clockie.
美梦小镇遇到的所有危机几乎都跟石头老板有关，他就是动画里的万恶之源，人人都对他恨之入骨。
Almost every single disaster in Dreamville was connected to Boss Stone. He's the source of all evil in the series, and everyone loathes him.
——说真的，这样的故事我有点看腻了，一点新意都没有。听说你的《美梦往事》里还有别的反派，我很期待哦。

...To be honest, I'm a little over these kinds of stories. There's nothing innovative about it at all. I heard that your Dreamjoy Memoir is using some other villains and I'm really looking forward to that.
About whom Boss Stone is based on.
原型？咱们之前不是聊过吗——石头老板肯定是匹诺康尼以前的敌人，破坏过美梦的大坏蛋。
Who he's based on? Didn't we already cover this? Boss Stone must have been the old nemesis of Penacony — the big bad guy who'd had his dreams shattered.
听说匹诺康尼在阿斯德纳星系存在了上千年，肯定遇到过各种危险…但家族把大家保护得这么好，谁还会天天惦记那些破事。

I heard Penacony has existed in the Asdana System for millennia. It must have faced all manner of disasters... But then again, The Family has kept everyone perfectly safe, so who would be worrying about such things all the time?
要我说啊，历史上可能根本不存在石头老板，只是钟表小子的故事里必须有一个反派而已。
If you ask me, there might not have ever been a Boss Stone in history — the Clockie stories just needed a villain, that's all.
在钟表小子的故事里，石头是鳄鱼们的最爱——美梦小镇里有很多漂亮的宝石，这也是石头老板不放过小镇的原因。
In the Clockie stories, stones are what the crocodiles love most — Dreamville has lots of beautiful stones, and this is also why Boss Stone has his sights set on it.
当初的镇民们天天给他挖石头，真是太可怕了！虽然做动画很苦，但肯定比挖石头要舒服多了…吧？
Back then, the townsfolk would dig up stones for him all day. It was so terrible! Animating is seriously hard work, but it's far more comfortable than digging up stones... right?
再见，好导演，祝你在生活中不会遇到石头老板这样的坏蛋。
So long, maestro! I hope you'll never encounter for yourself a bad guy like Boss Stone.
再见，好导演，祝你在生活中不会遇到石头老板这样的坏蛋。
So long, maestro! I hope you'll never encounter for yourself a bad guy like Boss Stone.
这个很酷的动画师发出了一声冷漠的*哼*，你可能要去找点让他不再装酷的消息。
This super-cool animation artist lets out an indifferent "hmph." You might have to come up with something to stop him from playing it so cool.
又怎么了？哼，我的工作已经完成了！
So what? Hmph, my work now is done!
皮斯让我来找你制作外传。
Pisce asked me to find you and make the extra stories.
导演，真不是我怠慢这份工作，对于哈努兄弟的故事，一直有些问题困扰着我——你说，哈努兄弟到底是什么样的人呢？
Director, it's not that I look down on this job, it's just that there are a few things about the Brother Hanu story that still bug me. Tell me, what kind of person is Brother Hanu exactly?
哼，即便是对历史毫无兴趣的观众，也都应该听说过哈努兄弟的原型——解放匹诺康尼的{RUBY_B#反抗者}哈努努{RUBY_E#}。
Hmph, even people who know nothing about history should still have heard of who Brother Hanu was modeled after — {RUBY_B#Rebel}Hanunue{RUBY_E#}, the one who liberated Penacony.
是他将监狱从公司的奴役中解放出来，赋予此处「匹诺康尼」之名…但匹诺康尼似乎从不感恩这位英雄，我在梦里从没见过他的塑像或颂歌。

He was the one who broke the IPC's hold over the prison and named it "Penacony"... Yet Penacony has never seemed to thank this hero, and I don't recall ever seeing his statue or hearing his theme song in the dreams.
哼，说不准——除了那些到处寻找创作素材的导演与作家，普通人从不在意匹诺康尼的过去，搞不好这个名字只是哪部电影里的虚构角色而已。

Well, I don't know... Everyday people don't care about Penacony's past, except for directors and artists constantly mining everything for new material. Maybe the name is actually just a fictional one borrowed from some movie.
或许是有人隐瞒了他的故事。
Maybe someone out there's hiding his story?
哼，很有可能——解放匹诺康尼这样伟大的事业竟是由一个罪犯完成的，没法抢功的家族肯定想让他的名字从梦中消失。

Hmph, it's more than likely — the mighty liberation of Penacony was carried out by a lowly crook... If they couldn't steal his thunder, you can bet The Family would want his name struck from the Dreamscapes.
喂，这么捉弄人可一点都不酷！
Hey, don't make fun of me. That ain't cool!
不过要创作「哈努兄弟」的故事，就必须对这个神秘的家伙有所了解。
But if you want to tell a tale about Brother Hanu, you'll have to understand a little more about this mysterious character.
为了搞清楚哈努努到底是何许人也，我收集了很久的信息，但却调查出了三个截然不同的说法！
I spent a long time gathering up info to find out what kind of person Hanunue actually was, but I somehow turned up three different stories!
第一个形象是我在「匹诺康尼大博物馆」找到的，展馆的看板上说，哈努努是一个<color=#dbc291ff>凶狠无情的罪犯</color>，曾犯下过滔天大罪。
The first story I found was from a Penacony Grand Museum, where an information board claimed Hanunue was a <color=#dbc291ff>merciless criminal</color> who had committed a flurry of serious felonies.
他入狱前在蒙托尔星系制造了一场战争，令上千万条无辜的生命葬身于战火。虽然凭着粗暴的手段解放了匹诺康尼，也因为粗暴的统治而将匹诺康尼变为了噩梦。

He waged war in the Montour System prior to his imprisonment that cost millions of innocent lives, and despite freeing Penacony using brutal means, it was those same brutal means that turned Penacony into a nightmare.
暴政下被处刑的尸体堆积成山，灾害与战争更是不计其数…博物馆中的许多资料都记录了那时的惨状，家族应该也没必要在这方面造假。

The executed corpses piled up high as mountains under his cruel regime, with war and disaster ravaging the world... Lots of material in the museum recounted horrors of the time, and there's probably no reason for The Family to have faked any of that.
第二个形象是我从折纸大学的一位历史教授口中听来的故事，他告诉我，哈努努是一个<color=#dbc291ff>正直无私的勇者</color>。
The second story I heard was from a history professor at Paperfold University who told me Hanunue was a <color=#dbc291ff>righteous and selfless hero</color>.
据那位教授所说，哈努努是因奸人陷害而蒙冤入狱。他是一位善良勇敢的哈贝克狼人，不忍目睹狱友们蒙受苦难，带领大家揭竿而起，反抗公司的暴政。

According to this professor, Hanunue had been set up and wrongfully imprisoned. He was a kind and courageous Harbeck werewolf who could not bear to see his fellow inmates suffering — and so he led them in an uprising against the tyranny of the IPC.
而后战争胜利，作为最大功臣的他选择让渡权力，成立家系制度，作为「猎犬」之主捍卫此处的自由，直至逝世前夜仍在荒芜的梦中为匹诺康尼而战。

After winning the battle, he chose to cede power as the biggest hero and established the system of different lineages. He defended this world's freedom as the leader of the Hounds and fought for Penacony in the barren Dreamscapes right up until the eve of his death.
至于第三个形象，可能有点离谱…这是我在「初醒图书馆」看到的野史——哈努努只是一条普通的<color=#dbc291ff>阿斯德纳野狼</color>。

Based on old Clockie lore, Hamster Ball Knight was this big doofus who didn't care about anything except Spheroids. He was always putting himself into dangerous situations in the name of a race...
但他背后的故事一定没有这么简单，他一定是为了更重要的东西才没命参加比赛的！但我完全不知道他是为了什么！
But his background story can't just be that simple. He has to be competing for the sake of something more important to continue to risk his life! It's just I have no idea what that should be!
导演！你觉得仓鼠球骑士是为了什么才这么卖命的？快快快，快想想！我听你的！
Director! What do you think Hamster Ball Knight was risking his life for? Quick quick quick, come up with something! I trust you!
啊哈，这个合理！那家伙收集了一大堆金灿灿的坚果，肯定是个贪心的仓鼠！
Aha, now that adds up! That guy had a huge collection of hard, shiny nuts. He must be a greedy stockpiling hamster!
嘿，冠军的确能得到很多人的喜爱，哪怕是个胖乎乎的仓鼠，也能通过胜利收获无数粉丝的青睐…看来仓鼠球骑士也是只缺爱的鼠呀。

Hey, a champion certainly does receive affection from plenty of others. Even a chubby hamster can earn the adoration of countless fans by just winning... Seems like all Hamster Ball Knight needs is a little love.
呀，这个够直接！骑着球笼奔驰确实是个很爽的事情，我也喜欢跑到热砂飙球…在驾照被猎犬吊销之前。

Jeez, that's straight to the point. Racing around in that Spheroid really is all about joy, and I used to love Spheroid racing in Scorchsand, too... until the Bloodhounds eventually revoked my license.
好！这下我懂了，我就按你的说法开始创作了，别反悔哦——冲冲冲冲冲！
Great! I get it now. I'll start pulling some things together based on what you said, so there's no going back now... Go, go, go!
仓鼠动画师开始撰写仓鼠球骑士的故事……
The Hamster Animator starts scribbling some stories about Hamster Ball Knight...
喏，这份故事也给导演看看吧，不用谢！
Hey, this copy of the script is for you, director. You're welcome!
怎么了怎么了？有话快说！
What's up? What's wrong? Quickly, say something!
Chat! Everyone can chat! Chat now!
仓鼠球骑士是美梦小镇的球笼明星！美梦小镇的镇民最喜欢看的就是球笼比赛——这点和现实的梦境没什么区别！
Hamster Ball Knight is the Spheroid-racing celebrity of Dreamville! The townsfolk love watching Spheroid races — it's not that different from real life!
仓鼠球骑士每次都能在球笼比赛中得到第一名，并通过比赛挫败坏人的阴谋，就连钟表小子都是他的粉丝！
Hamster Ball Knight always places first in Spheroid races while thwarting the bad guy's scheme throughout the race. Even Clockie is one of his fans!
关于现实中的仓鼠球骑士。
About the real Hamster Ball Knight.
现实中的仓鼠球骑士叫做「哈姆兹」，作为啮齿目的智慧生命，它和动画里一样可爱，也一样*快*！几千场比赛未尝一败！
The real Hamster Ball Knight is named "Hamz." As an intelligent rodent, it's just as cute and just as fast as in the animation! That's thousands of races without a single loss!
当年「钟表匠」先生就超级喜欢看他的比赛，才把他加进了动画里——简直就是公费追星嘛！
Back then, Mr. Watchmaker used to love watching those races so much that he just added him into the animation — it's basically using the company's money to support your idol!
但他已经很久没有接受过采访了，除了比赛之外，人们也没有见过它…真是奇怪！
But the hamster hasn't been interviewed in a very long time, and nobody has seen him outside of any races... How weird!
Might as well let The Family buy it.
In any case, the Watchmaker is already...
People always try to kick you when you're down...
How they are going to clean up this big mess?
Just their death rattle, that's all.
I want to reboot the Clockie series...
I don't have high hopes for that.
Finally getting started on that job.
There's a young film worker coming through...
Clockie is going to start shooting again.
Will it still be the same as before, though?
Foot traffic has gradually returned to...
A home theater system built into a car...
I still prefer seeing things on the big screen...
Too bad. It's still getting fixed.
Hey, fam, look who's behind me...
Just a little while longer, and then...
On this episode of spooky stories stream...
Split in two by a mysterious force...
The remarkable quality of the new script...
Thank you very much for all of your support.
The theme park's moment of rebirth!
You simply have to try this...
Have you seen that film, too?
Never thought I'd meet people into the same stuff...
Now THAT'S what I want to see!
Well, that ending was straight out of left field...
My sides are sore from laughing so much.
How did it get so late already...
The remarkable quality of the new script...
Thank you very much for all of your support.
动画师开始宣传由你参与制作的《美梦往事》外传，引来了游客们的关注……
The animator begins to promote the Dreamjoy Memoir extra story, in which you are involved, attracting the attention of tourists...
晚上好，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。久疏问候，没想到我们竟能在这片小小梦境中再次相会——
Good evening, dear {NICKNAME}. I've been meaning to get in touch and never thought that we'd be able to meet up again in a tiny Dreamscape like this...
What a happy twist of fate!
What a screwed-up twist of fate...

Long time no see, Mr. Giovanni.
哈哈，有笑声的地方自然会有{RUBY_B#「愚者」}我{RUBY_E#}的身影。何况我原本就在匹诺康尼投了一个新项目，正巧回来看看成果如何。

——一款全新的游戏，<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>！如何，感兴趣吗？
...A brand-new game, Legend of the Galactic Baseballer! How about it, are you keen?

别着急，我亲爱的朋友，让我慢慢为你介绍。

This is the new project that I'm sponsoring in Penacony, and it's a different game from Aetherium Wars. We use the unique Dreamscape tech of Penacony to create a completely immersive experience — and of course, you don't even need friends to play it. It's a single-player game!
目前首次测试正在开放中。怎么样，要来试试这次的新玩法吗？
The open beta is out now. How about it, wanna try out this new gameplay?
晚上好，{M#英俊的先生}{F#美丽的小姐}。久仰星穹列车大名，没想到竟能在这片小小梦境中遇见…
Good evening, {M#dashing sir}{F#lovely miss}. I've heard so much about the Astral Express but never imagined meeting you in this little Dreamscape here...
请允许我先进行一次自我介绍——鄙人名为乔瓦尼•迪•乔尔吉奥•达•艾普瑟隆，一介来自艾普瑟隆的小小私商。
Please allow me to introduce myself first: My humble name is Giovanni di Giorgio da Epsilon, and I'm a tiny private trader from Epsilon.
如果我没猜错，你也是来体验<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>的吧？

Also, we prefer an alternative term: Something like a flattering homage.
如果「银河球棒侠」本人愿意来参与测试的话，鄙人自然会准备一份大礼。

球棒侠{M#先生}{F#小姐}意下如何？
没问题！请尽管向我提问。想先从哪部分内容听起？
No problem! Please ask me anything. Which part would you like me to begin with?
Where do I play the game?
这是个好问题！我们曾试着在某位赞助商提供的梦泡上开发，但后来——哦，那枚梦泡里的内容有点太过刺激了，不太适合向大众推广。
Great question! We tried developing it on a dream bubble supplied by a sponsor, but... *sigh* the content on that dream bubble was a little bit too exciting to be made available to the public.
于是这次我们决定把它做得更*复古*一点儿——请看这边。
So this time, we decided to make things just a tad bit retro — check this out.
不用注册，上手即玩。这才是游戏最原本的乐趣。
You can play without registering. That's the fundamental part of the fun when it comes to video games.
What kind of game is this?
我想想…宣传词应该是这么说的……
Let's see... How did we put it in the tagline...
「银河中充满危险，也充满了奇遇。某日，一位小小的勇者踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路…」
"The cosmos is full of danger and adventure. One day, a teeny hero left their home world to conquer the stars..."
「挥动球棒，战胜宇宙各处的敌人；寻找宝物，合成星际最强的武器——最终，登上银河球棒侠之巅吧！」
"Swing your bat and defeat enemies from across the universe. Find treasures and synthesize the most powerful weapons in the cosmos. Then finally, ascend to the pinnacle of the Galactic Baseballer!"
故事向近期在银河间颇有名气的某位球棍使用者*致敬*。取材于现实，再加一点魔幻、一点荒诞…
The story pays homage to a baseball bat user who recently became famous throughout the cosmos. It's based on reality, with a pinch of fantasy, and just a hint of absurdity thrown in...
我想你会喜欢这个故事的。
I think you're gonna love this story.

当然！随着游玩进度提升，测试奖励也会逐步解锁。

但请相信我，报酬绝对令你满意。

That's all the questions I have.

哈哈，我会如实反馈给制作组的。

对首次测试的参与者，我得问几个例行问题——这也是为了收集一些关于游戏体验的反馈。
I have to ask the participants of the first test a few routine questions — it's also to collect feedback on the game's user experience.
第一个问题：玩得开心吗？
Question one: Did you have fun?
It was fun! And I want to play more!

No worries. I'll get the money. Somehow.
还差最后一个问题，我很好奇你的答案——
And the final question. I'm really curious about your answer to this one:
选择黄金球棒，成为寰宇第一侠…
Select the golden bat and become the top baseballer in the universe...
你描述了一个振奋人心的励志故事。
You tell an inspiring story of aspiration.
「黄金球棒赐予你无与伦比的强大力量，宇宙间无人不知你银河球棒侠的美名。球棒侠成为星际间最炙手可热的形象，故乡的星球为你立起巨大的雕塑，也撬动了无数游客的钱袋。但由于你没有登记版权，只能眼睁睁看着金币溜入其他人的口袋…」

"The golden bat bestows unto you unparalleled powers, and everyone in the universe comes to know the name of the Galactic Baseballer, which becomes the most unrivaled figure across the universe. Your home planet erects a huge sculpture in your name as it pries money out of eager tourists' wallets. However, since you failed to register the copyright, you can only watch as the coins flow away into other people's pockets..."
（…总感觉变成可悲的现实故事了。）
(...Sounds like this turned into a realistic tragedy somewhere along the way.)
结合「球棒侠」本人的遭遇来看…真是充满教育意义的结局。哈哈，我会考虑采纳的。
Combined with what happens to the Galactic Baseballer... it's a real educational ending. Haha, I'll add this outcome into consideration.
选择黑暗球棒，成为银河大反派…
Pick the dark bat and become the greatest villain in all the cosmos...
你描述了一个令人深思的寓言故事。
「屠龙者终将成龙，沾染禁忌力量的球棒侠也是如此。等到幡然醒悟时，一切早已无法悔改。你遮住自己的面容，将自己与黑暗球棒一同封印在银河的某个角落，等待下一个被欲望侵染的可怜虫出现…」

"As the dragonslayer eventually devolves into a dragon, so too does the Galactic Baseballer succumb when they touch upon the forbidden powers. By the time you realize what is happening, there is no longer any path to forgiveness. You cover up your face and seal yourself away in a dark corner of the universe with your dark bat, waiting for the next piteous adventurer who is driven mad by desire to turn up..."
（…但真有玩家会选一看就是错误选项的「黑暗球棒」吗？）
(...But would any players actually choose the obviously wrong "dark bat" as an option?)
嗯…很有意思的结局，我会考虑采纳的。
Hmm... what a fascinating ending. I'll consider it.
选择自己的球棒，成为热心好人…
Pick your own bat, and become a righteous person...
你描述了一个平平淡淡的暖心故事。
You tell an ordinary but heartwarming story.
「你放弃了诱惑，拿起了自己最熟悉的那只球棒。棍身已经磨损折旧，但却是手中最真实的力量。你没有成为银河第一的球棒侠。但每当他人落难时，都会有位使用球棒的好心人赶来助上一臂之力…」

"Giving up all temptation, you pick up the bat you're most familiar with. It's worn and dull, but it holds the truest powers when it rests in your hands. You have not become the ultimate baseballer in the cosmos, but whenever trouble befalls anyone, there will always be a kind-hearted individual arriving to help out with this bat in hand..."
（…银河好人，或许平平淡淡才是真。）
(...A cosmic altruist. Maybe it's for the best if they're someone ordinary.)
嗯…别出新意的结局，我会考虑采纳的。
Mmm... a rather innovative ending, and I'll consider using it.
弃武从文，成为银河笔杆子侠！
Spurn arms and take up the pen: Become the literary hero of the cosmos!
你描述了一个另辟蹊径的奇妙故事。
You tell a marvelous story about finding another way.
「你看着眼前的三只球棒，一个念头闪电般刺入你的脑海：『当球棒侠救不了所有人！ 』为了拯救宇宙的蒙昧无知，你决定扔掉武器，奔赴新的战场——成为银河笔杆子侠！」

"As you gaze at the three bats in front of you, a thought flashes into your skull like lightning: The Galactic Baseballer cannot save everyone! To save the universe from its own ignorance, you decide to throw down your weapon and set foot on a new battlefield: That of the cosmos's literary hero!"
(...Speaking of which, can raccoons even write?)
哈哈，很好！非常「欢愉」！结局就选它了！
Haha, fantastic! How "Elating"! That's my ending!
我最开始就不会这么设计。
I wouldn't design it like this at the start.
哈哈，非常有建设性的意见！我会考虑采纳的。
Haha, very constructive criticism! I'll consider it.
时间不早了，我得把这些反馈带回去，让那些开发人员看着改改。
It's getting late and I have to get this feedback back to the developers for them to run their changes.
真希望他们能在验收前改完。要知道，其他几个赞助商可没我这么好说话。
I hope they can get things done before project delivery. Y'know, the other sponsors aren't nearly as nice as I am.
在临走前——这个请收好，专门为「银河球棒侠」准备的额外大礼包！
Before you go — take this. It's a bonus present especially for the Galactic Baseballer!
哈哈，感谢你的赞美。这正是对{RUBY_B#「愚者」}我们{RUBY_E#}最好的褒奖。

If, at the end of the story, the little raccoon gets to jump into the black hole, defeats all its enemies in the universe, and finally gets the chance to choose the ultimate bat of its dreams...
代表传奇的黄金球棒、被禁忌封印的黑暗球棒…你认为，「球棒侠」会如何选择呢？
The legendary golden bat, or the forbidden dark bat... which bat do you think the baseballer would choose?
I heard you are looking for me?
对，这件事闹腾得挺厉害的，算是「公司」的机密吧…就连温世齐大哥也不敢张扬，他让我私下找你，切莫声张。
Yes, this is all rather confounding and one of the IPC's top secrets... Not even Wen Shiqi dared spread the word. He asked me to find you in private and to keep things quiet.
这件事…温世齐大哥说，整个空间站里的科员跟你没法比，无论是人脉、身手还是人品，你都是最佳人选，所以他让我把你喊过来……

So, with this business... Wen Shiqi said that none of the researchers aboard the space station can hold a candle to you, be it your connections, your skills, or your character — you're the top candidate for all of them. So he asked me to call you over...
So what exactly is going on?
简单来说，外面各方人马都发布了一些委托，是捞油水的大好机会，大哥他觉得你挺合适的，想把你内推到公司那儿。

Put simply, every man and his dog out there have issued assignments, and they're a great way to make some money. Wen Shiqi thinks you'd be suitable, and wants to do an internal recommendation for you to the IPC.
泄露机密，你就不怕出事吗？
Are you sure it's okay to leak secrets just like this?
机密嘛，不被泄漏的算什么「机密」呢？
What's the point of a secret if it never gets leaked?
再说了，我又不是「公司」的人，空间站可是黑塔女士罩着的呢，就算她老人家不在线，天花板塌了也有艾丝妲站长顶着嘛。
And besides, I'm not in the IPC. The space station comes under the auspices of Madam Herta and even if she wasn't online, Lead Researcher Asta is there to keep the sky from falling.
其实吧，就是有个叫波提欧的「星际牛仔」，最近干了几票大的，闹得人仰马翻的，连带我们空间站也倒了霉。
Actually, there's this "interstellar cowboy" called Boothill who's recently done a few big jobs and really caused a lot of trouble. He even got one over on our space station.
我听说，黑塔女士和某几个科室授权给「公司」研发的产品，在运输途中被劫，现在下落不明，害得大家又得返工……

I heard Madam Herta and a few of the departments commissioned the IPC to develop some products, but these items were robbed while being transported. Now their whereabouts are unknown, and everyone has to re-do all their work...
「公司」那边也很头疼，正准备通缉这家伙呢，各路人马也纷纷砸钱砸资源地想把他挖出来。
The IPC are in a pickle too. They're preparing a wanted bounty on this guy, and lots of other people are throwing out all kinds of bounties and offers to try and hunt him down too.
「嘿嘿…情况越混乱，咱们就越是有机会从中捞点油水」——咳咳，这是温世齐大哥的原话，他说有好事就应该是第一时间跟好朋友分享，所以把你喊过来了。

"Hehe... The more chaotic a situation is, the more money we stand to make from it"... Ahem, that's what Wen Shiqi said verbatim. He told me that good news should be shared in the first instance with good friends — and so he called you over.
So what should I do, then?
不愧是好兄弟，请指导我！
What a true friend. Please, give me pointers!
稍等，你的信息我已经内推给「公司」那边了，这次的专项委托是「公司」发起的，要等他们核实下你的身份——噢，{NICKNAME}，你可真了不得， 那边秒批了。

Hang on, I've already passed on your info to the IPC. Today's special assignment was issued by the IPC, so we have to wait for them to verify your identity... Oh, {NICKNAME} — you're incredible. They approved it in a heartbeat.
好了，具体的内容已经发给你了，你自己看着办吧，不过你得注意了——捞好处可以，但要注意安全，那个牛仔的手段听说挺毒辣的。

Good, specific details have been sent to you, and you can do it however you see fit. Remember — you can definitely turn a profit on it, but you need to be very careful. I heard that cowboy can be positively diabolical.
嘘，「专项委托」的事你可别对外声张——咱们得闷声发财，注意安全。
Shhh, don't leak anything about our "special assignment" — we gotta keep quiet, get rich, and stay safe.
请先别急，听我慢慢道来。
Patience, please. I'll explain everything in detail.
事情是这样的——为了重现你在比赛中的英姿，我们向闻名宇宙的大艺术家定制了一部特殊影片。
Here's what happened — To recreate your heroic performance in the competition, we have asked a cosmically-renowned artist to make a film dedicated to your name.
就像梦泡一样，这部影片储存着热砂盛典相关的「记忆」。但在对这部进行安全检查的时候，一位员工消失在了影片之中，与我们失去了联系……
Just like a dream bubble, this film stores the memories related to the Scorchsand Festival. But during the review process, a staff member got lost in the film...
谁说不是呢，梦里的怪事可太多了。
Ain't that right? So many shenanigans in dreams.
也许是，听说那位艺术家的性情颇为古怪，搞不好在作品中动了什么手脚……
Maybe, but from what I've heard, that artist is quite the eccentric character. Perhaps they embedded some shenanigans in the dream.
擅自翻阅他人物品的惩罚？
Serves you right. You lot didn't ask my consent first for all this.
这…我们也是为了你的安全着想。自从会场差点被一个包裹炸成废墟之后，家族规定我们必须对入梦物品进行检查，请见谅。

Well... It was all precautionary measures taken for your personal safety. Ever since that one time when the arena almost got blown up to smithereens by a suspicious package, The Family has explicitly demanded all items to be thoroughly inspected before they are allowed entry into the dreamscape. Please understand.
这部影片是为你制作的，可能也只有你可以救出那位员工了……
This film is dedicated to you. Perhaps only you can save that staff member...
那盘录像带就在沙发上，我们的盛会巨星，交给你了！
That film tape is on the sofa. O, our heroic Festive Superstar, we are all counting on you.
这部影片是为你制作的，或许也只有你可以解开谜题，救出那位员工了。
This film is dedicated to you. Perhaps only you are capable of solving this mystery and saving that staff member.
那盘录像带就在沙发上，麻烦你了，我们的盛会巨星！
That tape is on the sofa. O, our heroic Festive Superstar, please save us.
一卷散发金属光泽的录像带，封面刻着古怪的图案，像是一只两栖动物的眼睛——它正在注视着你。
A gleaming tape, metallic in its luster, adorned with a peculiar design on its cover — like some kind of amphibian's eye, fixated upon you.
你看着这只眼睛，耳边居然传来了古怪的声音……
As you gaze into the eye, peculiar whispers reach your ears...
*croak* *croak* *croak* It was the sound of a frog.
那只奇怪的眼睛眨了三下——你确信自己没看错，它眨了三下。
The strange eye blinked thrice — no doubt, you saw it right, three blinks.
你感到自己的脑袋晕乎乎的，录像带散发的波纹往四周蔓延，似乎把这里变成了一口迷幻的池塘……
Your head spins, as ripples cascade from the unraveling tape, transforming this place into an enchanting pool...
「现实是笼中的梦，我们的命运无法倒带。想要推动生命的剧情，就必须不停选择，继而被自己的选择束缚，没有任何反悔的资格。」
"Reality is a dream trapped in a cage, our destiny cannot be rewound. To propel the plot of life, one must constantly choose, only to be bound by their own choices, with no right to regret."
「而电影是无羁的梦，既定的命运可以被自由地拼接、重构、复现。在影片中，现实的囚徒才得以喘息，于镜头间弥补遗憾。」
"But films are untamed dreams, predetermined destinies can be freely stitched together, reconstructed, and replayed. In the films, prisoners of reality find solace, mending regrets between frames."
「{NICKNAME}，亲爱的主角，感谢你参演这部尚未完成的作品——」
"{NICKNAME}, my dear protagonist, thank you for your performance in this not-yet-finished art piece..."
（发生了什么…我已经来到影片里了吗？）
(What happened... Am I already in the film?)
{NICKNAME}，你刚刚跑哪去了？时间紧急，就不要乱跑啦！
{NICKNAME}, where were you just now? Time is of the essence. Please don't just run about.
怎么这时候犯糊涂了…打起精神来，我们必须通过「盛会海选」的挑战，尽快进入匹诺康尼大剧院才行！
Why the sudden confusion? Stay sharp, we must pass the Festivity Auditions and enter the Penacony Grand Theater as soon as possible!
Huh? Of course, why do you ask?
打起精神来，我们必须通过「盛会海选」的挑战，尽快进入匹诺康尼大剧院才行！
Get yourself together. We need to pass the Festivity Auditions and enter the Penacony Grand Theater as soon as possible!
So, this is a memory film...
记忆？你在说什么呢？现在可不是回忆过去的时候！
Memory? What do you mean? Now is not the time to reminisce about the past!
打起精神来，我们必须通过「盛会海选」的挑战，尽快进入匹诺康尼大剧院才行！
Get yourself together. We need to pass the Festivity Auditions and enter the Penacony Grand Theater as soon as possible!
前面的挑战一定很艰巨，我们去小吃摊补充些能量就出发吧！
The challenge ahead must be tough. Let's replenish our energy at the food stall and set off!
喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美味速速达！
Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, and make your dreams a blast!
前面的通关之路艰难无比，来点美味小吃补充能量吧！
The road ahead is can be quite tough. Why not buy some tasty snacks to replenish yourself!
他说得对，吃饱了才有力气迎接最后的挑战，我来买点吃的吧！
He was right, we need to fill up first before taking on this final challenge. This time it's on me!
I'll treat you again this time!
Thanks. That's very nice of you!
给，客气啦，不知道你喜不喜欢。
Here you go, don't mention it. I'm not entirely sure if you'll like it.
Let me treat you this time!
你真好！我随便吃一点就行。
You're the best. I'll just have a small bite.
时间紧急，我们边走边吃吧！
Time is of the essence. Let's eat while we walk!
手里的钱现在只够买这些，一切结束之后我们再去吃大餐吧！
We can only afford these for now. Let's treat ourselves to a feast after everything is over!
欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的热砂盛典第一关：「戏梦奇战」！在这一关里，您可以选择「演技派」或「动作派」两种挑战。
Welcome to the first stage of SoulGlad™ Enterprises' Scorchsand Festival: Dreamplay Fantasia! In this stage, you can choose between two challenges: The School of Acting or School of Action.
在「演技派」挑战中，您需要根据三份剧本完成表演，打动现场的评委；在「动作派」挑战中，您需要干净利落地战胜三组敌人，抵达终点。

In the School of Acting challenge, you have to complete three performances from three scripts and move the panel judges. In the School of Action challenge, you have to defeat three groups of enemies convincingly and reach the end.
亲爱的主角，你的命运正在被重新演绎，何必纠结于无用的选择——为了故事的精彩，下一幕只能是崭新的情节！
Dear protagonist, your destiny is being rewritten. Why dwell upon worthless choices. For the thrill of the story, the next scene can only be a brand-new beat!
…现在，我们将为您选择适合您的挑战，祝您闯关顺利！
...Now, we will select a challenge suitable for you. Best of luck!
亲爱的主角，你的下一幕只能是崭新的情节！请回到正确的轨道上来吧！
Dear protagonist, your next scene can only be a brand-new plot! Please get back on the right track!
戏梦大舞台，有梦你就来！欢迎来到「演技派」舞台！
The Stage of Dreams, for those who dare to dream! Welcome to the School of Acting stage!
请走上舞台，用你真挚的表演打动评委！匹诺康尼下一位银河之星——就是你！
Step onto the stage and move the judges with your heartfelt performance! The next Cosmic Star of Penacony — could be you!
二位选手，现在由我来为您介绍这一关的规则。
Competitors, allow me to introduce the rules of this challenge to you.
前方一共有三座舞台。在每座舞台上，你们都能拿到一份剧本梗概。这三份剧本均出自电影大亨「钟表匠」之手，描绘了匹诺康尼拓荒时代的种种逸闻。

There are three stages up ahead. On each, you will find an outline of a script. These three scripts were written by the legendary filmmaker, the Watchmaker, and depict various stories from Penacony's era of pioneering.
你们需要想象当时的情景，说出合适的台词，做出恰如其分的表演，让各位评委体会到剧本中想要传达的感情。预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
Your task is to bring those moments to life, find the right words, and act convincingly to make the judges feel the script's intended emotions. I wish you a successful performance!
预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
I wish you a successful performance!
噢，看看这对妙人儿，多有明星相啊！既然你们是双人组合，那我就为你们准备一个双人对戏的场景吧！
Oof, just take a look at this pair. Such star quality! Since you've come as a pair, I'll prep a two-person scene for you!
现在，想象你们二人受到拓荒感召，第一次踏上匹诺康尼的梦之土地。可是这里黄沙漫天，一片荒芜，根本不是「钟表匠」口中的乐土！

Envision that you both, driven by the spirit of exploration, are arriving at the land of dreams that is Penacony for the first time. But! Instead of lush lands, you find yourselves amidst swirling sands and desolation, far from the paradise the Watchmaker described.
你们在梦境的荒野上开着破旧的老爷车，喝着冷风、呛着黄沙、还被一只凶残的忆域迷因挡住了去路……
You're driving an old clunker through the wilderness of the Dreamscape, braving the cold wind, choking on the dust, and suddenly, a fierce Memory Zone Meme blocks your path...
现在——{NICKNAME}，什么样的台词才能表达你对匹诺康尼的「失望」？
Now... {NICKNAME}, what line would you deliver to express your disappointment in Penacony?
太好了！我喜欢刺激的生活！
Great! I love living on the wild side!
不对吧…让你表演「失望」，你怎么这么雀跃……
No... that's not right... You're trying to express disappointment. Why do you sound so chipper?
好凶残的生物！直接撞过去！
A brutish creature! Quick! Let's run it over!
那个…你平时都是这样表达「失望」的吗……
Uh... Do you usually express disappointment this way...?
什么鬼地方！钟表匠这个骗子！
What in tarnation is this hellhole! The Watchmaker is a big fat liar!
很好！接下来——虽然你很失望，但你的搭档反而很激动。现在！这位姑娘，你会说——
Very good! Now, though you're disappointed, your screen partner is conversely very enthusiastic. Now, young lady! You will say...
「太、太好了！我喜欢这种…刺、刺激的生活！」
"Th—This is great! I love living on the... w—wild side!"
可以，非常激动！然后到了故事下一幕——你们找到了一份修铁路的工作，但日夜辛劳、体力不支，最后倒在了沙漠深处……

Very good! Very intense! And then we cut to the story's next scene — you find a job mending the rails, but the days are long, and your endurance can't keep up, and you finally collapse in the endless expanse of desert...
突然！从天而降的甘霖滋润了你们的嘴唇，唤醒了你们奋斗的精神。
Suddenly! Sweet rain falls from the sky, wetting your lips, and rousing your spirits.
现在——{NICKNAME}，什么样的台词最适合表达你此时的「惊喜」？
Now... {NICKNAME}, what line will best express your surprise at this moment?
匹诺康尼果然处处是机遇！
O, Penacony, my Penacony! You truly abound with opportunities!
Just let me die of thirst instead!
不对吧…这句台词听上去也不是很「惊喜」。
That's not right... That line doesn't sound very "surprised".
也许我们就是无法成功。
Perhaps we were never meant to succeed.
已经换题啦！现在要表演「惊喜」，不是「失望」……
We're already at the next scene! You need to convey surprise now, not disappointment...
但此时，你的搭档却仰望天空，闭上双眼。雨滴落下，视野也一片模糊，她悲伤地说——
But at this moment, your partner yet gazes into the sky, both her eyes closed. The rain drops fall, blurring her vision, and she tragically says...
「也、也许我们就是无法成功…对不对？」
"P—Perhaps we were never meant to succeed... Right?"
太棒了！两位的台词功底真是无比深厚！不过，台词并非表演的全部，请在第二个舞台继续这个故事吧……
Fantastic! Both of you have an incredibly solid foundation in dialogue delivery! However, lines aren't everything in a performance. Please continue this story on the second stage...
接下来，你们将面对「肢体」的考验！
Up next, you'll be challenged with a body language test.
希望这样的考验不会持续太久……
I hope these tests won't take too long...
认真点啦，这可不是闹着玩的！
Let's get serious. This is no joking matter!
两位的台词功底真是无比深厚！预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
The depth of your dialogue delivery is remarkable! Best of luck with your results!
在我这，二位需要用精湛的「肢体语言」诠释我描绘的故事情境。
Here, you two are required to skillfully utilize body language to portray the story context I've laid out for you.
书接上回，一场大雨拯救了倒在沙漠中的你们。这场雨浇灭了你心中的愤怒，你看着身边已经毫无斗志的同伴，想要安慰她……

Picking up from where we left off, a heavy downpour saves you both stranded in the desert. This rain quenches the anger in your heart. You look to your companion, now completely devoid of fighting spirit, wanting to comfort her...
此时——你应该做出怎样的举动来「逗笑」她？
At this moment, what should you do to make her laugh?
You seriously think that would make someone laugh?
现在考验的是「肢体语言」…应该不能用台词糊弄过去吧？
The test now is about body language... I don't think dialogue is allowed here.
(Stand up and prepare to move out)
这不像要逗我笑，倒像是要抛下我了……
You look less like you want to make me laugh, and more like you want to abandon me.
回答正确！同伴看着你在沙子里打滚，想起此行种种坎坷。她忍不住笑出声，内心的希望重新燃起，所以这位姑娘——

Right answer! Your companion sees you rolling about in the sand, and thinks about the arduous obstacles along this journey. She can't help but let loose a laugh, rekindling hope in her heart — and so this girl...
我会…站起来，和他一起再次出发。
I'm... gonna get back on my feet and keep moving forward.
太感人了！故事继续发展，那场大雨令二位嗅到了商机，你们开始进军雨伞行业，可生意刚有起色，竞争对手就开始大量倾销低价商品挤占市场。

A tug at the heartstrings! The story continues to develop. The heavy rain leads you both to sense a business opportunity, so you start venturing into the umbrella industry. But just as the business begins to pick up, competitors start flooding the market with low-priced goods, squeezing your market share.
你们不得不将高价囤积的货物赔本销售…这无异于饮鸩止渴，你们被拖到了破产边缘。这个时候——不服输的你会做出怎样的决定？

You have no choice — the goods you stockpiled at high prices have to be sold at a loss... This is a pretty self-destructive move which drives your business to the brink of bankruptcy. At this moment, what would you — who refuses to admit defeat — decide to do?
你转过身，决绝地离开了，嘴里还念念有词——「英雄背井离家乡，来到美梦去开荒，美梦要是不留我，{F#老娘}{M#老子}投奔泯灭帮……」

You turn around, leaving resolutely, muttering under your breath — "The hero's quest started with a bang. For this dream I've toiled and sang. If the dream repays me in pang, then I, the {M#man}{F#woman}, will join the Annihilation Gang...."
这完全是服输了吧…快回来快回来……
That's totally giving up... Come back here!
你扑腾一声跪倒在地，向你的商界对手哐哐磕大头。人能平安活一世，无非就靠四个大字——「好汉饶命」！

You drop to your knees with a resounding thud and start to repeatedly bash your head hard against the floor, kowtowing enthusiastically to your business rival. The key to a peaceful life lies in these five powerful words — "Show me mercy, pretty please!"
快起来啦…没有人靠磕头打商战的吧……
Get up! No one wins a trade war by kowtowing...
你拍案而起，想让你知难而退？不可能！逐梦客可以被击倒，但不会被击败！
You slam the table and rise up. They think you'll back down? Impossible! Dreamchasers can be knocked down, but never knocked out.
太棒了！可惜，你的朋友并不认同。看着你债台高筑的样子，她深感未来无望，然后——
Fantastic! But it's a pity, your friend does not agree. Seeing that you're up to your eyeballs in debt, she sees nothing but despair in her future, and then...
呃…那我心灰意冷，离开匹诺康尼…可以吗？
Uh... I leave Penacony in utter disappointment... Is that okay?
可以，太可以了！二位有着卓越的表演才能，我都要看哭了！
Of course! Absolutely! I was this close to tears. Both of you possess exceptional acting talent!
但后面才是真正的挑战，你们将面对本节目有史以来最严苛的评委，只能凭借自身完美的演技令对方折服！
However, the true test is yet to come. You're about to encounter the harshest judge this show has ever seen. You'll need to rely on perfect performances if you want to win them over.
(Take out the transformer and prepare to transform)
这个剧本里没有幻想元素吧……
There are no fantasy elements in this script, right...
二位有着卓越的表演才能，预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！

"The enemy is at our doorstep, and we have no path of retreat. For the future of Dreamville..."
So they just jumped inside that TV...
我说…这剧情和台词也太随便了吧……
Sheesh... The logic in this plot and dialogue is really being pushed to its limits...
那我们就再来一次吧…准备好了吗？
Well, here we go again... Ready?
已经渐渐习惯这种感觉了…说不定还能操作哈努兄弟做些高难度动作呢。
I am gradually getting used to this... who knows, I might even be able to perform some high-level moves with Hanu.
哦？刚才是不是有人提到了「高难度动作」？没错，朋友！接下来的剧情正好充满了各种高难度动作！
Oh? Did someone say "high-level moves" just now? That's right, pal! The upcoming script is just exploding with all sorts of high-level shenanigans!
上回书说到，哈努兄弟做好了战斗准备。就在这时，他听见走廊外传来了沉重的脚步声。果然，恶棍军团的喽啰们已经闯入了哈努兄弟的宅邸！
Last we saw, Hanu was preparing for battle. Suddenly, he hears heavy footsteps coming from the hallway. The Malevolent Mischief Makers have broken into his home!
勇敢的哈努兄弟绝不会束手就擒！他立刻奔向储藏室，准备与坏蛋们决一死战……
But brave Hanu won't go down without a fight! He instantly sprints for the storage room, ready for a do-or-die showdown against the baddies...
可是…我们现在还是没有趁手的武器……
But... we still don't have any weapons in hand...
你知道吗？哈努兄弟心爱的火箭筒恰好就在那间储藏室里，快去吧！
Guess what? Hanu's favorite bazooka just so happens to be in that storage room! So get a move on!
还真是方便的流程啊…要是主办方允许穿装甲参赛就更好了。
What a coincidentally convenient plot twist... It'd be even more awesome if the organizers allowed me to wear armor.
储藏室…就在置物架后边吧？
The storage room... It's behind the shelves, right?
竟然真的有一支火箭筒。
He wasn't lying. There's actually a bazooka here.
现在…我们应该有办法对付那些坏蛋了。
Now... we should have a way of dealing with those baddies.
这个击发手感简直和「飞蝗Ⅱ型」一模一样……
This thing feels just like the Soaring Locust II...
小心，更多怪物进来了！准备开火！
Careful, looks like we've got more company! Get ready to fire!
又来…但没关系，我们已经完全习惯这支火箭筒了。
Here we go again... but no big deal, we're pretty handy with this bazooka now.
That should be all of them, right?
天哪，哈努兄弟简直所向披靡！各位，关卡完成，快通过电视机前往下一关吧！
Oh my! Hanu is on a streak! Everyone, the stage is complete, quickly head through the TV to the next stage!
天哪，无敌的哈努兄弟居然被发现了！各位，千万要小心行事！
Oh my, the unstoppable Hanu has been spotted! Everyone, please proceed with caution!
天哪，无敌的哈努兄弟居然倒下了！各位，快快回到战场，向恶棍们复仇吧！
Oh no, the not-so-unstoppable Hanu has actually fallen! Quickly, return to the battlefield and seek revenge against the bad guys!
终于结束了。不过，这支火箭筒的手感好好，有点舍不得……
Well, that's that. But it is gonna be hard to let go of this bazooka...
…呃，不是，没什么。我们赶紧去下一关吧。
...Uhm, never mind. Let's hurry over to the next stage.
亲爱的朋友，欢迎光临「钟表匠」构造的美妙世界！在前方等着你们的，是钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子！
Dear friends, welcome to the wonderful world created by the Watchmaker! Awaiting you up ahead is the titular character from the beloved Clockie animation — Clockie!
据说「钟表匠」早在童年时代便已构想出了它的原型！那时他还只是一位钟表店的学徒，某天夜里，他梦见那些坏掉的钟表全部长出了手脚……

It's said that the Watchmaker dreamed up the idea of Clockie when he was just a boy. Back then, he was merely an apprentice in a clock shop, and one night, he dreamt that all the broken clocks started sprouting arms and legs.
他如同领航员一样，带领它们走向正确的方向！而作为陪伴许多人长大的经典形象，钟表小子的确影响了一代人，也铸就了「钟表匠」的重要地位！

Like a skilled navigator, he steered them towards the right path! As a classic figure who grew up with many, Clockie truly shaped a generation, solidifying the Watchmaker's pivotal role in popular culture!
二位选手，祝愿你们与钟表小子共度美好的时光！
Contestants, may you have a wonderful time with Clockie!
「时间」的试炼…希望会是轻松快乐、健康阳光的休闲游戏。
The test of "time"... I hope it's a happy and positive casual game.
Am I... just a failed experiment?
那座雕像…是不是说话了？
That statue... Did it just speak?
Am I... just a failed experiment?
所以…我是个可有可无的失败的钟表，对吗？
...I'm just an expendable failure of a clock, aren't I?
你好，请让我游玩梦境谜钟。
Hello, I'd like to play Dreamscape Ticker.
「游玩」…这么说来，我不仅是个失败的钟表，还是个失败的玩具。
"Play"... So, I'm not just a failed clock, I'm also a failed toy.
这关不会是要我们话疗它吧…
So, this stage is requiring us to cure this thing with a whole therapy session now?
别傻了，朋友。失败不是一种病，而是一种罪过，罪过是治不好的。
Don't be naive, buddy. Failure isn't a sickness — it's a sin, and sins can't be cured.
我们有急事…能请你让一下吗？
We've got an urgent matter to attend to... Can you please let us pass already?
是的，虽然听起来很难以置信，但匹诺康尼现在很危险…我们必须去立刻阻止才行。
I know that this may sound like an exaggeration, but Penacony is actually in danger right now... We have to prevent it at all costs, sooner rather than later.
哦，又是一组投机取巧的挑战者。很抱歉，虽然我是个失败的钟表，但我也是有底线的。
Oh, another group of opportunistic challengers. Sorry, though I may be a failure of a clock, I still have my principles.
你们也和其他挑战者一样，想要深入我的内心吗？那就请进吧。但你们不会有任何收获…因为我只是一个失败品。
You guys are just like the other challengers. You want to enter my inner self? Then please, be my guest. But you won't find anything worthwhile... I'm just a failed piece.
看吧，我的内心早已空无一物了。
滴答，这时候就要轮到我出场了！
Tick-tock, it's time for me to make an appearance!
流程越来越复杂了，救命…
钟表小子？我也能看见…这一位是舞台布景吗？
Clockie? I can also see him... Is this character part of the show?
在美梦小镇，钟表小子可是无处不在、无所不能的！比如…我现在就可以帮你解决这位谜钟朋友的问题，滴答！
In Dreamville, Clockie is everywhere and can do anything! Like... right now, I could solve this problem with your Big Ticker pal, tick-tock!
竟然是钟表小子本尊，你怎么会无缘无故来看望我这样一个失败的钟表？
I can't believe it's actually Clockie! Why would you come and visit a failure of a clock like me for no reason?
你看，我们都是钟表，都是一家人！我想帮助你，让你快乐起来！可以告诉我，你的烦恼是什么吗？
You see, we're all clocks, we're family! I want to help you be happy! Tell your pal Clockie what's troubling you!
我…我昨天才知道一个惊人的事实。他们说，梦境谜钟根本不是钟表小子，只是当年钟表小子的造型废案。
I... I came across a startling revelation yesterday. Apparently, Dreamscape Ticker isn't the same as Clockie at all. It's just a discarded prototype from Clockie's early development.
让我一个人静静吧，钟表小子。我实在不知道该如何面对你…因为我只是一个失败品。
Please... just leave me be, Clockie. I just don't know how to face you... because I'm just a failure.
天哪，它的样子太让人伤心了。但没关系，我们可以找回它内心缺失的部分，帮助它从失意中走出来！
Oh dear, seeing it like this is utterly heart-wrenching. But fear not! We're here to help it rediscover the missing parts of its inner self and guide it out of despair!
啊…原来剧团成员也会陷入存在主义危机啊……
Ah... I guess even Troupe members can experience existential crises...
别担心，这位姑娘，我已经精准定位到它缺失的零件了！
Don't worry, miss. I've already pinpointed its missing parts!
让我一个人静静吧，钟表小子。我实在不知道该如何面对你…因为我只是一个失败品。
Please... just leave me be, Clockie. I just don't know how to face you... because I'm just a failure.
这边，朋友们！拿出仓鼠球骑士的速度吧！
Over here, my friends! Better be fast like Hamster Ball Knight!
我们到了！缺失的零件就在对面…可是要怎样才能过去？
We're here! There's a missing part on the opposite side... But how do we get over there?
这里也有筑梦师们留下的「筑梦遥眼」…时间紧迫，有需要就直接用吧。
There's also a "Dream's Eye" left here by a Dreamweaver... We're running out of time, we'll have to use it if necessary.
这一定就是谜钟内心缺失的零件，太好了！
This must be one of the missing parts that Big Ticker needs. That's great!
拿到了美梦剧团的内心碎片…这种事也太梦幻了。
An inner self fragment belonging to the Sweet Dreams Troupe... This is just too surreal.
救救，救救啾！要变成烤全鸟了啾！
Help, help, tweet! I'm about to end up as a roast dinner, tweet!
滴答！是不是有什么人在求救？
Tick-tock! Do I hear someone calling out for help?
啾！救救，救救啾！这家伙的身体也太烫了啾！
Tweet! Help, help help, tweet! This fella's body is boiling hot, tweet!
有人吗啾？我要坚持不住了啾！
Is anyone there, tweet? I can't take it anymore, tweet!
天哪，是一只折纸小鸟！它怎么钻进十七分熟的尾巴里了？
Oh dear, it's an origami bird! What's it doing in Beyond Overcooked's tail?
是钟表小子啾？快救救我啾，要变成烤全鸟了啾！
Is that Clockie, tweet? Please save me, tweet! I'm being roasted alive, tweet!
烤全鸟！这可真是太糟糕了——我们赶紧救它出来吧！
A roasted bird! This is horrible — let's save it, quickly!
呼…谢谢你们啾，我感觉自己差不多已经七分熟了啾。
Phew... thank you guys, tweet. I feel I'm about seventy percent cooked, tweet!
还好你没事！可你怎么会钻进那家伙的尾巴里？
Thank goodness you're ok! But why did you burrow yourself into that fella's tail?
这是因为那家伙偷走了谜钟先生的零件啾！我想帮它拿回来，结果不小心把自己送进烤炉了啾…你们拿去吧，小心烫手啾！

Because that fella stole one of Mr. Big Ticker's parts, tweet! I wanted to help retrieve it, but I accidentally got myself stuck in the oven, tweet... Go ahead and get it, but be careful, it's hot, tweet!
我们已经集齐全部零件了…快回去吧，别让那位谜钟等急了。
We've gathered all the missing parts... Let's hurry back, we don't want to keep Big Ticker waiting.
我们回来了！只要有这些，你一定能够打开心结，滴答！
We're back! As long as you have these, you'll be able to find closure, tick-tock!
噢！这突如其来的畅快感……
Wow! This sudden surge of joy...
起作用了，滴答！接下来，只要进入它的心境空间，帮它连通通路，就大功告成了！
It's working, tick-tock! Next, we just need to enter its Emoscape, help connect its pathways, and we're done!
天哪…这是怎么回事？你的内心十分混乱！
Oh dear... What's going on in here? Your inner self is a mess!
我…没有资格成为真正的你。还是放弃吧，钟表小子！
I'm not qualified to be the real Clockie. Just give up, Clockie!
噢，不！这可不行，你必须直面自己内心的恐惧！
Hmph, no! This is unacceptable. You have to face your fears!
事已至此，只好使用「钟表把戏」了——
Since it's come down to this, I'll have to use Clockwork...
谢谢你，钟表小子…如果不是你，我永远也无法像这样好好地和人交流——是你帮助我重新认识了我自己！
Thank you, Clockie... If not for you, I'd never be able to connect with people like this — you helped me find myself again!
不客气，身为美梦小镇的守护者，这是我应该做的！
No problem at all! As the guardian of Dreamville, it's what I'm here for! Tick-tock!
两位朋友，你们还有重要的事要做，对吧？
My friends, you still have other important things to do, right?
前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有谜钟都会为你们加油的！
Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!
前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有谜钟都会为你们加油的！
Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!
全都搞定了…胜利在望，我们出发前往最后的关卡吧。
It's all done... Victory is in sight. Let's head to the final stage.
滴答！灰色的朋友，我们还没帮那位谜钟打开心结呢！
Tick-tock! Hey there my gray-haired friend, we still haven't helped Big Ticker find closure yet!
咦，这里怎么没有引导员？
Huh? Why isn't there a guide here?
真是奇怪…{NICKNAME}，我们去前面看看吧。
Strange... {NICKNAME}, let's go inside and take a look.
我好像听到了熟悉的声音……
I think I hear something familiar...
你看到两个员工脸色煞白，满头大汗，晕倒在地。
You see two pale faced workers laying on the ground, sweat pouring down their foreheads.
你确信其中有一个就是那位失踪的包裹安检员。另外一个，应该是本应在此处的引导员。
You are certain that one of them is that missing package inspector, while the other should be the local guide.
天呐，这里到底发生了什么……
On the stage, it's that meme...
这是怎么回事？它为什么会在这里？
What's this? Why would that thing be here?
一道无形的壁障隔开了你们与「沉眠」。因为多次撞击牢笼，它的身上满是伤痕。
An invisible barrier parted you from "Dormancy." Due to slamming into the cage over and over, its body is coated with injuries.
即便如此，你们依然能感受到被监禁于其中的生命散发出的愤怒、无奈、沮丧……
Even so, you can feel the rage, frustration, and despair emanating from the imprisoned lifeform...
它是在…喊加拉赫先生吗？
Is it calling for Mr. Gallagher?
那头巨兽痛苦地蜷曲，嘶吼，撞击…那薄如光翼的牢笼越来越脆弱，只要两下…不，一下它就要裂开了！
The monster twists painfully as it roars and smashes... The cage, thin like wings made from light, grew weaker and weaker. With but two more... no, one more strike, it is sure to crack!
{NICKNAME}, look out! It's lost its senses!
呼，这下我们都能安静一会了。
Whew. Finally, we can have a moment of peace.
忆域迷因的生命力很顽强，它看起来不会有什么危险。没有了迷因的影响，那两位员工也应该能很快醒来。
The Memory Zone Meme is very resilient. It didn't look that dangerous, though. Without the influence of the memes, the two workers should be able to wake up soon.
不过这只迷因为什么会出现在这里，加拉赫先生应该不会容忍这种事情的发生吧。
But how did the meme get here? Mr. Gallagher probably wouldn't allow such a thing to happen.
Was all this the result of being in the film?
影片？你是想说，在电影里才能见到这样离奇的情节吧？
Film? You mean strange things like this can only happen in fiction, right?
Did something happen to Mr. Gallagher?
为了最后的大战，他耗费了许多心血…我也有些担心。
He gave a lot in that last big fight... I'm a bit worried.
我也不知道发生了什么。
I don't know what happened either.
嗯…现在也没时间想那么多了，我们快点走吧。
Well, we don't have that much time to think it over. Let's go.
终点就要到了，答案应该就在前面——
You are about to reach the end. The answers are just ahead of you.
把最热烈的掌声，献给两位年轻有为的来宾吧！
Let's give a round of applause to our aspiring young guests!
怎么回事，终点怎么一个人都没有…你看，那里好像放了一盘录像带？
What's wrong? Why is there no one at the finishing line... Look. It looks like there's a tape there?
与你相伴的少女忽然消散，你面前仍是那张闪着金属光泽的录像带，那只神秘的眼睛仍在静静地望着你。
The girl who accompanied you suddenly dissolves, leaving behind the metallic gleam of a videotape before you. That enigmatic eye still gazes silently at you.
「呱、呱、呱」——仍是三声青蛙的叫声。
"*croak* *croak* *croak*" It's again the sound of that frog.
亲爱的主角，这部影片即将结束，感觉如何？
Beloved protagonist, the end to this film will soon arrive. How do you feel?
是吗？如果你说的不是奉承之言，这个评价反而让我有些失望——你的审美不该对这样的情节予以赞美。
Is that so? If your words aren't mere flattery, this evaluation actually leaves me somewhat disappointed — someone of your taste shouldn't have praised such a storyline.
呵呵，这对我来说绝不是一份嘉奖——没有创作者会希望自己的作品只能用廉价的方式刺激感官。
Hehe, this is not a reward for me. No creator would be satisfied by their work only offering cheap thrills.
影片接下来的情节，你不是已经见证过了吗——一轮白日在白日梦中陨落，一份信仰被另一份信仰击溃，真是一段精彩的故事。
You already know what will happen next, don't you? A blazing sun setting within a daydream, a shattered belief crumbling under the weight of another. It's truly a captivating tale.
但不管你怎么看，鄙人对这部作品的评价是：平庸至极，无聊透顶。
Regardless of your perception, I must say this about this art piece: Utterly mediocre, dreadfully dull.
那位赞助商只想用影片还原这场游戏的感官刺激，用无趣的流程拘束着演员的灵魂…说实话，我真不想为这部作品署名。

The sponsor only wanted to capture the sensory thrill of the game through this film project, and they inevitably resorted to confining the actors' souls with many a tedious protocol... Honestly, I don't want my name to be attached to this project in any way.
你感觉到了吗？大部分人的生命都像这部不知所云的影片一样无趣，人们总是遵循某种「剧本」行事。那份剧本或名为「习惯」，或名为「规则」，或名「命运」……
Do you feel it now? Most people's lives are as uninteresting as this perplexing film, where they always follow some kind of "script." That script may be called "habits," or "rules," or "destiny"...
本应优秀的演员们总在被迫扮演着空洞的角色，说着单调的台词，经历一幕又一幕无趣的情节，做着一个又一个限定选项的选择，然后在麻木中草草退场。

Outstanding actors are always pigeonholed into vacuous roles, forced to repeat monotonous lines and experience the same vapid scenes and beats over and over, making the same limited choices over and over again, before finally departing in numbness.
在生命落幕后，他们才能摆脱庸俗的剧本…但退场后，演员往往会面临比「死亡」更悲惨的结局——被{RUBY_B#世人}观众{RUBY_E#}遗忘。

Only when the curtain falls upon life can they shed the tackiness of this script... But after leaving the stage, actors will often face an end worse than "death"... Being forgotten by {RUBY_B#World}the audience{RUBY_E#}.
希望你不会将自己演绎成如此无趣的作品，我的镜头会继续注视着你…不要辜负我，更不要辜负我们的观众。
I hope you won't give such a boring performance. My lens is upon you... Don't let me down. And more importantly, don't let the audience down.
（这到底是怎么回事，还是去问问艾迪恩吧……）
(What's going on here? Better go ask Aideen...)
总之，恭喜你又一次夺得了热砂盛典的冠军。
In any case, congrats on clinching the Scorchsand Festival trophy yet again.
愿苏乐达的甜美常伴你左右，愿你的未来如同苏乐达一般香甜美好！
May the sweetness of SoulGlad be with you, and your future be as sweet as SoulGlad!
一道无形的壁障隔开了你与「沉眠」。
An invisible barrier parted you from "Dormancy."
它比之前安静了许多，仿佛习惯了这里的环境。但你仍然能听见一声声细微的呼唤——
It is much quieter than before, as if it has become used to the environment here. However, you can still hear a faint calling...
啊哈，我们的盛会巨星，你回来了！
Ah! Our Festive Superstar! You're back!
刚刚失踪的员工已经回来了，这多亏了你的帮助——我代表苏乐达企业向你致敬！
The missing workers have returned. You have really done us a good deed. You have my thanks on behalf of SoulGlad™!
面对重重考验，你又一次证明了自己的实力，「盛会巨星」的称号真是实至名归！
After passing numerous challenges, you have proven yourself. You truly deserve the title of "Festive Superstar"!
不不不，当然不是。看来你还没打过瘾呀，但我这一把老骨头可不耐揍。
No no no. Of course not. Looks like you still got more in you, huh? But these old bones of mine won't last a second against you.
哈哈，我只是这部影片的赞助商，导演嘛…另有其人。
Haha, I'm just this film's sponsor. As for the director... that's someone else.
What on earth is going on?
说来惭愧，之前由于技术故障未能为你们举办颁奖仪式。于是我特地请来了一位宇宙顶尖的艺术家，为你们制作了这盘「记忆胶片」。
I'm ashamed to admit that we couldn't hold the award ceremony for you due to the technical issues. As such, I invited a cosmically-renewed artist to make a "Memory Film" just for you.
我希望借此令你重温夺冠的辉煌时光…顺便将你们精彩的闯关体验录入这盘胶卷之中，未来可与诸位宾客共享这段快乐时光。

Through this, I hope to reignite the glorious moments of victory for you... and capture your exhilarating journey as it unfolds, etching it within this film. In the future, we can share this joyful time with all our esteemed guests.
正如你们所体验的——危险与趣味并存的挑战，危险的忆域迷因，香甜美味的苏乐达，沉浸体验的热砂盛典的旅程……

Just as you've experienced, it's all about a thrilling blend of danger and excitement, the perilous memes of the Memory Zone, the delectable delight of SoulGlad, and an immersive journey through the Scorchsand Festival.
在不久的将来，各大梦境贩售店都会上架这款胶卷，所有的入梦之人都能体验成为盛会巨星的感觉，苏乐达企业也将借此开辟新的商业蓝海！

In the not-too-distant future, the Dreamscape stores will all have a film like this one, to let everyone know what it's like to be a Festive Superstar. The SoulGlad corporation will also use this moment to create new opportunities upon the tides of commerce!
亲爱的巨星，你还有什么想问的吗？
哦！那是一个多么野性、瑰丽、强大的存在啊，仿佛是拥有生命的噩梦！我都想为它设计一版新的苏乐达口味了，就叫「死亡苏乐达」吧！
Oh! What a wild, magnificent, and powerful existence. It's like a living nightmare! I'm very much tempted to design a new SoulGlad flavor based on it. I shall call it "DeathGlad"!
奇怪的是…这只可怕的恶魔居然变得如此虚弱，还闯进了热砂的时刻。为了会场的安全，我们费了不少功夫才把它抓起来。

The strange things is... This terrifying creature has somehow been rendered so fragile, and yet it managed to break into the Moment of Scorchsand. For the safety of everyone, we spared no effort to have it captured.
拍摄这部影片时，我们没能得到那位纯美骑士的形象授权，所以我就让导演把这只怪物安排在了关底——是不是很刺激？
When shooting this film, we couldn't get the rights to that Knight of Beauty, so we had the director place this monster as the final obstacle. Isn't that a thrill?
You shouldn't have kept it here.
哎呀，它给你们带来了不好的体验吗？真是抱歉！
Oh my, did it bring you any inconveniences? Truly sorry!
也是，听说这家伙之前在梦里搞出了不少乱子，如果让猎犬发现它在这里，可能会给苏乐达企业带来不少麻烦…还是把它扔回梦境的边缘吧。

That makes sense. I heard this one caused no shortage of trouble in the dreams. If the Hounds found out about it being here, it might bring no end of trouble to the SoulGlad corporation... Best to send it back to the edge of the Dreamscape.
Letting it stay here is a perfect idea.
哈哈，你说的没错，它一定会成为这里最受欢迎的吉祥物！
Haha, you're right. It'll definitely be the most popular mascot here!
但说实话，这家伙真是不听话。普通的忆域迷因都很好控制，但这怪物无论如何都不愿听从命令。真担心这家伙会跑掉啊……
But honestly, this guy just won't listen. Typical Memory Zone Memes are pretty easy to control, but this one just won't heed any warnings at all. I'm worried it might run off...
我们曾给流萤小姐发过邀请…很遗憾，她的身体情况暂不支持如此激烈的运动。
We once sent Ms. Firefly an invitation... A shame that her physical condition prevents her from participating in such an intense sporting event.
还好那位导演的技艺高超，仅凭几段记忆就创造出了她的影像，如同本人一般栩栩如生！
Thankfully, the director's skills were great, and he managed to simulate her likeness just from a few memory segments. It looks just like her!
哦！那是一位伟大的导演，人们都叫他「芮克先生」。
Oh! That great director. People call him "Mr. Reca."
他有着卓越的审美和魔法般的技艺，只是性格有些古怪……
He has outstanding taste in aesthetics and almost supernatural skill. It's just that he can be a bit eccentric...
谁？我好像从没听过这个名字。
Who? I don't think I've heard of him.
既然是无名的英雄，没人记得他的名字也很正常啊。
Well, if he's a nameless hero, then it seems perfectly normal that no one should remember his name.
我没听说过…应该不是什么重要的人物。
Never heard of him... Probably no one important.
Forget it if you've never heard of him.
哈哈，抱歉，我只会记住像你这样闪闪发光的巨星。
Haha. Sorry. I only remember superstars like you.
关于那两个倒霉的员工……
About those two unfortunate staff members...
他们只是受到了惊吓，并无大碍。
They're just in shock. It's nothing serious.
总之，恭喜你又一次夺得了热砂盛典的冠军。
In any case, congrats on clinching the Scorchsand Festival trophy yet again.
愿苏乐达的甜美常伴你左右，愿你的未来如同苏乐达一般香甜美好！
May the sweetness of SoulGlad be with you, and your future be as sweet as SoulGlad!
「我们演下去，片刻间如醉如痴，扮演生命而不想到喝彩。」\n
"We will keep playing our roles, drunken and foolish in the moment, playing at life but never thinking to celebrate it."\n
