「我们演下去，片刻间如醉如痴，扮演生命而不想到喝彩。」
"We will keep playing our roles, drunken and foolish in the moment, playing at life but never thinking to celebrate it."
你怎么知道我喜欢吃这些…谢谢！
How did you know that I had a taste for this... Thanks!
真想坐下来好好品尝一下啊，但现在时间紧急…我们边走边吃吧！
While I'd really like to sit here and sample these, time is of the essence right now... Let's eat while we walk!
警告：并非『主角』的演员擅自步入片场，将会沦为无名的『配角』，以不幸为剧目增彩。
Warning: Non-protagonist actors who trespass on the scene will be demoted to nameless "supporting characters" and will unfortunately not be given any more scenes.
「事到如今，世界仍然充满我们扮演的角色。」
"Even now, the world is still filled with characters that we've played."
So much... this is simply amazing...
I'm sorry. You must have spent a fortune on this!
It's just a token of my appreciation.
匹诺康尼的风波平息之后，下次我再请你吧！
Next meal's on me when Penacony's chaos has been quelled!
Can't fight on an empty stomach.
你说得对…还有更重要的事情等着我们。
You're right... There are more important matters waiting for us.
时间紧急，我们边走边吃吧！
Time is of the essence. Let's eat while we walk!
「雕琢自原始梦境的城市」…前面那个人偶，难道就是爱德华医生的合作伙伴？过去看看吧。
"The city chiseled from the Primordial Dreamscape"... Is that puppet over there the one who collaborates with Dr. Edward? Let me check it out.
「…未知之形令人驻足，莫测之影翩翩起舞。」
"...The unknown forms are captivating, and the elusive shadows dance gracefully."
「万物将以毁灭之名重新苏生，于终末之际、于终末之崖……」
"Everything shall be reborn in the name of Destruction... at the moment of Finality and atop Finality's cliff..."
我是「终末」的循迹者，你可以叫我「悼亡诗」。
I seek the traces of Finality. You can call me Elegy.
你终于来了…直视「末日」之人——{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。我在此恭候多时了。
Finally, you're here... {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} — the one who looked at the Apocalypse in the eye. I've been waiting for you for a long time.
黑纱覆面的人偶并未摆出什么动作，但你仿佛感觉她向你轻微欠身。
The puppet wearing a black veil over her face doesn't move, yet you somehow feel that she gave you a small curtsy.
比你想象的久，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
I've known you for longer than you can imagine, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
我从你的「终末」而来，追寻无形的{RUBY_B#溯洄者}储君{RUBY_E#}。
I come from your Finality in search of the {RUBY_B#one against the current}shapeless prince{RUBY_E#}.
Why are you dressed in mourning attire?
因为我是为凋亡世界悼念之人。
Because I'm the one who mourns for the dying world.
时间逆流而上，世界每时每刻都在变得愈发支离破碎——我为此而服丧。
Time is flowing backward, and the world becomes increasingly fragmented every moment in — that's what I mourn for.
你来到此处，是为了那些「末日幻影」，对吧？
You're here for those Apocalyptic Shadows, right?
你为爱德华医生制作梦泡？
Do you make dream bubbles for Dr. Edward?
可以这样理解。但我与爱德华医生有着不同的终点，只在{RUBY_B#时间交错之处}此刻{RUBY_E#}各取所需。
You can see it that way, but Dr. Edward and I have different destinations. We only complement each other's needs {RUBY_B#where time intersects}at this moment{RUBY_E#}.
我游走于每个文明湮灭的瞬间，循迹无数灭亡世界的讯息。而爱德华医生则更看重这些来自踪迹带来的…「商业价值」。

I travel between civilizations at the moment of their obliteration and track down intelligence from countless annihilated worlds. As for Dr. Edward, he attaches more importance to the... "commercial value" of these traces.
Are you a Messenger from the Garden of Recollection?
不，我悼念的并不是{RUBY_B#终将}早已{RUBY_E#}毁灭的世界，我是在悼念注定走向「终末」的{RUBY_B#往昔}未来{RUBY_E#}。
No, I'm not mourning the worlds that are {RUBY_B#eventually}already{RUBY_E#} destroyed, but the {RUBY_B#past}future{RUBY_E#} that is destined to reach to Finality.
求索「终末」的踪迹——这便是我等「葬仪知宾」的使命。
Seeking traces of Finality... That is the calling of us Creed Exequies.
{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，记忆是梦境的温床。您经历过无数生死攸关的死斗，那些死斗的背后都存在着潜在的「终末」。也许那其中就藏着「终末」的踪迹。

{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, memory is the breeding ground of dreams. Behind each of the many do-or-die battles you have experienced lies a potential Finality. The traces of Finality can probably be found therein.
作为交换，我也会给予您丰厚的回报，作为协助我的报酬。不知您是否愿意将那些{RUBY_B#未来}往昔{RUBY_E#}的梦境分享于我呢？
I'll reward you generously for your help. Would you be willing to share your {RUBY_B#future}past{RUBY_E#} dreams with me?
闭上双眼，请让我为你溯洄，「终末」的投影……
Please close your eyes and let me help you with the backtracking to see Finality's projection...
你闭上双眼，耳边响起送葬的哀歌。即使是联觉信标，也无法告诉你那些歌词的真实含义。你感到自己逐渐下沉，远离真实世界，但过去擦肩而过的死亡，却逐渐迫近。

You close your eyes and hear an elegy. Even the Synesthesia Beacon can't fathom the meaning of the lyrics. You can feel yourself sinking, getting further away from the real world. However, you find the deaths you once narrowly escaped drawing closer.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
我会在这里继续等待，直到你做好准备。
I'll continue my wait here until you are fully prepared.
{NICKNAME}，你是否已经做好准备凝视「终末」的投影了？
{NICKNAME}, are you ready to gaze at the projection of Finality?
闭上双眼，请让我为你溯洄，「终末」的投影……
Please close your eyes and let me help you with the backtracking to see Finality's projection...
你闭上双眼，耳边响起送葬的哀歌。即使是联觉新标，也无法告诉你那些歌词的真实含义。你感到自己逐渐下沉，远离真实世界，但过去擦肩而过的死亡，却逐渐迫近。

You close your eyes and hear an elegy. Even the Synesthesia Beacon can't fathom the meaning of the lyrics. You can feel yourself sinking, getting further away from the real world. However, you find the deaths you once narrowly escaped drawing closer.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
我会在这里继续等待，直到你做好准备。
I'll continue my wait here until you are fully prepared.
…你所经历的绝境，虽然未能让「终末」降临，却令祂的话语不再是呢喃，愈发清晰。
...Although the desperate crises you have experienced did not bring about the Finality, it has made THEIR mumbling much clearer.
这场战斗当时也没这么难啊？
This battle didn't feel so intense at that time.
因为真实的体验遭到了潜意识的篡改。最为恐怖的体验并非存在于外部世界，而诞生于灵魂中。
Your subconscious has tampered with the real experience. The most terrifying experiences do not exist in the outside world but within one's soul.
在刚才的某个瞬间，我确实地捕捉到了祂的呢喃。祂说，你{RUBY_B#已}将{RUBY_E#}与祂同行。就在{RUBY_B#不远的过去}不久的将来{RUBY_E#}。
At some point in time earlier, I definitely caught THEIR murmuring. THEY said you {RUBY_B#had joined}would join{RUBY_E#} THEM in THEIR journey {RUBY_B#not too long ago}in the near future{RUBY_E#}.
Because you have received THEIR grace.
你所行之处，伴随着祂的凝视。你所践行的，也是祂{RUBY_B#尚未}早已{RUBY_E#}宣告的谶语。繁星是祂的眼，微风是祂的手。你罹受的每场灾祸，皆是「终末」的启示。

Wherever you walk, you are under THEIR gaze. What you practice is also THEIR prophecy that has {RUBY_B#yet to be}already been{RUBY_E#} announced. The stars are THEIR eyes, and the breeze is THEIR hands. Every disaster that befalls you is a revelation of Finality.
我也奉行承诺，给予你相应的报酬…如果可以的话，还请您继续协助我。那些末日图景，能帮助我继续追寻无形的{RUBY_B#溯洄者}储君{RUBY_E#}。
I'll reward you as promised... If possible, please continue assisting me. Those images of the apocalypse can help my search for the {RUBY_B#one against the current}shapeless prince{RUBY_E#}.
{NICKNAME}，你是否已经做好准备凝视「终末」的投影了？
{NICKNAME}, are you ready to gaze at the projection of Finality?
你还搜集了哪些末日的忆泡？
What other Memory Bubbles of the apocalypse are in your collection?
I've got a few questions I'd like to ask you...
我是「葬仪知宾」——是凋亡世界的记录者，亦是求索终末的循迹者。
I'm a Creed Exequy — the chronicler of the dying world, as well as the seeker of the traces of Finality.
迎接命定的邂逅，然后向无形的{RUBY_B#溯洄者}储君{RUBY_E#}发问——
To welcome my fated encounter. Then, I'll ask the {RUBY_B#one against the current}shapeless prince{RUBY_E#} some questions.
「如果祂想终结一切，为何向过去预警？如果祂想拯救一切，为何带来末日？如果一切终归寂灭，那我们存在的意义是什么？」

"Why send warnings to the past if THEY want to end everything? Why bring about the apocalypse if THEY want to salvage everything? What is the meaning of our existence if everything is bound to be reduced to nothingness in the end?"
祂是执掌「终末」的神明，从未来逆时而行。祂会出现于每个「终末」的瞬间，带来{RUBY_B#往昔的记录}未来的预言{RUBY_E#}。
THEY are the god of Finality, traveling against time from the future. THEY appear at every moment of Finality, bringing {RUBY_B#records of the past}prophecies of the future{RUBY_E#}.
Is Finality the end of everything?
不，「终末」令琥珀崩裂、永生枯败、旋律喑哑、光矢黯淡、黑日只余灰烬、酒馆落满灰尘——即使毁灭本身，亦不能免于毁灭。

No. Finality causes amber to rupture, immortality to wither, music to mute, light arrows to dim, the Dark Sun to be reduced to ashes, and the Tavern to be covered in dust. Even Destruction itself cannot be spared from destruction.
然而「终末」并非一切的终点。万事万物将由此始发，前往下一场「终末」。
Yet, Finality isn't the end of everything. All things will originate from there and move on to the next Finality.
I've got something else to do.
悼亡诗沉默不语，身形几乎融入蜿蜒的影子中。
Elegy falls silent, their figure almost merging into the winding shadows.
你还搜集了哪些末日的忆泡？
What other Memory Bubbles of the apocalypse are in your collection?
我亲眼见证的末日么…让我想想。
The apocalypse I've witnessed myself? Let me think.
尼斯的人们偶尔会想起那个海洋耸立而起，吞下他们文明的日子。
From time to time, the people of Neese will recall the day the towering waves rose from the ocean and engulfed their civilization.
他们就像放肆的孩子，以为能永远逃离母亲的管束。
Like mischievous children, they thought they could escape their mother's control forever.
但当他们渴求海中的钢铁，燃烧起苍蓝的火焰，为了采掘而融化极地冰山时。
But when they ignited azure flames and melted the snow on the arctic mountains to mine the iron in the ocean...
母亲的怀抱重新淹没了他们。
Their mother's embrace drowned them once again.
只是这次的怀抱却并不温柔。
But this time, her embrace wasn't a gentle one.
你还搜集了哪些末日的忆泡？
What other Memory Bubbles of the apocalypse are in your collection?
我亲眼见证的末日么…让我想想。
The apocalypse I've witnessed myself? Let me think.
践行巡猎的仙舟追逐着丰饶赐福的子民，殊不知这最后的追逐却落入了精心布置的圈套。
The Xianzhou that follows The Hunt pursued those who were blessed by Abundance, only to find themselves falling into a carefully laid trap.
活体的赤红星宿笼罩在孤舟的穹顶，随着活物一般的搏动裂开了筋肉枯蔓构成的外壳，舟体被彻底包裹。
The living crimson star hovered in the sky over the singular ship. It pulsated like a living creature, causing the shell formed by flesh and withered vines to crack before enveloping the entire ship.
赤红的星辰如同巨兽的反刍的胃囊，也如同血肉铸造的温床滋生污秽。
The crimson star was akin to a behemoth's stomach in charge of regurgitation, as well as a hotbed of corruption made of flesh.
此刻，每个被吞噬的仙舟人只有一个诉求——死亡。
At that moment, every Xianzhou native who was swallowed had only one wish — death.
长生的赐福却成了诅咒。仙舟之民在反复的吞吐中经历无数次融解重构。
The blessing of immortality turned into a curse. The Xianzhou people underwent countless cycles of dissolution and re-structure in the repeated regurgitation.
最终个体意义不复存在，不死的赐福让敌我彼此也融合为一。
Ultimately, the concept of "individuals" is lost. The blessing of immortality joined friends and foes into one.
你还搜集了哪些末日的忆泡？
What other Memory Bubbles of the apocalypse are in your collection?
我亲眼见证的末日么…让我想想。
The apocalypse I've witnessed myself? Let me think.
边陲星系札乌姆，曾隶属于星际和平公司的物流路线的天体。
Zaum was once a border star system on an IPC logistic route.
受命运眷顾，他们出了一位先知。先知将不属于这个时代的知识带给了札乌姆，自此，被科技武装的他们有资格与公司坐在谈判桌上。

Blessed by luck, a prophet emerged, bringing knowledge ahead of the star system's time to Zaum. Starting from then, they had been equipped with cutting-edge technology that put them on the negotiation table with the IPC.
只是先知不知道，他开启的是封印灾难的箱子。
Unbeknownst to the prophet, he had opened a Pandora's box.
公司不会放任物流链中的一个星系能有资格与他们讨价还价。于是刺杀、离间、煽动对立等手段让这个星球的民众彼此枪口相向。

The IPC wouldn't give any star system in their logistics chain any room for horse-trading. By way of assassination, sowing discord, and inciting division, the IPC turned the people of Zaum against each other.
然而札乌姆并不是只有战争一种顽疾。凭空出现的灰色浪潮如同瘟疫蔓延。两个对立政权则彼此怀疑对方使用了违禁的超自然武器。

Yet, war wasn't the only bane Zaum was facing. A gray tide that emerged out of nowhere started spreading like a plague. Two opposing political forces suspected each other of using forbidden supernatural weapons.
一段时间后，所有人发现，能夺走一切活性的灰色浪潮，是针对整个星球的无差别疾病。
After some time, it came to the people's realization that the gray tide that left everything lifeless was a disease that afflicted all indiscriminately.
其实，灰潮产生于人祸。先知篡改历史后，消失的世界线凝结成海啸般的混沌忆质。只是谁也不愿意直面症结所在。

The truth is, the gray tide was a calamity caused by human folly. After the prophet altered history, the disappeared timelines condensed into a tsunami-like muddled memoria. Yet, no one was bold enough to directly address the underlying issue.
即使先知被刺杀，也并未能终止纠纷。一个充盈混沌忆质的洞，凭空地出现在两个政权的交界地上。
Even the assassination of the prophet wasn't enough to quell the chaos. A cavity filled with chaotic memoria appeared out of nowhere at the border between the two opposing forces.
究竟是谁最先发射了导弹已经无从考据了。人们只记得，明明本意终止忆质灾祸的飞弹却成了这场旷日持久战争的导火索。

There was no way to verify who first fired the missile. People only remember that the missile, originally intended to subdue the disaster of the memoria, became what started the prolonged war thereafter.
战火持续了两个琥珀纪，已知的国家最后只成为了地理概念。
The war lasted for two Amber Eras. Eventually, the established nation was reduced to a mere geographical concept.
这个世界幸运被透支。虽然没毁于战火，却溺毙在灰色的海啸中。
The world had overdrawn its fortune. It wasn't destroyed by the war but was drowned in the gray tsunami waves.
在灭亡前的人们也无意追责究竟是哪一方的错。只知道那个美好的世界早已一去不返。
With obliteration looming large, people couldn't care less to point fingers. The only thing they were certain was that the beautiful world would be gone forever.
按照爱德华医生提供的地址，你似乎找到了那位「合作伙伴」。
According to the address that Dr. Edward provided, you seem to have found that supposed "business partner."
你闭上双眼，耳边响起送葬的哀歌。你感到自己逐渐下沉，远离真实世界，但过去擦肩而过的死亡，却逐渐迫近。
You close your eyes and hear an elegy. You can feel yourself sinking, getting further away from the real world. However, you find the deaths you once narrowly escaped drawing closer.
很高兴见到你，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。你的到来就像早春的暖阳，让谬误的积雪尽数消融。
Glad to meet you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}. Your presence brings a warmth akin to the spring sun, melting away the snow of falsehoods.
螺丝咕姆，你怎么在这儿？
天才俱乐部#76螺丝咕姆，模拟宇宙的开发者之一，黑塔应当向你提起过。
I'm Screwllum, Member #76 of the Genius Society and one of the developers of the Simulated Universe. Herta should have mentioned my name to you.
逻辑：我想以个人名义邀请你参与一场思想实验。
Logic: I'd like to personally invite you to a thought experiment.
以模拟宇宙的底层逻辑为基础，螺丝星的技术为载体，我编写了「差分宇宙」，作为分支项目为模拟宇宙承担一些独立的研究。

Utilizing the Simulated Universe's underlying logic and the Planet Screwllum technology, I have created the Divergent Universe as a branch project for independent research regarding the Simulated Universe.
当前，差分宇宙正在运行某位博识学会的学者提出的课题。结论：思想的碰撞总是令人喜悦，我乐于见到更多学术伙伴。

Currently, the Divergent Universe is exploring a topic proposed by a certain scholar from the Intelligentsia Guild. Conclusion: It is always a delight to see a clash of thoughts, and I am pleased to have more research partners.
请容我暂时保留答案，为故事点缀上些许神秘的花朵不失为一种浪漫。
Please allow me to keep the answer hidden from you, as a touch of mystery adds charm to the tale.
Is there such a talented scholar in the Guild?
智慧的原野上不止有「天才」的大树，每一朵花蕾的存在都不可或缺。
Wisdom's realm extends beyond the towering individual trees known geniuses. Each unassuming flower bud is essential.
请跟我来吧。因为空间站是黑塔的私人财产，差分宇宙的测试场所另在他处。为此，我动用了一些「银河贵宾」的特权。
Now, please come with me. Since the space station is Herta's personal asset, I have arranged the test site for the Divergent Universe elsewhere, utilizing some of my "Cosmic VIP" privileges.
「盛会之星」匹诺康尼，希望你会喜欢。
Welcome to Penacony, the Planet of Festivities. I hope you find it enjoyable.
你登上螺丝咕姆的舰船，来到金碧辉煌的梦之国度。一艘巨大的飞艇飘浮在忆质之海上，宛如一只初醒的飞鸟，在梦中荡起层层涟漪。
You board the Screwllum's ship, entering a dream realm of glittering splendor. A colossal airship floats on an ocean of memoria, like a bird awakening, stirring ripples through the dream.
当然，它现在的名字，应该是—— {TEXTJOIN#87}。
But of course, its current name is — {TEXTJOIN#87}.
我们到了。梦想之地的风景总是令人眼花缭乱，博识学会的那位先生对此颇有怨词。
Here we are. The scenery in the Land of the Dreams is always captivating, although that gentleman from the Intelligentsia Guild did not find it to suit his tastes.
我曾向他发出邀请，希望他能作为博识学会的代表，为天才们的研究增添一些外来血液。结论：他拒绝了。
I once invited him to bring fresh perspectives to the research conducted by the geniuses as a representative of the Intelligentsia Guild. Conclusion: He declined.
在交流中，这位先生提出了一个优美的类比：星神和凡人就像函数方程式的两端，只需解明一端的未知数，就能求出另一端的答案。

During our discussion, that gentleman offered a beautiful analogy: Aeons and mortals are like the two ends of a functional equation. By solving the unknowns at one end, we can discover the answer at the other.
寻索星神的记录如大海捞针，凡人的故事则遍地开花。他认为比起诉诸众神，命途上芸芸众生的足迹才是通往真理的不二法门。

The records of the Aeons are scarce, while the stories of mortals are abundant. He believes that rather than seeking the Aeons, following the traces left by ordinary people on the Paths is a better way to seek the truth.
「数百个琥珀纪以来，烛墨学派收集了大量的史料，它们完全公开。但仰望星空的『天才』们大概无暇关注这些在沟壑里腐烂的历史残渣。」

"Over countless Amber Eras, the Candelagraphos has amassed a wealth of historical material, openly accessible. However, the geniuses busy gazing at the stars might not spare any time to delve into these remnants of history rotting in the gutters of time."
这位先生的建议虽有些刺耳，但不无道理。
While that gentleman's suggestion may sound harsh, it is not without merit.
当然，黑塔表达了截然相反的看法。但那道神与人的方程式，就像是获得了生命一般在我的灵感回路中无限地蔓延、如花瓣展开。
Naturally, Herta expressed an opposing view. However, that potential equation of gods and mortals, as if imbued with life, expanded infinitely like petals within my circuits of inspiration.
借由把烛墨学派的档案引入差分宇宙的沙盒，以「凡人」作为演算的跟踪目标，构建出命途的模型，我将这一课题命名为：「人间喜剧」。

By incorporating the archives from the Candelagraphos into the sandbox for the Divergent Universe and by using "mortals" as the focus of the extrapolation, I have constructed models for Paths and named this research project "The Human Comedy."
我很期待，你会为这场思想实验带来怎样的新火花。这边请，朋友。
I eagerly await what new insights you will bring to this thought experiment. Please follow me, my friend.
我似乎变成了另一个人…
Felt like I became someone else...
星神向世间投下祝福，凡人也在命途的道路中向上攀登。在方程式的推演中，这些蛛网般的轨迹会在特定的位置交汇，获得单一的输出结果：一位具象化的命途行者。

The Aeons bestow their blessings upon the world, while mortals ascend various Paths. Through the extrapolation of equations, these web-like trajectories will converge at specific points to generate a singular result — a materialized Pathstrider.
我将你的意识分离成两部分，其一作为在命途上行走的「自我」，在演算中走向相异的结点；其二作为锚定认知的「他者」，化身观测者飘浮在上层。

I have divided your consciousness into two parts: One as the Ego, traversing the Path and progressing towards distinct nodes in the algorithm. The second as the Other, becoming an observer that floats on a higher level.
这样处理，既可以保障「方程」不会扰乱你的主体意识，也可最大限度地保持中立，实现完整的推演。
This approach ensures that your consciousness remains undisturbed by my "equations" while maximizing your objectivity for complete extrapolations.
星神和凡人，命途平等地束缚着等号的两端，为他们戴上镣铐。逻辑：从这一角度分析，二者确实具备同等的价值。但若要问谁才是解开谜题的关键……

Aeons and mortals... Paths constrain these two ends of the equal sign and shackle them both without bias. Logic: When analyzed from this perspective, they indeed both hold equal value. However, if asked which one holds the key to solving the puzzle...
回答：我不知道，也无需做出定论。
Answer: I don't know, and I don't need to provide a conclusion.
我并不奢求这一课题能在「差分宇宙」中得到解答。毕竟，真理向来沉默寡言。
I don't dare to hope of finding the answer within the Divergent Universe. After all, truth has always been reticent.
但我仍对它的未来抱有着类似有机生命「期盼」的态度，因为我能从中感受到美妙的存在。
Nonetheless, I still possess an attitude similar to the organic beings' concept of "hope" for its future, as I have sensed remarkable entities within it.
如果可以，希望你能为差分宇宙提供更多变量，仅是我作为朋友的邀请。
If possible, I hope you will introduce more variables to the Divergent Universe, as a request from your friend.
系统收录了你的身份，以后你随时可以登录「差分宇宙」进行测试。
Your identity has been registered in the system. Please feel free to log into the Divergent Universe at any future time for testing purposes.
这场实验会持续相当长的时间，很抱歉不能留在此地与你共勉。但请相信，我会时刻关注你的动态。
This experiment will last for a considerable duration, and I apologize for not being able to remain by your side. However, please be assured that I will be monitoring your progress constantly.
参与学术研究的酬劳将按照特级研究助理的待遇定期支付。当然，与你为研究提供的帮助相比，不过是太阳面前的些许微尘罢了。

Compensation for your participation in the research will be provided regularly, equivalent to the rate of a class-A research assistant. Of course, it pales in comparison to the immense assistance you provide.
Thank you for your generosity, boss!
作为回礼，我也该给那位「合作伙伴」准备些礼物。
As a gesture of goodwill, I should prepare something for my "partner" in return.
Gift him a birthday lotus flower.
Gift him a Casket of Inaccuracy.
感谢你的建议，我会考虑的。
Thank you for your suggestion. I will take it into account.
不过，关于烛墨学派的公开数据库，那位先生其实弄错了一点。我和这批资料的接触时间，比他想象中要早上许多。
However, regarding the public database of the Candelagraphos, that gentleman was mistaken about one thing: I had come into those documents much earlier than he presumed.
那时第二次帝皇战争的余波尚未平息，宇宙间充满着针对无机生命的仇视。
At that time, the aftermath of the Second Emperor's War had not yet settled, and the universe seethed with hatred against inorganic beings.
于是我找到这些记录，将它作为量化分析的样本。通过对人类行为的推演，让剑拔弩张的双方放下了武器。
Thus, I discovered those records and used them as samples for my quantitative analyses. By extrapolating human behavior, I managed to persuade both factions to lay down their weapons.
的确——在当时的我看来，这些无可计数的故事只是构成「有机生命」的数字，就像是程序里的0和1。
I must admit that, at the time, those countless stories to me were mere numbers constituting "organic beings," similar to the 0s and 1s in our programs.
但唯有用亲历者的视角观测，才能明白这每一个名字背后的意义有多么沉重。
However, the true weight and significance behind those names can only be comprehended when experienced firsthand.
在星神的交响乐里，仍有那么多音符在不间断地演奏着，独属于凡人的赞美诗。
Within the symphony of the Aeons, numerous notes still play uninterrupted, hymns exclusively for mortals.
一想到正在运转的我们也是这首长诗的一部分，就连我的「内心」也不可抑制地跳动了起来。
The realization that we, who are churning along in our lives, are also integral parts of this extensive hymn, makes even my "heart" pound with unstoppable impulses.
这场实验会持续相当长的时间，很抱歉不能留在此地与你共勉。但请相信，我会时刻关注你的动态。
This experiment will last for a considerable duration, and I apologize for not being able to remain by your side. However, please be assured that I will be monitoring your progress constantly.
体验还顺利吗？{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
The experience went smoothly, I assume, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
哪怕蝴蝶的翅膀足以撼动飓风，它的美丽也需草木点缀。在你测试期间，我借用「差分宇宙」的资源为{TEXTJOIN#87}大厅增添了些许装饰。

Even if the wings of butterflies can sway a hurricane, its beauty needs to be adorned with foliage and flora. During your test, I borrowed the Divergent Universe's resources and spruced up {TEXTJOIN#87} lobby.
在许多学术观点中，「艺术」是独属于有机生命的认知，一如这绚烂瑰丽的迷梦。
From many academic perspectives, art is a perception reserved exclusively for organic life, just like this splendorous dream.
而依我之见，尽管这一概念诞生自有机体的主观感受，但艺术的殿堂自身并不拒绝任何一位来客。
In my opinion, even if this concept was borne of a subjective feeling of organic life, the pantheon of art does not discriminate against any of its guests.
提议：用你的双手亲自布设这些藏品，装点这段追寻凡人的旅路。
Suggestion: Use both your hands to arrange these art pieces, to adorn this voyage of the mortal pursuit.
在藏品展台外，这里还有不少空白的画框。
There are also plenty of painting frames by the art display.
这是另一件趣事：你在测试中邂逅的故事，会被系统截取成切片，并以画作的形式记录下来。
Here's another interesting tidbit: The stories you've encountered during the test will be extracted in section by the system, then recorded in the form of a painting.
你同样可以依照自己的意志，决定它们的展示位置。
You agree to decide their display placement as you deem fit.
这些在千万可能性中交汇的故事，总有一天会装满这座艺术馆。
These intersecting anecdotes of infinitesimal odds will one day fill this entire art gallery.
统计：从有机生物的心理学角度分析，对艺术的排列组合可以反映个体的个性和思维模式。
Assessment: From the analysis of organic life's psychological perspective, the sequence of the art pieces will reflect one's personality and mode of thinking.
经由你产生的变量，它们会呈现出怎样的形态，我很期待。
I very much look forward to the variables that you will generate, and the shape or form in which they may present themselves.
让时间回到三月七刚开始学剑的时候……
Turning back the clock to when March 7th had just begun studying swordplay...
既然三月小姐已经到位，那我们就开始今日的教学吧。
Alright, now that you're in position, Miss March, let's get this lesson started.
我不擅长摆什么师父架子，既然爷爷叫我来教你习剑，我绝不藏私。
I'm not good at acting all master-like. Since Grandpa asked me to teach you swordplay, I won't hold back any secrets.
哪里哪里，两位师父客气了。欸，等等，咱们的教学现在才算是正式开始吗？
Thank you so much, masters. Oh, wait, does this mean our training is only officially starting right now?
毕竟观察了你前几日的练习之后，我们才能判断出你的资质嘛。
After all, we need to watch you practice for a few days before we can figure out how talented you are, right?
师父师父，我的资质如何呢？
三月小姐天资聪颖，有学剑的天赋。
欸，{NICKNAME}你来了，听到了吗？两位师父说我是学剑的天才。
Hey, here you are, {NICKNAME}! Did you hear that? These two masters just called me a swordplay genius.
确实，不愧是咱家的三月七。
嘿嘿，我要是学成回去，大家还不得对我刮目相看。
Hehe, just wait until I go back, everyone's going to be so wowed by my new skills.
三月，要当心仙舟的客套话。
Watch out for the overly generous Xianzhou social niceties, March.
Oh, you're right! I almost got all excited for nothing.
我是有话直说的。放心吧，你是真有天赋。
I'm just speaking my mind. Trust me, you're really talented.
嘿嘿，{NICKNAME}你听你听，我是真的天才！
Did you hear that, {NICKNAME}? I'm truly a genius!
剑术修行从来都是苦修，三月小姐既然决心习剑，就得在正式修行前找到能够让自己坚持下去的理由，这个理由可大可小，但是不可暧昧不清。

Swordplay requires rigorous training. Before we start, Miss March, you need to find a clear reason to keep you motivated while you train. It doesn't have to be something huge, but it needs to be clear.
换句话说，虽然成为徒弟的过程是挺被动的，但是学习的过程你得主动一些。
In other words, even though you didn't exactly choose to be our apprentice, you still need to take the initiative during this learning process.
彦卿曾经有幸与一名剑术高手同行论剑，她问我小小年纪为何踏上习剑之路，为何挥剑…今日第一课，我也想从这个问题开始——

I once had the honor of learning swordplay from a master. She asked me why I started training at such a young age, why I wielded a sword... So, for our first lesson, I'd like to ask you the same question...
Miss March, why do you wield your sword?
为何挥剑…我挥剑是为了击倒敌人！难道不是吗？
Why do I wield my sword...? I wield my sword to take down my enemies! I mean what other reason is there?
我也曾问过那名剑术高手为何挥剑，她说「为杀敌而挥剑，仅此而已」。三月小姐竟然给出了相似的回复，看来你确有天赋。
I also questioned that sword master about why she uses her sword, and she said: "...to vanquish my enemies, nothing more." Miss March, you gave a similar response, which shows you've got potential.
击倒对手的方法要多少有多少。
There are countless ways to take down enemies.
只想击倒敌人的话用弓也可以。
If you just want to defeat your enemies, you can stick to your bow.
「要想击倒对方，最好的办法就是用爆能枪。」我在幻戏里听过类似的话！大侠还说习剑能将人的体能推向最高的极限。

"The best way to take down your enemy is with a blaster gun." I heard a hero say something like that in an immersia! He also mentioned that sword training can push a person's physical abilities to their ultimate limit.
看来三月小姐没少看幻戏。不过在彦卿看来，三月小姐若是以「提升自己」为目标，学成之后即便放下剑再拾起弓，你一样会感到学有所成。

Seems like you've seen your fair share of immersia, Miss March. But if you want my opinion, if your goal is self-improvement, you'll feel just as accomplished even if you put down the sword and go back to your bow.
别听彦卿那些虚头巴脑的鸡汤了。
Oh, come on, don't listen to his empty talk.
哦？我倒要听听云璃大师有什么高见……
Oh? Now I'm curious to hear what Master Yunli has to say...
三月，我问你，你学剑有没有什么具体可实现的目标呢？比如在演武仪典上拿到个什么段位或者名次？有没有想要战胜的人，比如彦卿、或者是我？
Let me ask you something, March. Do you have any specific goals for learning swordplay, like achieving a certain ranking in the Wardance? Or maybe you want to defeat someone, like Yanqing or me?
我要战胜谁呢…{NICKNAME}？丹恒？姬子姐姐？杨叔？
Who do I want to defeat...? {NICKNAME}? Dan Heng? Himeko? Or Mr. Yang?
…要是想不到具体的人，不如把目标设定得简单一些，比如用剑能同时打倒多少个对手？
...If you can't think of anyone specific, why not set a simpler goal? Like how many opponents do you want to defeat at once with a sword?
啊啊啊，其实「我要打十个！」也是幻戏里的台词，不小心就脱口而出了……

你这人满脑子都是幻戏呢。
...Yeah, I really like them, so what.
对面场上有五个就已是极限了。
Having five enemies on the other side of the battlefield is the limit.
...I have no idea what you're talking about.

你们这么一说，有道理欸！

本姑娘对仙舟幻戏、小说，都很感兴趣的！我虽然是用弓箭的，但是幻戏里的大侠几乎全都是用剑的，我也想成为那样的大侠！
I'm super interested in Xianzhou immersia and novels! Even though I use a bow, almost all the great heroes in those immersia use swords, so I want to be a swordmaster too!
感觉这是你对大侠的偏见。

...It doesn't matter. Everyone has their own preferences.
用来激励自己学剑的好理由！
Sounds like a great reason to stay motivated!
对吧对吧，你就说谁的心里没有一个剑侠梦呢？
You agree, right? I mean, who wouldn't want to be a swordmaster?
成为仗剑天涯、磊落坦荡的大侠…这倒是个能勉励习剑的理由。
